post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_b.heading_zh: 批量查询亚马逊搜索量 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_bulk_search_volume_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_b.desc_en: Returns Amazon search volume for a batch of keywords in a single request, so you can size demand across many keywords at once for the given location and language.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_b.description_zh: 单次请求为一批关键词返回 Amazon 搜索量,便于在指定地区与语言下一次性衡量多个关键词的需求规模。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_p.heading_zh: 查询亚马逊商品关键词交集 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_product_keyword_intersections_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_p.desc_en: Returns the keywords for which the supplied Amazon products appear together in the same SERP, along with each product's SERP element per keyword, revealing where multiple ASINs compete or co-rank.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_p.description_zh: 返回所传 Amazon 商品在同一 SERP 中共同出现的关键词,并给出每个关键词下各商品的 SERP 元素,揭示多个 ASIN 在何处竞争或同台排名。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_r.heading_zh: 查询亚马逊商品排名关键词 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_ranked_keywords_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_r.desc_en: Returns the keywords a target ASIN ranks for in Amazon SERPs, each with keyword metrics and the product's ranking SERP element, for the given location and language.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_r.description_zh: 返回目标 ASIN 在 Amazon SERP 中有排名的关键词,每个关键词附带关键词指标及该商品的排名 SERP 元素,按指定地区与语言限定。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_ap.heading_zh: 查询 App Store 应用竞品 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_app_competitors_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_ap.desc_en: Returns the apps that compete with a target App Store app across its ranking keywords, including each competitor's app ID and ranking metrics over the shared keywords.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_ap.description_zh: 返回在 App Store 上与目标应用争夺相同排名关键词的竞品应用,包含各竞品的应用 ID 及在共有关键词上的排名指标。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_bu.heading_zh: 批量查询 App Store 应用指标 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_bulk_app_metrics_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_bu.desc_en: Returns App Store SERP ranking metrics for a batch of target apps in one request, letting you compare how multiple apps perform across their ranking keywords within one location and language.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_bu.description_zh: 单次请求为一批目标应用返回 App Store SERP 排名指标,便于在同一地区、语言下横向对比多个应用在其排名关键词上的表现。

get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_available.desc_en: Returns the full list of fields usable in the filters and order_by parameters, grouped by the endpoint they apply to. Call it to discover which fields each DataForSEO Labs endpoint supports for filtering and sorting.
get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_available.description_zh: 返回可用于 filters 与 order_by 参数的全部字段清单,并按其适用的接口分组。可借此查明各 DataForSEO Labs 接口支持哪些字段进行筛选与排序。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_a.heading_zh: 查询 Google Play 应用关键词交集 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_app_intersection_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_a.desc_en: Returns the keywords for which several Google Play apps appear together in the same SERP, revealing the keyword overlap among the apps you supply in app_ids.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_a.description_zh: 返回多个 Google Play 应用在同一 SERP 中共同出现的关键词,揭示 app_ids 中所列应用之间的关键词重叠。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_b.heading_zh: 批量查询 Google Play 应用指标 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_bulk_app_metrics_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_b.desc_en: Returns Google Play SERP ranking metrics for a batch of target apps in one request, letting you compare how multiple apps perform across their ranking keywords within one location and language.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_b.description_zh: 单次请求为一批目标应用返回 Google Play SERP 排名指标,便于在同一地区、语言下横向对比多个应用在其排名关键词上的表现。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_b.desc_en: Returns estimated monthly Google search traffic for a batch of target domains, broken down by SERP result type, so you can compare traffic across many domains in one request.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_b.description_zh: 为一批目标域名返回 Google 搜索的估算月度流量,并按 SERP 结果类型拆分,便于单次请求横向比较多个域名的流量。

get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_ca.heading_zh: 查询关键词类目可用语言 get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_categories_for_keywords_languages
get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_ca.desc_en: Returns the languages supported by the Categories for Keywords endpoint, listing each language's name and code so you can pick a valid language for that endpoint.
get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_ca.description_zh: 返回 Categories for Keywords 接口所支持的语言,列出每种语言的名称与代码,便于为该接口选择有效语言。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_d.desc_en: Returns a domain's ranking distribution across SERP positions plus its estimated monthly organic and paid traffic, summarizing the domain's overall Google search presence.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_d.description_zh: 返回域名在各 SERP 位段的排名分布及其自然与付费的估算月度流量,概括该域名在 Google 搜索中的整体表现。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_h.desc_en: Returns the historical Google Ads metrics for each supplied keyword, including search volume, CPC, and competition over past months, so you can study how a keyword's demand has changed over time.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_h.description_zh: 为每个传入关键词返回其历史 Google Ads 指标,包含过往各月的搜索量、CPC 与竞争度,便于研究关键词需求随时间的变化。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.desc_en: Returns keyword ideas relevant to the seed keywords by drawing on the categories the seeds belong to, each enriched with Google Ads metrics, SERP data, and search history, to expand a topic into a broader keyword set.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.description_zh: 依据种子关键词所属类目返回相关的关键词创意,每个关键词附带 Google Ads 指标、SERP 数据与搜索历史,用于把某个主题扩展为更广的关键词集。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.desc_en: Returns long-tail keyword suggestions that contain the seed keyword, each enriched with Google Ads metrics, SERP data, and search history, to find longer phrases built around the seed term.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.description_zh: 返回包含种子关键词的长尾关键词联想,每个关键词附带 Google Ads 指标、SERP 数据与搜索历史,用于发现围绕种子词构成的更长短语。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.desc_en: Returns relevant keywords that belong to the supplied product and service categories, each enriched with Google Ads metrics, SERP data, and search history, to build a keyword set scoped to chosen categories.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.description_zh: 返回归属于所传产品与服务类目的相关关键词,每个关键词附带 Google Ads 指标、SERP 数据与搜索历史,用于构建限定于所选类目的关键词集。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_r.desc_en: Returns the keywords surfaced in Google's “searches related to” block for a seed keyword, expanded recursively by search depth, each enriched with keyword metrics, to grow a keyword set around a seed term.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_r.description_zh: 返回 Google “相关搜索”模块中与种子关键词相关的关键词,可按搜索深度递归扩展,每个关键词附带关键词指标,用于围绕种子词扩充关键词集。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_s.desc_en: Returns the predicted search intent of each supplied keyword, giving the primary intent label with its probability plus any secondary intents, so you can classify keywords by user intent.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_s.description_zh: 为每个传入关键词返回其预测的搜索意图,给出主意图标签及其概率以及若干次意图,便于按用户意图对关键词分类。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_s.desc_en: Returns the subdomains of a target domain together with each subdomain's ranking distribution and estimated organic and paid traffic, letting you see which subdomains drive the domain's search presence.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_s.description_zh: 返回目标域名的各个子域,并给出每个子域的排名分布及自然与付费的估算流量,便于查看哪些子域支撑了该域名的搜索表现。

get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_status.heading_zh: 查询数据更新状态 get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_status
get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_status.desc_en: Returns the last data-update date for the DataForSEO Labs Google, Bing, and Amazon endpoints, so you can tell how fresh each engine's database is before querying.
get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_status.description_zh: 返回 DataForSEO Labs 中 Google、Bing 与 Amazon 各组接口的最近数据更新日期,便于在查询前了解各引擎数据库的新鲜度。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_p.desc_en: Returns the products that compete with a target ASIN in Amazon SERPs, i.e. listings that rank for the same keywords as the target. Use it to map the competitive landscape of any Amazon listing; results are scoped to the supplied ASIN, location, and language.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_p.description_zh: 返回在 Amazon SERP 中与目标 ASIN 争夺相同关键词的竞品商品,用于梳理某个 Listing 的竞争格局。结果按请求中的 ASIN、地区与语言限定。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_p.heading_zh: 查询亚马逊商品排名概览 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_product_rank_overview_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_p.desc_en: Returns organic and paid Amazon SERP ranking distributions for a batch of target products, letting you compare how multiple ASINs perform side by side within one location and language.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_p.description_zh: 为一批目标商品返回其在 Amazon 自然与付费 SERP 中的排名分布,便于在同一地区、语言下横向对比多个 ASIN 的表现。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_r.heading_zh: 查询亚马逊相关关键词 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_related_keywords_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_r.desc_en: Returns the keywords surfaced in Amazon's “Related Searches” block for a seed keyword, expanded recursively by search depth, to help build out a keyword set around a seed term.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_r.description_zh: 返回 Amazon “Related Searches” 模块中与种子关键词相关的关键词,可按搜索深度递归扩展,用于围绕种子词扩充关键词集。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_ap.heading_zh: 查询 App Store 应用关键词交集 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_app_intersection_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_ap.desc_en: Returns the keywords for which several App Store apps appear together in the same SERP, revealing the keyword overlap among the apps you supply in app_ids.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_ap.description_zh: 返回多个 App Store 应用在同一 SERP 中共同出现的关键词,揭示 app_ids 中所列应用之间的关键词重叠。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_ke.heading_zh: 查询 App Store 应用关键词 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_keywords_for_app_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_ke.desc_en: Returns the keywords a target App Store app ranks for, together with keyword metrics and the app's ranking position for each keyword.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_ke.description_zh: 返回目标 App Store 应用所排名的关键词,并附带关键词指标及该应用在每个关键词下的排名位置。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_a.heading_zh: 查询 Google Play 应用竞品 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_app_competitors_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_a.desc_en: Returns the apps that compete with a target Google Play app across its ranking keywords, including competitor app IDs plus search volume and ranking data on the shared keywords.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_a.description_zh: 返回在 Google Play 上与目标应用争夺相同排名关键词的竞品应用,包含竞品应用 ID 及共有关键词的搜索量与排名数据。

get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_av.desc_en: Returns the list of dates available for the first_date and second_date fields of the Domain Metrics by Categories endpoint. Call it first to learn which historical snapshots can be requested.
get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_av.description_zh: 返回可用于 Domain Metrics by Categories 接口 first_date 与 second_date 字段的日期列表,通常先调用本接口确认可请求的历史快照。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_b.desc_en: Returns the Keyword Difficulty metric for up to 1,000 keywords in a single request, scoring how hard it is to break into the top-10 organic results for each keyword.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_b.description_zh: 单次请求最多为 1000 个关键词返回 Keyword Difficulty 指标,衡量每个关键词进入前 10 自然结果的难度。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_c.desc_en: Returns the Google product and service categories the domain ranks for, along with aggregated ranking and traffic data for the keywords under each category.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_c.description_zh: 返回域名在搜索中有排名关键词所属的 Google 产品与服务类目,并给出各类目下关键词的汇总排名与流量数据。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_c.desc_en: Returns the Google product and service categories associated with each supplied keyword; accepts up to 1,000 keywords per request.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_c.description_zh: 为每个传入关键词返回其关联的 Google 产品与服务类目,单次请求最多支持 1000 个关键词。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_h.heading_zh: 批量查询历史流量估算 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_historical_bulk_traffic_estimation_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_h.desc_en: Returns historical monthly traffic estimates for up to 1,000 domains over a chosen time range (data available from October 2020), broken down by organic, paid, featured snippet, and local pack results.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_h.description_zh: 为最多 1000 个域名返回所选时间范围内的历史月度流量估算(数据自 2020 年 10 月起),并按自然、付费、featured snippet 与 local pack 结果拆分。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_h.desc_en: Returns a domain's historical ranking distribution across SERP positions and its estimated monthly traffic for both organic and paid results over time.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_h.description_zh: 返回域名随时间变化的历史排名分布(各 SERP 位段)及自然与付费结果的月度估算流量。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.desc_en: Returns a comprehensive Google data profile for each supplied keyword, including cost-per-click, paid competition, search volume, search intent, monthly search history, plus SERP and backlink information; optional clickstream metrics are available via include_clickstream_data.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.description_zh: 为每个传入关键词返回完整的 Google 数据画像,涵盖 CPC、付费竞争度、搜索量、搜索意图、月度搜索历史以及 SERP 与外链信息;通过 include_clickstream_data 可附加点击流指标。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.heading_zh: 查询 Google Play 应用关键词 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_keywords_for_app_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.desc_en: Returns the keywords a target Google Play app ranks for, together with keyword metrics and the app's ranking position for each keyword.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.description_zh: 返回目标 Google Play 应用所排名的关键词,并附带关键词指标及该应用在每个关键词下的排名位置。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.desc_en: Returns keywords relevant to a target domain, each enriched with categories, last-month search volume, cost-per-click, paid competition, and the 12-month search volume trend.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.description_zh: 返回与目标域名相关的关键词,每个关键词附带类目、上月搜索量、CPC、付费竞争度以及近 12 个月的搜索量趋势。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_r.desc_en: Returns ranking and traffic data for individual web pages of a target domain, letting you review each page's ranking distribution and estimated monthly traffic from organic and paid search.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_r.description_zh: 返回目标域名各个网页的排名与流量数据,便于审视每个页面的排名分布及来自自然与付费搜索的月度估算流量。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_s.heading_zh: 查询 SERP 竞争域名 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_serp_competitors_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_s.desc_en: Returns the domains ranking for a set of supplied keywords, along with each domain's SERP rankings, rating, estimated traffic, and visibility derived from those keywords.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_s.description_zh: 返回为一组指定关键词排名的域名,并给出各域名基于这些关键词的 SERP 排名、评分、估算流量与可见度。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_t.desc_en: Returns keywords drawn from the DataForSEO Keyword Database (over 7 billion keywords), each supplied with Google Ads metrics, product categories, and Google SERP data, filtered and sorted to your criteria.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_t.description_zh: 从 DataForSEO 关键词数据库(逾 70 亿关键词)返回关键词,每个关键词附带 Google Ads 指标、产品类目及 Google SERP 数据,并按所设条件筛选与排序。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_dataforseo.desc_en: Run a DataForSEO Trends 合并数据 request synchronously and get the data back in the same response, with no separate task to poll.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_dataforseo.description_zh: 以同步方式发起 DataForSEO Trends 合并数据 请求，在同一响应中直接拿到数据，无需另行轮询任务。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_audien.desc_en: Return the reference list of Bing 广告受众估算 supported by the Keywords Data API, used to fill targeting parameters in other endpoints.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_audien.description_zh: 返回 Keywords Data API 支持的 Bing 广告受众估算 参考列表，用于填写其它端点的定向参数。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_audien.desc_en: Return the reference list of Bing 广告受众估算 supported by the Keywords Data API, used to fill targeting parameters in other endpoints.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_audien.description_zh: 返回 Keywords Data API 支持的 Bing 广告受众估算 参考列表，用于填写其它端点的定向参数。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_audie.desc_en: Run a Bing 广告受众估算 request synchronously and get the data back in the same response, with no separate task to poll.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_audie.description_zh: 以同步方式发起 Bing 广告受众估算 请求，在同一响应中直接拿到数据，无需另行轮询任务。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_audien.desc_en: Retrieve the results of a previously queued Bing 广告受众估算 task by its task id.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_audien.description_zh: 按任务 id 取回此前排队的 Bing 广告受众估算 任务结果。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_audie.desc_en: Queue a Bing 广告受众估算 task for asynchronous processing; the response returns a task id you later fetch via the matching task_get endpoint. Optionally set postback_url/pingback_url to be notified on completion.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_audie.description_zh: 提交一个 Bing 广告受众估算 任务异步处理；响应返回任务 id，稍后通过对应的 task_get 端点取回结果。可选地设置 postback_url/pingback_url 以在完成时获得通知。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_audien.desc_en: List completed Bing 广告受众估算 tasks that are ready to be collected via the task_get endpoint.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_audien.description_zh: 列出已完成、可通过 task_get 端点收取的 Bing 广告受众估算 任务。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywo.desc_en: Run a Bing 关键词效果 request synchronously and get the data back in the same response, with no separate task to poll.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywo.description_zh: 以同步方式发起 Bing 关键词效果 请求，在同一响应中直接拿到数据，无需另行轮询任务。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywor.description_zh: 返回 Keywords Data API 支持的 Bing 关键词效果 参考列表，用于填写其它端点的定向参数。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywor.desc_en: Retrieve the results of a previously queued Bing 关键词效果 task by its task id.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywor.description_zh: 按任务 id 取回此前排队的 Bing 关键词效果 任务结果。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywo.desc_en: Queue a Bing 关键词效果 task for asynchronous processing; the response returns a task id you later fetch via the matching task_get endpoint. Optionally set postback_url/pingback_url to be notified on completion.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywo.description_zh: 提交一个 Bing 关键词效果 任务异步处理；响应返回任务 id，稍后通过对应的 task_get 端点取回结果。可选地设置 postback_url/pingback_url 以在完成时获得通知。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywor.description_zh: 返回 Keywords Data API 支持的 Bing URL 关键词建议 参考列表，用于填写其它端点的定向参数。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywor.description_zh: 按任务 id 取回此前排队的 Bing URL 关键词建议 任务结果。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywo.desc_en: Queue a Bing URL 关键词建议 task for asynchronous processing; the response returns a task id you later fetch via the matching task_get endpoint. Optionally set postback_url/pingback_url to be notified on completion.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywo.description_zh: 提交一个 Bing URL 关键词建议 任务异步处理；响应返回任务 id，稍后通过对应的 task_get 端点取回结果。可选地设置 postback_url/pingback_url 以在完成时获得通知。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywor.desc_en: List completed Bing URL 关键词建议 tasks that are ready to be collected via the task_get endpoint.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywor.description_zh: 列出已完成、可通过 task_get 端点收取的 Bing URL 关键词建议 任务。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywo.desc_en: Run a Bing 关键词扩展 request synchronously and get the data back in the same response, with no separate task to poll.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywo.description_zh: 以同步方式发起 Bing 关键词扩展 请求，在同一响应中直接拿到数据，无需另行轮询任务。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywor.description_zh: 按任务 id 取回此前排队的 Bing 关键词扩展 任务结果。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywo.desc_en: Queue a Bing 关键词扩展 task for asynchronous processing; the response returns a task id you later fetch via the matching task_get endpoint. Optionally set postback_url/pingback_url to be notified on completion.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywo.description_zh: 提交一个 Bing 关键词扩展 任务异步处理；响应返回任务 id，稍后通过对应的 task_get 端点取回结果。可选地设置 postback_url/pingback_url 以在完成时获得通知。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywo.desc_en: Run a Bing 站点关键词 request synchronously and get the data back in the same response, with no separate task to poll.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywo.description_zh: 以同步方式发起 Bing 站点关键词 请求，在同一响应中直接拿到数据，无需另行轮询任务。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywor.desc_en: Retrieve the results of a previously queued Bing 站点关键词 task by its task id.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywor.description_zh: 按任务 id 取回此前排队的 Bing 站点关键词 任务结果。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywo.desc_en: Queue a Bing 站点关键词 task for asynchronous processing; the response returns a task id you later fetch via the matching task_get endpoint. Optionally set postback_url/pingback_url to be notified on completion.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_keywo.description_zh: 提交一个 Bing 站点关键词 任务异步处理；响应返回任务 id，稍后通过对应的 task_get 端点取回结果。可选地设置 postback_url/pingback_url 以在完成时获得通知。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_langua.desc_en: Return the reference list of Bing 语言 supported by the Keywords Data API, used to fill targeting parameters in other endpoints.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_langua.description_zh: 返回 Keywords Data API 支持的 Bing 语言 参考列表，用于填写其它端点的定向参数。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_locati.desc_en: Return the reference list of Bing 位置 supported by the Keywords Data API, used to fill targeting parameters in other endpoints.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_locati.description_zh: 返回 Keywords Data API 支持的 Bing 位置 参考列表，用于填写其它端点的定向参数。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_searc.desc_en: Run a Bing 搜索量 request synchronously and get the data back in the same response, with no separate task to poll.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_searc.description_zh: 以同步方式发起 Bing 搜索量 请求，在同一响应中直接拿到数据，无需另行轮询任务。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_search.desc_en: Retrieve the results of a previously queued Bing 搜索量 task by its task id.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_search.description_zh: 按任务 id 取回此前排队的 Bing 搜索量 任务结果。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_searc.desc_en: Queue a Bing 搜索量 task for asynchronous processing; the response returns a task id you later fetch via the matching task_get endpoint. Optionally set postback_url/pingback_url to be notified on completion.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_searc.description_zh: 提交一个 Bing 搜索量 任务异步处理；响应返回任务 id，稍后通过对应的 task_get 端点取回结果。可选地设置 postback_url/pingback_url 以在完成时获得通知。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_search.desc_en: Return the reference list of Bing 搜索量历史 supported by the Keywords Data API, used to fill targeting parameters in other endpoints.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_bing_search.description_zh: 返回 Keywords Data API 支持的 Bing 搜索量历史 参考列表，用于填写其它端点的定向参数。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_clickstrea.desc_en: Run a 点击流批量搜索量 request synchronously and get the data back in the same response, with no separate task to poll.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_clickstrea.description_zh: 以同步方式发起 点击流批量搜索量 请求，在同一响应中直接拿到数据，无需另行轮询任务。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_clickstrea.desc_en: Run a DataForSEO 点击流搜索量 request synchronously and get the data back in the same response, with no separate task to poll.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_clickstrea.description_zh: 以同步方式发起 DataForSEO 点击流搜索量 请求，在同一响应中直接拿到数据，无需另行轮询任务。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_clickstrea.desc_en: Run a 点击流全球搜索量 request synchronously and get the data back in the same response, with no separate task to poll.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_clickstrea.description_zh: 以同步方式发起 点击流全球搜索量 请求，在同一响应中直接拿到数据，无需另行轮询任务。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_clickstream.desc_en: Return the reference list of 点击流位置与语言 supported by the Keywords Data API, used to fill targeting parameters in other endpoints.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_clickstream.description_zh: 返回 Keywords Data API 支持的 点击流位置与语言 参考列表，用于填写其它端点的定向参数。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_dataforseo.desc_en: Run a DataForSEO Trends 人口统计 request synchronously and get the data back in the same response, with no separate task to poll.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_dataforseo.description_zh: 以同步方式发起 DataForSEO Trends 人口统计 请求，在同一响应中直接拿到数据，无需另行轮询任务。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_dataforseo.desc_en: Run a DataForSEO Trends 探索 request synchronously and get the data back in the same response, with no separate task to poll.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_dataforseo.description_zh: 以同步方式发起 DataForSEO Trends 探索 请求，在同一响应中直接拿到数据，无需另行轮询任务。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_dataforseo_.desc_en: Return the reference list of DataForSEO Trends 位置 supported by the Keywords Data API, used to fill targeting parameters in other endpoints.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_dataforseo_.description_zh: 返回 Keywords Data API 支持的 DataForSEO Trends 位置 参考列表，用于填写其它端点的定向参数。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_dataforseo.desc_en: Run a DataForSEO Trends 次区域兴趣 request synchronously and get the data back in the same response, with no separate task to poll.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_dataforseo.description_zh: 以同步方式发起 DataForSEO Trends 次区域兴趣 请求，在同一响应中直接拿到数据，无需另行轮询任务。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads_.heading_zh: Google Ads 关键词流量预测 get_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads_ad_traffic_by_keywords_task_get_id
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads_.desc_en: Retrieve the results of a previously queued Google Ads 关键词流量预测 task by its task id.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads_.description_zh: 按任务 id 取回此前排队的 Google Ads 关键词流量预测 任务结果。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads.heading_zh: Google Ads 关键词流量预测 post_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads_ad_traffic_by_keywords_task_post
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads.desc_en: Queue a Google Ads 关键词流量预测 task for asynchronous processing; the response returns a task id you later fetch via the matching task_get endpoint. Optionally set postback_url/pingback_url to be notified on completion.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads.description_zh: 提交一个 Google Ads 关键词流量预测 任务异步处理；响应返回任务 id，稍后通过对应的 task_get 端点取回结果。可选地设置 postback_url/pingback_url 以在完成时获得通知。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads.desc_en: Run a Google Ads 关键词扩展 request synchronously and get the data back in the same response, with no separate task to poll.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads.description_zh: 以同步方式发起 Google Ads 关键词扩展 请求，在同一响应中直接拿到数据，无需另行轮询任务。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads_.desc_en: Retrieve the results of a previously queued Google Ads 关键词扩展 task by its task id.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads_.description_zh: 按任务 id 取回此前排队的 Google Ads 关键词扩展 任务结果。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads.desc_en: Queue a Google Ads 关键词扩展 task for asynchronous processing; the response returns a task id you later fetch via the matching task_get endpoint. Optionally set postback_url/pingback_url to be notified on completion.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads.description_zh: 提交一个 Google Ads 关键词扩展 任务异步处理；响应返回任务 id，稍后通过对应的 task_get 端点取回结果。可选地设置 postback_url/pingback_url 以在完成时获得通知。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads.desc_en: Run a Google Ads 站点关键词 request synchronously and get the data back in the same response, with no separate task to poll.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads.description_zh: 以同步方式发起 Google Ads 站点关键词 请求，在同一响应中直接拿到数据，无需另行轮询任务。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads_.desc_en: Retrieve the results of a previously queued Google Ads 站点关键词 task by its task id.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads_.description_zh: 按任务 id 取回此前排队的 Google Ads 站点关键词 任务结果。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads.desc_en: Queue a Google Ads 站点关键词 task for asynchronous processing; the response returns a task id you later fetch via the matching task_get endpoint. Optionally set postback_url/pingback_url to be notified on completion.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads.description_zh: 提交一个 Google Ads 站点关键词 任务异步处理；响应返回任务 id，稍后通过对应的 task_get 端点取回结果。可选地设置 postback_url/pingback_url 以在完成时获得通知。

post_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads.desc_en: Run a Google Ads 搜索量 request synchronously and get the data back in the same response, with no separate task to poll.
post_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads.description_zh: 以同步方式发起 Google Ads 搜索量 请求，在同一响应中直接拿到数据，无需另行轮询任务。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads_.desc_en: Retrieve the results of a previously queued Google Ads 搜索量 task by its task id.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads_.description_zh: 按任务 id 取回此前排队的 Google Ads 搜索量 任务结果。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads_.desc_en: Return the reference list of Google Ads 状态 supported by the Keywords Data API, used to fill targeting parameters in other endpoints.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_ads_.description_zh: 返回 Keywords Data API 支持的 Google Ads 状态 参考列表，用于填写其它端点的定向参数。

get_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_tren.desc_en: Return the reference list of Google Trends 类目 supported by the Keywords Data API, used to fill targeting parameters in other endpoints.
get_dataforseo_keywords_data_google_tren.description_zh: 返回 Keywords Data API 支持的 Google Trends 类目 参考列表，用于填写其它端点的定向参数。

post_dataforseo_on_page_content_parsing_.desc_en: Crawl a single url on the fly and return its parsed, structured content in the same response, with no separate OnPage task to queue.
post_dataforseo_on_page_content_parsing_.description_zh: 即时抓取单个 url，并在同一响应中返回其结构化解析内容，无需另行排队 OnPage 任务。

post_dataforseo_on_page_content_parsing.heading_zh: 解析已抓取页面内容 post_dataforseo_on_page_content_parsing
post_dataforseo_on_page_content_parsing.desc_en: Parse a previously crawled page (by task id and url) into structured content blocks: topics, primary/secondary content, tables, ratings, offers, and contacts.
post_dataforseo_on_page_content_parsing.description_zh: 对此前已抓取的页面（按 task id 与 url）进行结构化内容解析：主题、主/次要内容、表格、评分、报价与联系方式。

post_dataforseo_on_page_duplicate_conten.heading_zh: 获取重复内容页面 post_dataforseo_on_page_duplicate_content
post_dataforseo_on_page_duplicate_conten.desc_en: Return pages whose body content is highly similar to a reference page for a task id, ranked by similarity, to surface duplicate-content risks.
post_dataforseo_on_page_duplicate_conten.description_zh: 返回某 task id 中与参考页正文高度相似的页面，按相似度排序，用于发现重复内容风险。

post_dataforseo_on_page_duplicate_tags.heading_zh: 获取重复标签页面 post_dataforseo_on_page_duplicate_tags
post_dataforseo_on_page_duplicate_tags.desc_en: Return groups of pages that share duplicate title or meta description tags for a task id, to help locate cannibalization and SEO tag issues.
post_dataforseo_on_page_duplicate_tags.description_zh: 返回某 task id 中存在重复 title 或 meta description 标签的页面分组，用于定位标签重复与 SEO 问题。

get_dataforseo_on_page_available_filters.heading_zh: 列出可用过滤字段 get_dataforseo_on_page_available_filters
get_dataforseo_on_page_available_filters.desc_en: Return the reference list of fields and operators usable in the filters parameter of OnPage endpoints.
get_dataforseo_on_page_available_filters.description_zh: 返回 OnPage 端点 filters 参数中可用的字段与运算符参考列表。

post_dataforseo_on_page_force_stop.heading_zh: 强制停止 OnPage 抓取 post_dataforseo_on_page_force_stop
post_dataforseo_on_page_force_stop.desc_en: Force-stop an in-progress OnPage crawl by task id; already crawled pages remain available for retrieval.
post_dataforseo_on_page_force_stop.description_zh: 按 task id 强制停止进行中的 OnPage 抓取；已抓取的页面仍可读取。

post_dataforseo_on_page_keyword_density.desc_en: Return keyword-density statistics (single words or n-grams) computed from crawled pages for a task id.
post_dataforseo_on_page_keyword_density.description_zh: 返回某 task id 抓取页面计算出的关键词密度统计（单词或 n-gram）。

get_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_audits.heading_zh: 列出 Lighthouse 审计项 get_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_audits
get_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_audits.desc_en: Return the reference list of individual Lighthouse audit ids that can be requested via the audits parameter.
get_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_audits.description_zh: 返回可通过 audits 参数请求的 Lighthouse 单项审计 id 参考列表。

get_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_langua.desc_en: Return the languages supported for Lighthouse report localization via the language_name/language_code parameters.
get_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_langua.description_zh: 返回 Lighthouse 报告本地化支持的语言，对应 language_name/language_code 参数。

post_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_live_.heading_zh: 实时运行 Lighthouse 审计 post_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_live_json
post_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_live_.desc_en: Run a Google Lighthouse audit on a url synchronously and return the full JSON report in the same response, with no task to poll.
post_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_live_.description_zh: 对某 url 同步运行 Google Lighthouse 审计，并在同一响应中返回完整 JSON 报告，无需轮询任务。

get_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_task_g.heading_zh: 获取 Lighthouse 审计结果 get_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_task_get_json_id
get_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_task_g.desc_en: Retrieve the full JSON report of a previously queued Lighthouse audit task by its task id.
get_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_task_g.description_zh: 按 task id 取回此前排队的 Lighthouse 审计任务的完整 JSON 报告。

post_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_task_.heading_zh: 提交 Lighthouse 审计任务 post_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_task_post
post_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_task_.desc_en: Queue a Google Lighthouse audit for a url; the response returns a task id you later fetch via the matching lighthouse task_get endpoint. Optionally set pingback_url to be notified on completion.
post_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_task_.description_zh: 为某 url 提交 Google Lighthouse 审计任务；响应返回 task id，稍后通过对应的 lighthouse task_get 端点取回结果。可选地设置 pingback_url 以在完成时获得通知。

get_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_tasks_.heading_zh: 列出可收取的 Lighthouse 任务 get_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_tasks_.desc_en: List completed Lighthouse audit tasks that are ready to be collected via the lighthouse task_get endpoint.
get_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_tasks_.description_zh: 列出已完成、可通过 lighthouse task_get 端点收取的 Lighthouse 审计任务。

get_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_versio.desc_en: Return the list of Lighthouse engine versions available to the version parameter.
get_dataforseo_on_page_lighthouse_versio.description_zh: 返回 version 参数可选的 Lighthouse 引擎版本列表。

post_dataforseo_on_page_links.desc_en: Return the internal and external links discovered during the crawl for a task id, with per-link attributes, anchor text, and broken-link status.
post_dataforseo_on_page_links.description_zh: 返回某 task id 抓取过程中发现的内外部链接，含每条链接的属性、锚文本与失效状态。

post_dataforseo_on_page_microdata.heading_zh: 获取页面结构化数据 post_dataforseo_on_page_microdata
post_dataforseo_on_page_microdata.desc_en: Extract and validate the structured-data markup (Microdata / JSON-LD / schema.org) found on a crawled page for a task id and url.
post_dataforseo_on_page_microdata.description_zh: 提取并校验某 task id 与 url 的已抓取页面上的结构化数据标记（Microdata / JSON-LD / schema.org）。

post_dataforseo_on_page_non_indexable.heading_zh: 获取不可索引页面 post_dataforseo_on_page_non_indexable
post_dataforseo_on_page_non_indexable.desc_en: Return pages that search engines cannot index for a task id, together with the reason each page is blocked from indexing.
post_dataforseo_on_page_non_indexable.description_zh: 返回某 task id 中搜索引擎无法索引的页面，并给出每页被阻止索引的原因。

post_dataforseo_on_page_page_screenshot.desc_en: Capture a screenshot of a url in a real browser and return its image location, with controls for viewport size, user agent, and full-page capture.
post_dataforseo_on_page_page_screenshot.description_zh: 在真实浏览器中对某 url 截图并返回图片地址，可控制视口尺寸、User-Agent 与整页截图。

post_dataforseo_on_page_raw_html.heading_zh: 获取页面原始 HTML post_dataforseo_on_page_raw_html
post_dataforseo_on_page_raw_html.desc_en: Return the stored raw HTML of a crawled page for a task id (requires store_raw_html to have been enabled on the task).
post_dataforseo_on_page_raw_html.description_zh: 返回某 task id 已抓取页面的原始 HTML（需在任务上启用 store_raw_html）。

post_dataforseo_on_page_resources.desc_en: Return the resources (images, scripts, stylesheets, etc.) found during the crawl for a task id, with load timing, size, and per-resource checks.
post_dataforseo_on_page_resources.description_zh: 返回某 task id 抓取过程中发现的资源（图片、脚本、样式表等），含加载耗时、体积与逐资源检查。

get_dataforseo_on_page_summary_id.heading_zh: 获取 OnPage 抓取汇总 get_dataforseo_on_page_summary_id
get_dataforseo_on_page_summary_id.desc_en: Return the overall crawl summary for a task id: crawl progress, aggregate page metrics, and the site-wide checks breakdown.
get_dataforseo_on_page_summary_id.description_zh: 按 task id 返回整体抓取汇总：抓取进度、聚合页面指标与全站检查项统计。

post_dataforseo_on_page_task_post.heading_zh: 提交 OnPage 站点抓取任务 post_dataforseo_on_page_task_post
post_dataforseo_on_page_task_post.desc_en: Queue an OnPage crawl task for a target website; the response returns a task id used by all other OnPage endpoints (summary, pages, links, resources, etc.) to read the crawled data once the crawl completes.
post_dataforseo_on_page_task_post.description_zh: 为目标站点提交一个 OnPage 抓取任务；响应返回 task id，抓取完成后用它在其它 OnPage 端点（summary、pages、links、resources 等）读取抓取结果。

get_dataforseo_on_page_tasks_ready.heading_zh: 列出可收取的 OnPage 任务 get_dataforseo_on_page_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_on_page_tasks_ready.desc_en: List OnPage crawl tasks that have finished and are ready to be collected via the matching summary/pages endpoints.
get_dataforseo_on_page_tasks_ready.description_zh: 列出已完成、可通过对应 summary/pages 端点收取的 OnPage 抓取任务。

post_dataforseo_on_page_uncrawlable_reso.desc_en: Return resources the crawler failed to fetch for a task id, with the error details for each one.
post_dataforseo_on_page_uncrawlable_reso.description_zh: 返回某 task id 中抓取器未能获取的资源，并附每项的错误详情。

post_dataforseo_on_page_waterfall.heading_zh: 获取页面加载瀑布图 post_dataforseo_on_page_waterfall
post_dataforseo_on_page_waterfall.desc_en: Return the per-resource load-timing waterfall for a single crawled page (by task id and url), exposing how each resource contributed to total load time.
post_dataforseo_on_page_waterfall.description_zh: 返回某单页（按 task id 与 url）的逐资源加载时序瀑布，展现各资源对总加载耗时的贡献。

get_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_task_.heading_zh: 获取 Google 自然搜索结果（regular） get_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_task_get_regular_id
get_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_task_.desc_en: Retrieves the regular (lightweight) result of a previously posted Google Organic SERP task by its task id. Results stay retrievable for 30 days at no extra charge.
get_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_task_.description_zh: 按任务 id 获取此前提交的 Google 自然搜索（Organic）任务的 regular（精简）结果，结果 30 天内可免费重复拉取。

get_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_task_.heading_zh: 获取 Google 自然搜索结果（advanced） get_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_task_.desc_en: Retrieves the advanced (full structured) result of a posted Google Organic SERP task by its task id, including all parsed SERP elements.
get_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_task_.description_zh: 按任务 id 获取已提交的 Google 自然搜索（Organic）任务的 advanced（完整结构化）结果，含全部解析后的 SERP 元素。

get_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_tasks.heading_zh: 列出可领取的 Google 自然搜索任务 get_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_tasks.desc_en: Lists Google Organic SERP tasks that have finished and are ready to collect, returning the endpoints to fetch each one.
get_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_tasks.description_zh: 列出已完成、可领取的 Google 自然搜索任务，并给出获取每个任务结果的端点。

post_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_live.heading_zh: 实时获取 Google 自然搜索 HTML 页面 post_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_live_html
post_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_live.desc_en: Runs a Google Organic SERP query in live mode and returns the rendered search results page as raw HTML in a single synchronous call.
post_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_live.description_zh: 以实时模式执行 Google 自然搜索查询，单次同步调用直接返回渲染后的搜索结果页面（原始 HTML）。

get_dataforseo_serp_google_ai_mode_langu.heading_zh: 列出 Google AI Mode 支持的语言 get_dataforseo_serp_google_ai_mode_languages
get_dataforseo_serp_google_ai_mode_langu.desc_en: Returns the list of languages supported by the Google AI Mode SERP endpoints.
get_dataforseo_serp_google_ai_mode_langu.description_zh: 返回 Google AI Mode SERP 接口支持的语言列表。

get_dataforseo_serp_google_ai_mode_tasks.heading_zh: 列出可领取的 Google AI Mode 任务 get_dataforseo_serp_google_ai_mode_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_serp_google_ai_mode_tasks.desc_en: Lists completed Google AI Mode SERP tasks that are ready to collect.
get_dataforseo_serp_google_ai_mode_tasks.description_zh: 列出已完成、可领取的 Google AI Mode SERP 任务。

get_dataforseo_serp_google_ai_mode_task_.heading_zh: 获取 Google AI Mode HTML 结果 get_dataforseo_serp_google_ai_mode_task_get_html_id
get_dataforseo_serp_google_ai_mode_task_.desc_en: Retrieves the HTML result of a posted Google AI Mode SERP task by its task id.
get_dataforseo_serp_google_ai_mode_task_.description_zh: 按任务 id 获取已提交的 Google AI Mode SERP 任务的 HTML 结果。

post_dataforseo_serp_google_ai_mode_live.heading_zh: 实时获取 Google AI Mode HTML 页面 post_dataforseo_serp_google_ai_mode_live_html
post_dataforseo_serp_google_ai_mode_live.desc_en: Runs a Google AI Mode SERP query in live mode and returns the rendered page as raw HTML in one synchronous call.
post_dataforseo_serp_google_ai_mode_live.description_zh: 以实时模式执行 Google AI Mode 查询，单次同步调用返回渲染后的页面（原始 HTML）。

get_dataforseo_serp_google_maps_tasks_re.heading_zh: 列出可领取的 Google Maps 任务 get_dataforseo_serp_google_maps_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_serp_google_maps_tasks_re.desc_en: Lists completed Google Maps SERP tasks that are ready to collect.
get_dataforseo_serp_google_maps_tasks_re.description_zh: 列出已完成、可领取的 Google Maps SERP 任务。

get_dataforseo_serp_google_maps_task_get.heading_zh: 获取 Google Maps advanced 结果 get_dataforseo_serp_google_maps_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_serp_google_maps_task_get.desc_en: Retrieves the advanced result of a posted Google Maps SERP task by its task id.
get_dataforseo_serp_google_maps_task_get.description_zh: 按任务 id 获取已提交的 Google Maps SERP 任务的 advanced 结果。

get_dataforseo_serp_google_local_finder_.heading_zh: 列出可领取的 Google Local Finder 任务 get_dataforseo_serp_google_local_finder_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_serp_google_local_finder_.desc_en: Lists completed Google Local Finder SERP tasks that are ready to collect.
get_dataforseo_serp_google_local_finder_.description_zh: 列出已完成、可领取的 Google Local Finder SERP 任务。

get_dataforseo_serp_google_local_finder_.heading_zh: 获取 Google Local Finder HTML 结果 get_dataforseo_serp_google_local_finder_task_get_html_id
get_dataforseo_serp_google_local_finder_.desc_en: Retrieves the HTML result of a posted Google Local Finder SERP task by its task id.
get_dataforseo_serp_google_local_finder_.description_zh: 按任务 id 获取已提交的 Google Local Finder SERP 任务的 HTML 结果。

get_dataforseo_serp_google_news_task_get.description_zh: 在任务提交后的留存期内，按 task id 取回 Google 新闻 SERP 的高级结果。

post_dataforseo_serp_google_news_live_ad.heading_zh: 实时获取 Google 新闻 SERP post_dataforseo_serp_google_news_live_advanced
