post_dataforseo_business_data_business_l.desc_en: Synchronously search DataForSEO's business-listings database by category, name, description, location and custom filters, returning matching local businesses with their profiles, ratings and contact details in a single request.
post_dataforseo_business_data_business_l.description_zh: 在单次请求中，按分类、名称、描述、地区与自定义筛选条件同步检索 DataForSEO 商户列表库，返回匹配的本地商户及其资料、评分与联系信息。

post_dataforseo_business_data_google_ext.heading_zh: 创建 Google 扩展评论任务
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_ext.desc_en: Create an asynchronous task that collects an establishment's Google reviews, including reviews aggregated from third-party sites; poll the matching tasks_ready endpoint and then fetch results by task id.
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_ext.description_zh: 创建异步任务以采集某商户的 Google 评论（含聚合自第三方站点的评论）；随后轮询对应的 tasks_ready 接口，并按任务 id 取回结果。

post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hot.heading_zh: 实时获取 Google 酒店详情（advanced）
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hot.desc_en: Synchronously retrieve detailed Google hotel info for a given hotel identifier and stay dates, returning the hotel's description, amenities, location scores, ratings and pricing in a single request.
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hot.description_zh: 针对给定酒店标识与入住日期，单次请求同步获取 Google 酒店详情，返回酒店介绍、便利设施、位置评分、评分与价格信息。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.heading_zh: 获取 Google 酒店详情任务结果（advanced）
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.desc_en: Fetch the advanced results of a previously created Google Hotel Info task by its id.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的 Google 酒店详情任务的 advanced 结果。

post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hot.heading_zh: 创建 Google 酒店详情任务
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hot.desc_en: Create an asynchronous Google Hotel Info task for a given hotel identifier and stay dates; collect the detailed result later via the matching task_get endpoint.
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hot.description_zh: 针对给定酒店标识与入住日期创建异步 Google 酒店详情任务；稍后通过对应的 task_get 接口取回详细结果。

post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hot.heading_zh: 实时搜索 Google 酒店
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hot.desc_en: Synchronously search Google hotels for a keyword and stay dates with optional price, rating, star and amenity filters, returning matched hotel listings with pricing, location and rating data in a single request.
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hot.description_zh: 针对关键词与入住日期同步搜索 Google 酒店，支持价格、评分、星级与设施等筛选，单次请求返回匹配的酒店列表及其价格、位置与评分数据。

post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hot.heading_zh: 创建 Google 酒店搜索任务
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hot.desc_en: Create an asynchronous Google Hotel Searches task for a keyword and stay dates with optional filters; collect the results later via the matching task_get endpoint.
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hot.description_zh: 针对关键词与入住日期创建异步 Google 酒店搜索任务，支持可选筛选；稍后通过对应的 task_get 接口取回结果。

post_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_.heading_zh: 实时获取 Google 商家资料
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_.desc_en: Synchronously retrieve the Google My Business profile for a local establishment, returning its categories, contact details, working hours, attributes, ratings and available interactions in a single request.
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_.description_zh: 同步获取某本地商户的 Google 商家（My Business）资料，单次请求返回其分类、联系方式、营业时间、属性、评分与可用互动入口。

post_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_.heading_zh: 创建 Google 商家资料任务
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_.desc_en: Create an asynchronous Google My Business Info task for a local establishment; collect the profile result later via the matching task_get endpoint.
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_.description_zh: 为某本地商户创建异步 Google 商家资料任务；稍后通过对应的 task_get 接口取回资料结果。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_b.heading_zh: 获取 Google 商家动态任务结果
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_b.desc_en: Fetch the results of a previously created Google My Business Updates task by its id, returning the establishment's posted business updates.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_b.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的 Google 商家动态任务结果，返回该商户发布的商家动态。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_b.heading_zh: 获取 Google 商家动态已完成任务
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_b.desc_en: List Google My Business Updates tasks that have finished processing and are ready to be collected via the matching task_get endpoint.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_b.description_zh: 列出已处理完成、可通过对应 task_get 接口拉取的 Google 商家动态任务。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_ques.heading_zh: 获取 Google 问答任务结果
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_ques.desc_en: Fetch the results of a previously created Google Questions & Answers task by its id, returning the establishment's questions, their answers and questions still awaiting answers.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_ques.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的 Google 问答任务结果，返回该商户的问题、对应回答及仍待回答的问题。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_ques.heading_zh: 获取 Google 问答已完成任务
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_ques.desc_en: List Google Questions & Answers tasks that have finished processing and are ready to be collected.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_ques.description_zh: 列出已处理完成、可供拉取的 Google 问答任务。

post_dataforseo_business_data_google_rev.heading_zh: 创建 Google 评论任务
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_rev.desc_en: Create an asynchronous task that collects an establishment's Google reviews; poll the matching tasks_ready endpoint and then fetch results by task id.
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_rev.description_zh: 创建异步任务以采集某商户的 Google 评论；随后轮询对应的 tasks_ready 接口，并按任务 id 取回结果。

post_dataforseo_business_data_social_med.heading_zh: 实时获取 Pinterest 收藏数
post_dataforseo_business_data_social_med.desc_en: Synchronously retrieve the number of Pinterest saves (pins) made from one or more target page URLs via the Pinterest Save Button, in a single request.
post_dataforseo_business_data_social_med.description_zh: 单次请求同步获取一个或多个目标页面 URL 通过 Pinterest 保存按钮产生的收藏（pin）数量。

get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor.heading_zh: 获取 Tripadvisor 评论任务结果
get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor.desc_en: Fetch the results of a previously created Tripadvisor Reviews task by its id, returning the establishment's collected reviews and ratings.
get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的 Tripadvisor 评论任务结果，返回该商户已采集的评论与评分。

get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor.heading_zh: 获取 Tripadvisor 评论已完成任务
get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor.desc_en: List Tripadvisor Reviews tasks that have finished processing and are ready to be collected.
get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor.description_zh: 列出已处理完成、可供拉取的 Tripadvisor 评论任务。

post_dataforseo_business_data_tripadviso.heading_zh: 创建 Tripadvisor 搜索任务
post_dataforseo_business_data_tripadviso.desc_en: Create an asynchronous Tripadvisor Search task for a keyword and location; collect the matched establishments later via the matching task_get endpoint.
post_dataforseo_business_data_tripadviso.description_zh: 针对关键词与地区创建异步 Tripadvisor 搜索任务；稍后通过对应的 task_get 接口取回匹配的商户。

get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_.heading_zh: 获取 Trustpilot 评论任务结果
get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_.desc_en: Fetch the results of a previously created Trustpilot Reviews task by its id, returning the business's collected reviews and ratings.
get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的 Trustpilot 评论任务结果，返回该商户已采集的评论与评分。

get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_.heading_zh: 获取 Trustpilot 评论已完成任务
get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_.desc_en: List Trustpilot Reviews tasks that have finished processing and are ready to be collected.
get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_.description_zh: 列出已处理完成、可供拉取的 Trustpilot 评论任务。

post_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot.heading_zh: 创建 Trustpilot 搜索任务
post_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot.desc_en: Create an asynchronous Trustpilot Search task for a keyword (domain); collect the matched businesses later via the matching task_get endpoint.
post_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot.description_zh: 针对关键词（域名）创建异步 Trustpilot 搜索任务；稍后通过对应的 task_get 接口取回匹配的商户。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_exte.heading_zh: 获取 Google 扩展评论结果 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_extended_reviews_task_get_id
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_exte.desc_en: Fetch the results of a previously created Google Extended Reviews task by its id, returning the establishment's aggregated rating and the collected review entries, including reviews sourced from third-party sites.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_exte.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的 Google 扩展评论任务结果，返回商家的综合评分及采集到的评论条目，并包含来自第三方站点的评论。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_exte.heading_zh: 获取 Google 扩展评论已完成任务 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_extended_reviews_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_exte.desc_en: List Google Extended Reviews tasks that have finished processing and are ready to be collected via the matching task_get endpoint.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_exte.description_zh: 列出已处理完成、可通过对应 task_get 端点拉取的 Google 扩展评论任务。

post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hot.heading_zh: 实时获取 Google 酒店信息 HTML post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hotel_info_live_html
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hot.desc_en: Synchronously retrieve Google hotel info for a given hotel identifier and stay dates, returning the captured result as raw HTML pages in a single request.
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hot.description_zh: 针对给定酒店标识与入住日期，同步获取 Google 酒店信息，并在单次请求中以原始 HTML 页面形式返回采集结果。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.heading_zh: 获取 Google 酒店信息 HTML 结果 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hotel_info_task_get_html_id
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.desc_en: Fetch the HTML results of a previously created advanced Google Hotel Info task by its id.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的高级 Google 酒店信息任务的 HTML 结果。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.heading_zh: 获取 Google 酒店信息已完成任务 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hotel_info_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.desc_en: List Google Hotel Info tasks that have finished processing and are ready to be collected.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.description_zh: 列出已处理完成、可供拉取的 Google 酒店信息任务。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.heading_zh: 获取 Google 酒店搜索结果 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hotel_searches_task_get_id
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.desc_en: Fetch the results of a previously created Google Hotel Searches task by its id, returning matched hotel listings with pricing, location and rating data.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的 Google 酒店搜索任务结果，返回匹配的酒店列表及其价格、位置与评分数据。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.heading_zh: 获取 Google 酒店搜索已完成任务 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hotel_searches_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.desc_en: List Google Hotel Searches tasks that have finished processing and are ready to be collected.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.description_zh: 列出已处理完成、可供拉取的 Google 酒店搜索任务。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_b.heading_zh: 获取 Google 商家信息结果 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_business_info_task_get_id
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_b.desc_en: Fetch the results of a previously created Google My Business Info task by its id, returning the full business profile: categories, address, contacts, ratings, attributes, working and popular hours, and any directory sub-listings.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_b.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的 Google 商家信息任务结果，返回完整的商家档案：分类、地址、联系方式、评分、属性、营业与热门时段，以及目录子条目。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_b.heading_zh: 获取 Google 商家信息已完成任务 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_business_info_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_b.desc_en: List Google My Business Info tasks that have finished processing and are ready to be collected.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_b.description_zh: 列出已处理完成、可供拉取的 Google 商家信息任务。

post_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_.heading_zh: 创建 Google 商家动态任务 post_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_business_updates_task_post
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_.desc_en: Create an asynchronous task that collects Google My Business posts/updates for a named establishment; poll tasks_ready and then fetch results by id.
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_.description_zh: 创建一个异步任务，采集指定商家的 Google 商家动态/帖子；随后轮询 tasks_ready 并按 id 拉取结果。

post_dataforseo_business_data_google_que.heading_zh: 实时获取 Google 商家问答 post_dataforseo_business_data_google_questions_and_answers_live
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_que.desc_en: Synchronously retrieve the Questions and Answers section of a Google My Business listing for the named establishment, returning both answered and unanswered questions.
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_que.description_zh: 针对指定商家，同步获取其 Google 商家页面的问答区，返回已回答与未回答的问题。

post_dataforseo_business_data_google_que.heading_zh: 创建 Google 商家问答任务 post_dataforseo_business_data_google_questions_and_answers_task_post
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_que.desc_en: Create an asynchronous task that collects the Questions and Answers section of a Google My Business listing; poll tasks_ready and fetch results by id.
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_que.description_zh: 创建一个异步任务，采集 Google 商家页面的问答区；随后轮询 tasks_ready 并按 id 拉取结果。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_revi.heading_zh: 获取 Google 评论结果 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_reviews_task_get_id
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_revi.desc_en: Fetch the results of a previously created Google Reviews task by its id, returning the establishment's aggregated rating and individual review entries.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_revi.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的 Google 评论任务结果，返回商家的综合评分及单条评论条目。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_revi.heading_zh: 获取 Google 评论已完成任务 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_reviews_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_revi.desc_en: List Google Reviews tasks that have finished processing and are ready to be collected.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_revi.description_zh: 列出已处理完成、可供拉取的 Google 评论任务。

post_dataforseo_business_data_social_med.heading_zh: 实时获取 Reddit 社媒数据 post_dataforseo_business_data_social_media_reddit_live
post_dataforseo_business_data_social_med.desc_en: Synchronously retrieve Reddit mentions (subreddit posts that share the URL) for one or more target pages, returning the subreddit and post details for each.
post_dataforseo_business_data_social_med.description_zh: 针对一个或多个目标页面，同步获取其在 Reddit 上的提及（分享该 URL 的 subreddit 帖子），并返回各自的 subreddit 与帖子详情。

post_dataforseo_business_data_tripadviso.heading_zh: 创建 Tripadvisor 评论任务 post_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor_reviews_task_post
post_dataforseo_business_data_tripadviso.desc_en: Create an asynchronous task that collects Tripadvisor reviews for a business identified by URL path or keyword, with optional filters by rating, traveler type, visit month and review keyword.
post_dataforseo_business_data_tripadviso.description_zh: 创建一个异步任务，采集由 URL 路径或关键词指定商家的 Tripadvisor 评论，并可按评分、出行者类型、到访月份及评论关键词进行筛选。

get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor.heading_zh: 获取 Tripadvisor 搜索结果 get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor_search_task_get_id
get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor.desc_en: Fetch the results of a previously created Tripadvisor Search task by its id, returning matched business listings with category, price rate and rating data.
get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的 Tripadvisor 搜索任务结果，返回匹配的商家列表及其分类、价格水平与评分数据。

get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor.heading_zh: 获取 Tripadvisor 搜索已完成任务 get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor_search_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor.desc_en: List Tripadvisor Search tasks that have finished processing and are ready to be collected.
get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor.description_zh: 列出已处理完成、可供拉取的 Tripadvisor 搜索任务。

post_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot.heading_zh: 创建 Trustpilot 评论任务 post_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_reviews_task_post
post_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot.desc_en: Create an asynchronous task that collects Trustpilot reviews for an establishment identified by its domain; poll tasks_ready and fetch results by id.
post_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot.description_zh: 创建一个异步任务，采集由域名指定商家的 Trustpilot 评论；随后轮询 tasks_ready 并按 id 拉取结果。

get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_.heading_zh: 获取 Trustpilot 搜索结果 get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_search_task_get_id
get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_.desc_en: Fetch the results of a previously created Trustpilot Search task by its id, returning matched establishments with their domain, review count and rating data.
get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的 Trustpilot 搜索任务结果，返回匹配的商家及其域名、评论数与评分数据。

get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_.heading_zh: 获取 Trustpilot 搜索已完成任务 get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_search_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_.desc_en: List Trustpilot Search tasks that have finished processing and are ready to be collected.
get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_.description_zh: 列出已处理完成、可供拉取的 Trustpilot 搜索任务。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_anchors_live.desc_en: Returns the anchor texts used in backlinks pointing to a target, each with aggregated link and referring-domain metrics. Use it to analyse anchor-text distribution and spot over-optimised or branded anchors.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_anchors_live.description_zh: 返回指向目标的外链所用的锚文本列表，每条附带外链与引荐域名的聚合指标，用于分析锚文本分布、识别过度优化或品牌词锚文本。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_backlinks_live.desc_en: Returns the individual backlinks pointing to a target with full per-link detail (source page, anchor, attributes, ranks, status). The core endpoint for inspecting a target's link profile link by link.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_backlinks_live.description_zh: 返回指向目标的逐条外链明细（来源页、锚文本、属性、rank、状态等），是逐条审视目标链接画像的核心接口。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_backlinks.desc_en: Returns the total backlink count for up to 1000 targets in a single request — a fast way to compare link volume across many domains or pages.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_backlinks.description_zh: 单次请求返回多达 1000 个目标的外链总数，用于快速横比多个域名或页面的外链体量。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_new_lost_.heading_zh: 批量获取新增与丢失外链数 post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_new_lost_backlinks_live
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_new_lost_.desc_en: Returns the number of newly gained and lost backlinks since a given date for up to 1000 targets, for tracking link velocity in bulk.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_new_lost_.description_zh: 返回多达 1000 个目标自指定日期以来新增与丢失的外链数量，用于批量跟踪外链增减趋势。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_new_lost_.heading_zh: 批量获取新增与丢失引荐域名数 post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_new_lost_referring_domains_live
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_new_lost_.desc_en: Returns the count of newly gained and lost referring domains (and main domains) since a given date for up to 1000 targets.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_new_lost_.description_zh: 返回多达 1000 个目标自指定日期以来新增与丢失的引荐域名（及主域名）数量。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_pages_sum.heading_zh: 批量获取页面外链摘要 post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_pages_summary_live
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_pages_sum.desc_en: Returns a compact backlink summary (rank, link and referring counts) per target for up to 1000 pages/domains at once.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_pages_sum.description_zh: 单次请求返回多达 1000 个页面/域名的外链摘要（rank、外链与引荐计数）。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_ranks_liv.desc_en: Returns the backlink-based rank for up to 1000 targets in a single request, for bulk authority comparison.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_ranks_liv.description_zh: 单次请求返回多达 1000 个目标基于外链的 rank，用于批量比较权重。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_referring.desc_en: Returns referring-domain and main-domain counts (total and nofollow) for up to 1000 targets at once.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_referring.description_zh: 单次请求返回多达 1000 个目标的引荐域名与主域名数量（含 nofollow 计数）。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_spam_scor.desc_en: Returns the backlink spam score for up to 1000 targets, for bulk link-quality screening.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_bulk_spam_scor.description_zh: 单次请求返回多达 1000 个目标的外链垃圾分，用于批量筛查链接质量。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_competitors_li.desc_en: Returns domains that share referring domains with the target — i.e. likely backlink competitors — ranked by how many referrers they have in common.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_competitors_li.description_zh: 返回与目标共享引荐域名的域名（即潜在外链竞争对手），按共有引荐方数量排序。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_domain_interse.desc_en: Returns referring domains that link to several of the specified targets, with per-target metrics — useful for finding shared link sources across competitors.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_domain_interse.description_zh: 返回同时链向多个指定目标的引荐域名，并给出各目标的指标，便于发现竞争对手间共有的链接来源。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_domain_pages_l.desc_en: Returns the pages of a domain that have backlinks, each with page metadata and a per-page backlink summary — useful for finding the most-linked pages of a site.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_domain_pages_l.description_zh: 返回某域名下有外链的页面，每条附带页面元信息和该页的外链摘要，便于找出站点中被链接最多的页面。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_domain_pages_s.heading_zh: 获取域名页面外链摘要 post_dataforseo_backlinks_domain_pages_summary_live
post_dataforseo_backlinks_domain_pages_s.desc_en: Returns a per-page backlink summary (rank, link and referring counts) for the linked pages of a target domain.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_domain_pages_s.description_zh: 返回目标域名下被链接页面的逐页外链摘要（rank、外链与引荐计数）。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_history_live.desc_en: Returns a time series of a domain's overall backlink metrics within a date range, for tracking how its link profile evolved.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_history_live.description_zh: 返回某域名在指定日期范围内整体外链指标的时间序列，用于跟踪其链接画像的演变。

get_dataforseo_backlinks_index.desc_en: Returns the current size of the DataForSEO backlink index (total backlinks, pages, domains) plus its growth history. Takes no parameters.
get_dataforseo_backlinks_index.description_zh: 返回 DataForSEO 外链索引的当前规模（外链、页面、域名总数）及其增长历史，无需任何参数。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_page_intersect.desc_en: Returns backlinks whose source pages link to several of the specified targets, with full per-link detail — for finding pages that link to multiple competitors at once.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_page_intersect.description_zh: 返回来源页同时链向多个指定目标的外链，并给出逐条明细，用于找出同时链向多个竞品的页面。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_referring_doma.desc_en: Returns the domains that link to a target, each with aggregated backlink metrics — the standard way to audit who links to a site at domain granularity.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_referring_doma.description_zh: 返回链向目标的引荐域名列表，每条附带聚合外链指标，是按域名粒度审计「谁链向站点」的标准方式。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_referring_netw.desc_en: Returns the IP networks or subnets that backlinks originate from, with aggregated metrics — useful for detecting link networks and IP diversity.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_referring_netw.description_zh: 返回外链来源的 IP 网络或子网及其聚合指标，便于识别链接网络与 IP 多样性。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_summary_live.desc_en: Returns a single aggregated snapshot of a target's entire backlink profile (rank, counts, spam score, host info). The go-to overview endpoint for one target.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_summary_live.description_zh: 返回目标整体外链画像的单条聚合快照（rank、各类计数、垃圾分、主机信息），是针对单一目标的总览首选接口。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_timeseries_new.heading_zh: 获取新增丢失时间序列汇总 post_dataforseo_backlinks_timeseries_new_lost_summary_live
post_dataforseo_backlinks_timeseries_new.desc_en: Returns a time series of newly gained and lost backlinks and referring domains for a target, bucketed by the chosen range.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_timeseries_new.description_zh: 返回目标新增与丢失外链及引荐域名的时间序列，按指定粒度分桶。

post_dataforseo_backlinks_timeseries_sum.heading_zh: 获取外链时间序列汇总 post_dataforseo_backlinks_timeseries_summary_live
post_dataforseo_backlinks_timeseries_sum.desc_en: Returns a time series of a target's aggregated backlink metrics (rank, backlinks, referring domains/pages) bucketed by the chosen range.
post_dataforseo_backlinks_timeseries_sum.description_zh: 返回目标聚合外链指标（rank、外链、引荐域名/页面）的时间序列，按指定粒度分桶。

get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_asin_task.heading_zh: 获取 Amazon ASIN 任务结果（Advanced） get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_asin_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_asin_task.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed Amazon ASIN task by its `id`, returning the product and the ASINs of all its variations.
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_asin_task.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Amazon ASIN 任务的结构化（advanced）结果，返回该商品及其所有变体的 ASIN。

get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_asin_task.heading_zh: 获取 Amazon ASIN 任务结果（HTML） get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_asin_task_get_html_id
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_asin_task.desc_en: Collect the raw HTML results of a completed Amazon ASIN task by its `id`.
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_asin_task.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Amazon ASIN 任务的原始 HTML 结果。

post_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_asin_tas.heading_zh: 提交 Amazon ASIN 任务 post_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_asin_task_post
post_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_asin_tas.desc_en: Queue an Amazon ASIN task that returns the full list of ASINs assigned to the variations of a product. Returns a task `id` to collect later via the Task GET endpoints.
post_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_asin_tas.description_zh: 排队提交 Amazon ASIN 任务，返回某商品各变体所对应的完整 ASIN 列表。返回任务 `id`，稍后经 Task GET 接口收取。

get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_asin_task.heading_zh: 列出可收取的 Amazon ASIN 任务 get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_asin_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_asin_task.desc_en: List completed Amazon ASIN tasks that have not yet been collected, so you can fetch each via the Task GET endpoints.
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_asin_task.description_zh: 列出已完成但尚未收取的 Amazon ASIN 任务，便于逐个经 Task GET 接口取回结果。

get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_languages.heading_zh: 列出 Amazon 支持的语言 get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_languages
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_languages.desc_en: Return the list of languages supported by the Amazon merchant endpoints, with their `language_name` and `language_code`.
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_languages.description_zh: 返回 Amazon merchant 接口支持的语言列表，含 `language_name` 与 `language_code`。

get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_locations.heading_zh: 列出 Amazon 支持的地区 get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_locations
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_locations.desc_en: Return the list of locations supported by the Amazon merchant endpoints, with their `location_name` and `location_code`.
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_locations.description_zh: 返回 Amazon merchant 接口支持的地区列表，含 `location_name` 与 `location_code`。

get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_products_.heading_zh: 获取 Amazon Products 任务结果（Advanced） get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_products_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_products_.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed Amazon Products task by its `id`.
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_products_.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Amazon Products 任务的结构化（advanced）结果。

get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_products_.heading_zh: 获取 Amazon Products 任务结果（HTML） get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_products_task_get_html_id
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_products_.desc_en: Collect the raw HTML results of a completed Amazon Products task by its `id`.
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_products_.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Amazon Products 任务的原始 HTML 结果。

post_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_products.heading_zh: 提交 Amazon Products 任务 post_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_products_task_post
post_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_products.desc_en: Queue an Amazon product-listings task for a keyword, location, and language. Returns a task `id` to collect later via the Task GET endpoints.
post_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_products.description_zh: 按关键词、地区与语言排队提交 Amazon 商品列表任务。返回任务 `id`，稍后经 Task GET 接口收取。

get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_products_.heading_zh: 列出可收取的 Amazon Products 任务 get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_products_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_products_.desc_en: List completed Amazon Products tasks that have not yet been collected.
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_products_.description_zh: 列出已完成但尚未收取的 Amazon Products 任务。

get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_sellers_t.heading_zh: 获取 Amazon Sellers 任务结果（Advanced） get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_sellers_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_sellers_t.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed Amazon Sellers task by its `id`, listing the sellers of a product with condition, pricing, and shipping data.
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_sellers_t.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Amazon Sellers 任务的结构化（advanced）结果，列出某商品的卖家及其品相、定价与配送信息。

get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_sellers_t.heading_zh: 获取 Amazon Sellers 任务结果（HTML） get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_sellers_task_get_html_id
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_sellers_t.desc_en: Collect the raw HTML results of a completed Amazon Sellers task by its `id`.
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_sellers_t.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Amazon Sellers 任务的原始 HTML 结果。

post_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_sellers_.heading_zh: 提交 Amazon Sellers 任务 post_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_sellers_task_post
post_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_sellers_.desc_en: Queue an Amazon Sellers task that returns the sellers of a specified product with condition, pricing, and shipping details. Returns a task `id` to collect later.
post_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_sellers_.description_zh: 排队提交 Amazon Sellers 任务，返回指定商品的卖家及其品相、定价与配送细节。返回任务 `id`，稍后收取。

get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_sellers_t.heading_zh: 列出可收取的 Amazon Sellers 任务 get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_sellers_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_sellers_t.desc_en: List completed Amazon Sellers tasks that have not yet been collected.
get_dataforseo_merchant_amazon_sellers_t.description_zh: 列出已完成但尚未收取的 Amazon Sellers 任务。

get_dataforseo_merchant_google_languages.heading_zh: 列出 Google Shopping 支持的语言 get_dataforseo_merchant_google_languages
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_languages.desc_en: Return the list of languages supported by the Google Shopping merchant endpoints, with their `language_name` and `language_code`.
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_languages.description_zh: 返回 Google Shopping merchant 接口支持的语言列表，含 `language_name` 与 `language_code`。

get_dataforseo_merchant_google_locations.heading_zh: 列出 Google Shopping 支持的地区 get_dataforseo_merchant_google_locations
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_locations.desc_en: Return the list of locations supported by the Google Shopping merchant endpoints, with their `location_name` and `location_code`.
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_locations.description_zh: 返回 Google Shopping merchant 接口支持的地区列表，含 `location_name` 与 `location_code`。

get_dataforseo_merchant_google_product_i.heading_zh: 获取 Google Shopping 商品详情任务结果（Advanced） get_dataforseo_merchant_google_product_info_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_product_i.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed Google Shopping Product Info task by its `id`.
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_product_i.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Google Shopping 商品详情任务的结构化（advanced）结果。

post_dataforseo_merchant_google_product_.heading_zh: 提交 Google Shopping 商品详情任务 post_dataforseo_merchant_google_product_info_task_post
post_dataforseo_merchant_google_product_.desc_en: Queue a Google Shopping Product Info task for a product (identified by `product_id`, `gid`, or `data_docid`), returning description, images, rating, variations, specifications, and sellers. Returns a task `id`.
post_dataforseo_merchant_google_product_.description_zh: 为某商品（以 `product_id`、`gid` 或 `data_docid` 标识）排队提交 Google Shopping 商品详情任务，返回描述、图片、评分、变体、规格与卖家。返回任务 `id`。

get_dataforseo_merchant_google_product_i.heading_zh: 列出可收取的 Google Shopping 商品详情任务 get_dataforseo_merchant_google_product_info_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_product_i.desc_en: List completed Google Shopping Product Info tasks that have not yet been collected.
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_product_i.description_zh: 列出已完成但尚未收取的 Google Shopping 商品详情任务。

get_dataforseo_merchant_google_products_.heading_zh: 获取 Google Shopping Products 任务结果（Advanced） get_dataforseo_merchant_google_products_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_products_.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed Google Shopping Products task by its `id`.
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_products_.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Google Shopping Products 任务的结构化（advanced）结果。

get_dataforseo_merchant_google_products_.heading_zh: 获取 Google Shopping Products 任务结果（HTML） get_dataforseo_merchant_google_products_task_get_html_id
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_products_.desc_en: Collect the raw HTML results of a completed Google Shopping Products task by its `id`.
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_products_.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Google Shopping Products 任务的原始 HTML 结果。

post_dataforseo_merchant_google_products.heading_zh: 提交 Google Shopping Products 任务 post_dataforseo_merchant_google_products_task_post
post_dataforseo_merchant_google_products.desc_en: Queue a Google Shopping Products task that returns the products found for a query, including titles, prices, and seller data. Returns a task `id`.
post_dataforseo_merchant_google_products.description_zh: 排队提交 Google Shopping Products 任务，返回查询命中的商品（含标题、价格与卖家数据）。返回任务 `id`。

get_dataforseo_merchant_google_products_.heading_zh: 列出可收取的 Google Shopping Products 任务 get_dataforseo_merchant_google_products_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_products_.desc_en: List completed Google Shopping Products tasks that have not yet been collected.
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_products_.description_zh: 列出已完成但尚未收取的 Google Shopping Products 任务。

get_dataforseo_merchant_google_reviews_t.heading_zh: 获取 Google Shopping 评论任务结果（Advanced） get_dataforseo_merchant_google_reviews_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_reviews_t.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed Google Shopping Reviews task by its `id`, including top keywords, review titles, images, and ratings.
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_reviews_t.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Google Shopping 评论任务的结构化（advanced）结果，含高频关键词、评论标题、图片与评分。

post_dataforseo_merchant_google_reviews_.heading_zh: 提交 Google Shopping 评论任务 post_dataforseo_merchant_google_reviews_task_post
post_dataforseo_merchant_google_reviews_.desc_en: Queue a Google Shopping Reviews task to collect reviews for a product on Google Shopping. Returns a task `id`.
post_dataforseo_merchant_google_reviews_.description_zh: 排队提交 Google Shopping 评论任务，收取某 Google Shopping 商品的评论。返回任务 `id`。

get_dataforseo_merchant_google_reviews_t.heading_zh: 列出可收取的 Google Shopping 评论任务 get_dataforseo_merchant_google_reviews_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_reviews_t.desc_en: List completed Google Shopping Reviews tasks that have not yet been collected.
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_reviews_t.description_zh: 列出已完成但尚未收取的 Google Shopping 评论任务。

get_dataforseo_merchant_google_sellers_a.heading_zh: 获取 Google Shopping 卖家广告 URL get_dataforseo_merchant_google_sellers_ad_url
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_sellers_a.desc_en: Return the full advertisement URL of a Google Shopping seller, including all extra parameters the seller set.
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_sellers_a.description_zh: 返回某 Google Shopping 卖家广告的完整 URL，含卖家设置的全部附加参数。

get_dataforseo_merchant_google_sellers_t.heading_zh: 获取 Google Shopping Sellers 任务结果（Advanced） get_dataforseo_merchant_google_sellers_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_sellers_t.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed Google Shopping Sellers task by its `id`.
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_sellers_t.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Google Shopping Sellers 任务的结构化（advanced）结果。

post_dataforseo_merchant_google_sellers_.heading_zh: 提交 Google Shopping Sellers 任务 post_dataforseo_merchant_google_sellers_task_post
post_dataforseo_merchant_google_sellers_.desc_en: Queue a Google Shopping Sellers task that returns the sellers offering a specified product on Google Shopping. Returns a task `id`.
post_dataforseo_merchant_google_sellers_.description_zh: 排队提交 Google Shopping Sellers 任务，返回在 Google Shopping 上提供指定商品的卖家。返回任务 `id`。

get_dataforseo_merchant_google_sellers_t.heading_zh: 列出可收取的 Google Shopping Sellers 任务 get_dataforseo_merchant_google_sellers_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_sellers_t.desc_en: List completed Google Shopping Sellers tasks that have not yet been collected.
get_dataforseo_merchant_google_sellers_t.description_zh: 列出已完成但尚未收取的 Google Shopping Sellers 任务。

get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_info_t.heading_zh: 获取 App Store 应用详情任务结果（Advanced） get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_info_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_info_t.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed App Store App Info task by its `id`, returning the app's ID, icon, description, reviews, rating, and more.
get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_info_t.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 App Store 应用详情任务的结构化（advanced）结果，返回应用 ID、图标、描述、评论、评分等。

post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_info_.heading_zh: 提交 App Store 应用详情任务 post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_info_task_post
post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_info_.desc_en: Queue an App Store App Info task for the app given in `app_id`. Returns a task `id` to collect later.
post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_info_.description_zh: 为 `app_id` 指定的应用排队提交 App Store 应用详情任务。返回任务 `id`，稍后收取。

get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_list_t.heading_zh: 获取 App Store 榜单任务结果（Advanced） get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_list_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_list_t.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed App Store App List task by its `id`, returning apps from the top charts with IDs, ratings, prices, and titles.
get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_list_t.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 App Store 榜单任务的结构化（advanced）结果，返回排行榜应用及其 ID、评分、价格与标题。

post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_list_.heading_zh: 提交 App Store 榜单任务 post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_list_task_post
post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_list_.desc_en: Queue an App Store App List task that returns apps from a specified top chart collection. Returns a task `id`.
post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_list_.description_zh: 排队提交 App Store 榜单任务，返回指定榜单集合中的应用。返回任务 `id`。

get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_listin.heading_zh: 列出 App Store 应用分类 get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_listings_categories
get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_listin.desc_en: Return the full list of app categories available on the Apple App Store for app-listing searches.
get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_listin.description_zh: 返回 Apple App Store 上可用于应用列表检索的全部应用分类。

post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_listi.heading_zh: 实时检索 App Store 应用列表 post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_listings_search_live
post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_listi.desc_en: Search App Store app listings in real time (Live mode) and return apps with ID, icon, reviews count, rating, price, and more in the same response.
post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_listi.description_zh: 以实时（Live）方式检索 App Store 应用列表，在同一响应中返回应用的 ID、图标、评论数、评分、价格等信息。

get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_review.heading_zh: 获取 App Store 评论任务结果（Advanced） get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_reviews_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_review.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed App Store App Reviews task by its `id`, including review ratings, content, and user profile info.
get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_review.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 App Store 评论任务的结构化（advanced）结果，含评论评分、内容与用户资料信息。

post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_revie.heading_zh: 提交 App Store 评论任务 post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_reviews_task_post
post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_revie.desc_en: Queue an App Store App Reviews task for the app given in `app_id`. Returns a task `id` to collect later.
post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_revie.description_zh: 为 `app_id` 指定的应用排队提交 App Store 评论任务。返回任务 `id`，稍后收取。

get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_search.heading_zh: 获取 App Store 关键词搜索任务结果（Advanced） get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_searches_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_search.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed App Store App Searches task by its `id`, listing apps ranking for the posted keyword.
get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_search.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 App Store 关键词搜索任务的结构化（advanced）结果，列出对应关键词下排名的应用。

post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_searc.heading_zh: 提交 App Store 关键词搜索任务 post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_searches_task_post
post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_searc.desc_en: Queue an App Store App Searches task that returns apps ranking for a keyword. Returns a task `id`.
post_dataforseo_app_data_apple_app_searc.description_zh: 排队提交 App Store 关键词搜索任务，返回某关键词下排名的应用。返回任务 `id`。

get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_categories.heading_zh: 列出 App Store 应用分类 get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_categories
get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_categories.desc_en: Return the full list of app categories available on the App Store.
get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_categories.description_zh: 返回 App Store 上可用的全部应用分类。

get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_languages.heading_zh: 列出 App Data Apple 支持的语言 get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_languages
get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_languages.desc_en: Return the list of Apple languages supported by the App Data API.
get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_languages.description_zh: 返回 App Data API 支持的 Apple 语言列表。

get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_locations.heading_zh: 列出 App Data Apple 支持的地区 get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_locations
get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_locations.desc_en: Return the list of Apple locations supported by the App Data API.
get_dataforseo_app_data_apple_locations.description_zh: 返回 App Data API 支持的 Apple 地区列表。

get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_info_.heading_zh: 获取 Google Play 应用详情任务结果（Advanced） get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_info_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_info_.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed Google Play App Info task by its `id`, returning the app's ID, icon, description, reviews, rating, and more.
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_info_.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Google Play 应用详情任务的结构化（advanced）结果，返回应用 ID、图标、描述、评论、评分等。

get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_info_.heading_zh: 获取 Google Play 应用详情任务结果（HTML） get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_info_task_get_html_id
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_info_.desc_en: Collect the raw HTML results of a completed Google Play App Info task by its `id`.
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_info_.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Google Play 应用详情任务的原始 HTML 结果。

post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_info.heading_zh: 提交 Google Play 应用详情任务 post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_info_task_post
post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_info.desc_en: Queue a Google Play App Info task for the app given in `app_id`. Returns a task `id` to collect later.
post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_info.description_zh: 为 `app_id` 指定的应用排队提交 Google Play 应用详情任务。返回任务 `id`，稍后收取。

get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_list_.heading_zh: 获取 Google Play 榜单任务结果（Advanced） get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_list_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_list_.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed Google Play App List task by its `id`, returning apps from the top charts.
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_list_.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Google Play 榜单任务的结构化（advanced）结果，返回排行榜中的应用。

get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_list_.heading_zh: 获取 Google Play 榜单任务结果（HTML） get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_list_task_get_html_id
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_list_.desc_en: Collect the raw HTML results of a completed Google Play App List task by its `id`.
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_list_.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Google Play 榜单任务的原始 HTML 结果。

post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_list.heading_zh: 提交 Google Play 榜单任务 post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_list_task_post
post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_list.desc_en: Queue a Google Play App List task that returns apps from a specified top chart collection. Returns a task `id`.
post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_list.description_zh: 排队提交 Google Play 榜单任务，返回指定榜单集合中的应用。返回任务 `id`。

get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_listi.heading_zh: 列出 Google Play 应用分类 get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_listings_categories
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_listi.desc_en: Return the full list of app categories available on Google Play for app-listing searches.
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_listi.description_zh: 返回 Google Play 上可用于应用列表检索的全部应用分类。

post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_list.heading_zh: 实时检索 Google Play 应用列表 post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_listings_search_live
post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_list.desc_en: Search Google Play app listings in real time (Live mode) and return apps with ID, icon, reviews count, rating, price, and more in the same response.
post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_list.description_zh: 以实时（Live）方式检索 Google Play 应用列表，在同一响应中返回应用的 ID、图标、评论数、评分、价格等信息。

get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_revie.heading_zh: 获取 Google Play 评论任务结果（Advanced） get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_reviews_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_revie.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed Google Play App Reviews task by its `id`, including review ratings and content.
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_revie.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Google Play 评论任务的结构化（advanced）结果，含评论评分与内容。

post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_revi.heading_zh: 提交 Google Play 评论任务 post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_reviews_task_post
post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_revi.desc_en: Queue a Google Play App Reviews task for the app given in `app_id`. Returns a task `id` to collect later.
post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_revi.description_zh: 为 `app_id` 指定的应用排队提交 Google Play 评论任务。返回任务 `id`，稍后收取。

get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_searc.heading_zh: 获取 Google Play 关键词搜索任务结果（Advanced） get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_searches_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_searc.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed Google Play App Searches task by its `id`, listing apps ranking for the posted keyword.
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_searc.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Google Play 关键词搜索任务的结构化（advanced）结果，列出对应关键词下排名的应用。

get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_searc.heading_zh: 获取 Google Play 关键词搜索任务结果（HTML） get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_searches_task_get_html_id
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_searc.desc_en: Collect the raw HTML results of a completed Google Play App Searches task by its `id`.
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_searc.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Google Play 关键词搜索任务的原始 HTML 结果。

post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_sear.heading_zh: 提交 Google Play 关键词搜索任务 post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_searches_task_post
post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_sear.desc_en: Queue a Google Play App Searches task that returns apps ranking for a keyword. Returns a task `id`.
post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_sear.description_zh: 排队提交 Google Play 关键词搜索任务，返回某关键词下排名的应用。返回任务 `id`。

get_dataforseo_app_data_google_categorie.heading_zh: 列出 Google Play 应用分类 get_dataforseo_app_data_google_categories
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_categorie.desc_en: Return the full list of app categories available on Google Play.
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_categorie.description_zh: 返回 Google Play 上可用的全部应用分类。

get_dataforseo_app_data_google_languages.heading_zh: 列出 App Data Google 支持的语言 get_dataforseo_app_data_google_languages
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_languages.desc_en: Return the list of Google languages supported by the App Data API.
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_languages.description_zh: 返回 App Data API 支持的 Google 语言列表。

get_dataforseo_app_data_google_locations.heading_zh: 列出 App Data Google 支持的地区 get_dataforseo_app_data_google_locations
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_locations.desc_en: Return the list of Google locations supported by the App Data API.
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_locations.description_zh: 返回 App Data API 支持的 Google 地区列表。

post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technol.heading_zh: 聚合关联技术统计 aggregation_technologies
post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technol.desc_en: List the technologies most commonly used alongside the technologies, categories or groups you specify, with domain counts per group, category and technology.
post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technol.description_zh: 列出与你指定的技术、类别或分组常一起使用的热门技术，并给出按分组、类别、技术统计的域名数量。

post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technol.heading_zh: 查询单域名技术画像 domain_technologies
post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technol.desc_en: Return the full technology profile (plus meta, contact and locale data) of a single specified domain.
post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technol.description_zh: 返回单个指定域名的完整技术画像（含元信息、联系方式与地区数据）。

post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technol.heading_zh: 按 HTML 词条反查域名 domains_by_html_terms
post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technol.desc_en: Find domains whose homepage HTML contains the specified terms, returning each domain's technology profile and locale data.
post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technol.description_zh: 查找首页 HTML 包含指定词条的域名，并返回每个域名的技术画像与地区数据。

post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technol.desc_en: Find domains that use the specified technologies, groups, categories or keywords, returning each domain's technology profile and locale data.
post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technol.description_zh: 查找使用指定技术、分组、类别或关键词的域名，并返回每个域名的技术画像与地区数据。

get_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technolo.heading_zh: 查询技术接口可用过滤器 available_filters
get_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technolo.desc_en: List the filters available for the Domain Analytics Technologies endpoints, so you can build valid `filters` request fields. This endpoint is free.
get_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technolo.description_zh: 列出 Domain Analytics Technologies 各接口可用的过滤器，便于构建合法的请求字段 `filters`。该接口免费。

get_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technolo.heading_zh: 查询技术接口语言列表 languages
get_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technolo.desc_en: List the languages supported by the Domain Analytics Technologies endpoints. This endpoint is free.
get_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technolo.description_zh: 列出 Domain Analytics Technologies 接口支持的语言。该接口免费。

get_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technolo.heading_zh: 查询技术接口地区列表 locations
get_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technolo.desc_en: List the locations supported by the Domain Analytics Technologies endpoints. This endpoint is free.
get_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technolo.description_zh: 列出 Domain Analytics Technologies 接口支持的地区。该接口免费。

get_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technolo.heading_zh: 查询全部可检测技术目录 technologies
get_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technolo.desc_en: Return the full catalog of detectable technologies, organized into groups and categories; use the returned ids and names as selectors on the technology query endpoints.
get_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technolo.description_zh: 返回可检测技术的完整目录，按分组与类别组织；返回的 id 与名称可作为技术查询接口的选择器。

post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technol.heading_zh: 查询技术使用汇总 technologies_summary
post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technol.desc_en: Return how many domains, broken down by country and language, use the specified technologies, groups or categories.
post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technol.description_zh: 返回使用指定技术、分组或类别的域名数量，并按国家与语言拆分。

post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technol.heading_zh: 查询技术使用历史趋势 technology_stats
post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technol.desc_en: Return a historical time series of how many domains, by country and language, used a specified technology over a date range.
post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_technol.description_zh: 返回某项指定技术在某日期范围内被多少域名使用的历史时间序列，并按国家与语言拆分。

get_dataforseo_domain_analytics_whois_av.heading_zh: 查询 Whois 接口可用过滤器 available_filters
get_dataforseo_domain_analytics_whois_av.desc_en: List the filters available for the Domain Analytics Whois endpoint, so you can build valid `filters` request fields. This endpoint is free.
get_dataforseo_domain_analytics_whois_av.description_zh: 列出 Domain Analytics Whois 接口可用的过滤器，便于构建合法的请求字段 `filters`。该接口免费。

post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_whois_o.heading_zh: 查询域名 Whois 概览 whois_overview
post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_whois_o.desc_en: Return Whois records for domains matching your filters, enriched with backlink stats and organic/paid search ranking and traffic metrics.
post_dataforseo_domain_analytics_whois_o.description_zh: 返回匹配你过滤条件的域名 Whois 记录，并补充反链统计及自然/付费搜索的排名与流量指标。

get_dataforseo_content_analysis_categori.heading_zh: 查询内容分析分类列表 categories
get_dataforseo_content_analysis_categori.desc_en: Return the full list of Google product and service categories used by the Content Analysis endpoints, with their codes and parent codes.
get_dataforseo_content_analysis_categori.description_zh: 返回 Content Analysis 接口所用的 Google 产品与服务分类全表，含分类代码及父级代码。

post_dataforseo_content_analysis_categor.heading_zh: 查询分类引用趋势 category_trends
post_dataforseo_content_analysis_categor.desc_en: Return a time series of citation data for a target category over a date range, broken down by sentiment, page type, top domains, country and language.
post_dataforseo_content_analysis_categor.description_zh: 返回某目标分类在某日期范围内的引用数据时间序列，并按情感、页面类型、热门域名、国家与语言拆分。

get_dataforseo_content_analysis_availabl.heading_zh: 查询内容分析可用过滤器 available_filters
get_dataforseo_content_analysis_availabl.desc_en: List the filters available for the Content Analysis endpoints, so you can build valid `filters` request fields. This endpoint is free.
get_dataforseo_content_analysis_availabl.description_zh: 列出 Content Analysis 各接口可用的过滤器，便于构建合法的请求字段 `filters`。该接口免费。

get_dataforseo_content_analysis_language.heading_zh: 查询内容分析语言列表 languages
get_dataforseo_content_analysis_language.desc_en: List the languages supported by the Content Analysis endpoints. This endpoint is free.
get_dataforseo_content_analysis_language.description_zh: 列出 Content Analysis 接口支持的语言。该接口免费。

get_dataforseo_content_analysis_location.heading_zh: 查询内容分析地区列表 locations
get_dataforseo_content_analysis_location.desc_en: List the locations supported by the Content Analysis endpoints. This endpoint is free.
get_dataforseo_content_analysis_location.description_zh: 列出 Content Analysis 接口支持的地区。该接口免费。

post_dataforseo_content_analysis_phrase_.heading_zh: 查询关键词引用趋势 phrase_trends
post_dataforseo_content_analysis_phrase_.desc_en: Return a time series of citation data for a target keyword over a date range, broken down by sentiment, page type, top domains, country and language.
post_dataforseo_content_analysis_phrase_.description_zh: 返回某目标关键词在某日期范围内的引用数据时间序列，并按情感、页面类型、热门域名、国家与语言拆分。

post_dataforseo_content_analysis_rating_.heading_zh: 查询关键词评分分布 rating_distribution
post_dataforseo_content_analysis_rating_.desc_en: Return how citations of a target keyword are distributed across rating buckets, with the full citation metric breakdown per bucket.
post_dataforseo_content_analysis_rating_.description_zh: 返回目标关键词的引用在各评分区间上的分布，并给出每个区间的完整引用指标拆解。

post_dataforseo_content_analysis_search_.heading_zh: 查询关键词引用明细 search
post_dataforseo_content_analysis_search_.desc_en: Return detailed, citation-level data for a target keyword, including each citing URL's content, ratings, sentiment and ranking metrics.
post_dataforseo_content_analysis_search_.description_zh: 返回目标关键词的逐条引用明细数据，包含每个引用 URL 的内容、评分、情感与排名指标。

post_dataforseo_content_analysis_sentime.heading_zh: 查询关键词情感分析 sentiment_analysis
post_dataforseo_content_analysis_sentime.desc_en: Return sentiment analysis of a target keyword's citations, grouped by sentiment polarity and by emotional reaction, each with its own metric breakdown.
post_dataforseo_content_analysis_sentime.description_zh: 返回目标关键词引用的情感分析，按情感极性与情绪反应分组，每组各带其指标拆解。

post_dataforseo_content_analysis_summary.heading_zh: 查询关键词引用总览 summary
post_dataforseo_content_analysis_summary.desc_en: Return an overview of the citation data available for a target keyword, including rank, sentiment, top domains and category/locale breakdowns.
post_dataforseo_content_analysis_summary.description_zh: 返回目标关键词可用引用数据的总览，含排名、情感、热门域名及分类/地区拆解。

keywords.desc_en: Target keywords whose AI search-volume data you want to retrieve. Each entry is processed as a separate keyword.
keywords.title_zh: 需要查询 AI 搜索量的目标关键词，每个元素作为一个独立关键词处理。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name (e.g. `United States`). Provide this or `location_code`; the available values come from the corresponding Locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 完整的地理位置名称（如 `United States`）。与 `location_code` 二选一，可选值见对应的 Locations 列表接口。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier. Provide this or `location_name`; the available values come from the corresponding Locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 地理位置的数字标识。与 `location_name` 二选一，可选值见对应的 Locations 列表接口。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name (e.g. `English`). Provide this or `language_code`; the available values come from the corresponding Languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 完整的语言名称（如 `English`）。与 `language_code` 二选一，可选值见对应的 Languages 列表接口。

language_code.desc_en: Language code (e.g. `en`). Provide this or `language_name`; the available values come from the corresponding Languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 语言代码（如 `en`）。与 `language_name` 二选一，可选值见对应的 Languages 列表接口。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task, echoed back in the response so you can match results to requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签，会在响应中原样返回，便于将结果与请求对应。

version.desc_en: The API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本次响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response. Inspect it to detect request-level errors.
status_code.title_zh: 本次响应的总体状态码，用于判断请求级别的错误。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Total execution time of the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 请求的总执行时间（秒）。

cost.desc_en: Total cost of all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总费用（美元）。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of tasks in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的任务数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the `tasks` array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中返回错误的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: List of tasks created for this request.
tasks.title_zh: 为本次请求创建的任务列表。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier in UUID format.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识，UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Status code of this individual task. Use it to tell whether the task itself succeeded.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 该任务自身的状态码，用于判断单个任务是否成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Execution time of this task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该任务的执行时间（秒）。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Cost of this task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该任务的费用（美元）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API route segments of the endpoint that handled this task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 处理该任务的接口路由分段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you supplied for this task.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你为该任务提交的参数。

tasks.result.desc_en: Results produced by this task.
tasks.result.title_zh: 该任务产生的结果。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 回显请求中的地理位置代码。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request.

user_prompt.desc_en: The question or instruction sent to the AI model.
user_prompt.title_zh: 发送给 AI 模型的问题或指令。

model_name.desc_en: Which AI model to query. Combines the base model name and version; the available values come from the corresponding Models endpoint.
model_name.title_zh: 指定要调用的 AI 模型，由基础模型名与版本组成，可选值见对应的 Models 列表接口。

max_output_tokens.desc_en: Upper bound on the number of tokens the model may generate in its reply. Limits response length and cost.
max_output_tokens.title_zh: 模型回复可生成的最大 token 数，用于限制响应长度与成本。

temperature.desc_en: Sampling randomness: higher values make the output more varied, lower values make it more focused and deterministic.
temperature.title_zh: 采样随机度：值越高输出越多样，值越低输出越聚焦、越确定。

top_p.desc_en: Nucleus-sampling threshold controlling response diversity by limiting which tokens are eligible for selection.
top_p.title_zh: 核采样阈值，通过限制候选 token 的范围来控制响应的多样性。

web_search.desc_en: Whether the model may access and cite current web information when answering. When disabled, the model answers from its training knowledge only.
web_search.title_zh: 是否允许模型在作答时访问并引用实时网页信息；关闭时仅依据模型自身知识作答。

system_message.desc_en: Instructions that shape the AI's role, tone, or behavior, applied before the user prompt.
system_message.title_zh: 用于设定 AI 角色、语气或行为的系统指令，先于用户提示生效。

message_chain.desc_en: Prior conversation turns supplied as context. Each element is a message object carrying a role and its content.
message_chain.title_zh: 作为上下文传入的历史对话轮次，每个元素是带 role 与内容的消息对象。

use_reasoning.desc_en: Whether the model should perform an explicit reasoning step before answering. Supported only by reasoning-capable models.
use_reasoning.title_zh: 是否让模型在作答前执行显式推理步骤，仅推理类模型支持。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task, echoed back in the response so you can match results to requests.

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier in UUID format.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识，UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Status code of this individual task. Use it to tell whether the task itself succeeded.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 该任务自身的状态码，用于判断单个任务是否成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Execution time of this task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该任务的执行时间（秒）。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Cost of this task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该任务的费用（美元）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API route segments of the endpoint that handled this task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 处理该任务的接口路由分段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you supplied for this task.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你为该任务提交的参数。

result.desc_en: Results produced by this request.
result.title_zh: 本次请求产生的结果。

result.id.desc_en: Identifier of the completed task, in UUID format.
result.id.title_zh: 已完成任务的标识，UUID 格式。

result.se.desc_en: The search engine specified when the task was set.
result.se.title_zh: 设置任务时指定的搜索引擎。

result.function.desc_en: The search-engine function of the task (e.g. `llm_scraper`).
result.function.title_zh: 任务的搜索引擎功能（如 `llm_scraper`）。

result.date_posted.desc_en: When the task was submitted, in UTC.

result.tag.desc_en: Your own label supplied when the task was set.
result.tag.title_zh: 设置任务时你自定义的标签。

result.endpoint_advanced.desc_en: URL to collect the Advanced results of the task; null when Advanced is unsupported.
result.endpoint_advanced.title_zh: 领取该任务 Advanced 结果的 URL；不支持 Advanced 时为 null。

result.endpoint_html.desc_en: URL to collect the HTML results of the task; null when HTML is unsupported.
result.endpoint_html.title_zh: 领取该任务 HTML 结果的 URL；不支持 HTML 时为 null。

target.desc_en: The entities to analyze. Each element is a domain entity or keyword entity describing what to track in LLM mentions.
target.title_zh: 要分析的目标实体集合，每个元素为描述待追踪对象的域名实体或关键词实体。

domain_entity.desc_en: A target specified as a domain, with its own search filter and scope.
domain_entity.title_zh: 以域名形式指定的目标，带有自己的搜索过滤与范围设置。

domain.desc_en: The target domain to track. Provide this or `keyword` within the entity.
domain.title_zh: 要追踪的目标域名，与实体内的 `keyword` 二选一。

search_filter.desc_en: Whether matches for this target are included in or excluded from the analysis.
search_filter.title_zh: 该目标的命中结果是纳入还是排除于分析。

search_scope.desc_en: Which parts of the LLM interaction to search for the target, such as the question, answer, brand entities, or fan-out queries.
search_scope.title_zh: 在 LLM 交互的哪些部分中搜索该目标，如问题、回答、品牌实体或扩展查询等。

include_subdomains.desc_en: Whether subdomains of the target domain are counted as matches.
include_subdomains.title_zh: 是否将目标域名的子域名计为命中。

keyword_entity.desc_en: A target specified as a keyword, with its own search filter, scope, and match type.
keyword_entity.title_zh: 以关键词形式指定的目标，带有自己的搜索过滤、范围与匹配方式设置。

keyword.desc_en: The single search term to look up.
keyword.title_zh: 用于查询的单个搜索词。

match_type.desc_en: How the keyword is matched against text: word-level full-text matching or partial matching.
match_type.title_zh: 关键词与文本的匹配方式：按词的全文匹配或部分匹配。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name (e.g. `United States`). Provide this or `location_code`; the available values come from the corresponding Locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 完整的地理位置名称（如 `United States`）。与 `location_code` 二选一，可选值见对应的 Locations 列表接口。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier. Provide this or `location_name`; the available values come from the corresponding Locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 地理位置的数字标识。与 `location_name` 二选一，可选值见对应的 Locations 列表接口。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name (e.g. `English`). Provide this or `language_code`; the available values come from the corresponding Languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 完整的语言名称（如 `English`）。与 `language_code` 二选一，可选值见对应的 Languages 列表接口。

language_code.desc_en: Language code (e.g. `en`). Provide this or `language_name`; the available values come from the corresponding Languages endpoint.

platform.desc_en: Which AI platform the data is drawn from. The returned data depends on the selected platform.

initial_dataset_filters.desc_en: Filter expressions applied to the raw mentions data before aggregation.

internal_list_limit.desc_en: Caps the number of elements returned within each nested array in the result.

target.desc_en: The entities to analyze. Each element is a domain entity or keyword entity describing what to track in LLM mentions.
target.title_zh: 要分析的目标实体集合，每个元素为描述待追踪对象的域名实体或关键词实体。

domain_entity.desc_en: A target specified as a domain, with its own search filter and scope.
domain_entity.title_zh: 以域名形式指定的目标，带有自己的搜索过滤与范围设置。

domain.desc_en: The target domain to track. Provide this or `keyword` within the entity.
domain.title_zh: 要追踪的目标域名，与实体内的 `keyword` 二选一。

search_filter.desc_en: Whether matches for this target are included in or excluded from the analysis.
search_filter.title_zh: 该目标的命中结果是纳入还是排除于分析。

search_scope.desc_en: Which parts of the LLM interaction to search for the target, such as the question, answer, brand entities, or fan-out queries.
search_scope.title_zh: 在 LLM 交互的哪些部分中搜索该目标，如问题、回答、品牌实体或扩展查询等。

include_subdomains.desc_en: Whether subdomains of the target domain are counted as matches.
include_subdomains.title_zh: 是否将目标域名的子域名计为命中。

keyword_entity.desc_en: A target specified as a keyword, with its own search filter, scope, and match type.
keyword_entity.title_zh: 以关键词形式指定的目标，带有自己的搜索过滤、范围与匹配方式设置。

keyword.desc_en: The single search term to look up.
keyword.title_zh: 用于查询的单个搜索词。

match_type.desc_en: How the keyword is matched against text: word-level full-text matching or partial matching.
match_type.title_zh: 关键词与文本的匹配方式：按词的全文匹配或部分匹配。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name (e.g. `United States`). Provide this or `location_code`; the available values come from the corresponding Locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 完整的地理位置名称（如 `United States`）。与 `location_code` 二选一，可选值见对应的 Locations 列表接口。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier. Provide this or `location_name`; the available values come from the corresponding Locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 地理位置的数字标识。与 `location_name` 二选一，可选值见对应的 Locations 列表接口。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name (e.g. `English`). Provide this or `language_code`; the available values come from the corresponding Languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 完整的语言名称（如 `English`）。与 `language_code` 二选一，可选值见对应的 Languages 列表接口。

language_code.desc_en: Language code (e.g. `en`). Provide this or `language_name`; the available values come from the corresponding Languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 语言代码（如 `en`）。与 `language_name` 二选一，可选值见对应的 Languages 列表接口。

platform.desc_en: Which AI platform the data is drawn from. The returned data depends on the selected platform.

filters.desc_en: Filtering rules applied to the returned results. Multiple filters can be combined with logical operators.
filters.title_zh: 应用于返回结果的过滤规则，可用逻辑运算符组合多个过滤条件。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules for the returned results, using ascending or descending order on selected fields.
order_by.title_zh: 返回结果的排序规则，按选定字段升序或降序排列。

offset.desc_en: Number of leading results to skip in the returned array, used for paging.
offset.title_zh: 返回数组中跳过的起始结果数，用于分页。

search_after_token.desc_en: Cursor token from a previous response; pass it to fetch the next batch of results without time-window limits.
search_after_token.title_zh: 上一次响应返回的游标令牌，传入后可获取下一批结果且不受时间窗口限制。

limit.desc_en: Maximum number of objects to return.
limit.title_zh: 返回对象的最大数量。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task, echoed back in the response so you can match results to requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签，会在响应中原样返回，便于将结果与请求对应。

version.desc_en: The API version that produced this response.

target.desc_en: The entities to analyze. Each element is a domain entity or keyword entity describing what to track in LLM mentions.
target.title_zh: 要分析的目标实体集合，每个元素为描述待追踪对象的域名实体或关键词实体。

domain_entity.desc_en: A target specified as a domain, with its own search filter and scope.
domain_entity.title_zh: 以域名形式指定的目标，带有自己的搜索过滤与范围设置。

domain.desc_en: The target domain to track. Provide this or `keyword` within the entity.
domain.title_zh: 要追踪的目标域名，与实体内的 `keyword` 二选一。

search_filter.desc_en: Whether matches for this target are included in or excluded from the analysis.
search_filter.title_zh: 该目标的命中结果是纳入还是排除于分析。

search_scope.desc_en: Which parts of the LLM interaction to search for the target, such as the question, answer, brand entities, or fan-out queries.
search_scope.title_zh: 在 LLM 交互的哪些部分中搜索该目标，如问题、回答、品牌实体或扩展查询等。

include_subdomains.desc_en: Whether subdomains of the target domain are counted as matches.
include_subdomains.title_zh: 是否将目标域名的子域名计为命中。

keyword_entity.desc_en: A target specified as a keyword, with its own search filter, scope, and match type.
keyword_entity.title_zh: 以关键词形式指定的目标，带有自己的搜索过滤、范围与匹配方式设置。

keyword.desc_en: The single search term to look up.
keyword.title_zh: 用于查询的单个搜索词。

match_type.desc_en: How the keyword is matched against text: word-level full-text matching or partial matching.
match_type.title_zh: 关键词与文本的匹配方式：按词的全文匹配或部分匹配。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name (e.g. `United States`). Provide this or `location_code`; the available values come from the corresponding Locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 完整的地理位置名称（如 `United States`）。与 `location_code` 二选一，可选值见对应的 Locations 列表接口。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier. Provide this or `location_name`; the available values come from the corresponding Locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 地理位置的数字标识。与 `location_name` 二选一，可选值见对应的 Locations 列表接口。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name (e.g. `English`). Provide this or `language_code`; the available values come from the corresponding Languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 完整的语言名称（如 `English`）。与 `language_code` 二选一，可选值见对应的 Languages 列表接口。

language_code.desc_en: Language code (e.g. `en`). Provide this or `language_name`; the available values come from the corresponding Languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 语言代码（如 `en`）。与 `language_name` 二选一，可选值见对应的 Languages 列表接口。

platform.desc_en: Which AI platform the data is drawn from. The returned data depends on the selected platform.
platform.title_zh: 数据来源的 AI 平台，返回数据随所选平台而不同。

links_scope.desc_en: Which links are used to extract domains/pages and their aggregation data.
links_scope.title_zh: 用于提取域名/页面及其聚合数据的链接范围。

initial_dataset_filters.desc_en: Filter expressions applied to the raw mentions data before aggregation.
initial_dataset_filters.title_zh: 在聚合之前对原始 mentions 数据应用的过滤表达式。

items_list_limit.desc_en: Caps the number of objects returned in the top-level `items` array.
items_list_limit.title_zh: 限制顶层 `items` 数组返回的对象数量。

internal_list_limit.desc_en: Caps the number of elements returned within each nested array in the result.
internal_list_limit.title_zh: 限制结果中每个内嵌数组返回的元素数量。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task, echoed back in the response so you can match results to requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签，会在响应中原样返回，便于将结果与请求对应。

version.desc_en: The API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本次响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response. Inspect it to detect request-level errors.
status_code.title_zh: 本次响应的总体状态码，用于判断请求级别的错误。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Total execution time of the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 请求的总执行时间（秒）。

cost.desc_en: Total cost of all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总费用（美元）。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of tasks in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的任务数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the `tasks` array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中返回错误的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: List of tasks created for this request.
tasks.title_zh: 为本次请求创建的任务列表。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier in UUID format.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识，UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Status code of this individual task. Use it to tell whether the task itself succeeded.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 该任务自身的状态码，用于判断单个任务是否成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Execution time of this task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该任务的执行时间（秒）。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Cost of this task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该任务的费用（美元）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API route segments of the endpoint that handled this task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 处理该任务的接口路由分段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you supplied for this task.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你为该任务提交的参数。

tasks.result.desc_en: Results produced by this task.
tasks.result.title_zh: 该任务产生的结果。

tasks.result.total.desc_en: Overall aggregated LLM-mention metrics for the target, grouped along several dimensions.
tasks.result.total.title_zh: 针对目标的整体 LLM 提及聚合指标，按多个维度分组。

user_prompt.desc_en: The question or instruction sent to the AI model.
user_prompt.title_zh: 发送给 AI 模型的问题或指令。

model_name.desc_en: Which AI model to query. Combines the base model name and version; the available values come from the corresponding Models endpoint.
model_name.title_zh: 指定要调用的 AI 模型，由基础模型名与版本组成，可选值见对应的 Models 列表接口。

max_output_tokens.desc_en: Upper bound on the number of tokens the model may generate in its reply. Limits response length and cost.
max_output_tokens.title_zh: 模型回复可生成的最大 token 数，用于限制响应长度与成本。

temperature.desc_en: Sampling randomness: higher values make the output more varied, lower values make it more focused and deterministic.
temperature.title_zh: 采样随机度：值越高输出越多样，值越低输出越聚焦、越确定。

top_p.desc_en: Nucleus-sampling threshold controlling response diversity by limiting which tokens are eligible for selection.
top_p.title_zh: 核采样阈值，通过限制候选 token 的范围来控制响应的多样性。

web_search_country_iso_code.desc_en: ISO country code used to localize web-search results.
web_search_country_iso_code.title_zh: 用于本地化网页搜索结果的 ISO 国家代码。

system_message.desc_en: Instructions that shape the AI's role, tone, or behavior, applied before the user prompt.
system_message.title_zh: 用于设定 AI 角色、语气或行为的系统指令，先于用户提示生效。

message_chain.desc_en: Prior conversation turns supplied as context. Each element is a message object carrying a role and its content.
message_chain.title_zh: 作为上下文传入的历史对话轮次，每个元素是带 role 与内容的消息对象。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task, echoed back in the response so you can match results to requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签，会在响应中原样返回，便于将结果与请求对应。

version.desc_en: The API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本次响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response. Inspect it to detect request-level errors.
status_code.title_zh: 本次响应的总体状态码，用于判断请求级别的错误。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Total execution time of the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 请求的总执行时间（秒）。

cost.desc_en: Total cost of all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总费用（美元）。
