tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Number of search results the engine reports for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 搜索引擎为该关键词报告的搜索结果数量。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.l.desc_en: When this data was last refreshed, in UTC (“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”).
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.l.title_zh: 该数据最近一次刷新的时间,UTC 格式(“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”)。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.p.desc_en: When this data was refreshed prior to the most recent update, in UTC.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.p.title_zh: 该数据在最近一次更新之前的刷新时间,UTC 格式。

app_id.desc_en: Target Google Play app's ID, taken from the store URL; competitors are computed relative to this app.
app_id.title_zh: 目标 Google Play 应用的 ID,取自商店页 URL;竞品以该应用为基准计算。

location_name.desc_en: Geographic target given by its full location name; supply either this or location_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 以完整地区名称指定的地理目标;与 location_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

location_code.desc_en: Geographic target given by its numeric location code; supply either this or location_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 以数字地区代码指定的地理目标;与 location_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 以完整名称指定的目标语言;与 language_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

language_code.desc_en: Target language given by its short code; supply either this or language_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 以简码指定的目标语言;与 language_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

filters.desc_en: Conditions that narrow the result set; combine clauses with the and / or logical operators. Reference fields by their response dotpath (e.g. metrics.organic.pos_1).
filters.title_zh: 用于收窄结果集的筛选条件;子句之间以 and / or 逻辑运算符组合。字段以其响应点路径引用(如 metrics.organic.pos_1)。
filters.annotation: 源码描述的运算符与最大条件数在各接口间不一致且部分符号被渲染截断，具体可用运算符与上限请以原生 description 为准，待研发确认。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules over the same fields usable in filters; each rule pairs a field with an asc or desc direction.
order_by.title_zh: 针对 filters 中可用字段的排序规则;每条规则将一个字段与 asc 或 desc 方向配对。

limit.desc_en: Caps how many records are returned in the results array.
limit.title_zh: 限定 results 数组中返回的记录条数上限。

offset.desc_en: Skips this many leading records in the results array, for paging through results.
offset.title_zh: 跳过 results 数组开头的指定条数记录,用于分页浏览结果。

tag.desc_en: Free-form label you attach to the task so you can match it to its result later; echoed back in the response data object.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务附加的自定义标签,便于事后将任务与结果对应;会在响应的 data 对象中原样回传。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中任务对象的数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the tasks array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: tasks 数组中以错误返回的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per task in the request batch.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表,请求批次中每个任务对应一项。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier in UUID format.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在系统中的唯一标识,采用 UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 本任务 result 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced the task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径分段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied in the request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 对请求中所传参数的回传。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for the task.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果数据。

tasks.result.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.app_id.desc_en: App store ID; in results, the app this record describes.
tasks.result.app_id.title_zh: 应用商店 ID;在结果中为该记录所描述的应用。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的地区代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的语言代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of matching records in the database for this request, which may exceed the number returned.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中匹配本请求的记录总数,可能多于实际返回的条数。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of records returned in this items array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本 items 数组中返回的记录数量。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Returned records carrying the core data of this endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 返回的记录,承载本接口的核心数据。

tasks.result.items.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.app_id.desc_en: App store ID; in results, the app this record describes.
tasks.result.items.app_id.title_zh: 应用商店 ID;在结果中为该记录所描述的应用。

tasks.result.items.avg_position.desc_en: Average SERP position of the entity across the matched keywords.
tasks.result.items.avg_position.title_zh: 实体在匹配关键词上的平均 SERP 排名位置。

tasks.result.items.sum_position.desc_en: Sum of the entity's positions across the intersected keywords.
tasks.result.items.sum_position.title_zh: 实体在交集关键词上各排名位置之和。

tasks.result.items.intersections.desc_en: Number of keywords the entity shares with the target.
tasks.result.items.intersections.title_zh: 实体与目标共有的关键词数量。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.desc_en: Ranking metrics over the keywords this competitor shares with the target.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.title_zh: 该竞争方与目标共有关键词上的排名指标。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.go.desc_en: Ranking data from Google Play organic search.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.go.title_zh: 来自 Google Play 自然搜索的排名数据。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.go.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks #1.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.go.title_zh: 实体排名第 1 的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.go.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 2-3.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.go.title_zh: 实体排名第 2 至 3 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.go.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 4-10.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.go.title_zh: 实体排名第 4 至 10 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.go.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 11-100.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.go.title_zh: 实体排名第 11 至 100 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.go.desc_en: Total count of SERPs of this type that contain the entity.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.go.title_zh: 包含该实体的此类 SERP 总数。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.go.desc_en: Approximate average monthly search volume for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.go.title_zh: 关键词的近似月均搜索量。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.desc_en: Ranking metrics over all keywords this entity ranks for, not just the shared ones.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.title_zh: 该主体所有排名关键词(而非仅共有关键词)上的排名指标。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.google_p.desc_en: Ranking data from Google Play organic search.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.google_p.title_zh: 来自 Google Play 自然搜索的排名数据。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.google_p.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks #1.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.google_p.title_zh: 实体排名第 1 的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.google_p.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 2-3.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.google_p.title_zh: 实体排名第 2 至 3 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.google_p.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 4-10.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.google_p.title_zh: 实体排名第 4 至 10 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.google_p.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 11-100.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.google_p.title_zh: 实体排名第 11 至 100 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.google_p.desc_en: Total count of SERPs of this type that contain the entity.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.google_p.title_zh: 包含该实体的此类 SERP 总数。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.google_p.desc_en: Approximate average monthly search volume for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.google_p.title_zh: 关键词的近似月均搜索量。

keywords.title_zh: 单次请求要处理的目标关键词;以 UTF-8 提供,匹配前会被统一转为小写。

tasks.result.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本 items 数组中返回的记录数量。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Returned records carrying the core data of this endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 返回的记录,承载本接口的核心数据。

tasks.result.items.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.keyword.title_zh: 该记录所描述的关键词。

tasks.result.items.keyword_difficulty.desc_en: How hard it is to rank in the top-10 organic results for the keyword, on a 0-to-100 logarithmic scale derived from the link profiles of the current top-10 pages.
tasks.result.items.keyword_difficulty.title_zh: 关键词进入前 10 自然结果的难度,采用 0 至 100 的对数刻度,依据当前前 10 页面的外链情况计算。

target.desc_en: Target domain or subdomain to analyze; specify it without the https:// scheme and without the www. prefix.
target.title_zh: 要分析的目标域名或子域名;指定时不带 https:// 协议头,也不带 www. 前缀。

location_name.desc_en: Geographic target given by its full location name; supply either this or location_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 以完整地区名称指定的地理目标;与 location_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

location_code.desc_en: Geographic target given by its numeric location code; supply either this or location_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 以数字地区代码指定的地理目标;与 location_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 以完整名称指定的目标语言;与 language_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

language_code.desc_en: Target language given by its short code; supply either this or language_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 以简码指定的目标语言;与 language_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

include_subcategories.desc_en: When true, results also span the subcategories of matched categories; when false, only top-level categories are considered.
include_subcategories.title_zh: 为 true 时,结果一并覆盖命中类目的子类目;为 false 时仅考虑顶层类目。

include_clickstream_data.desc_en: When true, enriches the response with clickstream-based metrics (such as clickstream search volume and gender/age distributions). Leaving it off keeps those fields empty.
include_clickstream_data.title_zh: 为 true 时,在响应中附加基于点击流的指标(如点击流搜索量、性别/年龄分布)。不开启则相关字段为空。

historical_serp_mode.desc_en: Controls which SERPs are counted: live keeps only SERPs where the target currently ranks, while lost keeps SERPs where it ranked before but no longer does.
historical_serp_mode.title_zh: 控制纳入统计的 SERP 范围:live 仅保留目标当前仍有排名的 SERP,lost 则保留目标曾经有过、现已失去排名的 SERP。

item_types.desc_en: Restricts results to the listed SERP result types; the first type listed also determines the default ordering of results.
item_types.title_zh: 将结果限定为所列的 SERP 结果类型;数组中的首个类型同时决定结果的默认排序依据。

filters.desc_en: Conditions that narrow the result set; combine clauses with the and / or logical operators. Reference fields by their response dotpath (e.g. metrics.organic.pos_1).
filters.title_zh: 用于收窄结果集的筛选条件;子句之间以 and / or 逻辑运算符组合。字段以其响应点路径引用(如 metrics.organic.pos_1)。
filters.annotation: 源码描述的运算符与最大条件数在各接口间不一致且部分符号被渲染截断，具体可用运算符与上限请以原生 description 为准，待研发确认。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules over the same fields usable in filters; each rule pairs a field with an asc or desc direction.
order_by.title_zh: 针对 filters 中可用字段的排序规则;每条规则将一个字段与 asc 或 desc 方向配对。

limit.desc_en: Caps how many records are returned in the results array.
limit.title_zh: 限定 results 数组中返回的记录条数上限。

offset.desc_en: Skips this many leading records in the results array, for paging through results.
offset.title_zh: 跳过 results 数组开头的指定条数记录,用于分页浏览结果。

tag.desc_en: Free-form label you attach to the task so you can match it to its result later; echoed back in the response data object.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务附加的自定义标签,便于事后将任务与结果对应;会在响应的 data 对象中原样回传。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中任务对象的数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the tasks array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: tasks 数组中以错误返回的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per task in the request batch.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表,请求批次中每个任务对应一项。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier in UUID format.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在系统中的唯一标识,采用 UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 本任务 result 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced the task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径分段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied in the request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 对请求中所传参数的回传。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for the task.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果数据。

tasks.result.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.target.desc_en: Target domain echoed from the request.
tasks.result.target.title_zh: 从请求回传的目标域名。

tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的地区代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的语言代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中匹配本请求的记录总数,可能多于实际返回的条数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.featured_snip.desc_en: Estimated monthly traffic volume, computed as the sum of search volume times click-through rate over the entity's ranking keywords.
tasks.result.items.metrics.featured_snip.title_zh: 估算月度流量,按该实体排名关键词的搜索量与点击率乘积求和得出。

tasks.result.items.metrics.featured_snip.desc_en: Total count of SERPs of this type that contain the entity.
tasks.result.items.metrics.featured_snip.title_zh: 包含该实体的此类 SERP 总数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.local_pack.desc_en: Ranking and traffic data from local pack results.
tasks.result.items.metrics.local_pack.title_zh: 来自 local pack 结果的排名与流量数据。

tasks.result.items.metrics.local_pack.ye.desc_en: Calendar year the data point belongs to.

tasks.result.items.metrics.local_pack.mo.desc_en: Calendar month the data point belongs to.

tasks.result.items.metrics.local_pack.et.desc_en: Estimated monthly traffic volume, computed as the sum of search volume times click-through rate over the entity's ranking keywords.
tasks.result.items.metrics.local_pack.et.title_zh: 估算月度流量,按该实体排名关键词的搜索量与点击率乘积求和得出。

tasks.result.items.metrics.local_pack.co.desc_en: Total count of SERPs of this type that contain the entity.
tasks.result.items.metrics.local_pack.co.title_zh: 包含该实体的此类 SERP 总数。

target.desc_en: Target domain or subdomain to analyze; specify it without the https:// scheme and without the www. prefix.
target.title_zh: 要分析的目标域名或子域名;指定时不带 https:// 协议头,也不带 www. 前缀。

location_name.desc_en: Geographic target given by its full location name; supply either this or location_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 以完整地区名称指定的地理目标;与 location_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

location_code.desc_en: Geographic target given by its numeric location code; supply either this or location_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 以数字地区代码指定的地理目标;与 location_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 以完整名称指定的目标语言;与 language_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

language_code.desc_en: Target language given by its short code; supply either this or language_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 以简码指定的目标语言;与 language_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

date_from.desc_en: Start of the historical time range, formatted yyyy-mm-dd.
date_from.title_zh: 历史时间范围的起始日期,格式为 yyyy-mm-dd。

date_to.desc_en: End of the historical time range, formatted yyyy-mm-dd.
date_to.title_zh: 历史时间范围的结束日期,格式为 yyyy-mm-dd。

correlate.desc_en: When enabled, aligns the returned series with previously obtained datasets to smooth over inconsistencies introduced by database changes.
correlate.title_zh: 开启后,将返回的序列与此前获取的数据集对齐,以平滑因数据库变更带来的不一致。

ignore_synonyms.desc_en: When true, collapses highly similar keywords and returns only the core keyword of each cluster.
ignore_synonyms.title_zh: 为 true 时,合并高度相似的关键词,每个簇仅返回核心关键词。

include_clickstream_data.desc_en: When true, enriches the response with clickstream-based metrics (such as clickstream search volume and gender/age distributions). Leaving it off keeps those fields empty.
include_clickstream_data.title_zh: 为 true 时,在响应中附加基于点击流的指标(如点击流搜索量、性别/年龄分布)。不开启则相关字段为空。

tag.desc_en: Free-form label you attach to the task so you can match it to its result later; echoed back in the response data object.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务附加的自定义标签,便于事后将任务与结果对应;会在响应的 data 对象中原样回传。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中任务对象的数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the tasks array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: tasks 数组中以错误返回的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per task in the request batch.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表,请求批次中每个任务对应一项。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier in UUID format.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在系统中的唯一标识,采用 UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 本任务 result 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced the task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径分段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied in the request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 对请求中所传参数的回传。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for the task.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果数据。

tasks.result.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.target.desc_en: Target domain echoed from the request.
tasks.result.target.title_zh: 从请求回传的目标域名。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的地区代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的语言代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of matching records in the database for this request, which may exceed the number returned.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中匹配本请求的记录总数,可能多于实际返回的条数。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of records returned in this items array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本 items 数组中返回的记录数量。

tasks.result.items.title_zh: 返回的记录,承载本接口的核心数据。

tasks.result.items.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 以完整名称指定的目标语言;与 language_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

language_code.desc_en: Target language given by its short code; supply either this or language_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 以简码指定的目标语言;与 language_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

include_serp_info.desc_en: When true, attaches a serp_info block per keyword with SERP-level data such as result count, a check URL, and the SERP feature types present.
include_serp_info.title_zh: 为 true 时,为每个关键词附加 serp_info 块,包含结果数量、核对 URL 及 SERP 中出现的功能类型等 SERP 级数据。

include_clickstream_data.desc_en: When true, enriches the response with clickstream-based metrics (such as clickstream search volume and gender/age distributions). Leaving it off keeps those fields empty.
include_clickstream_data.title_zh: 为 true 时,在响应中附加基于点击流的指标(如点击流搜索量、性别/年龄分布)。不开启则相关字段为空。

tag.desc_en: Free-form label you attach to the task so you can match it to its result later; echoed back in the response data object.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务附加的自定义标签,便于事后将任务与结果对应;会在响应的 data 对象中原样回传。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中任务对象的数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the tasks array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: tasks 数组中以错误返回的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per task in the request batch.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表,请求批次中每个任务对应一项。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier in UUID format.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在系统中的唯一标识,采用 UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 本任务 result 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced the task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径分段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied in the request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 对请求中所传参数的回传。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for the task.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果数据。

tasks.result.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的地区代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的语言代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of records returned in this items array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本 items 数组中返回的记录数量。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Returned records carrying the core data of this endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 返回的记录,承载本接口的核心数据。

tasks.result.items.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.keyword.title_zh: 该记录所描述的关键词。

tasks.result.items.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.items.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的地区代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.items.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.items.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的语言代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.items.search_partners.desc_en: True when figures include Google search partner sites in addition to Google itself.
tasks.result.items.search_partners.title_zh: 为 true 时,数值除 Google 自身外还纳入 Google 搜索合作网站。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.desc_en: Core keyword metrics block (volume, competition, bids, categories, and history).
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.title_zh: 核心关键词指标块(搜索量、竞争度、出价、类目与历史)。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.last_upd.desc_en: When this data was last refreshed, in UTC (“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”).
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.last_upd.title_zh: 该数据最近一次刷新的时间,UTC 格式(“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”)。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.competit.desc_en: Relative amount of paid competition for the keyword, derived from Google Ads data on a 0-to-1 scale.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.competit.title_zh: 关键词的相对付费竞争程度,基于 Google Ads 数据,取值范围 0 至 1。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.competit.desc_en: Bucketed paid-competition level for the keyword; LOW, MEDIUM, and HIGH denote increasing competition, and an unknown level is null.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.competit.title_zh: 关键词付费竞争的分档:LOW、MEDIUM、HIGH 依次表示竞争由低到高,未知时为 null。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.cpc.desc_en: Average historical cost per click for the keyword, in USD.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.cpc.title_zh: 关键词历史平均的单次点击成本,单位为美元。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.search_v.desc_en: Approximate average monthly search volume for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.search_v.title_zh: 关键词的近似月均搜索量。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.low_top_.desc_en: Lower-end top-of-page bid estimate (around the 20th percentile of winning bids), varying by the requested location.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.low_top_.title_zh: 页首广告出价的低端估计(约为中标出价的 20 分位),随请求地区而变。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.high_top.desc_en: Upper-end top-of-page bid estimate (around the 80th percentile of winning bids), varying by the requested location.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.high_top.title_zh: 页首广告出价的高端估计(约为中标出价的 80 分位),随请求地区而变。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.categori.desc_en: Product and service category IDs the keyword belongs to; the full category list is downloadable from DataForSEO.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.categori.title_zh: 关键词所属的产品与服务类目 ID;完整类目清单可从 DataForSEO 下载。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.monthly_.desc_en: Per-month search volume history for roughly the trailing twelve months.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.monthly_.title_zh: 约近 12 个月的逐月搜索量历史。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.monthly_.desc_en: Calendar year the data point belongs to.

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.monthly_.title_zh: 该数据点所属的月份。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.search_v.desc_en: Search volume change in percent versus the previous month.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.search_v.title_zh: 搜索量相对上月的百分比变化。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.search_v.title_zh: 搜索量相对上季度的百分比变化。

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.desc_en: Additional descriptive properties of the keyword (clustering, difficulty, language).
tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.title_zh: 关键词的附加描述性属性(聚类、难度、语言)。

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.se.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.se.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.co.desc_en: Representative keyword of the synonym cluster this keyword belongs to; null when no synonym cluster was identified.
tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.co.title_zh: 该关键词所属同义簇的代表关键词;未识别出同义簇时为 null。

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.sy.desc_en: Which clustering method grouped this keyword: keyword_metrics uses keyword_info signals, text_processing uses text analysis; null when no cluster was found.
tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.sy.title_zh: 对该关键词聚类所用的方法:keyword_metrics 基于 keyword_info 指标,text_processing 基于文本分析;未成簇时为 null。

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.ke.desc_en: How hard it is to rank in the top-10 organic results for the keyword, on a 0-to-100 logarithmic scale derived from the link profiles of the current top-10 pages.
tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.ke.title_zh: 关键词进入前 10 自然结果的难度,采用 0 至 100 的对数刻度,依据当前前 10 页面的外链情况计算。

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.de.desc_en: Language of the keyword as identified by DataForSEO's detector.
tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.de.title_zh: DataForSEO 检测器识别出的关键词语言。

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.is.desc_en: True when the detected keyword language differs from the language set in the request.
tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.is.title_zh: 当检测到的关键词语言与请求所设语言不一致时为 true。

tasks.result.items.serp_info.desc_en: SERP-level data for the keyword; null unless include_serp_info was set and SERP data exists for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.serp_info.title_zh: 关键词的 SERP 级数据;除非设置了 include_serp_info 且数据库存有该关键词的 SERP 数据,否则为 null。

tasks.result.items.serp_info.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.serp_info.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.serp_info.check_url.desc_en: Direct URL to the live search results, usable to verify the returned data.
tasks.result.items.serp_info.check_url.title_zh: 指向实时搜索结果的直达 URL,可用于核对返回数据。

tasks.result.items.serp_info.serp_item_t.desc_en: The kinds of SERP features (items) found in the results for this keyword.
tasks.result.items.serp_info.serp_item_t.title_zh: 该关键词结果中出现的 SERP 功能(item)类型。

tasks.result.items.serp_info.se_results_.desc_en: Number of search results the engine reports for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.serp_info.se_results_.title_zh: 搜索引擎为该关键词报告的搜索结果数量。

tasks.result.items.serp_info.last_update.desc_en: When this data was last refreshed, in UTC (“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”).
tasks.result.items.serp_info.last_update.title_zh: 该数据最近一次刷新的时间,UTC 格式(“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”)。

tasks.result.items.serp_info.previous_up.desc_en: When this data was refreshed prior to the most recent update, in UTC.
tasks.result.items.serp_info.previous_up.title_zh: 该数据在最近一次更新之前的刷新时间,UTC 格式。

tasks.result.items.avg_backlinks_info.title_zh: 关键词前 10 自然排名页面的平均外链画像。

tasks.result.items.avg_backlinks_info.do.title_zh: 排名靠前页面的平均 dofollow 外链数量。

tasks.result.items.avg_backlinks_info.re.title_zh: 排名靠前页面的平均引荐页面数量。

tasks.result.items.avg_backlinks_info.ra.title_zh: 排名靠前页面的平均页面级 rank 分值。

tasks.result.items.avg_backlinks_info.ma.title_zh: 排名靠前页面的平均域名级 rank 分值。

tasks.result.items.avg_backlinks_info.la.title_zh: 该数据最近一次刷新的时间,UTC 格式(“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”)。

tasks.result.items.search_intent_info.fo.title_zh: 关键词除主意图外还表现出的次要搜索意图。

tasks.result.items.search_intent_info.la.desc_en: When this data was last refreshed, in UTC (“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”).
tasks.result.items.search_intent_info.la.title_zh: 该数据最近一次刷新的时间,UTC 格式(“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”)。

app_id.desc_en: Target Google Play app's ID, taken from the store URL; results cover the keywords this app ranks for.
app_id.title_zh: 目标 Google Play 应用的 ID,取自商店页 URL;结果覆盖该应用所排名的关键词。

location_name.desc_en: Geographic target given by its full location name; supply either this or location_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 以完整地区名称指定的地理目标;与 location_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

location_code.desc_en: Geographic target given by its numeric location code; supply either this or location_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 以数字地区代码指定的地理目标;与 location_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 以完整名称指定的目标语言;与 language_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

language_code.desc_en: Target language given by its short code; supply either this or language_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 以简码指定的目标语言;与 language_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

filters.desc_en: Conditions that narrow the result set; combine clauses with the and / or logical operators. Reference fields by their response dotpath (e.g. metrics.organic.pos_1).
filters.title_zh: 用于收窄结果集的筛选条件;子句之间以 and / or 逻辑运算符组合。字段以其响应点路径引用(如 metrics.organic.pos_1)。
filters.annotation: 源码描述的运算符与最大条件数在各接口间不一致且部分符号被渲染截断，具体可用运算符与上限请以原生 description 为准，待研发确认。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules over the same fields usable in filters; each rule pairs a field with an asc or desc direction.
order_by.title_zh: 针对 filters 中可用字段的排序规则;每条规则将一个字段与 asc 或 desc 方向配对。

limit.desc_en: Caps how many records are returned in the results array.
limit.title_zh: 限定 results 数组中返回的记录条数上限。

offset.desc_en: Skips this many leading records in the results array, for paging through results.
offset.title_zh: 跳过 results 数组开头的指定条数记录,用于分页浏览结果。

tag.desc_en: Free-form label you attach to the task so you can match it to its result later; echoed back in the response data object.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务附加的自定义标签,便于事后将任务与结果对应;会在响应的 data 对象中原样回传。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中任务对象的数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the tasks array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: tasks 数组中以错误返回的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per task in the request batch.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表,请求批次中每个任务对应一项。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier in UUID format.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在系统中的唯一标识,采用 UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 本任务 result 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced the task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径分段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied in the request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 对请求中所传参数的回传。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for the task.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果数据。

tasks.result.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.app_id.desc_en: App store ID; in results, the app this record describes.
tasks.result.app_id.title_zh: 应用商店 ID;在结果中为该记录所描述的应用。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的地区代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的语言代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of matching records in the database for this request, which may exceed the number returned.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中匹配本请求的记录总数,可能多于实际返回的条数。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of records returned in this items array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本 items 数组中返回的记录数量。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Returned records carrying the core data of this endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 返回的记录,承载本接口的核心数据。

tasks.result.items.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.keyword_data.desc_en: Keyword metrics and SERP data for the returned keyword.
tasks.result.items.keyword_data.title_zh: 返回关键词的指标与 SERP 数据。

tasks.result.items.keyword_data.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.keyword_data.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword.title_zh: 该记录所描述的关键词。

tasks.result.items.keyword_data.location.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.items.keyword_data.location.title_zh: 从请求回传的地区代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.items.keyword_data.language.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.items.keyword_data.language.title_zh: 从请求回传的语言代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.desc_en: Core keyword metrics block (volume, competition, bids, categories, and history).
tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.title_zh: 核心关键词指标块(搜索量、竞争度、出价、类目与历史)。

tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.desc_en: When this data was last refreshed, in UTC (“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”).
tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.title_zh: 该数据最近一次刷新的时间,UTC 格式(“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”)。

tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.desc_en: Relative amount of paid competition for the keyword, derived from Google Ads data on a 0-to-1 scale.
tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.title_zh: 关键词的相对付费竞争程度,基于 Google Ads 数据,取值范围 0 至 1。

tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.desc_en: Bucketed paid-competition level for the keyword; LOW, MEDIUM, and HIGH denote increasing competition, and an unknown level is null.
tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.title_zh: 关键词付费竞争的分档:LOW、MEDIUM、HIGH 依次表示竞争由低到高,未知时为 null。

tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.desc_en: Average historical cost per click for the keyword, in USD.
tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.title_zh: 关键词历史平均的单次点击成本,单位为美元。

tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.desc_en: Approximate average monthly search volume for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.title_zh: 关键词的近似月均搜索量。

tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.desc_en: Lower-end top-of-page bid estimate (around the 20th percentile of winning bids), varying by the requested location.
tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.title_zh: 页首广告出价的低端估计(约为中标出价的 20 分位),随请求地区而变。

tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.desc_en: Upper-end top-of-page bid estimate (around the 80th percentile of winning bids), varying by the requested location.
tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.title_zh: 页首广告出价的高端估计(约为中标出价的 80 分位),随请求地区而变。

tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.desc_en: Product and service category IDs the keyword belongs to; the full category list is downloadable from DataForSEO.
tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.title_zh: 关键词所属的产品与服务类目 ID;完整类目清单可从 DataForSEO 下载。

tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.desc_en: Per-month search volume history for roughly the trailing twelve months.
tasks.result.items.keyword_data.keyword_.title_zh: 约近 12 个月的逐月搜索量历史。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.desc_en: The app's SERP element found for the returned keyword.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.title_zh: 返回关键词对应的该应用 SERP 元素。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: SERP element details for the app.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 该应用的 SERP 元素详情。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Type of the SERP element.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: SERP 元素的类型。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Rank within the group of elements sharing the same type; other types are skipped in this count.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 在同类型元素组内的排名;其他类型不计入该计数。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Absolute rank of the element among all elements in the SERP.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 该元素在整个 SERP 全部元素中的绝对排名。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Horizontal alignment of the element within the SERP (left or right).
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 元素在 SERP 中的水平对齐方位(left 或 right)。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: App store ID; in results, the app this record describes.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 应用商店 ID;在结果中为该记录所描述的应用。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Title of the app.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 应用的标题。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: URL of the app's store page.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 应用商店页的 URL。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: URL of the app icon.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 应用图标的 URL。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Total number of reviews the app has.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 应用的评价总数。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Average rating of the app.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 应用的平均评分。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Rating scale used; Max5 denotes a 0-5 scale.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 所用评分量表;Max5 表示 0 至 5 分制。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: The rating value.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 评分数值。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Number of ratings contributing to the value.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 参与构成该评分的评价数量。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Maximum possible value for the rating scale.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 该评分量表的最大可能值。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Whether the app is free; the nested fields carry its pricing details when it is not.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 应用是否免费;非免费时其内嵌字段承载定价详情。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Current price shown in the listing.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: Listing 中显示的当前价格。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Regular (non-promotional) price shown in the listing.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: Listing 中显示的常规(非促销)价格。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Maximum price shown in the listing.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: Listing 中显示的最高价格。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: ISO currency code applied to the listed price.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: Listing 价格所用的 ISO 货币代码。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Whether the price is given as a range rather than a single value.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 价格是否以区间而非单一数值给出。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Raw price string exactly as shown in the listing.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: Listing 中原样展示的价格字符串。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Name of the app's developer.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 应用开发者的名称。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: URL of the developer's store page.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 开发者商店页的 URL。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.c.desc_en: Direct URL to the live search results, usable to verify the returned data.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.c.title_zh: 指向实时搜索结果的直达 URL,可用于核对返回数据。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Number of search results the engine reports for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 搜索引擎为该关键词报告的搜索结果数量。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.l.desc_en: When this data was last refreshed, in UTC (“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”).
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.l.title_zh: 该数据最近一次刷新的时间,UTC 格式(“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”)。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.p.desc_en: When this data was refreshed prior to the most recent update, in UTC.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.p.title_zh: 该数据在最近一次更新之前的刷新时间,UTC 格式。

target.desc_en: Target domain or subdomain to analyze; specify it without the https:// scheme and without the www. prefix.
target.title_zh: 要分析的目标域名或子域名;指定时不带 https:// 协议头,也不带 www. 前缀。

location_name.desc_en: Geographic target given by its full location name; supply either this or location_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 以完整地区名称指定的地理目标;与 location_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

location_code.desc_en: Geographic target given by its numeric location code; supply either this or location_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 以数字地区代码指定的地理目标;与 location_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 以完整名称指定的目标语言;与 language_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

language_code.desc_en: Target language given by its short code; supply either this or language_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 以简码指定的目标语言;与 language_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

include_serp_info.desc_en: When true, attaches a serp_info block per keyword with SERP-level data such as result count, a check URL, and the SERP feature types present.
include_serp_info.title_zh: 为 true 时,为每个关键词附加 serp_info 块,包含结果数量、核对 URL 及 SERP 中出现的功能类型等 SERP 级数据。

include_subdomains.desc_en: When true, keywords from the domain's subdomains are included; when false, only the exact host is considered.
include_subdomains.title_zh: 为 true 时,纳入该域名各子域的关键词;为 false 时仅考虑精确主机。

include_clickstream_data.desc_en: When true, enriches the response with clickstream-based metrics (such as clickstream search volume and gender/age distributions). Leaving it off keeps those fields empty.
include_clickstream_data.title_zh: 为 true 时,在响应中附加基于点击流的指标(如点击流搜索量、性别/年龄分布)。不开启则相关字段为空。

limit.desc_en: Caps how many records are returned in the results array.
limit.title_zh: 限定 results 数组中返回的记录条数上限。

offset.desc_en: Skips this many leading records in the results array, for paging through results.
offset.title_zh: 跳过 results 数组开头的指定条数记录,用于分页浏览结果。

offset_token.desc_en: Pagination cursor for fetching subsequent pages beyond the offset limit; pass back the offset_token value returned in the previous response. Each token is single-use for the next page.
offset_token.title_zh: 用于翻取超出 offset 上限后续结果的分页游标;回传上一次响应中返回的 offset_token 值。每个 token 仅对应下一页且一次性使用。

filters.desc_en: Conditions that narrow the result set; combine clauses with the and / or logical operators. Reference fields by their response dotpath (e.g. metrics.organic.pos_1).
filters.title_zh: 用于收窄结果集的筛选条件;子句之间以 and / or 逻辑运算符组合。字段以其响应点路径引用(如 metrics.organic.pos_1)。
filters.annotation: 源码描述的运算符与最大条件数在各接口间不一致且部分符号被渲染截断，具体可用运算符与上限请以原生 description 为准，待研发确认。

tag.title_zh: 你为任务附加的自定义标签,便于事后将任务与结果对应;会在响应的 data 对象中原样回传。

version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中任务对象的数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the tasks array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: tasks 数组中以错误返回的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per task in the request batch.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表,请求批次中每个任务对应一项。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier in UUID format.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在系统中的唯一标识,采用 UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 本任务 result 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced the task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径分段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied in the request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 对请求中所传参数的回传。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for the task.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果数据。

tasks.result.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.target.desc_en: Target domain echoed from the request.
tasks.result.target.title_zh: 从请求回传的目标域名。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的地区代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的语言代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of matching records in the database for this request, which may exceed the number returned.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中匹配本请求的记录总数,可能多于实际返回的条数。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of records returned in this items array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本 items 数组中返回的记录数量。

tasks.result.offset.desc_en: Offset applied to this result page.
tasks.result.offset.title_zh: 本结果页所应用的偏移量。

tasks.result.offset_token.desc_en: Single-use cursor to fetch the next page of results; pass it back as the request's offset_token.
tasks.result.offset_token.title_zh: 用于获取下一页结果的一次性游标;作为请求的 offset_token 回传。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Returned records carrying the core data of this endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 返回的记录,承载本接口的核心数据。

tasks.result.items.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.keyword.title_zh: 该记录所描述的关键词。

tasks.result.items.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.items.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的地区代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.items.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.items.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的语言代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.desc_en: Core keyword metrics block (volume, competition, bids, categories, and history).
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.title_zh: 核心关键词指标块(搜索量、竞争度、出价、类目与历史)。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.last_upd.desc_en: When this data was last refreshed, in UTC (“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”).
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.last_upd.title_zh: 该数据最近一次刷新的时间,UTC 格式(“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”)。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.competit.desc_en: Relative amount of paid competition for the keyword, derived from Google Ads data on a 0-to-1 scale.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.competit.title_zh: 关键词的相对付费竞争程度,基于 Google Ads 数据,取值范围 0 至 1。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.competit.desc_en: Bucketed paid-competition level for the keyword; LOW, MEDIUM, and HIGH denote increasing competition, and an unknown level is null.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.competit.title_zh: 关键词付费竞争的分档:LOW、MEDIUM、HIGH 依次表示竞争由低到高,未知时为 null。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.cpc.desc_en: Average historical cost per click for the keyword, in USD.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.cpc.title_zh: 关键词历史平均的单次点击成本,单位为美元。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.search_v.desc_en: Approximate average monthly search volume for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.search_v.title_zh: 关键词的近似月均搜索量。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.low_top_.desc_en: Lower-end top-of-page bid estimate (around the 20th percentile of winning bids), varying by the requested location.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.low_top_.title_zh: 页首广告出价的低端估计(约为中标出价的 20 分位),随请求地区而变。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.high_top.desc_en: Upper-end top-of-page bid estimate (around the 80th percentile of winning bids), varying by the requested location.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.high_top.title_zh: 页首广告出价的高端估计(约为中标出价的 80 分位),随请求地区而变。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.categori.desc_en: Product and service category IDs the keyword belongs to; the full category list is downloadable from DataForSEO.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.categori.title_zh: 关键词所属的产品与服务类目 ID;完整类目清单可从 DataForSEO 下载。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.monthly_.desc_en: Per-month search volume history for roughly the trailing twelve months.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.monthly_.title_zh: 约近 12 个月的逐月搜索量历史。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.monthly_.desc_en: Calendar year the data point belongs to.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.monthly_.title_zh: 该数据点所属的年份。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.monthly_.desc_en: Calendar month the data point belongs to.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.monthly_.title_zh: 该数据点所属的月份。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.monthly_.desc_en: Approximate average monthly search volume for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.monthly_.title_zh: 关键词的近似月均搜索量。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.search_v.desc_en: Percentage change in search volume versus prior periods.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.search_v.title_zh: 搜索量相对此前各周期的百分比变化。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.search_v.desc_en: Search volume change in percent versus the previous month.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.search_v.title_zh: 搜索量相对上月的百分比变化。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.search_v.desc_en: Search volume change in percent versus the previous quarter.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.search_v.title_zh: 搜索量相对上季度的百分比变化。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.search_v.desc_en: Search volume change in percent versus the previous year.
tasks.result.items.keyword_info.search_v.title_zh: 搜索量相对去年的百分比变化。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: Clickstream-derived keyword metrics; populated only when include_clickstream_data is true.
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 基于点击流的关键词指标;仅当 include_clickstream_data 为 true 时填充。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: Approximate average monthly search volume for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 关键词的近似月均搜索量。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: When this data was last refreshed, in UTC (“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”).
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 该数据最近一次刷新的时间,UTC 格式(“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”)。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: Breakdown of the clickstream audience by gender.
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 点击流受众的性别构成。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: Count of female users in the clickstream dataset.
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 点击流数据集中女性用户的数量。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: Count of male users in the clickstream dataset.
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 点击流数据集中男性用户的数量。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: Breakdown of the clickstream audience by age band.
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 点击流受众的年龄段构成。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: Share of the clickstream audience in the 18-24 age band.
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 点击流受众中 18-24 岁年龄段的占比。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: Share of the clickstream audience in the 25-34 age band.
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 点击流受众中 25-34 岁年龄段的占比。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: Share of the clickstream audience in the 35-44 age band.
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 点击流受众中 35-44 岁年龄段的占比。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: Share of the clickstream audience in the 45-54 age band.
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 点击流受众中 45-54 岁年龄段的占比。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: Share of the clickstream audience in the 55-64 age band.
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 点击流受众中 55-64 岁年龄段的占比。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: Per-month search volume history for roughly the trailing twelve months.
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 约近 12 个月的逐月搜索量历史。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: Calendar year the data point belongs to.
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 该数据点所属的年份。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: Calendar month the data point belongs to.
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 该数据点所属的月份。

tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.desc_en: Approximate average monthly search volume for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.clickstream_keyword_i.title_zh: 关键词的近似月均搜索量。

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.desc_en: Additional descriptive properties of the keyword (clustering, difficulty, language).
tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.title_zh: 关键词的附加描述性属性(聚类、难度、语言)。

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.se.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.se.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.co.desc_en: Representative keyword of the synonym cluster this keyword belongs to; null when no synonym cluster was identified.
tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.co.title_zh: 该关键词所属同义簇的代表关键词;未识别出同义簇时为 null。

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.sy.desc_en: Which clustering method grouped this keyword: keyword_metrics uses keyword_info signals, text_processing uses text analysis; null when no cluster was found.
tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.sy.title_zh: 对该关键词聚类所用的方法:keyword_metrics 基于 keyword_info 指标,text_processing 基于文本分析;未成簇时为 null。

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.ke.desc_en: How hard it is to rank in the top-10 organic results for the keyword, on a 0-to-100 logarithmic scale derived from the link profiles of the current top-10 pages.
tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.ke.title_zh: 关键词进入前 10 自然结果的难度,采用 0 至 100 的对数刻度,依据当前前 10 页面的外链情况计算。

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.de.desc_en: Language of the keyword as identified by DataForSEO's detector.
tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.de.title_zh: DataForSEO 检测器识别出的关键词语言。

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.is.desc_en: True when the detected keyword language differs from the language set in the request.
tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.is.title_zh: 当检测到的关键词语言与请求所设语言不一致时为 true。

tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.wo.desc_en: Number of words the keyword phrase consists of.
tasks.result.items.keyword_properties.wo.title_zh: 关键词短语包含的词数。

tasks.result.items.serp_info.desc_en: SERP-level data for the keyword; null unless include_serp_info was set and SERP data exists for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.serp_info.title_zh: 关键词的 SERP 级数据;除非设置了 include_serp_info 且数据库存有该关键词的 SERP 数据,否则为 null。

tasks.result.items.serp_info.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.serp_info.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.serp_info.check_url.desc_en: Direct URL to the live search results, usable to verify the returned data.
tasks.result.items.serp_info.check_url.title_zh: 指向实时搜索结果的直达 URL,可用于核对返回数据。

tasks.result.items.serp_info.serp_item_t.desc_en: The kinds of SERP features (items) found in the results for this keyword.
tasks.result.items.serp_info.serp_item_t.title_zh: 该关键词结果中出现的 SERP 功能(item)类型。

tasks.result.items.serp_info.se_results_.desc_en: Number of search results the engine reports for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.serp_info.se_results_.title_zh: 搜索引擎为该关键词报告的搜索结果数量。

tasks.result.items.serp_info.last_update.desc_en: When this data was last refreshed, in UTC (“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”).
tasks.result.items.serp_info.last_update.title_zh: 该数据最近一次刷新的时间,UTC 格式(“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”)。

tasks.result.items.serp_info.previous_up.desc_en: When this data was refreshed prior to the most recent update, in UTC.
tasks.result.items.serp_info.previous_up.title_zh: 该数据在最近一次更新之前的刷新时间,UTC 格式。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.desc_en: Average backlink profile across the top-10 organically ranking pages for the keyword.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.title_zh: 关键词前 10 自然排名页面的平均外链画像。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.backlink.desc_en: Average number of backlinks among the top-ranking pages.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.backlink.title_zh: 排名靠前页面的平均外链数量。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.dofollow.desc_en: Average number of dofollow backlinks among the top-ranking pages.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.dofollow.title_zh: 排名靠前页面的平均 dofollow 外链数量。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.referrin.desc_en: Average number of referring pages among the top-ranking pages.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.referrin.title_zh: 排名靠前页面的平均引荐页面数量。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.referrin.desc_en: Average number of referring domains among the top-ranking pages.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.referrin.title_zh: 排名靠前页面的平均引荐域名数量。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.referrin.desc_en: Average number of referring main (root) domains among the top-ranking pages.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.referrin.title_zh: 排名靠前页面的平均引荐主域名数量。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.rank.desc_en: Average page-level rank score among the top-ranking pages.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.rank.title_zh: 排名靠前页面的平均页面级 rank 分值。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.main_dom.desc_en: Average domain-level rank score among the top-ranking pages.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.main_dom.title_zh: 排名靠前页面的平均域名级 rank 分值。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.last_upd.desc_en: When this data was last refreshed, in UTC (“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”).
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.last_upd.title_zh: 该数据最近一次刷新的时间,UTC 格式(“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”)。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.search_i.desc_en: Detected search intent for the keyword.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.search_i.title_zh: 关键词的检出搜索意图。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.search_i.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.search_i.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.search_i.desc_en: Primary search intent of the keyword (informational, navigational, commercial, or transactional).
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.search_i.title_zh: 关键词的主要搜索意图(informational、navigational、commercial 或 transactional)。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.search_i.desc_en: Secondary search intents the keyword also exhibits, beyond the main one.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.search_i.title_zh: 关键词除主意图外还表现出的次要搜索意图。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.search_i.desc_en: When this data was last refreshed, in UTC (“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”).
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.search_i.title_zh: 该数据最近一次刷新的时间,UTC 格式(“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”)。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.desc_en: Keyword search volume normalized against Bing search volume.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.title_zh: 对照 Bing 搜索量归一化后的关键词搜索量。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.desc_en: When this data was last refreshed, in UTC (“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”).
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.title_zh: 该数据最近一次刷新的时间,UTC 格式(“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”)。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.desc_en: Approximate average monthly search volume for the keyword.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.title_zh: 关键词的近似月均搜索量。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.desc_en: Whether the volume figures in this block have been normalized against the reference dataset.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.title_zh: 本块中的搜索量数值是否已对照参考数据集做归一化。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.desc_en: Per-month search volume history for roughly the trailing twelve months.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.title_zh: 约近 12 个月的逐月搜索量历史。

Calendar month the data point belongs to.
Approximate average monthly search volume for the keyword.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.title_zh: 关键词的近似月均搜索量。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.title_zh: 对照点击流数据归一化后的关键词搜索量。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.desc_en: When this data was last refreshed, in UTC (“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”).
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.title_zh: 该数据最近一次刷新的时间,UTC 格式(“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”)。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.desc_en: Approximate average monthly search volume for the keyword.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.title_zh: 关键词的近似月均搜索量。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.desc_en: Whether the volume figures in this block have been normalized against the reference dataset.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.title_zh: 本块中的搜索量数值是否已对照参考数据集做归一化。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.desc_en: Per-month search volume history for roughly the trailing twelve months.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.title_zh: 约近 12 个月的逐月搜索量历史。

tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.desc_en: Calendar year the data point belongs to.
Calendar month the data point belongs to.
Approximate average monthly search volume for the keyword.
tasks.result.avg_backlinks_info.keyword_.title_zh: 关键词的近似月均搜索量。

target.desc_en: Target domain or subdomain to analyze; specify it without the https:// scheme and without the www. prefix.
target.title_zh: 要分析的目标域名或子域名;指定时不带 https:// 协议头,也不带 www. 前缀。

location_name.desc_en: Geographic target given by its full location name; supply either this or location_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 以完整地区名称指定的地理目标;与 location_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

location_code.desc_en: Geographic target given by its numeric location code; supply either this or location_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 以数字地区代码指定的地理目标;与 location_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 以完整名称指定的目标语言;与 language_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

language_code.desc_en: Target language given by its short code; supply either this or language_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 以简码指定的目标语言;与 language_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

item_types.desc_en: Restricts results to the listed SERP result types; the first type listed also determines the default ordering of results.
item_types.title_zh: 将结果限定为所列的 SERP 结果类型;数组中的首个类型同时决定结果的默认排序依据。

include_clickstream_data.desc_en: When true, enriches the response with clickstream-based metrics (such as clickstream search volume and gender/age distributions). Leaving it off keeps those fields empty.
include_clickstream_data.title_zh: 为 true 时,在响应中附加基于点击流的指标(如点击流搜索量、性别/年龄分布)。不开启则相关字段为空。

limit.desc_en: Caps how many records are returned in the results array.
limit.title_zh: 限定 results 数组中返回的记录条数上限。

offset.desc_en: Skips this many leading records in the results array, for paging through results.
offset.title_zh: 跳过 results 数组开头的指定条数记录,用于分页浏览结果。

historical_serp_mode.desc_en: Controls which SERPs are counted: live keeps only SERPs where the target currently ranks, while lost keeps SERPs where it ranked before but no longer does.
historical_serp_mode.title_zh: 控制纳入统计的 SERP 范围:live 仅保留目标当前仍有排名的 SERP,lost 则保留目标曾经有过、现已失去排名的 SERP。

ignore_synonyms.desc_en: When true, collapses highly similar keywords and returns only the core keyword of each cluster.
ignore_synonyms.title_zh: 为 true 时,合并高度相似的关键词,每个簇仅返回核心关键词。

filters.desc_en: Conditions that narrow the result set; combine clauses with the and / or logical operators. Reference fields by their response dotpath (e.g. metrics.organic.pos_1).
filters.title_zh: 用于收窄结果集的筛选条件;子句之间以 and / or 逻辑运算符组合。字段以其响应点路径引用(如 metrics.organic.pos_1)。
filters.annotation: 源码描述的运算符与最大条件数在各接口间不一致且部分符号被渲染截断，具体可用运算符与上限请以原生 description 为准，待研发确认。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules over the same fields usable in filters; each rule pairs a field with an asc or desc direction.
order_by.title_zh: 针对 filters 中可用字段的排序规则;每条规则将一个字段与 asc 或 desc 方向配对。

tag.desc_en: Free-form label you attach to the task so you can match it to its result later; echoed back in the response data object.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务附加的自定义标签,便于事后将任务与结果对应;会在响应的 data 对象中原样回传。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中任务对象的数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the tasks array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: tasks 数组中以错误返回的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per task in the request batch.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表,请求批次中每个任务对应一项。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier in UUID format.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在系统中的唯一标识,采用 UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 本任务 result 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced the task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径分段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied in the request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 对请求中所传参数的回传。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for the task.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果数据。

tasks.result.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.target.desc_en: Target domain echoed from the request.
tasks.result.target.title_zh: 从请求回传的目标域名。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的地区代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的语言代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of matching records in the database for this request, which may exceed the number returned.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中匹配本请求的记录总数,可能多于实际返回的条数。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of records returned in this items array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本 items 数组中返回的记录数量。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Returned records carrying the core data of this endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 返回的记录,承载本接口的核心数据。

tasks.result.page_address.desc_en: Absolute URL of the relevant page.

tasks.result.metrics.featured_snippet.is.title_zh: 目标此前有排名、本次检查未再找到的元素数量。

tasks.result.metrics.featured_snippet.cl.title_zh: 基于点击流搜索量计算的估算流量;需 include_clickstream_data 为 true。

tasks.result.metrics.featured_snippet.cl.title_zh: 点击流流量的性别拆分;需 include_clickstream_data 为 true。

tasks.result.metrics.featured_snippet.cl.title_zh: 点击流受众中 35-44 岁年龄段的占比。

tasks.result.metrics.featured_snippet.cl.desc_en: Share of the clickstream audience in the 45-54 age band.
tasks.result.metrics.featured_snippet.cl.title_zh: 点击流受众中 45-54 岁年龄段的占比。

tasks.result.metrics.featured_snippet.cl.desc_en: Share of the clickstream audience in the 55-64 age band.
tasks.result.metrics.featured_snippet.cl.title_zh: 点击流受众中 55-64 岁年龄段的占比。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.title_zh: 来自 local pack 结果的排名与流量数据。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_1.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks #1.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_1.title_zh: 实体排名第 1 的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_2_3.title_zh: 实体排名第 2 至 3 位的 SERP 数量。
