tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_4_10.title_zh: 实体排名第 4 至 10 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_11_2.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 11-20.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_11_2.title_zh: 实体排名第 11 至 20 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_21_3.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 21-30.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_21_3.title_zh: 实体排名第 21 至 30 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_31_4.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 31-40.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_31_4.title_zh: 实体排名第 31 至 40 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_41_5.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 41-50.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_41_5.title_zh: 实体排名第 41 至 50 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_51_6.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 51-60.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_51_6.title_zh: 实体排名第 51 至 60 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_61_7.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 61-70.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_61_7.title_zh: 实体排名第 61 至 70 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_71_8.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 71-80.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_71_8.title_zh: 实体排名第 71 至 80 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_81_9.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 81-90.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_81_9.title_zh: 实体排名第 81 至 90 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_91_1.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 91-100.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.pos_91_1.title_zh: 实体排名第 91 至 100 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.etv.desc_en: Estimated monthly traffic volume, computed as the sum of search volume times click-through rate over the entity's ranking keywords.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.etv.title_zh: 估算月度流量,按该实体排名关键词的搜索量与点击率乘积求和得出。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.count.desc_en: Total count of SERPs of this type that contain the entity.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.count.title_zh: 包含该实体的此类 SERP 总数。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.estimate.desc_en: Estimated monthly USD cost of acquiring the equivalent traffic through paid ads, derived from etv and CPC values.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.estimate.title_zh: 通过付费广告获取等量流量的估算月度成本(美元),由 etv 与 CPC 数值推算。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.is_new.desc_en: How many ranked elements for the target are newly found in this check.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.is_new.title_zh: 本次检查中目标新发现的排名元素数量。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.is_up.desc_en: How many of the target's ranked elements moved up since the previous check.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.is_up.title_zh: 相比上次检查,目标排名上升的元素数量。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.is_down.desc_en: How many of the target's ranked elements moved down since the previous check.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.is_down.title_zh: 相比上次检查,目标排名下降的元素数量。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.is_lost.desc_en: How many of the target's previously ranked elements were not found in this check.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.is_lost.title_zh: 目标此前有排名、本次检查未再找到的元素数量。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.desc_en: Estimated traffic volume computed from clickstream search volumes; requires include_clickstream_data to be true.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.title_zh: 基于点击流搜索量计算的估算流量;需 include_clickstream_data 为 true。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.desc_en: Clickstream traffic split by gender; requires include_clickstream_data to be true.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.title_zh: 点击流流量的性别拆分;需 include_clickstream_data 为 true。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.desc_en: Count of female users in the clickstream dataset.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.title_zh: 点击流数据集中女性用户的数量。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.desc_en: Count of male users in the clickstream dataset.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.title_zh: 点击流数据集中男性用户的数量。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.desc_en: Clickstream traffic split by age band; requires include_clickstream_data to be true.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.title_zh: 点击流流量的年龄段拆分;需 include_clickstream_data 为 true。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.desc_en: Share of the clickstream audience in the 18-24 age band.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.title_zh: 点击流受众中 18-24 岁年龄段的占比。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.desc_en: Share of the clickstream audience in the 25-34 age band.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.title_zh: 点击流受众中 25-34 岁年龄段的占比。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.desc_en: Share of the clickstream audience in the 35-44 age band.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.title_zh: 点击流受众中 35-44 岁年龄段的占比。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.desc_en: Share of the clickstream audience in the 45-54 age band.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.title_zh: 点击流受众中 45-54 岁年龄段的占比。

tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.desc_en: Share of the clickstream audience in the 55-64 age band.
tasks.result.metrics.local_pack.clickstr.title_zh: 点击流受众中 55-64 岁年龄段的占比。

keywords.desc_en: Target keywords to process in one request; supplied in UTF-8 and converted to lowercase before matching.
keywords.title_zh: 单次请求要处理的目标关键词;以 UTF-8 提供,匹配前会被统一转为小写。

location_name.desc_en: Geographic target given by its full location name; supply either this or location_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 以完整地区名称指定的地理目标;与 location_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

location_code.desc_en: Geographic target given by its numeric location code; supply either this or location_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 以数字地区代码指定的地理目标;与 location_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 以完整名称指定的目标语言;与 language_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

language_code.desc_en: Target language given by its short code; supply either this or language_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 以简码指定的目标语言;与 language_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

include_subdomains.desc_en: When true, keywords from the domain's subdomains are included; when false, only the exact host is considered.
include_subdomains.title_zh: 为 true 时,纳入该域名各子域的关键词;为 false 时仅考虑精确主机。

item_types.desc_en: Restricts results to the listed SERP result types; the first type listed also determines the default ordering of results.
item_types.title_zh: 将结果限定为所列的 SERP 结果类型;数组中的首个类型同时决定结果的默认排序依据。

limit.desc_en: Caps how many records are returned in the results array.
limit.title_zh: 限定 results 数组中返回的记录条数上限。

offset.desc_en: Skips this many leading records in the results array, for paging through results.
offset.title_zh: 跳过 results 数组开头的指定条数记录,用于分页浏览结果。

filters.desc_en: Conditions that narrow the result set; combine clauses with the and / or logical operators. Reference fields by their response dotpath (e.g. metrics.organic.pos_1).
filters.title_zh: 用于收窄结果集的筛选条件;子句之间以 and / or 逻辑运算符组合。字段以其响应点路径引用(如 metrics.organic.pos_1)。
filters.annotation: 源码描述的运算符与最大条件数在各接口间不一致且部分符号被渲染截断，具体可用运算符与上限请以原生 description 为准，待研发确认。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules over the same fields usable in filters; each rule pairs a field with an asc or desc direction.
order_by.title_zh: 针对 filters 中可用字段的排序规则;每条规则将一个字段与 asc 或 desc 方向配对。

tag.desc_en: Free-form label you attach to the task so you can match it to its result later; echoed back in the response data object.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务附加的自定义标签,便于事后将任务与结果对应;会在响应的 data 对象中原样回传。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中任务对象的数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the tasks array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: tasks 数组中以错误返回的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per task in the request batch.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表,请求批次中每个任务对应一项。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier in UUID format.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在系统中的唯一标识,采用 UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 本任务 result 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced the task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径分段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied in the request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 对请求中所传参数的回传。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for the task.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果数据。

tasks.result.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.seed_keywords.desc_en: Keywords echoed from the request, with URL-encoding decoded.
tasks.result.seed_keywords.title_zh: 从请求回传的关键词,已对 URL 编码解码。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的地区代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的语言代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of matching records in the database for this request, which may exceed the number returned.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中匹配本请求的记录总数,可能多于实际返回的条数。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of records returned in this items array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本 items 数组中返回的记录数量。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Returned records carrying the core data of this endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 返回的记录,承载本接口的核心数据。

tasks.result.items.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.domain.desc_en: Domain name of the detected competitor.

tasks.result.items.avg_position.desc_en: Average SERP position of the entity across the matched keywords.
tasks.result.items.avg_position.title_zh: 实体在匹配关键词上的平均 SERP 排名位置。

tasks.result.items.median_position.desc_en: Median SERP position of the entity across the matched keywords.
tasks.result.items.median_position.title_zh: 实体在匹配关键词上的中位 SERP 排名位置。

tasks.result.items.rating.desc_en: Relative SERP visibility rating for the domain over the specified keywords, accumulated from how high it ranks.
tasks.result.items.rating.title_zh: 域名在指定关键词上的相对 SERP 可见度评分,按其排名高低累加得出。

tasks.result.items.etv.desc_en: Estimated monthly traffic volume, computed as the sum of search volume times click-through rate over the entity's ranking keywords.
tasks.result.items.etv.title_zh: 估算月度流量,按该实体排名关键词的搜索量与点击率乘积求和得出。

tasks.result.items.keywords_count.desc_en: Number of the specified keywords the domain holds SERP positions for.
tasks.result.items.keywords_count.title_zh: 域名在所指定关键词中拥有 SERP 排名的关键词数量。

tasks.result.items.visibility.desc_en: SERP visibility rate of the domain over the specified keywords, weighting higher positions more heavily.
tasks.result.items.visibility.title_zh: 域名在指定关键词上的 SERP 可见度,对靠前位置赋予更高权重。

tasks.result.items.relevant_serp_items.desc_en: Number of SERP elements relevant to the domain across the specified keywords.
tasks.result.items.relevant_serp_items.title_zh: 在指定关键词上与该域名相关的 SERP 元素数量。

tasks.result.items.keywords_positions.desc_en: SERP positions the domain holds for each of the specified keywords.
tasks.result.items.keywords_positions.title_zh: 该域名在每个指定关键词上所占的 SERP 排名位置。

location_name.desc_en: Geographic target given by its full location name; supply either this or location_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 以完整地区名称指定的地理目标;与 location_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

location_code.desc_en: Geographic target given by its numeric location code; supply either this or location_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 以数字地区代码指定的地理目标;与 location_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 以完整名称指定的目标语言;与 language_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

language_code.desc_en: Target language given by its short code; supply either this or language_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 以简码指定的目标语言;与 language_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

include_serp_info.desc_en: When true, attaches a serp_info block per keyword with SERP-level data such as result count, a check URL, and the SERP feature types present.
include_serp_info.title_zh: 为 true 时,为每个关键词附加 serp_info 块,包含结果数量、核对 URL 及 SERP 中出现的功能类型等 SERP 级数据。

include_clickstream_data.desc_en: When true, enriches the response with clickstream-based metrics (such as clickstream search volume and gender/age distributions). Leaving it off keeps those fields empty.
include_clickstream_data.title_zh: 为 true 时,在响应中附加基于点击流的指标(如点击流搜索量、性别/年龄分布)。不开启则相关字段为空。

ignore_synonyms.desc_en: When true, collapses highly similar keywords and returns only the core keyword of each cluster.
ignore_synonyms.title_zh: 为 true 时,合并高度相似的关键词,每个簇仅返回核心关键词。

filters.desc_en: Conditions that narrow the result set; combine clauses with the and / or logical operators. Reference fields by their response dotpath (e.g. metrics.organic.pos_1).
filters.title_zh: 用于收窄结果集的筛选条件;子句之间以 and / or 逻辑运算符组合。字段以其响应点路径引用(如 metrics.organic.pos_1)。
filters.annotation: 源码描述的运算符与最大条件数在各接口间不一致且部分符号被渲染截断，具体可用运算符与上限请以原生 description 为准，待研发确认。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules over the same fields usable in filters; each rule pairs a field with an asc or desc direction.
order_by.title_zh: 针对 filters 中可用字段的排序规则;每条规则将一个字段与 asc 或 desc 方向配对。

tag.desc_en: Free-form label you attach to the task so you can match it to its result later; echoed back in the response data object.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务附加的自定义标签,便于事后将任务与结果对应;会在响应的 data 对象中原样回传。

limit.desc_en: Caps how many records are returned in the results array.
limit.title_zh: 限定 results 数组中返回的记录条数上限。

offset.desc_en: Skips this many leading records in the results array, for paging through results.
offset.title_zh: 跳过 results 数组开头的指定条数记录,用于分页浏览结果。

offset_token.desc_en: Pagination cursor for fetching subsequent pages beyond the offset limit; pass back the offset_token value returned in the previous response. Each token is single-use for the next page.
offset_token.title_zh: 用于翻取超出 offset 上限后续结果的分页游标;回传上一次响应中返回的 offset_token 值。每个 token 仅对应下一页且一次性使用。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the tasks array.

tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在系统中的唯一标识,采用 UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 本任务 result 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径分段。

tasks.result.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.last_upd.title_zh: 该数据最近一次刷新的时间,UTC 格式(“yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”)。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.competit.title_zh: 关键词的相对付费竞争程度,基于 Google Ads 数据,取值范围 0 至 1。

tasks.result.items.keyword_info.competit.title_zh: 关键词付费竞争的分档:LOW、MEDIUM、HIGH 依次表示竞争由低到高,未知时为 null。

keywords.desc_en: Seed keywords to analyze; pass them as an array of strings. Capping and character rules are enforced by the endpoint, and non-Latin characters bias results toward the regions where those characters are used.
keywords.title_zh: 待分析的种子关键词，以字符串数组传入。条数上限与字符规则由端点强制；使用非拉丁字符会让结果偏向这些字符所属的地区。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name used for geo targeting (e.g. country, region, city). Mutually replaceable with location_code; omit both to get global results. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages / locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地理定向的位置全名（如国家、地区、城市）。与 location_code 二选一；两者都不传则返回全球结果。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages / locations 端点查询合法名称。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier used for geo targeting; an alternative to location_name. Omit both to get global results. Data is reported for the country the code belongs to. Look up valid codes via the matching locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地理定向的数字位置标识，可替代 location_name。两者都不传则返回全球结果；数据按该编码所属国家提供。可通过对应的 locations 端点查询合法编码。

type.desc_en: Trends data category to query (e.g. web, news, ecommerce). Selects which corpus the popularity figures are drawn from.
type.title_zh: 要查询的趋势数据类别（如 web、news、ecommerce），决定热度数据取自哪一类语料。

date_from.desc_en: Start of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Endpoint-specific minimum dates apply; omit to default to the start of the comparable prior period.
date_from.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的起始日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。各端点有各自的最早可用日期；不传时按可比的上一周期起点默认。

date_to.desc_en: End of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Omit to default to the current date.
date_to.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的结束日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。不传则默认到当天。

time_range.desc_en: Preset relative time window for trend data, used as a shortcut instead of date_from/date_to. Ignored if explicit dates are supplied.
time_range.title_zh: 趋势数据的预设相对时间窗，作为 date_from/date_to 的快捷替代；若已显式给定日期则忽略本字段。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task, echoed back in the response so you can correlate results with the request that produced them.
tag.title_zh: 自定义的任务标签，会原样回显在响应中，方便把结果与触发它的请求对应起来。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response; useful when reporting issues.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号，反馈问题时可一并提供。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request; check it before reading the payload and design handling for error conditions.
status_code.title_zh: 本次请求的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查，并为异常情况设计处理逻辑。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

time.desc_en: Server-side processing time for the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端处理耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total billed cost of this response across all tasks, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应所有任务的合计计费金额，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task entries contained in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the tasks finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own status fields.
tasks_error.title_zh: 其中以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

tasks.desc_en: List of task results; one entry per task created by the request.
tasks.title_zh: 任务结果列表，请求创建的每个任务对应一个条目。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of this task in the provider's system.
tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务在提供方系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code; check it to tell whether this individual task succeeded.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，用于判断该任务是否成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态码对应的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time for this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Billed cost of this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 单个任务的计费金额，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 result 数组中的条目数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments identifying the endpoint that handled this task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 标识处理该任务的端点的 URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted in the request, returned for traceability.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在请求中提交的参数，便于追溯。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying the actual keyword/trend data produced for this task; drill into its items for per-keyword figures.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际关键词/趋势数据的数组，逐项下钻可得到按关键词的具体数值。

tasks.result.keywords.desc_en: The keywords submitted in the request that this result corresponds to.
tasks.result.keywords.title_zh: 本结果对应的、请求中提交的关键词列表。

tasks.result.type.desc_en: Search-engine/data type echoed from the request.
tasks.result.type.title_zh: 从请求回显的搜索引擎/数据类型。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的位置编码；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的语言代码；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.datetime.desc_en: UTC timestamp when this result was produced.
tasks.result.datetime.title_zh: 本结果生成的 UTC 时间戳。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this result's items array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本结果 items 数组中的条目数量。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Detailed per-keyword (or per-element) data rows for this result.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 本结果中按关键词（或按元素）的明细数据行。

tasks.result.items.position.desc_en: Ordinal position of this element within the items array.
tasks.result.items.position.title_zh: 本元素在 items 数组中的序号位置。

tasks.result.items.type.desc_en: Element type of this item row, indicating which kind of data block it carries.
tasks.result.items.type.title_zh: 本条目的元素类型，指明它承载的数据块类别。

tasks.result.items.keywords.desc_en: Keywords that the demography and comparison data in this item are based on.
tasks.result.items.keywords.title_zh: 本条目中人口统计与对比数据所基于的关键词。

tasks.result.items.data.desc_en: Trends time-series data points for the requested parameters.
tasks.result.items.data.title_zh: 针对所请求参数的趋势时间序列数据点。

tasks.result.items.data.date_from.desc_en: Start date (UTC) of this data point's time bucket.
tasks.result.items.data.date_from.title_zh: 该数据点所属时间桶的起始日期（UTC）。

tasks.result.items.data.date_to.desc_en: End date (UTC) of this data point's time bucket.
tasks.result.items.data.date_to.title_zh: 该数据点所属时间桶的结束日期（UTC）。

tasks.result.items.data.timestamp.desc_en: Point in time of this data point, in Unix time.
tasks.result.items.data.timestamp.title_zh: 该数据点的时间点，Unix 时间格式。

tasks.result.items.data.values.desc_en: Relative keyword popularity at this timestamp; when multiple keywords are queried the values are averaged. The scale is relative, peaking at the most popular point.
tasks.result.items.data.values.title_zh: 该时间点的相对关键词热度；查询多个关键词时取平均。该刻度为相对值，在最热点处达到峰值。

tasks.result.items.averages.desc_en: Keyword popularity values averaged across the full requested time range.
tasks.result.items.averages.title_zh: 在整个所请求时间范围内取平均的关键词热度值。

tasks.result.items.interests.desc_en: Subregional keyword popularity data for each specified term.
tasks.result.items.interests.title_zh: 每个指定词的次区域关键词热度数据。

tasks.result.items.interests.keyword.desc_en: Keyword the subregional values are based on.
tasks.result.items.interests.keyword.title_zh: 次区域数值所基于的关键词。

tasks.result.items.interests.values.desc_en: Relative keyword popularity broken down by country or region.
tasks.result.items.interests.values.title_zh: 按国家或地区拆分的相对关键词热度。

tasks.result.items.interests.values.geo_.desc_en: Location identifier; use it to match results back to the location parameters in your request.
tasks.result.items.interests.values.geo_.title_zh: 位置标识；可用它把结果与请求中的位置参数对应起来。

tasks.result.items.interests.values.geo_.desc_en: Location name; use it to match results back to the location parameters in your request.
tasks.result.items.interests.values.geo_.title_zh: 位置名称；可用它把结果与请求中的位置参数对应起来。

tasks.result.items.interests.values.valu.desc_en: Location-specific relative keyword popularity over the requested time range.
tasks.result.items.interests.values.valu.title_zh: 在所请求时间范围内某位置的相对关键词热度。

tasks.result.items.interests_comparison.desc_en: Comparison of subregional popularity across the specified terms; null when only one keyword was supplied.
tasks.result.items.interests_comparison.title_zh: 对所指定多个词的次区域热度对比；仅提交一个关键词时为 null。

tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..desc_en: Per-location popularity values normalized relative to the maximum within each region.
tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..title_zh: 按位置的热度值，相对每个地区内的最大值做归一化。

tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..desc_en: Location identifier; use it to match results back to your request's location parameters.
tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..title_zh: 位置标识；可用它把结果与请求的位置参数对应起来。

tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..desc_en: Location name; use it to match results back to your request's location parameters.
tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..title_zh: 位置名称；可用它把结果与请求的位置参数对应起来。

tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..desc_en: Relative popularity within the given location over the requested time range.
tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..title_zh: 在所请求时间范围内某位置内的相对热度。

tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..desc_en: Per-location popularity values normalized relative to the maximum across all locations.
tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..title_zh: 按位置的热度值，相对所有位置中的最大值做归一化。

tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..desc_en: Location identifier; use it to match results back to your request's location parameters.
tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..title_zh: 位置标识；可用它把结果与请求的位置参数对应起来。

tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..desc_en: Location name; use it to match results back to your request's location parameters.
tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..title_zh: 位置名称；可用它把结果与请求的位置参数对应起来。

tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..desc_en: Location-specific relative popularity, normalized across all locations.
tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..title_zh: 某位置的相对热度，跨所有位置做归一化。

tasks.result.items.demography.desc_en: Demographic breakdown of keyword popularity, split by age and gender for each term.
tasks.result.items.demography.title_zh: 关键词热度的人口统计拆分，按年龄与性别分别给出每个词的数据。

tasks.result.items.demography.age.desc_en: Keyword popularity distributed across age ranges.
tasks.result.items.demography.age.title_zh: 关键词热度在各年龄段上的分布。

tasks.result.items.demography.age.keywor.desc_en: Keyword the age-distribution data applies to.
tasks.result.items.demography.age.keywor.title_zh: 年龄分布数据所对应的关键词。

tasks.result.items.demography.age.values.desc_en: Age-range buckets with their corresponding popularity values.
tasks.result.items.demography.age.values.title_zh: 各年龄段及其对应的热度值。

tasks.result.items.demography.age.values.desc_en: The age range this value applies to.
tasks.result.items.demography.age.values.title_zh: 该热度值所对应的年龄段。

tasks.result.items.demography.age.values.desc_en: Relative keyword popularity within this age range, on the trends popularity scale.
tasks.result.items.demography.age.values.title_zh: 该年龄段内关键词的相对热度，采用趋势热度刻度。

tasks.result.items.demography.gender.desc_en: Keyword popularity distributed across gender categories.
tasks.result.items.demography.gender.title_zh: 关键词热度在各性别类别上的分布。

tasks.result.items.demography.gender.key.desc_en: Keyword the gender-distribution data applies to.
tasks.result.items.demography.gender.key.title_zh: 性别分布数据所对应的关键词。

tasks.result.items.demography.gender.val.desc_en: Gender categories with their corresponding popularity values.
tasks.result.items.demography.gender.val.title_zh: 各性别类别及其对应的热度值。

tasks.result.items.demography.gender.val.desc_en: The gender category this value applies to.
tasks.result.items.demography.gender.val.title_zh: 该热度值所对应的性别类别。

tasks.result.items.demography.gender.val.desc_en: Relative keyword popularity within this gender category, on the trends popularity scale.
tasks.result.items.demography.gender.val.title_zh: 该性别类别内关键词的相对热度，采用趋势热度刻度。

tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.desc_en: Side-by-side comparison of demographic popularity across the specified terms; null when only one keyword was supplied.
tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.title_zh: 对所指定多个词的人口统计热度并排对比；仅提交一个关键词时为 null。

tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.desc_en: Age-based comparison of keyword popularity across terms, keyed by age range.
tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.title_zh: 按年龄段比较各词关键词热度，以年龄段为键。

tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.desc_en: Comparison values for the corresponding age range across the specified terms.
tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.title_zh: 对应年龄段下各指定词的对比数值。

tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.desc_en: Gender-based comparison of keyword popularity across terms, keyed by gender category.
tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.title_zh: 按性别类别比较各词关键词热度，以性别类别为键。

tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.desc_en: Comparison values for the female category across the specified terms.
tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.title_zh: female 类别下各指定词的对比数值。

tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.desc_en: Comparison values for the male category across the specified terms.
tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.title_zh: male 类别下各指定词的对比数值。

tasks.result.job_function_id.desc_en: Identifier of the LinkedIn job function.

tasks.result.job_function_name.desc_en: Name of the LinkedIn job function.

location_name.desc_en: Full location name used for geo targeting (e.g. country, region, city). Mutually replaceable with location_code; omit both to get global results. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages / locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地理定向的位置全名（如国家、地区、城市）。与 location_code 二选一；两者都不传则返回全球结果。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages / locations 端点查询合法名称。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier used for geo targeting; an alternative to location_name. Omit both to get global results. Data is reported for the country the code belongs to. Look up valid codes via the matching locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地理定向的数字位置标识，可替代 location_name。两者都不传则返回全球结果；数据按该编码所属国家提供。可通过对应的 locations 端点查询合法编码。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS-based geo target given as `latitude,longitude,radius_km`. An alternative to location_name / location_code; data is reported for the country the coordinates fall in.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 基于 GPS 的地理定向，格式为 `纬度,经度,半径(km)`。可替代 location_name / location_code；数据按坐标所属国家提供。

age.desc_en: Age-range buckets to target for the audience estimate, passed as an array. Narrows the estimated audience to the chosen demographics.
age.title_zh: 受众估算的目标年龄段，以数组传入，用于把估算受众收窄到所选人群。

bid.desc_en: Hypothetical max bid in USD used to forecast ad traffic. Drives the estimated impressions, clicks, and spend figures returned.
bid.title_zh: 用于预测广告流量的假设最高出价（美元），决定返回的预计展示、点击与花费数据。

daily_budget.desc_en: Hypothetical daily campaign budget in USD used to forecast ad traffic, constraining the estimated reach and spend.
daily_budget.title_zh: 用于预测广告流量的假设每日预算（美元），会约束返回的预计触达与花费。

gender.desc_en: Gender categories to target for the audience estimate, passed as an array. Narrows the estimated audience to the chosen demographics.
gender.title_zh: 受众估算的目标性别类别，以数组传入，用于把估算受众收窄到所选人群。

industry.desc_en: LinkedIn industry IDs to target for the audience estimate. Resolve valid IDs and names via the audience_estimation/industries endpoint.

tasks.result.est_impressions.low.desc_en: Lower bound of the estimated range.

tasks.result.est_spend.high.desc_en: Upper bound of the estimated range.

tasks.result.est_cost_per_event.title_zh: 预计每事件成本，以下限/上限区间给出。

tasks.result.est_cost_per_event.low.desc_en: Lower bound of the estimated range.

tasks.result.suggested_budget.title_zh: 在当前定向与出价下的建议每日预算。

tasks.result.events_lost_to_bid.desc_en: Estimated events lost because the input bid was too low.
tasks.result.events_lost_to_bid.title_zh: 因输入出价过低而预计损失的事件数。

tasks.result.events_lost_to_budget.desc_en: Estimated events lost because the input budget was too low.
tasks.result.events_lost_to_budget.title_zh: 因输入预算过低而预计损失的事件数。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name used for geo targeting (e.g. country, region, city). Mutually replaceable with location_code; omit both to get global results. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages / locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地理定向的位置全名（如国家、地区、城市）。与 location_code 二选一；两者都不传则返回全球结果。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages / locations 端点查询合法名称。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier used for geo targeting; an alternative to location_name. Omit both to get global results. Data is reported for the country the code belongs to. Look up valid codes via the matching locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地理定向的数字位置标识，可替代 location_name。两者都不传则返回全球结果；数据按该编码所属国家提供。可通过对应的 locations 端点查询合法编码。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS-based geo target given as `latitude,longitude,radius_km`. An alternative to location_name / location_code; data is reported for the country the coordinates fall in.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 基于 GPS 的地理定向，格式为 `纬度,经度,半径(km)`。可替代 location_name / location_code；数据按坐标所属国家提供。

age.desc_en: Age-range buckets to target for the audience estimate, passed as an array. Narrows the estimated audience to the chosen demographics.
age.title_zh: 受众估算的目标年龄段，以数组传入，用于把估算受众收窄到所选人群。

bid.desc_en: Hypothetical max bid in USD used to forecast ad traffic. Drives the estimated impressions, clicks, and spend figures returned.

daily_budget.desc_en: Hypothetical daily campaign budget in USD used to forecast ad traffic, constraining the estimated reach and spend.

tasks.result.keyword_kpi.title_zh: 承载该关键词按设备拆分的广告效果指标的对象；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.keyword_kpi.desktop.desc_en: Keyword ad metrics aggregated for desktop devices; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.keyword_kpi.desktop.title_zh: 按 desktop 设备汇总的关键词广告指标；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.keyword_kpi.desktop.ad_posi.desc_en: Position of the relevant ad in the SERP for this device.
tasks.result.keyword_kpi.desktop.ad_posi.title_zh: 该设备上相关广告在 SERP 中的位置。

tasks.result.keyword_kpi.desktop.clicks.desc_en: Ad clicks the keyword and match type generated last month on this device.
tasks.result.keyword_kpi.desktop.clicks.title_zh: 上月该设备上由该关键词与匹配类型带来的广告点击数。

tasks.result.keyword_kpi.desktop.impress.desc_en: Ad impressions the keyword and match type generated last month on this device.
tasks.result.keyword_kpi.desktop.impress.title_zh: 上月该设备上由该关键词与匹配类型带来的广告展示数。

tasks.result.keyword_kpi.desktop.average.desc_en: Average cost-per-click (USD) on this device, i.e. total cost divided by clicks.
tasks.result.keyword_kpi.desktop.average.title_zh: 该设备上的平均每次点击成本（美元），即总花费除以点击数。

tasks.result.keyword_kpi.desktop.ctr.desc_en: Click-through rate (%) on this device, i.e. clicks divided by impressions.
tasks.result.keyword_kpi.desktop.ctr.title_zh: 该设备上的点击率（%），即点击数除以展示数。

tasks.result.keyword_kpi.desktop.total_c.desc_en: Total ad cost (USD) for the keyword and match type last month on this device.
tasks.result.keyword_kpi.desktop.total_c.title_zh: 上月该设备上该关键词与匹配类型的广告总花费（美元）。

tasks.result.keyword_kpi.desktop.average.desc_en: Average bid for the keyword on this device.
tasks.result.keyword_kpi.desktop.average.title_zh: 该设备上该关键词的平均出价。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response; useful when reporting issues.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号，反馈问题时可一并提供。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request; check it before reading the payload and design handling for error conditions.
status_code.title_zh: 本次请求的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查，并为异常情况设计处理逻辑。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

time.desc_en: Server-side processing time for the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端处理耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total billed cost of this response across all tasks, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应所有任务的合计计费金额，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task entries contained in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the tasks finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own status fields.
tasks_error.title_zh: 其中以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

tasks.desc_en: List of task results; one entry per task created by the request.
tasks.title_zh: 任务结果列表，请求创建的每个任务对应一个条目。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of this task in the provider's system.
tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务在提供方系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code; check it to tell whether this individual task succeeded.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，用于判断该任务是否成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态码对应的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time for this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Billed cost of this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 单个任务的计费金额，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 result 数组中的条目数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments identifying the endpoint that handled this task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 标识处理该任务的端点的 URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted in the request, returned for traceability.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在请求中提交的参数，便于追溯。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying the actual keyword/trend data produced for this task; drill into its items for per-keyword figures.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际关键词/趋势数据的数组，逐项下钻可得到按关键词的具体数值。

tasks.result.language_name.desc_en: Language name for the returned data.
tasks.result.language_name.title_zh: 返回数据对应的语言名称。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的语言代码；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.available_locations.desc_en: Locations supported in combination with a given language.
tasks.result.available_locations.title_zh: 可与给定语言组合使用的受支持位置列表。

tasks.result.available_locations.country.desc_en: ISO country code of the supported location.
tasks.result.available_locations.country.title_zh: 受支持位置的 ISO 国家代码。

tasks.result.available_locations.locatio.desc_en: Granularity of the supported location, such as country or region.
tasks.result.available_locations.locatio.title_zh: 受支持位置的粒度，例如国家或地区。

id.desc_en: Unique task identifier (UUID) you can use to retrieve this task's results later from the corresponding task_get endpoint.
id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识（UUID），后续可凭它从对应的 task_get 端点取回该任务结果。

keywords.desc_en: Seed keywords to analyze; pass them as an array of strings. Capping and character rules are enforced by the endpoint, and non-Latin characters bias results toward the regions where those characters are used.
keywords.title_zh: 待分析的种子关键词，以字符串数组传入。条数上限与字符规则由端点强制；使用非拉丁字符会让结果偏向这些字符所属的地区。

device.desc_en: Restricts the returned metrics to a single device type. Leave unset to aggregate across all devices.
device.title_zh: 将返回的指标限定到某一设备类型；不设置则跨所有设备汇总。

match.desc_en: Keyword match type that controls how strictly user queries must match your keyword (aggregate / broad / phrase / exact), shaping which queries contribute to the metrics.
match.title_zh: 关键词匹配类型，控制用户查询需与关键词匹配的严格程度（aggregate / broad / phrase / exact），影响哪些查询计入指标。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name used for geo targeting (e.g. country, region, city). Mutually replaceable with location_code; omit both to get global results. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages / locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地理定向的位置全名（如国家、地区、城市）。与 location_code 二选一；两者都不传则返回全球结果。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages / locations 端点查询合法名称。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier used for geo targeting; an alternative to location_name. Omit both to get global results. Data is reported for the country the code belongs to. Look up valid codes via the matching locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地理定向的数字位置标识，可替代 location_name。两者都不传则返回全球结果；数据按该编码所属国家提供。可通过对应的 locations 端点查询合法编码。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS-based geo target given as `latitude,longitude,radius_km`. An alternative to location_name / location_code; data is reported for the country the coordinates fall in.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 基于 GPS 的地理定向，格式为 `纬度,经度,半径(km)`。可替代 location_name / location_code；数据按坐标所属国家提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full search-engine language name (e.g. English) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_code. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言全名（如 English），与 language_code 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法名称。

language_code.desc_en: Search-engine language code (e.g. en) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_name. Look up valid codes via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言代码（如 en），与 language_name 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法代码。

postback_url.desc_en: Endpoint that receives a POST callback with the gzipped task results once the task finishes. Supports the `$id` and `$tag` placeholders, which are substituted before the callback is sent.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后接收回调的地址，结果以 gzip 压缩通过 POST 推送到此。支持 `$id`、`$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换为实际值。

pingback_url.desc_en: Endpoint that receives a lightweight GET ping when the task completes, signalling you to fetch the results. Supports the `$id` and `$tag` placeholders, substituted before the ping is sent.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时接收 GET 通知的地址，用于提示你去拉取结果。支持 `$id`、`$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换为实际值。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task, echoed back in the response so you can correlate results with the request that produced them.
tag.title_zh: 自定义的任务标签，会原样回显在响应中，方便把结果与触发它的请求对应起来。

target.desc_en: Target web page (or site) URL to scan for keyword ideas. Combine with target_type to choose page-level or site-level extraction.
target.title_zh: 用于抓取关键词建议的目标网页（或站点）URL。与 target_type 搭配，决定按单页还是整站提取。

language_code.desc_en: Search-engine language code (e.g. en) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_name. Look up valid codes via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言代码（如 en），与 language_name 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法代码。

exclude_brands.desc_en: Whether branded keywords are filtered out of the results. Enable to focus on non-brand demand.
exclude_brands.title_zh: 是否从结果中过滤掉品牌词。开启可聚焦非品牌需求。

tasks.cost.title_zh: 单个任务的计费金额，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 result 数组中的条目数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments identifying the endpoint that handled this task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 标识处理该任务的端点的 URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted in the request, returned for traceability.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在请求中提交的参数，便于追溯。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying the actual keyword/trend data produced for this task; drill into its items for per-keyword figures.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际关键词/趋势数据的数组，逐项下钻可得到按关键词的具体数值。

tasks.result.keyword.desc_en: The keyword these metrics describe (URL-decoded; `+` becomes a space).
tasks.result.keyword.title_zh: 本组指标所对应的关键词（已 URL 解码，`+` 还原为空格）。

tasks.result.confidence_score.desc_en: Probability (0.0–1.0) that the keyword matches a user's search query; higher means a closer match.
tasks.result.confidence_score.title_zh: 关键词与用户查询匹配的概率（0.0–1.0），越高表示匹配越紧密。

id.desc_en: Unique task identifier (UUID) you can use to retrieve this task's results later from the corresponding task_get endpoint.
id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识（UUID），后续可凭它从对应的 task_get 端点取回该任务结果。

target.desc_en: Target web page (or site) URL to scan for keyword ideas. Combine with target_type to choose page-level or site-level extraction.
target.title_zh: 用于抓取关键词建议的目标网页（或站点）URL。与 target_type 搭配，决定按单页还是整站提取。

language_code.desc_en: Search-engine language code (e.g. en) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_name. Look up valid codes via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言代码（如 en），与 language_name 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法代码。

exclude_brands.desc_en: Whether branded keywords are filtered out of the results. Enable to focus on non-brand demand.
exclude_brands.title_zh: 是否从结果中过滤掉品牌词。开启可聚焦非品牌需求。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response; useful when reporting issues.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号，反馈问题时可一并提供。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request; check it before reading the payload and design handling for error conditions.
status_code.title_zh: 本次请求的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查，并为异常情况设计处理逻辑。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

time.desc_en: Server-side processing time for the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端处理耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total billed cost of this response across all tasks, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应所有任务的合计计费金额，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task entries contained in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the tasks finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own status fields.
tasks_error.title_zh: 其中以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

tasks.result.id.desc_en: UUID of the completed task this result belongs to.
tasks.result.id.title_zh: 本结果所属已完成任务的 UUID。

tasks.result.se.desc_en: Search engine the task was run against, echoed from the request.
tasks.result.se.title_zh: 任务所针对的搜索引擎，从请求回显。

tasks.result.function.desc_en: Task type/function name describing what this task computed.
tasks.result.function.title_zh: 描述该任务所执行计算的任务类型/功能名。

tasks.result.date_posted.desc_en: UTC timestamp when the task was submitted.
tasks.result.date_posted.title_zh: 任务提交时的 UTC 时间戳。

tasks.result.endpoint.desc_en: URL from which the completed task's results can be collected.
tasks.result.endpoint.title_zh: 可用于收取该已完成任务结果的 URL。

keywords.desc_en: Seed keywords to analyze; pass them as an array of strings. Capping and character rules are enforced by the endpoint, and non-Latin characters bias results toward the regions where those characters are used.
keywords.title_zh: 待分析的种子关键词，以字符串数组传入。条数上限与字符规则由端点强制；使用非拉丁字符会让结果偏向这些字符所属的地区。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name used for geo targeting (e.g. country, region, city). Mutually replaceable with location_code; omit both to get global results. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages / locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地理定向的位置全名（如国家、地区、城市）。与 location_code 二选一；两者都不传则返回全球结果。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages / locations 端点查询合法名称。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier used for geo targeting; an alternative to location_name. Omit both to get global results. Data is reported for the country the code belongs to. Look up valid codes via the matching locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地理定向的数字位置标识，可替代 location_name。两者都不传则返回全球结果；数据按该编码所属国家提供。可通过对应的 locations 端点查询合法编码。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS-based geo target given as `latitude,longitude,radius_km`. An alternative to location_name / location_code; data is reported for the country the coordinates fall in.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 基于 GPS 的地理定向，格式为 `纬度,经度,半径(km)`。可替代 location_name / location_code；数据按坐标所属国家提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full search-engine language name (e.g. English) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_code. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言全名（如 English），与 language_code 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法名称。

language_code.desc_en: Search-engine language code (e.g. en) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_name. Look up valid codes via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言代码（如 en），与 language_name 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法代码。

sort_by.desc_en: Metric used to order the returned keyword rows in descending order (e.g. by search volume, CPC, competition, or relevance).
sort_by.title_zh: 返回关键词行的降序排序依据（如按搜索量、CPC、竞争度或相关度）。

keywords_negative.desc_en: Negative keyword terms to exclude from the result set. Matching items are dropped from the response and the terms are lowercased before filtering.
keywords_negative.title_zh: 用于从结果中排除的否定关键词。命中的条目会从响应里剔除，过滤前这些词会被统一转为小写。

device.desc_en: Restricts the returned metrics to a single device type. Leave unset to aggregate across all devices.
device.title_zh: 将返回的指标限定到某一设备类型；不设置则跨所有设备汇总。

date_from.desc_en: Start of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Endpoint-specific minimum dates apply; omit to default to the start of the comparable prior period.
date_from.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的起始日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。各端点有各自的最早可用日期；不传时按可比的上一周期起点默认。

date_to.desc_en: End of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Omit to default to the current date.
date_to.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的结束日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。不传则默认到当天。

search_partners.desc_en: Whether to include syndicated search-partner networks in addition to the primary engine. Enable to widen reach across partner sites.
search_partners.title_zh: 是否在主引擎之外纳入联合搜索合作网络。开启可把覆盖范围扩展到合作站点。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task, echoed back in the response so you can correlate results with the request that produced them.
tag.title_zh: 自定义的任务标签，会原样回显在响应中，方便把结果与触发它的请求对应起来。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response; useful when reporting issues.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号，反馈问题时可一并提供。

status_code.title_zh: 本次请求的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查，并为异常情况设计处理逻辑。

tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

tasks_error.title_zh: 其中以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

tasks.desc_en: List of task results; one entry per task created by the request.
tasks.title_zh: 任务结果列表，请求创建的每个任务对应一个条目。

tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务在提供方系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

tasks.result.keyword.desc_en: The keyword these metrics describe (URL-decoded; `+` becomes a space).
tasks.result.keyword.title_zh: 本组指标所对应的关键词（已 URL 解码，`+` 还原为空格）。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的位置编码；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的语言代码；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.search_partners.desc_en: Whether partner-network data was included in this result.
tasks.result.search_partners.title_zh: 本结果是否纳入了合作网络的数据。

tasks.result.device.desc_en: Device type the data applies to.
tasks.result.device.title_zh: 数据所对应的设备类型。

tasks.result.competition.desc_en: Relative paid-search competition level for the keyword; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.competition.title_zh: 该关键词在付费搜索中的相对竞争程度；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.cpc.desc_en: Average historical cost-per-click in USD for the keyword; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.cpc.title_zh: 该关键词的历史平均每次点击成本（美元）；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.search_volume.desc_en: Approximate monthly average number of searches for the keyword under the requested targeting.
tasks.result.search_volume.title_zh: 在所请求定向下，该关键词的月均搜索量近似值。

tasks.result.categories.desc_en: Product/service categories for the keyword. Legacy field that is always null.
tasks.result.categories.title_zh: 关键词的产品/服务类目。该字段为历史遗留，恒为 null。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.desc_en: Per-month search-volume history for the keyword over the trailing window.
tasks.result.monthly_searches.title_zh: 该关键词在最近窗口内逐月的搜索量历史。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.year.desc_en: Year of this monthly data point.
tasks.result.monthly_searches.year.title_zh: 该月度数据点所属年份。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.month.desc_en: Month of this monthly data point.
tasks.result.monthly_searches.month.title_zh: 该月度数据点所属月份。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.search_vol.desc_en: Average search volume for that month.

id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识（UUID），后续可凭它从对应的 task_get 端点取回该任务结果。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name used for geo targeting (e.g. country, region, city). Mutually replaceable with location_code; omit both to get global results. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages / locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地理定向的位置全名（如国家、地区、城市）。与 location_code 二选一；两者都不传则返回全球结果。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages / locations 端点查询合法名称。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier used for geo targeting; an alternative to location_name. Omit both to get global results. Data is reported for the country the code belongs to. Look up valid codes via the matching locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地理定向的数字位置标识，可替代 location_name。两者都不传则返回全球结果；数据按该编码所属国家提供。可通过对应的 locations 端点查询合法编码。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS-based geo target given as `latitude,longitude,radius_km`. An alternative to location_name / location_code; data is reported for the country the coordinates fall in.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 基于 GPS 的地理定向，格式为 `纬度,经度,半径(km)`。可替代 location_name / location_code；数据按坐标所属国家提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full search-engine language name (e.g. English) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_code. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言全名（如 English），与 language_code 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法名称。

language_code.desc_en: Search-engine language code (e.g. en) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_name. Look up valid codes via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言代码（如 en），与 language_name 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法代码。

sort_by.desc_en: Metric used to order the returned keyword rows in descending order (e.g. by search volume, CPC, competition, or relevance).
sort_by.title_zh: 返回关键词行的降序排序依据（如按搜索量、CPC、竞争度或相关度）。

keywords_negative.desc_en: Negative keyword terms to exclude from the result set. Matching items are dropped from the response and the terms are lowercased before filtering.
keywords_negative.title_zh: 用于从结果中排除的否定关键词。命中的条目会从响应里剔除，过滤前这些词会被统一转为小写。

device.desc_en: Restricts the returned metrics to a single device type. Leave unset to aggregate across all devices.
device.title_zh: 将返回的指标限定到某一设备类型；不设置则跨所有设备汇总。

date_from.desc_en: Start of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Endpoint-specific minimum dates apply; omit to default to the start of the comparable prior period.
date_from.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的起始日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。各端点有各自的最早可用日期；不传时按可比的上一周期起点默认。

date_to.desc_en: End of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Omit to default to the current date.
date_to.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的结束日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。不传则默认到当天。

search_partners.desc_en: Whether to include syndicated search-partner networks in addition to the primary engine. Enable to widen reach across partner sites.
search_partners.title_zh: 是否在主引擎之外纳入联合搜索合作网络。开启可把覆盖范围扩展到合作站点。

postback_url.desc_en: Endpoint that receives a POST callback with the gzipped task results once the task finishes. Supports the `$id` and `$tag` placeholders, which are substituted before the callback is sent.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后接收回调的地址，结果以 gzip 压缩通过 POST 推送到此。支持 `$id`、`$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换为实际值。

pingback_url.desc_en: Endpoint that receives a lightweight GET ping when the task completes, signalling you to fetch the results. Supports the `$id` and `$tag` placeholders, substituted before the ping is sent.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时接收 GET 通知的地址，用于提示你去拉取结果。支持 `$id`、`$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换为实际值。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task, echoed back in the response so you can correlate results with the request that produced them.
tag.title_zh: 自定义的任务标签，会原样回显在响应中，方便把结果与触发它的请求对应起来。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response; useful when reporting issues.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号，反馈问题时可一并提供。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request; check it before reading the payload and design handling for error conditions.
status_code.title_zh: 本次请求的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查，并为异常情况设计处理逻辑。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

time.desc_en: Server-side processing time for the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端处理耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total billed cost of this response across all tasks, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应所有任务的合计计费金额，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task entries contained in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the tasks finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own status fields.
tasks_error.title_zh: 其中以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

tasks.desc_en: List of task results; one entry per task created by the request.
tasks.title_zh: 任务结果列表，请求创建的每个任务对应一个条目。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of this task in the provider's system.
tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务在提供方系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code; check it to tell whether this individual task succeeded.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，用于判断该任务是否成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态码对应的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time for this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Billed cost of this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 单个任务的计费金额，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 result 数组中的条目数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments identifying the endpoint that handled this task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 标识处理该任务的端点的 URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted in the request, returned for traceability.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在请求中提交的参数，便于追溯。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying the actual keyword/trend data produced for this task; drill into its items for per-keyword figures.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际关键词/趋势数据的数组，逐项下钻可得到按关键词的具体数值。

target.desc_en: Target web page (or site) URL to scan for keyword ideas. Combine with target_type to choose page-level or site-level extraction.
target.title_zh: 用于抓取关键词建议的目标网页（或站点）URL。与 target_type 搭配，决定按单页还是整站提取。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name used for geo targeting (e.g. country, region, city). Mutually replaceable with location_code; omit both to get global results. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages / locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地理定向的位置全名（如国家、地区、城市）。与 location_code 二选一；两者都不传则返回全球结果。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages / locations 端点查询合法名称。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier used for geo targeting; an alternative to location_name. Omit both to get global results. Data is reported for the country the code belongs to. Look up valid codes via the matching locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地理定向的数字位置标识，可替代 location_name。两者都不传则返回全球结果；数据按该编码所属国家提供。可通过对应的 locations 端点查询合法编码。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS-based geo target given as `latitude,longitude,radius_km`. An alternative to location_name / location_code; data is reported for the country the coordinates fall in.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 基于 GPS 的地理定向，格式为 `纬度,经度,半径(km)`。可替代 location_name / location_code；数据按坐标所属国家提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full search-engine language name (e.g. English) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_code. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言全名（如 English），与 language_code 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法名称。

language_code.desc_en: Search-engine language code (e.g. en) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_name. Look up valid codes via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言代码（如 en），与 language_name 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法代码。

keywords_negative.desc_en: Negative keyword terms to exclude from the result set. Matching items are dropped from the response and the terms are lowercased before filtering.
keywords_negative.title_zh: 用于从结果中排除的否定关键词。命中的条目会从响应里剔除，过滤前这些词会被统一转为小写。

device.desc_en: Restricts the returned metrics to a single device type. Leave unset to aggregate across all devices.
device.title_zh: 将返回的指标限定到某一设备类型；不设置则跨所有设备汇总。

date_from.desc_en: Start of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Endpoint-specific minimum dates apply; omit to default to the start of the comparable prior period.
date_from.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的起始日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。各端点有各自的最早可用日期；不传时按可比的上一周期起点默认。

date_to.desc_en: End of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Omit to default to the current date.
date_to.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的结束日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。不传则默认到当天。

sort_by.desc_en: Metric used to order the returned keyword rows in descending order (e.g. by search volume, CPC, competition, or relevance).
sort_by.title_zh: 返回关键词行的降序排序依据（如按搜索量、CPC、竞争度或相关度）。

search_partners.desc_en: Whether to include syndicated search-partner networks in addition to the primary engine. Enable to widen reach across partner sites.
search_partners.title_zh: 是否在主引擎之外纳入联合搜索合作网络。开启可把覆盖范围扩展到合作站点。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task, echoed back in the response so you can correlate results with the request that produced them.
tag.title_zh: 自定义的任务标签，会原样回显在响应中，方便把结果与触发它的请求对应起来。

status_code.title_zh: 本次请求的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查，并为异常情况设计处理逻辑。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

time.desc_en: Server-side processing time for the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，用于判断该任务是否成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态码对应的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time for this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Billed cost of this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 单个任务的计费金额，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 result 数组中的条目数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments identifying the endpoint that handled this task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 标识处理该任务的端点的 URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted in the request, returned for traceability.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在请求中提交的参数，便于追溯。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying the actual keyword/trend data produced for this task; drill into its items for per-keyword figures.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际关键词/趋势数据的数组，逐项下钻可得到按关键词的具体数值。

tasks.result.keyword.desc_en: The keyword these metrics describe (URL-decoded; `+` becomes a space).
tasks.result.keyword.title_zh: 本组指标所对应的关键词（已 URL 解码，`+` 还原为空格）。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的位置编码；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的语言代码；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.search_partners.desc_en: Whether partner-network data was included in this result.
tasks.result.search_partners.title_zh: 本结果是否纳入了合作网络的数据。

tasks.result.device.desc_en: Device type the data applies to.
tasks.result.device.title_zh: 数据所对应的设备类型。

tasks.result.competition.desc_en: Relative paid-search competition level for the keyword; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.competition.title_zh: 该关键词在付费搜索中的相对竞争程度；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.cpc.desc_en: Average historical cost-per-click in USD for the keyword; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.cpc.title_zh: 该关键词的历史平均每次点击成本（美元）；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.search_volume.desc_en: Approximate monthly average number of searches for the keyword under the requested targeting.
tasks.result.search_volume.title_zh: 在所请求定向下，该关键词的月均搜索量近似值。

tasks.result.categories.desc_en: Product/service categories for the keyword. Legacy field that is always null.
tasks.result.categories.title_zh: 关键词的产品/服务类目。该字段为历史遗留，恒为 null。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.desc_en: Per-month search-volume history for the keyword over the trailing window.
tasks.result.monthly_searches.title_zh: 该关键词在最近窗口内逐月的搜索量历史。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.year.desc_en: Year of this monthly data point.
tasks.result.monthly_searches.year.title_zh: 该月度数据点所属年份。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.month.desc_en: Month of this monthly data point.
tasks.result.monthly_searches.month.title_zh: 该月度数据点所属月份。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.search_vol.desc_en: Average search volume for that month.

id.desc_en: Unique task identifier (UUID) you can use to retrieve this task's results later from the corresponding task_get endpoint.
id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识（UUID），后续可凭它从对应的 task_get 端点取回该任务结果。

target.desc_en: Target web page (or site) URL to scan for keyword ideas. Combine with target_type to choose page-level or site-level extraction.
target.title_zh: 用于抓取关键词建议的目标网页（或站点）URL。与 target_type 搭配，决定按单页还是整站提取。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name used for geo targeting (e.g. country, region, city). Mutually replaceable with location_code; omit both to get global results. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages / locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地理定向的位置全名（如国家、地区、城市）。与 location_code 二选一；两者都不传则返回全球结果。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages / locations 端点查询合法名称。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier used for geo targeting; an alternative to location_name. Omit both to get global results. Data is reported for the country the code belongs to. Look up valid codes via the matching locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地理定向的数字位置标识，可替代 location_name。两者都不传则返回全球结果；数据按该编码所属国家提供。可通过对应的 locations 端点查询合法编码。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS-based geo target given as `latitude,longitude,radius_km`. An alternative to location_name / location_code; data is reported for the country the coordinates fall in.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 基于 GPS 的地理定向，格式为 `纬度,经度,半径(km)`。可替代 location_name / location_code；数据按坐标所属国家提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full search-engine language name (e.g. English) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_code. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言全名（如 English），与 language_code 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法名称。

language_code.desc_en: Search-engine language code (e.g. en) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_name. Look up valid codes via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言代码（如 en），与 language_name 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法代码。

keywords_negative.desc_en: Negative keyword terms to exclude from the result set. Matching items are dropped from the response and the terms are lowercased before filtering.
keywords_negative.title_zh: 用于从结果中排除的否定关键词。命中的条目会从响应里剔除，过滤前这些词会被统一转为小写。

device.desc_en: Restricts the returned metrics to a single device type. Leave unset to aggregate across all devices.
device.title_zh: 将返回的指标限定到某一设备类型；不设置则跨所有设备汇总。

sort_by.desc_en: Metric used to order the returned keyword rows in descending order (e.g. by search volume, CPC, competition, or relevance).
sort_by.title_zh: 返回关键词行的降序排序依据（如按搜索量、CPC、竞争度或相关度）。

date_from.desc_en: Start of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Endpoint-specific minimum dates apply; omit to default to the start of the comparable prior period.
date_from.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的起始日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。各端点有各自的最早可用日期；不传时按可比的上一周期起点默认。

date_to.desc_en: End of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Omit to default to the current date.

tasks.result.language_name.desc_en: Language name for the returned data.
tasks.result.language_name.title_zh: 返回数据对应的语言名称。

tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的语言代码；无数据时为 null。

tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

tasks.result.location_name.desc_en: Full name of the location these metrics apply to.
tasks.result.location_name.title_zh: 本组指标所适用位置的全名。

tasks.result.location_code_parent.desc_en: Location code of the parent (superordinate) location in the geo hierarchy.
tasks.result.location_code_parent.title_zh: 地理层级中上级（父级）位置的位置编码。

tasks.result.country_iso_code.desc_en: ISO country code of the location.
tasks.result.country_iso_code.title_zh: 位置所属国家的 ISO 国家代码。

tasks.result.location_type.desc_en: Granularity of the location, such as country or region.
tasks.result.location_type.title_zh: 位置的粒度，例如国家或地区。

keywords.desc_en: Seed keywords to analyze; pass them as an array of strings. Capping and character rules are enforced by the endpoint, and non-Latin characters bias results toward the regions where those characters are used.
keywords.title_zh: 待分析的种子关键词，以字符串数组传入。条数上限与字符规则由端点强制；使用非拉丁字符会让结果偏向这些字符所属的地区。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name used for geo targeting (e.g. country, region, city). Mutually replaceable with location_code; omit both to get global results. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages / locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地理定向的位置全名（如国家、地区、城市）。与 location_code 二选一；两者都不传则返回全球结果。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages / locations 端点查询合法名称。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier used for geo targeting; an alternative to location_name. Omit both to get global results. Data is reported for the country the code belongs to. Look up valid codes via the matching locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地理定向的数字位置标识，可替代 location_name。两者都不传则返回全球结果；数据按该编码所属国家提供。可通过对应的 locations 端点查询合法编码。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS-based geo target given as `latitude,longitude,radius_km`. An alternative to location_name / location_code; data is reported for the country the coordinates fall in.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 基于 GPS 的地理定向，格式为 `纬度,经度,半径(km)`。可替代 location_name / location_code；数据按坐标所属国家提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full search-engine language name (e.g. English) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_code. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言全名（如 English），与 language_code 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法名称。

language_code.desc_en: Search-engine language code (e.g. en) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_name. Look up valid codes via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言代码（如 en），与 language_name 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法代码。

device.desc_en: Restricts the returned metrics to a single device type. Leave unset to aggregate across all devices.
device.title_zh: 将返回的指标限定到某一设备类型；不设置则跨所有设备汇总。

sort_by.desc_en: Metric used to order the returned keyword rows in descending order (e.g. by search volume, CPC, competition, or relevance).
sort_by.title_zh: 返回关键词行的降序排序依据（如按搜索量、CPC、竞争度或相关度）。

date_from.desc_en: Start of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Endpoint-specific minimum dates apply; omit to default to the start of the comparable prior period.
date_from.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的起始日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。各端点有各自的最早可用日期；不传时按可比的上一周期起点默认。

date_to.desc_en: End of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Omit to default to the current date.
date_to.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的结束日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。不传则默认到当天。

search_partners.desc_en: Whether to include syndicated search-partner networks in addition to the primary engine. Enable to widen reach across partner sites.
search_partners.title_zh: 是否在主引擎之外纳入联合搜索合作网络。开启可把覆盖范围扩展到合作站点。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task, echoed back in the response so you can correlate results with the request that produced them.
tag.title_zh: 自定义的任务标签，会原样回显在响应中，方便把结果与触发它的请求对应起来。

tasks.result.keyword.title_zh: 本组指标所对应的关键词（已 URL 解码，`+` 还原为空格）。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的位置编码；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的语言代码；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.search_partners.desc_en: Whether partner-network data was included in this result.
tasks.result.search_partners.title_zh: 本结果是否纳入了合作网络的数据。

tasks.result.device.desc_en: Device type the data applies to.
tasks.result.device.title_zh: 数据所对应的设备类型。

tasks.result.competition.desc_en: Relative paid-search competition level for the keyword; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.competition.title_zh: 该关键词在付费搜索中的相对竞争程度；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.cpc.desc_en: Average historical cost-per-click in USD for the keyword; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.cpc.title_zh: 该关键词的历史平均每次点击成本（美元）；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.search_volume.desc_en: Approximate monthly average number of searches for the keyword under the requested targeting.
tasks.result.search_volume.title_zh: 在所请求定向下，该关键词的月均搜索量近似值。

tasks.result.categories.desc_en: Product/service categories for the keyword. Legacy field that is always null.
tasks.result.categories.title_zh: 关键词的产品/服务类目。该字段为历史遗留，恒为 null。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.desc_en: Per-month search-volume history for the keyword over the trailing window.
tasks.result.monthly_searches.title_zh: 该关键词在最近窗口内逐月的搜索量历史。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.year.desc_en: Year of this monthly data point.
tasks.result.monthly_searches.year.title_zh: 该月度数据点所属年份。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.month.desc_en: Month of this monthly data point.
tasks.result.monthly_searches.month.title_zh: 该月度数据点所属月份。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.search_vol.desc_en: Average search volume for that month.

id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识（UUID），后续可凭它从对应的 task_get 端点取回该任务结果。

postback_url.desc_en: Endpoint that receives a POST callback with the gzipped task results once the task finishes. Supports the `$id` and `$tag` placeholders, which are substituted before the callback is sent.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后接收回调的地址，结果以 gzip 压缩通过 POST 推送到此。支持 `$id`、`$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换为实际值。

pingback_url.desc_en: Endpoint that receives a lightweight GET ping when the task completes, signalling you to fetch the results. Supports the `$id` and `$tag` placeholders, substituted before the ping is sent.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时接收 GET 通知的地址，用于提示你去拉取结果。支持 `$id`、`$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换为实际值。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name used for geo targeting (e.g. country, region, city). Mutually replaceable with location_code; omit both to get global results. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages / locations endpoint.

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier used for geo targeting; an alternative to location_name. Omit both to get global results. Data is reported for the country the code belongs to. Look up valid codes via the matching locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地理定向的数字位置标识，可替代 location_name。两者都不传则返回全球结果；数据按该编码所属国家提供。可通过对应的 locations 端点查询合法编码。
