tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，用于判断该任务是否成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态码对应的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time for this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Billed cost of this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 单个任务的计费金额，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 result 数组中的条目数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments identifying the endpoint that handled this task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 标识处理该任务的端点的 URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted in the request, returned for traceability.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在请求中提交的参数，便于追溯。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying the actual keyword/trend data produced for this task; drill into its items for per-keyword figures.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际关键词/趋势数据的数组，逐项下钻可得到按关键词的具体数值。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的位置编码；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.location_name.desc_en: Full name of the location these metrics apply to.
tasks.result.location_name.title_zh: 本组指标所适用位置的全名。

tasks.result.location_code_parent.desc_en: Location code of the parent (superordinate) location in the geo hierarchy.
tasks.result.location_code_parent.title_zh: 地理层级中上级（父级）位置的位置编码。

tasks.result.country_iso_code.desc_en: ISO country code of the location.
tasks.result.country_iso_code.title_zh: 位置所属国家的 ISO 国家代码。

tasks.result.location_type.desc_en: Granularity of the location, such as country or region.
tasks.result.location_type.title_zh: 位置的粒度，例如国家或地区。

tasks.result.available_languages.desc_en: Languages supported for the given location.
tasks.result.available_languages.title_zh: 给定位置所支持的语言列表。

tasks.result.available_languages.languag.desc_en: ISO 639-1 code of a supported language.
tasks.result.available_languages.languag.title_zh: 受支持语言的 ISO 639-1 代码。

keywords.desc_en: Seed keywords to analyze; pass them as an array of strings. Capping and character rules are enforced by the endpoint, and non-Latin characters bias results toward the regions where those characters are used.
keywords.title_zh: 待分析的种子关键词，以字符串数组传入。条数上限与字符规则由端点强制；使用非拉丁字符会让结果偏向这些字符所属的地区。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name used for geo targeting (e.g. country, region, city). Mutually replaceable with location_code; omit both to get global results. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages / locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地理定向的位置全名（如国家、地区、城市）。与 location_code 二选一；两者都不传则返回全球结果。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages / locations 端点查询合法名称。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier used for geo targeting; an alternative to location_name. Omit both to get global results. Data is reported for the country the code belongs to. Look up valid codes via the matching locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地理定向的数字位置标识，可替代 location_name。两者都不传则返回全球结果；数据按该编码所属国家提供。可通过对应的 locations 端点查询合法编码。

type.desc_en: Trends data category to query (e.g. web, news, ecommerce). Selects which corpus the popularity figures are drawn from.
type.title_zh: 要查询的趋势数据类别（如 web、news、ecommerce），决定热度数据取自哪一类语料。

date_from.desc_en: Start of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Endpoint-specific minimum dates apply; omit to default to the start of the comparable prior period.
date_from.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的起始日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。各端点有各自的最早可用日期；不传时按可比的上一周期起点默认。

date_to.desc_en: End of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Omit to default to the current date.
date_to.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的结束日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。不传则默认到当天。

time_range.desc_en: Preset relative time window for trend data, used as a shortcut instead of date_from/date_to. Ignored if explicit dates are supplied.
time_range.title_zh: 趋势数据的预设相对时间窗，作为 date_from/date_to 的快捷替代；若已显式给定日期则忽略本字段。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task, echoed back in the response so you can correlate results with the request that produced them.
tag.title_zh: 自定义的任务标签，会原样回显在响应中，方便把结果与触发它的请求对应起来。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response; useful when reporting issues.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号，反馈问题时可一并提供。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request; check it before reading the payload and design handling for error conditions.
status_code.title_zh: 本次请求的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查，并为异常情况设计处理逻辑。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

time.desc_en: Server-side processing time for the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端处理耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total billed cost of this response across all tasks, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应所有任务的合计计费金额，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task entries contained in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the tasks finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own status fields.
tasks_error.title_zh: 其中以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

tasks.desc_en: List of task results; one entry per task created by the request.
tasks.title_zh: 任务结果列表，请求创建的每个任务对应一个条目。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of this task in the provider's system.
tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务在提供方系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 result 数组中的条目数量。

tasks.path.title_zh: 标识处理该任务的端点的 URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在请求中提交的参数，便于追溯。

tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际关键词/趋势数据的数组，逐项下钻可得到按关键词的具体数值。

tasks.result.keywords.desc_en: The keywords submitted in the request that this result corresponds to.
tasks.result.keywords.title_zh: 本结果对应的、请求中提交的关键词列表。

tasks.result.type.desc_en: Search-engine/data type echoed from the request.
tasks.result.type.title_zh: 从请求回显的搜索引擎/数据类型。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的位置编码；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的语言代码；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.datetime.desc_en: UTC timestamp when this result was produced.
tasks.result.datetime.title_zh: 本结果生成的 UTC 时间戳。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this result's items array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本结果 items 数组中的条目数量。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Detailed per-keyword (or per-element) data rows for this result.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 本结果中按关键词（或按元素）的明细数据行。

tasks.result.items.position.desc_en: Ordinal position of this element within the items array.
tasks.result.items.position.title_zh: 本元素在 items 数组中的序号位置。

tasks.result.items.type.desc_en: Element type of this item row, indicating which kind of data block it carries.
tasks.result.items.type.title_zh: 本条目的元素类型，指明它承载的数据块类别。

tasks.result.items.keywords.desc_en: Keywords that the demography and comparison data in this item are based on.
tasks.result.items.keywords.title_zh: 本条目中人口统计与对比数据所基于的关键词。

tasks.result.items.demography.desc_en: Demographic breakdown of keyword popularity, split by age and gender for each term.
tasks.result.items.demography.title_zh: 关键词热度的人口统计拆分，按年龄与性别分别给出每个词的数据。

tasks.result.items.demography.age.desc_en: Keyword popularity distributed across age ranges.
tasks.result.items.demography.age.title_zh: 关键词热度在各年龄段上的分布。

tasks.result.items.demography.age.keywor.desc_en: Keyword the age-distribution data applies to.
tasks.result.items.demography.age.keywor.title_zh: 年龄分布数据所对应的关键词。

tasks.result.items.demography.age.values.desc_en: Age-range buckets with their corresponding popularity values.
tasks.result.items.demography.age.values.title_zh: 各年龄段及其对应的热度值。

tasks.result.items.demography.age.values.desc_en: The age range this value applies to.
tasks.result.items.demography.age.values.title_zh: 该热度值所对应的年龄段。

tasks.result.items.demography.age.values.desc_en: Relative keyword popularity within this age range, on the trends popularity scale.
tasks.result.items.demography.age.values.title_zh: 该年龄段内关键词的相对热度，采用趋势热度刻度。

tasks.result.items.demography.gender.desc_en: Keyword popularity distributed across gender categories.
tasks.result.items.demography.gender.title_zh: 关键词热度在各性别类别上的分布。

tasks.result.items.demography.gender.key.desc_en: Keyword the gender-distribution data applies to.
tasks.result.items.demography.gender.key.title_zh: 性别分布数据所对应的关键词。

tasks.result.items.demography.gender.val.desc_en: Gender categories with their corresponding popularity values.
tasks.result.items.demography.gender.val.title_zh: 各性别类别及其对应的热度值。

tasks.result.items.demography.gender.val.desc_en: The gender category this value applies to.
tasks.result.items.demography.gender.val.title_zh: 该热度值所对应的性别类别。

tasks.result.items.demography.gender.val.desc_en: Relative keyword popularity within this gender category, on the trends popularity scale.
tasks.result.items.demography.gender.val.title_zh: 该性别类别内关键词的相对热度，采用趋势热度刻度。

tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.desc_en: Side-by-side comparison of demographic popularity across the specified terms; null when only one keyword was supplied.
tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.title_zh: 对所指定多个词的人口统计热度并排对比；仅提交一个关键词时为 null。

tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.desc_en: Age-based comparison of keyword popularity across terms, keyed by age range.
tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.title_zh: 按年龄段比较各词关键词热度，以年龄段为键。

tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.desc_en: Comparison values for the corresponding age range across the specified terms.
tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.title_zh: 对应年龄段下各指定词的对比数值。

tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.desc_en: Gender-based comparison of keyword popularity across terms, keyed by gender category.
tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.title_zh: 按性别类别比较各词关键词热度，以性别类别为键。

tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.desc_en: Comparison values for the female category across the specified terms.
tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.title_zh: female 类别下各指定词的对比数值。

tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.desc_en: Comparison values for the male category across the specified terms.
tasks.result.items.demography_comparison.title_zh: male 类别下各指定词的对比数值。

tasks.result.items.data.date_from.desc_en: Start date (UTC) of this data point's time bucket.

tasks.result.items.data.values.desc_en: Relative keyword popularity at this timestamp; when multiple keywords are queried the values are averaged. The scale is relative, peaking at the most popular point.

tasks.result.items.averages.desc_en: Keyword popularity values averaged across the full requested time range.
tasks.result.items.averages.title_zh: 在整个所请求时间范围内取平均的关键词热度值。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier used for geo targeting; an alternative to location_name. Omit both to get global results. Data is reported for the country the code belongs to. Look up valid codes via the matching locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地理定向的数字位置标识，可替代 location_name。两者都不传则返回全球结果；数据按该编码所属国家提供。可通过对应的 locations 端点查询合法编码。

type.desc_en: Trends data category to query (e.g. web, news, ecommerce). Selects which corpus the popularity figures are drawn from.
type.title_zh: 要查询的趋势数据类别（如 web、news、ecommerce），决定热度数据取自哪一类语料。

date_from.desc_en: Start of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Endpoint-specific minimum dates apply; omit to default to the start of the comparable prior period.
date_from.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的起始日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。各端点有各自的最早可用日期；不传时按可比的上一周期起点默认。

date_to.desc_en: End of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Omit to default to the current date.
date_to.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的结束日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。不传则默认到当天。

time_range.desc_en: Preset relative time window for trend data, used as a shortcut instead of date_from/date_to. Ignored if explicit dates are supplied.
time_range.title_zh: 趋势数据的预设相对时间窗，作为 date_from/date_to 的快捷替代；若已显式给定日期则忽略本字段。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task, echoed back in the response so you can correlate results with the request that produced them.
tag.title_zh: 自定义的任务标签，会原样回显在响应中，方便把结果与触发它的请求对应起来。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response; useful when reporting issues.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号，反馈问题时可一并提供。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request; check it before reading the payload and design handling for error conditions.
status_code.title_zh: 本次请求的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查，并为异常情况设计处理逻辑。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

time.desc_en: Server-side processing time for the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端处理耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total billed cost of this response across all tasks, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应所有任务的合计计费金额，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task entries contained in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the tasks finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own status fields.
tasks_error.title_zh: 其中以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

tasks.desc_en: List of task results; one entry per task created by the request.
tasks.title_zh: 任务结果列表，请求创建的每个任务对应一个条目。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of this task in the provider's system.
tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务在提供方系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code; check it to tell whether this individual task succeeded.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，用于判断该任务是否成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态码对应的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time for this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Billed cost of this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 单个任务的计费金额，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 result 数组中的条目数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments identifying the endpoint that handled this task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 标识处理该任务的端点的 URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted in the request, returned for traceability.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在请求中提交的参数，便于追溯。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying the actual keyword/trend data produced for this task; drill into its items for per-keyword figures.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际关键词/趋势数据的数组，逐项下钻可得到按关键词的具体数值。

tasks.result.keywords.desc_en: The keywords submitted in the request that this result corresponds to.
tasks.result.keywords.title_zh: 本结果对应的、请求中提交的关键词列表。

tasks.result.type.desc_en: Search-engine/data type echoed from the request.
tasks.result.type.title_zh: 从请求回显的搜索引擎/数据类型。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的位置编码；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的语言代码；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.datetime.desc_en: UTC timestamp when this result was produced.
tasks.result.datetime.title_zh: 本结果生成的 UTC 时间戳。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this result's items array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本结果 items 数组中的条目数量。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Detailed per-keyword (or per-element) data rows for this result.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 本结果中按关键词（或按元素）的明细数据行。

tasks.result.items.position.desc_en: Ordinal position of this element within the items array.
tasks.result.items.position.title_zh: 本元素在 items 数组中的序号位置。

tasks.result.items.type.desc_en: Element type of this item row, indicating which kind of data block it carries.
tasks.result.items.type.title_zh: 本条目的元素类型，指明它承载的数据块类别。

tasks.result.items.keywords.desc_en: Keywords that the demography and comparison data in this item are based on.
tasks.result.items.keywords.title_zh: 本条目中人口统计与对比数据所基于的关键词。

tasks.result.items.interests.desc_en: Subregional keyword popularity data for each specified term.
tasks.result.items.interests.title_zh: 每个指定词的次区域关键词热度数据。

tasks.result.items.interests.keyword.desc_en: Keyword the subregional values are based on.
tasks.result.items.interests.keyword.title_zh: 次区域数值所基于的关键词。

tasks.result.items.interests.values.desc_en: Relative keyword popularity broken down by country or region.
tasks.result.items.interests.values.title_zh: 按国家或地区拆分的相对关键词热度。

tasks.result.items.interests.values.geo_.desc_en: Location identifier; use it to match results back to the location parameters in your request.
tasks.result.items.interests.values.geo_.title_zh: 位置标识；可用它把结果与请求中的位置参数对应起来。

tasks.result.items.interests.values.geo_.desc_en: Location name; use it to match results back to the location parameters in your request.
tasks.result.items.interests.values.geo_.title_zh: 位置名称；可用它把结果与请求中的位置参数对应起来。

tasks.result.items.interests.values.valu.desc_en: Location-specific relative keyword popularity over the requested time range.
tasks.result.items.interests.values.valu.title_zh: 在所请求时间范围内某位置的相对关键词热度。

tasks.result.items.interests_comparison.desc_en: Comparison of subregional popularity across the specified terms; null when only one keyword was supplied.
tasks.result.items.interests_comparison.title_zh: 对所指定多个词的次区域热度对比；仅提交一个关键词时为 null。

tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..desc_en: Per-location popularity values normalized relative to the maximum within each region.
tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..title_zh: 按位置的热度值，相对每个地区内的最大值做归一化。

tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..desc_en: Location identifier; use it to match results back to your request's location parameters.
tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..title_zh: 位置标识；可用它把结果与请求的位置参数对应起来。

tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..desc_en: Location name; use it to match results back to your request's location parameters.
tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..title_zh: 位置名称；可用它把结果与请求的位置参数对应起来。

tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..desc_en: Relative popularity within the given location over the requested time range.
tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..title_zh: 在所请求时间范围内某位置内的相对热度。

tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..desc_en: Per-location popularity values normalized relative to the maximum across all locations.
tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..title_zh: 按位置的热度值，相对所有位置中的最大值做归一化。

tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..desc_en: Location identifier; use it to match results back to your request's location parameters.
tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..title_zh: 位置标识；可用它把结果与请求的位置参数对应起来。

tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..desc_en: Location name; use it to match results back to your request's location parameters.
tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..title_zh: 位置名称；可用它把结果与请求的位置参数对应起来。

tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..desc_en: Location-specific relative popularity, normalized across all locations.
tasks.result.items.interests_comparison..title_zh: 某位置的相对热度，跨所有位置做归一化。

id.desc_en: Unique task identifier (UUID) you can use to retrieve this task's results later from the corresponding task_get endpoint.
id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识（UUID），后续可凭它从对应的 task_get 端点取回该任务结果。

keywords.desc_en: Seed keywords to analyze; pass them as an array of strings. Capping and character rules are enforced by the endpoint, and non-Latin characters bias results toward the regions where those characters are used.
keywords.title_zh: 待分析的种子关键词，以字符串数组传入。条数上限与字符规则由端点强制；使用非拉丁字符会让结果偏向这些字符所属的地区。

bid.desc_en: Hypothetical max bid in USD used to forecast ad traffic. Drives the estimated impressions, clicks, and spend figures returned.
bid.title_zh: 用于预测广告流量的假设最高出价（美元），决定返回的预计展示、点击与花费数据。

match.desc_en: Keyword match type that controls how strictly user queries must match your keyword (aggregate / broad / phrase / exact), shaping which queries contribute to the metrics.
match.title_zh: 关键词匹配类型，控制用户查询需与关键词匹配的严格程度（aggregate / broad / phrase / exact），影响哪些查询计入指标。

search_partners.desc_en: Whether to include syndicated search-partner networks in addition to the primary engine. Enable to widen reach across partner sites.
search_partners.title_zh: 是否在主引擎之外纳入联合搜索合作网络。开启可把覆盖范围扩展到合作站点。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name used for geo targeting (e.g. country, region, city). Mutually replaceable with location_code; omit both to get global results. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages / locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地理定向的位置全名（如国家、地区、城市）。与 location_code 二选一；两者都不传则返回全球结果。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages / locations 端点查询合法名称。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier used for geo targeting; an alternative to location_name. Omit both to get global results. Data is reported for the country the code belongs to. Look up valid codes via the matching locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地理定向的数字位置标识，可替代 location_name。两者都不传则返回全球结果；数据按该编码所属国家提供。可通过对应的 locations 端点查询合法编码。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS-based geo target given as `latitude,longitude,radius_km`. An alternative to location_name / location_code; data is reported for the country the coordinates fall in.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 基于 GPS 的地理定向，格式为 `纬度,经度,半径(km)`。可替代 location_name / location_code；数据按坐标所属国家提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full search-engine language name (e.g. English) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_code. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言全名（如 English），与 language_code 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法名称。

language_code.desc_en: Search-engine language code (e.g. en) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_name. Look up valid codes via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言代码（如 en），与 language_name 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法代码。

date_from.desc_en: Start of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Endpoint-specific minimum dates apply; omit to default to the start of the comparable prior period.
date_from.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的起始日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。各端点有各自的最早可用日期；不传时按可比的上一周期起点默认。

date_to.desc_en: End of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Omit to default to the current date.
date_to.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的结束日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。不传则默认到当天。

date_interval.desc_en: Forecasting horizon for ad-traffic estimates (e.g. next week/month/quarter), used as a shortcut instead of date_from/date_to.
date_interval.title_zh: 广告流量预测的预测区间（如下周/下月/下季度），作为 date_from/date_to 的快捷替代。

sort_by.desc_en: Metric used to order the returned keyword rows in descending order (e.g. by search volume, CPC, competition, or relevance).
sort_by.title_zh: 返回关键词行的降序排序依据（如按搜索量、CPC、竞争度或相关度）。

postback_url.desc_en: Endpoint that receives a POST callback with the gzipped task results once the task finishes. Supports the `$id` and `$tag` placeholders, which are substituted before the callback is sent.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后接收回调的地址，结果以 gzip 压缩通过 POST 推送到此。支持 `$id`、`$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换为实际值。

pingback_url.desc_en: Endpoint that receives a lightweight GET ping when the task completes, signalling you to fetch the results. Supports the `$id` and `$tag` placeholders, substituted before the ping is sent.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时接收 GET 通知的地址，用于提示你去拉取结果。支持 `$id`、`$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换为实际值。

keywords.desc_en: Seed keywords to analyze; pass them as an array of strings. Capping and character rules are enforced by the endpoint, and non-Latin characters bias results toward the regions where those characters are used.
keywords.title_zh: 待分析的种子关键词，以字符串数组传入。条数上限与字符规则由端点强制；使用非拉丁字符会让结果偏向这些字符所属的地区。

target.desc_en: Target web page (or site) URL to scan for keyword ideas. Combine with target_type to choose page-level or site-level extraction.
target.title_zh: 用于抓取关键词建议的目标网页（或站点）URL。与 target_type 搭配，决定按单页还是整站提取。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name used for geo targeting (e.g. country, region, city). Mutually replaceable with location_code; omit both to get global results. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages / locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地理定向的位置全名（如国家、地区、城市）。与 location_code 二选一；两者都不传则返回全球结果。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages / locations 端点查询合法名称。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier used for geo targeting; an alternative to location_name. Omit both to get global results. Data is reported for the country the code belongs to. Look up valid codes via the matching locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地理定向的数字位置标识，可替代 location_name。两者都不传则返回全球结果；数据按该编码所属国家提供。可通过对应的 locations 端点查询合法编码。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS-based geo target given as `latitude,longitude,radius_km`. An alternative to location_name / location_code; data is reported for the country the coordinates fall in.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 基于 GPS 的地理定向，格式为 `纬度,经度,半径(km)`。可替代 location_name / location_code；数据按坐标所属国家提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full search-engine language name (e.g. English) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_code. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言全名（如 English），与 language_code 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法名称。

language_code.desc_en: Search-engine language code (e.g. en) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_name. Look up valid codes via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言代码（如 en），与 language_name 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法代码。

search_partners.desc_en: Whether to include syndicated search-partner networks in addition to the primary engine. Enable to widen reach across partner sites.
search_partners.title_zh: 是否在主引擎之外纳入联合搜索合作网络。开启可把覆盖范围扩展到合作站点。

date_from.desc_en: Start of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Endpoint-specific minimum dates apply; omit to default to the start of the comparable prior period.
date_from.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的起始日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。各端点有各自的最早可用日期；不传时按可比的上一周期起点默认。

date_to.desc_en: End of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Omit to default to the current date.
date_to.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的结束日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。不传则默认到当天。

sort_by.desc_en: Metric used to order the returned keyword rows in descending order (e.g. by search volume, CPC, competition, or relevance).
sort_by.title_zh: 返回关键词行的降序排序依据（如按搜索量、CPC、竞争度或相关度）。

include_adult_keywords.desc_en: Whether adult-content keywords are kept in the response. Enable to retain them; note the provider may still return no data for such terms.
include_adult_keywords.title_zh: 是否在响应中保留成人内容关键词。开启则保留；注意此类词仍可能因提供方限制而无数据。

postback_url.desc_en: Endpoint that receives a POST callback with the gzipped task results once the task finishes. Supports the `$id` and `$tag` placeholders, which are substituted before the callback is sent.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后接收回调的地址，结果以 gzip 压缩通过 POST 推送到此。支持 `$id`、`$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换为实际值。

pingback_url.desc_en: Endpoint that receives a lightweight GET ping when the task completes, signalling you to fetch the results. Supports the `$id` and `$tag` placeholders, substituted before the ping is sent.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时接收 GET 通知的地址，用于提示你去拉取结果。支持 `$id`、`$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换为实际值。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task, echoed back in the response so you can correlate results with the request that produced them.
tag.title_zh: 自定义的任务标签，会原样回显在响应中，方便把结果与触发它的请求对应起来。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response; useful when reporting issues.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号，反馈问题时可一并提供。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request; check it before reading the payload and design handling for error conditions.
status_code.title_zh: 本次请求的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查，并为异常情况设计处理逻辑。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

time.desc_en: Server-side processing time for the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端处理耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total billed cost of this response across all tasks, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应所有任务的合计计费金额，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task entries contained in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the tasks finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own status fields.
tasks_error.title_zh: 其中以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

tasks.desc_en: List of task results; one entry per task created by the request.
tasks.title_zh: 任务结果列表，请求创建的每个任务对应一个条目。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of this task in the provider's system.
tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务在提供方系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code; check it to tell whether this individual task succeeded.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，用于判断该任务是否成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态码对应的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time for this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Billed cost of this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 单个任务的计费金额，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 result 数组中的条目数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments identifying the endpoint that handled this task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 标识处理该任务的端点的 URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted in the request, returned for traceability.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在请求中提交的参数，便于追溯。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying the actual keyword/trend data produced for this task; drill into its items for per-keyword figures.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际关键词/趋势数据的数组，逐项下钻可得到按关键词的具体数值。

target.desc_en: Target web page (or site) URL to scan for keyword ideas. Combine with target_type to choose page-level or site-level extraction.
target.title_zh: 用于抓取关键词建议的目标网页（或站点）URL。与 target_type 搭配，决定按单页还是整站提取。

target_type.desc_en: Whether keyword ideas are derived for the whole site or only the given page. Use `site` to crawl the entire domain, `page` for the single URL in target.
target_type.title_zh: 决定关键词建议是面向整站还是仅面向指定页面。`site` 抓取整个域名，`page` 仅针对 target 中的单个 URL。

location_name.title_zh: 用于地理定向的位置全名（如国家、地区、城市）。与 location_code 二选一；两者都不传则返回全球结果。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages / locations 端点查询合法名称。

language_code.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言代码（如 en），与 language_name 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法代码。

search_partners.title_zh: 是否在主引擎之外纳入联合搜索合作网络。开启可把覆盖范围扩展到合作站点。

include_adult_keywords.title_zh: 是否在响应中保留成人内容关键词。开启则保留；注意此类词仍可能因提供方限制而无数据。

tasks_error.title_zh: 其中以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务在提供方系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，用于判断该任务是否成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status code.

tasks.time.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.title_zh: 单个任务的计费金额，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 result 数组中的条目数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments identifying the endpoint that handled this task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 标识处理该任务的端点的 URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted in the request, returned for traceability.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在请求中提交的参数，便于追溯。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying the actual keyword/trend data produced for this task; drill into its items for per-keyword figures.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际关键词/趋势数据的数组，逐项下钻可得到按关键词的具体数值。

tasks.result.keyword.desc_en: The keyword these metrics describe (URL-decoded; `+` becomes a space).
tasks.result.keyword.title_zh: 本组指标所对应的关键词（已 URL 解码，`+` 还原为空格）。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的位置编码；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的语言代码；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.search_partners.desc_en: Whether partner-network data was included in this result.
tasks.result.search_partners.title_zh: 本结果是否纳入了合作网络的数据。

tasks.result.competition.desc_en: Relative paid-search competition level for the keyword; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.competition.title_zh: 该关键词在付费搜索中的相对竞争程度；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.competition_index.desc_en: Competition score reflecting how contested ad placement is for the keyword (higher means more competitive); null when data is insufficient.
tasks.result.competition_index.title_zh: 反映该关键词广告位竞争激烈程度的竞争指数（越高越激烈）；数据不足时为 null。

tasks.result.search_volume.desc_en: Approximate monthly average number of searches for the keyword under the requested targeting.
tasks.result.search_volume.title_zh: 在所请求定向下，该关键词的月均搜索量近似值。

tasks.result.low_top_of_page_bid.desc_en: Lower-end estimated bid (USD) needed to show at the top of the first results page; varies with the requested location.
tasks.result.low_top_of_page_bid.title_zh: 在首页顶部展示所需出价的下限估值（美元），随所请求位置而变化。

tasks.result.high_top_of_page_bid.desc_en: Upper-end estimated bid (USD) needed to show at the top of the first results page; varies with the requested location.
tasks.result.high_top_of_page_bid.title_zh: 在首页顶部展示所需出价的上限估值（美元），随所请求位置而变化。

tasks.result.cpc.desc_en: Average historical cost-per-click in USD for the keyword; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.cpc.title_zh: 该关键词的历史平均每次点击成本（美元）；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.desc_en: Per-month search-volume history for the keyword over the trailing window.
tasks.result.monthly_searches.title_zh: 该关键词在最近窗口内逐月的搜索量历史。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.year.desc_en: Year of this monthly data point.
tasks.result.monthly_searches.year.title_zh: 该月度数据点所属年份。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.month.desc_en: Month of this monthly data point.
tasks.result.monthly_searches.month.title_zh: 该月度数据点所属月份。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.search_vol.desc_en: Average search volume for that month.

tasks.result.keyword_annotations.desc_en: Annotation details attached to the keyword.
tasks.result.keyword_annotations.title_zh: 附加在该关键词上的注解信息。

tasks.result.concepts.desc_en: Concepts associated with the keyword, grouping it into broader themes.
tasks.result.concepts.title_zh: 与关键词关联的概念，将其归入更宏观的主题。

tasks.result.concepts.name.desc_en: Concept name for the keyword within its concept group.
tasks.result.concepts.name.title_zh: 关键词在其概念组内的概念名称。

tasks.result.concepts.concept_group.desc_en: The concept group this concept belongs to.

id.desc_en: Unique task identifier (UUID) you can use to retrieve this task's results later from the corresponding task_get endpoint.
id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识（UUID），后续可凭它从对应的 task_get 端点取回该任务结果。

postback_url.desc_en: Endpoint that receives a POST callback with the gzipped task results once the task finishes. Supports the `$id` and `$tag` placeholders, which are substituted before the callback is sent.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后接收回调的地址，结果以 gzip 压缩通过 POST 推送到此。支持 `$id`、`$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换为实际值。

pingback_url.desc_en: Endpoint that receives a lightweight GET ping when the task completes, signalling you to fetch the results. Supports the `$id` and `$tag` placeholders, substituted before the ping is sent.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时接收 GET 通知的地址，用于提示你去拉取结果。支持 `$id`、`$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换为实际值。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task, echoed back in the response so you can correlate results with the request that produced them.
tag.title_zh: 自定义的任务标签，会原样回显在响应中，方便把结果与触发它的请求对应起来。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response; useful when reporting issues.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号，反馈问题时可一并提供。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request; check it before reading the payload and design handling for error conditions.
status_code.title_zh: 本次请求的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查，并为异常情况设计处理逻辑。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

time.desc_en: Server-side processing time for the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端处理耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total billed cost of this response across all tasks, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应所有任务的合计计费金额，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task entries contained in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the tasks finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own status fields.
tasks_error.title_zh: 其中以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

tasks.desc_en: List of task results; one entry per task created by the request.
tasks.title_zh: 任务结果列表，请求创建的每个任务对应一个条目。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of this task in the provider's system.
tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务在提供方系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code; check it to tell whether this individual task succeeded.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，用于判断该任务是否成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态码对应的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time for this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Billed cost of this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 单个任务的计费金额，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 result 数组中的条目数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments identifying the endpoint that handled this task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 标识处理该任务的端点的 URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted in the request, returned for traceability.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在请求中提交的参数，便于追溯。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying the actual keyword/trend data produced for this task; drill into its items for per-keyword figures.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际关键词/趋势数据的数组，逐项下钻可得到按关键词的具体数值。

keywords.desc_en: Seed keywords to analyze; pass them as an array of strings. Capping and character rules are enforced by the endpoint, and non-Latin characters bias results toward the regions where those characters are used.
keywords.title_zh: 待分析的种子关键词，以字符串数组传入。条数上限与字符规则由端点强制；使用非拉丁字符会让结果偏向这些字符所属的地区。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name used for geo targeting (e.g. country, region, city). Mutually replaceable with location_code; omit both to get global results. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages / locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地理定向的位置全名（如国家、地区、城市）。与 location_code 二选一；两者都不传则返回全球结果。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages / locations 端点查询合法名称。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location identifier used for geo targeting; an alternative to location_name. Omit both to get global results. Data is reported for the country the code belongs to. Look up valid codes via the matching locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地理定向的数字位置标识，可替代 location_name。两者都不传则返回全球结果；数据按该编码所属国家提供。可通过对应的 locations 端点查询合法编码。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS-based geo target given as `latitude,longitude,radius_km`. An alternative to location_name / location_code; data is reported for the country the coordinates fall in.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 基于 GPS 的地理定向，格式为 `纬度,经度,半径(km)`。可替代 location_name / location_code；数据按坐标所属国家提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full search-engine language name (e.g. English) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_code. Look up valid names via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言全名（如 English），与 language_code 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法名称。

language_code.desc_en: Search-engine language code (e.g. en) for the query. Mutually replaceable with language_name. Look up valid codes via the matching locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 查询使用的搜索引擎语言代码（如 en），与 language_name 二选一。可通过对应的 locations_and_languages 端点查询合法代码。

search_partners.desc_en: Whether to include syndicated search-partner networks in addition to the primary engine. Enable to widen reach across partner sites.
search_partners.title_zh: 是否在主引擎之外纳入联合搜索合作网络。开启可把覆盖范围扩展到合作站点。

date_from.desc_en: Start of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Endpoint-specific minimum dates apply; omit to default to the start of the comparable prior period.
date_from.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的起始日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。各端点有各自的最早可用日期；不传时按可比的上一周期起点默认。

date_to.desc_en: End of the time window for historical/trend data, in `yyyy-mm-dd`. Omit to default to the current date.
date_to.title_zh: 历史/趋势数据时间窗的结束日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`。不传则默认到当天。

include_adult_keywords.desc_en: Whether adult-content keywords are kept in the response. Enable to retain them; note the provider may still return no data for such terms.
include_adult_keywords.title_zh: 是否在响应中保留成人内容关键词。开启则保留；注意此类词仍可能因提供方限制而无数据。

sort_by.desc_en: Metric used to order the returned keyword rows in descending order (e.g. by search volume, CPC, competition, or relevance).
sort_by.title_zh: 返回关键词行的降序排序依据（如按搜索量、CPC、竞争度或相关度）。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task, echoed back in the response so you can correlate results with the request that produced them.
tag.title_zh: 自定义的任务标签，会原样回显在响应中，方便把结果与触发它的请求对应起来。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response; useful when reporting issues.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号，反馈问题时可一并提供。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request; check it before reading the payload and design handling for error conditions.
status_code.title_zh: 本次请求的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查，并为异常情况设计处理逻辑。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

time.desc_en: Server-side processing time for the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端处理耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total billed cost of this response across all tasks, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应所有任务的合计计费金额，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task entries contained in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the tasks finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own status fields.
tasks_error.title_zh: 其中以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

tasks.desc_en: List of task results; one entry per task created by the request.
tasks.title_zh: 任务结果列表，请求创建的每个任务对应一个条目。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of this task in the provider's system.
tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务在提供方系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code; check it to tell whether this individual task succeeded.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，用于判断该任务是否成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态码对应的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time for this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Billed cost of this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 单个任务的计费金额，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 result 数组中的条目数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments identifying the endpoint that handled this task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 标识处理该任务的端点的 URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted in the request, returned for traceability.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在请求中提交的参数，便于追溯。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying the actual keyword/trend data produced for this task; drill into its items for per-keyword figures.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际关键词/趋势数据的数组，逐项下钻可得到按关键词的具体数值。

tasks.result.keyword.desc_en: The keyword these metrics describe (URL-decoded; `+` becomes a space).
tasks.result.keyword.title_zh: 本组指标所对应的关键词（已 URL 解码，`+` 还原为空格）。

tasks.result.spell.desc_en: Corrected spelling of the submitted keyword; when the input looks misspelled, data is returned for this corrected term.
tasks.result.spell.title_zh: 提交关键词的纠正拼写；当输入疑似拼错时，会返回纠正后词条的数据。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的位置编码；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回显的语言代码；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.search_partners.desc_en: Whether partner-network data was included in this result.
tasks.result.search_partners.title_zh: 本结果是否纳入了合作网络的数据。

tasks.result.competition.desc_en: Relative paid-search competition level for the keyword; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.competition.title_zh: 该关键词在付费搜索中的相对竞争程度；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.competition_index.desc_en: Competition score reflecting how contested ad placement is for the keyword (higher means more competitive); null when data is insufficient.
tasks.result.competition_index.title_zh: 反映该关键词广告位竞争激烈程度的竞争指数（越高越激烈）；数据不足时为 null。

tasks.result.search_volume.desc_en: Approximate monthly average number of searches for the keyword under the requested targeting.
tasks.result.search_volume.title_zh: 在所请求定向下，该关键词的月均搜索量近似值。

tasks.result.low_top_of_page_bid.desc_en: Lower-end estimated bid (USD) needed to show at the top of the first results page; varies with the requested location.
tasks.result.low_top_of_page_bid.title_zh: 在首页顶部展示所需出价的下限估值（美元），随所请求位置而变化。

tasks.result.high_top_of_page_bid.desc_en: Upper-end estimated bid (USD) needed to show at the top of the first results page; varies with the requested location.
tasks.result.high_top_of_page_bid.title_zh: 在首页顶部展示所需出价的上限估值（美元），随所请求位置而变化。

tasks.result.cpc.desc_en: Average historical cost-per-click in USD for the keyword; null when no data is available.
tasks.result.cpc.title_zh: 该关键词的历史平均每次点击成本（美元）；无数据时为 null。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.desc_en: Per-month search-volume history for the keyword over the trailing window.
tasks.result.monthly_searches.title_zh: 该关键词在最近窗口内逐月的搜索量历史。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.year.desc_en: Year of this monthly data point.
tasks.result.monthly_searches.year.title_zh: 该月度数据点所属年份。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.month.desc_en: Month of this monthly data point.
tasks.result.monthly_searches.month.title_zh: 该月度数据点所属月份。

tasks.result.monthly_searches.search_vol.desc_en: Average search volume for that month.

id.desc_en: Unique task identifier (UUID) you can use to retrieve this task's results later from the corresponding task_get endpoint.
id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识（UUID），后续可凭它从对应的 task_get 端点取回该任务结果。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response; useful when reporting issues.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号，反馈问题时可一并提供。

tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际关键词/趋势数据的数组，逐项下钻可得到按关键词的具体数值。

tasks.result.actual_data.desc_en: Whether up-to-date keyword data for the previous month is available; false means last month's data could not be provided.
tasks.result.actual_data.title_zh: 是否已有上个月的最新关键词数据；false 表示无法提供上月数据。

tasks.result.date_update.desc_en: Date of the latest provider-side refresh of the underlying keyword metrics.
tasks.result.date_update.title_zh: 底层关键词指标在提供方侧最近一次更新的日期。

tasks.result.last_year_in_monthly_search.desc_en: Most recent year for which monthly search-volume data is available.
tasks.result.last_year_in_monthly_search.title_zh: 月度搜索量数据可用的最近年份。

tasks.result.last_month_in_monthly_searc.desc_en: Most recent month for which monthly search-volume data is available.
tasks.result.last_month_in_monthly_searc.title_zh: 月度搜索量数据可用的最近月份。

tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际关键词/趋势数据的数组，逐项下钻可得到按关键词的具体数值。

tasks.result.category_code.desc_en: Identifier of the Google Trends category.

tasks.result.category_name.desc_en: Name of the Google Trends category.

tasks.result.category_code_parent.desc_en: Category code of the parent (superordinate) Google Trends category.
tasks.result.category_code_parent.title_zh: 上级（父级）Google Trends 类目的类目编码。

url.desc_en: Page URL to act on; for read endpoints it selects a single crawled page, for live endpoints it is the page to fetch now.
url.title_zh: 要操作的页面 URL；读取端点用它选定单个已抓取页面，实时端点用它指定当前要抓取的页面。

custom_user_agent.desc_en: User-Agent string the crawler presents to the target server.
custom_user_agent.title_zh: 抓取器向目标服务器呈现的 User-Agent 字符串。

browser_preset.desc_en: Named device preset that sets viewport and rendering defaults; enum values map to common device profiles.
browser_preset.title_zh: 命名设备预设，设定视口与渲染默认值；枚举值对应常见设备配置。

browser_screen_width.desc_en: Viewport width in pixels used when rendering the page in a browser.
browser_screen_width.title_zh: 在浏览器中渲染页面时使用的视口宽度，单位像素。

browser_screen_height.desc_en: Viewport height in pixels used when rendering the page in a browser.
browser_screen_height.title_zh: 在浏览器中渲染页面时使用的视口高度，单位像素。

browser_screen_scale_factor.desc_en: Device pixel ratio applied to the rendering viewport.
browser_screen_scale_factor.title_zh: 应用于渲染视口的设备像素比。

store_raw_html.desc_en: Whether to keep each page's raw HTML so it can later be retrieved via the raw_html endpoint.
store_raw_html.title_zh: 是否保留每页原始 HTML，以便之后通过 raw_html 端点取回。

disable_cookie_popup.desc_en: Whether to suppress cookie-consent popups before capturing the page.
disable_cookie_popup.title_zh: 捕获页面前是否屏蔽 Cookie 同意弹窗。

accept_language.desc_en: Value sent in the crawler's Accept-Language header, controlling the language variant of fetched pages.
accept_language.title_zh: 抓取器 Accept-Language 请求头的取值，控制所取页面的语言版本。

enable_javascript.desc_en: Whether to execute JavaScript when rendering pages, capturing client-rendered content.
enable_javascript.title_zh: 渲染页面时是否执行 JavaScript，以捕获客户端渲染内容。

enable_browser_rendering.desc_en: Whether to render pages in a real browser instead of a plain HTTP fetch.
enable_browser_rendering.title_zh: 是否在真实浏览器中渲染页面，而非纯 HTTP 抓取。

enable_xhr.desc_en: Whether to capture XHR/fetch requests made by the page during rendering.
enable_xhr.title_zh: 是否捕获页面渲染过程中发起的 XHR/fetch 请求。

switch_pool.desc_en: Whether to retry from a different IP pool if the target blocks the initial request.
switch_pool.title_zh: 当目标拦截首次请求时，是否切换到其它 IP 池重试。

ip_pool_for_scan.desc_en: Geographic IP pool to crawl from; enum selects the source region.
ip_pool_for_scan.title_zh: 用于抓取的地理 IP 池；枚举选择来源地区。

markdown_view.desc_en: Whether to also return the parsed page content rendered as Markdown.
markdown_view.title_zh: 是否同时返回以 Markdown 渲染的解析页面内容。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response; useful when reporting issues.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号，反馈问题时可一并提供。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code; check it before reading the payload and handle error cases.
status_code.title_zh: 本次响应的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查并处理异常情况。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

time.desc_en: Server-side processing time for the request.
time.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端处理耗时。

cost.desc_en: Total billed cost of this response across all tasks, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应所有任务的合计计费金额，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task entries contained in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many tasks finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own status fields.
tasks_error.title_zh: 以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

tasks.desc_en: List of task results; one entry per task created by the request.
tasks.title_zh: 任务结果列表，请求创建的每个任务对应一个条目。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of this task; reuse it to fetch the task's data from other OnPage endpoints.
tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务的唯一标识（UUID）；在其它 OnPage 端点读取该任务数据时复用。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code; check it to tell whether this individual task succeeded.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，用于判断该任务是否成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态码对应的可读说明文字。

tasks.time.desc_en: Server-side processing time spent on this task.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该任务的服务端处理耗时。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Billed cost attributed to this task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 归属于该任务的计费金额，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 result 数组中的条目数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: Endpoint path segments that were called to create this task; echoes the request routing.
tasks.path.title_zh: 创建该任务时调用的端点路径分段，回显请求路由。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the request parameters used to create this task, for traceability.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显创建该任务所用的请求参数，便于追溯。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for this task; the actual OnPage data is nested inside.
tasks.result.title_zh: 该任务的结果载荷，实际的 OnPage 数据嵌套于内。

tasks.result.crawl_progress.desc_en: Crawl lifecycle state of the task; tells whether the crawl is in progress or finished.
tasks.result.crawl_progress.title_zh: 任务的抓取生命周期状态，标明抓取进行中还是已完成。

tasks.result.crawl_status.desc_en: Crawl progress snapshot: page-count limit, pages crawled, and pages still queued.
tasks.result.crawl_status.title_zh: 抓取进度快照：页面数上限、已抓取页面数与仍排队的页面数。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of items returned in this result page.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本结果页返回的条目数量。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Array of result records for this endpoint; structure depends on the endpoint called.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 本端点的结果记录数组，结构因所调用端点而异。

tasks.result.items.type.desc_en: Kind of the record (e.g. link, resource, or content type), as classified by the crawler.
tasks.result.items.type.title_zh: 记录的类别（如 link、resource 或内容类型），由抓取器分类。

tasks.result.items.fetch_time.desc_en: Timestamp when the page or resource was fetched.
tasks.result.items.fetch_time.title_zh: 页面或资源被抓取的时间戳。

tasks.result.items.status_code.desc_en: HTTP status code returned when the page was fetched.
tasks.result.items.status_code.title_zh: 抓取该页面时返回的 HTTP 状态码。

tasks.result.items.page_content.desc_en: Structured parse of the page body into topics, content blocks, tables, ratings, offers, and contacts.
tasks.result.items.page_content.title_zh: 将页面正文结构化解析为主题、内容块、表格、评分、报价与联系方式。

tasks.result.items.page_content.header.desc_en: Last-Modified value taken from the HTTP response header.
tasks.result.items.page_content.header.title_zh: 取自 HTTP 响应头的 Last-Modified 值。

tasks.result.items.page_content.primary_.title_zh: 与记录关联的文本内容（锚文本、解析文本或 HTML 片段）。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many tasks finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own status fields.
tasks_error.title_zh: 以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

tasks.desc_en: List of task results; one entry per task created by the request.
tasks.title_zh: 任务结果列表，请求创建的每个任务对应一个条目。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of this task; reuse it to fetch the task's data from other OnPage endpoints.
tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务的唯一标识（UUID）；在其它 OnPage 端点读取该任务数据时复用。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code; check it to tell whether this individual task succeeded.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，用于判断该任务是否成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态码对应的可读说明文字。

tasks.time.desc_en: Server-side processing time spent on this task.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该任务的服务端处理耗时。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Billed cost attributed to this task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 归属于该任务的计费金额，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 result 数组中的条目数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: Endpoint path segments that were called to create this task; echoes the request routing.
tasks.path.title_zh: 创建该任务时调用的端点路径分段，回显请求路由。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the request parameters used to create this task, for traceability.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显创建该任务所用的请求参数，便于追溯。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for this task; the actual OnPage data is nested inside.
tasks.result.title_zh: 该任务的结果载荷，实际的 OnPage 数据嵌套于内。

tasks.result.crawl_progress.desc_en: Crawl lifecycle state of the task; tells whether the crawl is in progress or finished.
tasks.result.crawl_progress.title_zh: 任务的抓取生命周期状态，标明抓取进行中还是已完成。

tasks.result.crawl_status.desc_en: Crawl progress snapshot: page-count limit, pages crawled, and pages still queued.
tasks.result.crawl_status.title_zh: 抓取进度快照：页面数上限、已抓取页面数与仍排队的页面数。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of items returned in this result page.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本结果页返回的条目数量。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Array of result records for this endpoint; structure depends on the endpoint called.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 本端点的结果记录数组，结构因所调用端点而异。

tasks.result.items.type.desc_en: Kind of the record (e.g. link, resource, or content type), as classified by the crawler.
tasks.result.items.type.title_zh: 记录的类别（如 link、resource 或内容类型），由抓取器分类。

tasks.result.items.fetch_time.desc_en: Timestamp when the page or resource was fetched.

id.desc_en: Task id returned by task_post; identifies which crawl's data to read or act on.
id.title_zh: task_post 返回的任务 id，标明要读取或操作哪次抓取的数据。

url.desc_en: Page URL to act on; for read endpoints it selects a single crawled page, for live endpoints it is the page to fetch now.
url.title_zh: 要操作的页面 URL；读取端点用它选定单个已抓取页面，实时端点用它指定当前要抓取的页面。

similarity.desc_en: Minimum content-similarity threshold for a page to be reported as duplicate.
similarity.title_zh: 判定页面为重复内容所需的最小相似度阈值。

limit.desc_en: Maximum number of items to return in this response.
limit.title_zh: 本响应最多返回的条目数量。

offset.desc_en: Number of leading items to skip, for paging through results.
offset.title_zh: 跳过的起始条目数，用于分页浏览结果。

tag.desc_en: Free-text label you attach to the task to identify it in later listings and callbacks.
tag.title_zh: 为任务附加的自由文本标签，便于在后续列表与回调中识别。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response; useful when reporting issues.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号，反馈问题时可一并提供。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code; check it before reading the payload and handle error cases.
status_code.title_zh: 本次响应的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查并处理异常情况。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

time.desc_en: Server-side processing time for the request.
time.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端处理耗时。

cost.desc_en: Total billed cost of this response across all tasks, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应所有任务的合计计费金额，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task entries contained in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many tasks finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own status fields.
tasks_error.title_zh: 以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

tasks.desc_en: List of task results; one entry per task created by the request.

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of this task; reuse it to fetch the task's data from other OnPage endpoints.
tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务的唯一标识（UUID）；在其它 OnPage 端点读取该任务数据时复用。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code; check it to tell whether this individual task succeeded.
