keyword.title_zh: 要查询的搜索词。需做 URL 编码；SERP 围绕该查询词构建。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric code of the search-engine location; the code-based alternative to `location_name`, obtainable from the locations reference endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码，是 `location_name` 的代码型替代写法，可从地区参考端点获取。

location_name.desc_en: Full text name of the search-engine location (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`); used to localize the SERP.
location_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`），用于本地化 SERP。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates of the target location, as `latitude,longitude`; used for fine-grained geo-targeting.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 目标地点的 GPS 坐标，格式为 `纬度,经度`，用于更精细的地理定向。

language_code.desc_en: Two-letter language code (e.g. `en`); the code-based alternative to `language_name`.
language_code.title_zh: 两位语言代码（如 `en`），是 `language_name` 的代码型替代写法。

language_name.desc_en: Full text name of the search-engine language (e.g. `English`); the SERP is returned in this language.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English`），SERP 以该语言返回。

min_rating.desc_en: Lower bound on the place rating; results with a rating below this value are filtered out.
min_rating.title_zh: 地点评分的下限；评分低于该值的结果会被过滤掉。

time_filter.desc_en: Restricts results to a time window (e.g. open-now / specific hours); narrows the local results returned.
time_filter.title_zh: 将结果限定在某时间窗口（如当前营业/特定时段），收窄返回的本地结果。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code; check it before reading the payload.
status_code.title_zh: 本次响应的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time of the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端执行耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total billed cost of this response across all tasks, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应所有任务的合计计费金额，单位美元。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects; one entry per task in the request.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表，请求中的每个任务对应一个条目。

tasks[].result.desc_en: Result payload for this task; the actual SERP data is nested inside.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 该任务的结果载荷，实际的 SERP 数据嵌套于内。

keyword.desc_en: Search term to query. URL-encode it; the SERP is built around this query.
keyword.title_zh: 要查询的搜索词。需做 URL 编码；SERP 围绕该查询词构建。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric code of the search-engine location; the code-based alternative to `location_name`, obtainable from the locations reference endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码，是 `location_name` 的代码型替代写法，可从地区参考端点获取。

location_name.desc_en: Full text name of the search-engine location (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`); used to localize the SERP.
location_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`），用于本地化 SERP。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates of the target location, as `latitude,longitude`; used for fine-grained geo-targeting.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 目标地点的 GPS 坐标，格式为 `纬度,经度`，用于更精细的地理定向。

language_code.desc_en: Two-letter language code (e.g. `en`); the code-based alternative to `language_name`.
language_code.title_zh: 两位语言代码（如 `en`），是 `language_name` 的代码型替代写法。

language_name.desc_en: Full text name of the search-engine language (e.g. `English`); the SERP is returned in this language.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English`），SERP 以该语言返回。

depth.desc_en: Number of SERP results to parse; deeper values cost more crawl pages and increase task price.
depth.title_zh: 要解析的 SERP 结果数量；取值越深消耗的抓取页数越多，任务价格也越高。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the task; higher priority is processed sooner at a higher price.
priority.title_zh: 任务的执行优先级；更高优先级处理更快、价格更高。

postback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the completed task results once the task finishes.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后 DataForSEO 回调推送结果的你方接收端点。

pingback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify you that the task is complete, without sending the payload.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时 DataForSEO 通知你方的 ping 端点，仅通知不发送结果数据。

postback_data.desc_en: Result format delivered to `postback_url`; choose the variant (such as advanced or html) matching how you want results pushed.
postback_data.title_zh: 推送到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；按你期望的推送方式选择对应变体（如 advanced 或 html）。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code; check it before reading the payload.
status_code.title_zh: 本次响应的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time of the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端执行耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total billed cost of this response across all tasks, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应所有任务的合计计费金额，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task entries contained in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many tasks finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own status fields.
tasks_error.title_zh: 以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects; one entry per task in the request.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表，请求中的每个任务对应一个条目。

tasks[].id.desc_en: UUID of this task; reuse it to fetch the task's results from the matching task_get endpoint.
tasks[].id.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID；在对应 task_get 端点取该任务结果时复用。

tasks[].status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code; check it to tell whether this individual task succeeded.
tasks[].status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，用于判断该任务是否成功。

tasks[].status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status code.
tasks[].status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态码对应的可读说明文字。

tasks[].cost.desc_en: Billed cost attributed to this task, in USD.
tasks[].cost.title_zh: 归属于该任务的计费金额，单位美元。

tasks[].result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's `result` array.
tasks[].result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的条目数量。

id.desc_en: UUID of the task whose results you want to fetch, as returned in `tasks[].id` when the task was posted.
id.title_zh: 要取结果的任务 UUID，即提交任务时 `tasks[].id` 返回的值。

tasks[].result[].tag.desc_en: User-defined tag echoed for the completed task.
tasks[].result[].tag.title_zh: 为已完成任务回显的用户自定义标签。

tasks[].result[].endpoint_regular.desc_en: Relative URL to call to collect this task's regular results.
tasks[].result[].endpoint_regular.title_zh: 用于收取该任务常规结果的相对 URL。

tasks[].result[].endpoint_html.desc_en: Relative URL to call to collect this task's HTML results.
tasks[].result[].endpoint_html.title_zh: 用于收取该任务 HTML 结果的相对 URL。

id.desc_en: UUID of the task whose results you want to fetch, as returned in `tasks[].id` when the task was posted.
id.title_zh: 要取结果的任务 UUID，即提交任务时 `tasks[].id` 返回的值。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code; check it before reading the payload.
status_code.title_zh: 本次响应的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time of the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端执行耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total billed cost of this response across all tasks, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应所有任务的合计计费金额，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task entries contained in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many tasks finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own status fields.
tasks_error.title_zh: 以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects; one entry per task in the request.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表，请求中的每个任务对应一个条目。

tasks[].id.desc_en: UUID of this task; reuse it to fetch the task's results from the matching task_get endpoint.
tasks[].id.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID；在对应 task_get 端点取该任务结果时复用。

tasks[].status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code; check it to tell whether this individual task succeeded.
tasks[].status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，用于判断该任务是否成功。

tasks[].status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status code.
tasks[].status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态码对应的可读说明文字。

tasks[].result.desc_en: Result payload for this task; the actual SERP data is nested inside.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 该任务的结果载荷，实际的 SERP 数据嵌套于内。

keyword.desc_en: Search term to query. URL-encode it; the SERP is built around this query.
keyword.title_zh: 要查询的搜索词。需做 URL 编码；SERP 围绕该查询词构建。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric code of the search-engine location; the code-based alternative to `location_name`, obtainable from the locations reference endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码，是 `location_name` 的代码型替代写法，可从地区参考端点获取。

location_name.desc_en: Full text name of the search-engine location (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`); used to localize the SERP.
location_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`），用于本地化 SERP。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates of the target location, as `latitude,longitude`; used for fine-grained geo-targeting.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 目标地点的 GPS 坐标，格式为 `纬度,经度`，用于更精细的地理定向。

language_code.desc_en: Two-letter language code (e.g. `en`); the code-based alternative to `language_name`.
language_code.title_zh: 两位语言代码（如 `en`），是 `language_name` 的代码型替代写法。

language_name.desc_en: Full text name of the search-engine language (e.g. `English`); the SERP is returned in this language.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English`），SERP 以该语言返回。

device.desc_en: Device profile to emulate for the search, such as `desktop` or `mobile`; affects layout and result set.
device.title_zh: 搜索时模拟的设备类型，如 `desktop` 或 `mobile`，会影响版式与结果集合。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code; check it before reading the payload.

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.

language_name.desc_en: Full text name of the search-engine language (e.g. `English`); the SERP is returned in this language.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English`），SERP 以该语言返回。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the task; higher priority is processed sooner at a higher price.
priority.title_zh: 任务的执行优先级；更高优先级处理更快、价格更高。

postback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the completed task results once the task finishes.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后 DataForSEO 回调推送结果的你方接收端点。

pingback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify you that the task is complete, without sending the payload.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时 DataForSEO 通知你方的 ping 端点，仅通知不发送结果数据。

postback_data.title_zh: 推送到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；按你期望的推送方式选择对应变体（如 advanced 或 html）。

cost.title_zh: 本响应所有任务的合计计费金额，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task entries contained in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many tasks finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own status fields.
tasks_error.title_zh: 以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects; one entry per task in the request.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表，请求中的每个任务对应一个条目。

tasks[].id.desc_en: UUID of this task; reuse it to fetch the task's results from the matching task_get endpoint.
tasks[].id.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID；在对应 task_get 端点取该任务结果时复用。

tasks[].status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code; check it to tell whether this individual task succeeded.
tasks[].status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，用于判断该任务是否成功。

tasks[].status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status code.
tasks[].status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态码对应的可读说明文字。

tasks[].cost.desc_en: Billed cost attributed to this task, in USD.
tasks[].cost.title_zh: 归属于该任务的计费金额，单位美元。

tasks[].result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's `result` array.
tasks[].result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的条目数量。

keyword.desc_en: Seed term to fetch autocomplete suggestions for.
keyword.title_zh: 用于获取自动补全建议的种子词。

client.desc_en: Autocomplete source client to emulate, such as `chrome`, `chrome-omni`, `gws-wiz`, `safari`, `firefox`, `img`, or `youtube`; each client returns a different suggestion set.
client.title_zh: 要模拟的自动补全来源客户端，如 `chrome`、`chrome-omni`、`gws-wiz`、`safari`、`firefox`、`img` 或 `youtube`；不同客户端返回的建议集合不同。

location_name.desc_en: Full text name of the search-engine location (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`); used to localize the SERP.
location_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`），用于本地化 SERP。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric code of the search-engine location; the code-based alternative to `location_name`, obtainable from the locations reference endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码，是 `location_name` 的代码型替代写法，可从地区参考端点获取。

language_name.desc_en: Full text name of the search-engine language (e.g. `English`); the SERP is returned in this language.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English`），SERP 以该语言返回。

language_code.desc_en: Two-letter language code (e.g. `en`); the code-based alternative to `language_name`.
language_code.title_zh: 两位语言代码（如 `en`），是 `language_name` 的代码型替代写法。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code; check it before reading the payload.
status_code.title_zh: 本次响应的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time of the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端执行耗时，单位秒。

tasks[].result.title_zh: 该任务的结果载荷，实际的 SERP 数据嵌套于内。

keyword.desc_en: Search term used to find matching datasets.
keyword.title_zh: 用于查找匹配数据集的搜索词。

language_name.desc_en: Full text name of the search-engine language (e.g. `English`); the SERP is returned in this language.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English`），SERP 以该语言返回。

language_code.desc_en: Two-letter language code (e.g. `en`); the code-based alternative to `language_name`.
language_code.title_zh: 两位语言代码（如 `en`），是 `language_name` 的代码型替代写法。

os.desc_en: Operating system to emulate for the chosen device, refining the user-agent presented to Google.
os.title_zh: 为所选设备模拟的操作系统，用于细化向 Google 呈现的 user-agent。

last_updated.desc_en: Filter datasets by how recently they were updated, expressed as a relative window such as `1m`, `1y`, or `3y`.
last_updated.title_zh: 按数据集的最近更新时间筛选，使用相对时间窗口表示，如 `1m`、`1y`、`3y`。

file_formats.desc_en: Filter datasets by file format, such as `other`, `archive`, `text`, `image`, `document`, or `tabular`.
file_formats.title_zh: 按文件格式筛选数据集，如 `other`、`archive`、`text`、`image`、`document` 或 `tabular`。

usage_rights.desc_en: Filter datasets by usage rights, such as `commercial` or `noncommercial`.
usage_rights.title_zh: 按使用权限筛选数据集，如 `commercial` 或 `noncommercial`。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the task; higher priority is processed sooner at a higher price.
priority.title_zh: 任务的执行优先级；更高优先级处理更快、价格更高。

postback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the completed task results once the task finishes.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后 DataForSEO 回调推送结果的你方接收端点。

pingback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify you that the task is complete, without sending the payload.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时 DataForSEO 通知你方的 ping 端点，仅通知不发送结果数据。

postback_data.desc_en: Result format delivered to `postback_url`; choose the variant (such as advanced or html) matching how you want results pushed.
postback_data.title_zh: 推送到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；按你期望的推送方式选择对应变体（如 advanced 或 html）。

target.desc_en: Domain name associated with an advertiser account whose ads to retrieve; required when `advertiser_ids` is not provided.
target.title_zh: 与某广告主账户关联的域名，用于检索其广告；未提供 `advertiser_ids` 时必填。

location_name.desc_en: Full text name of the search-engine location (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`); used to localize the SERP.
location_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`），用于本地化 SERP。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric code of the search-engine location; the code-based alternative to `location_name`, obtainable from the locations reference endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码，是 `location_name` 的代码型替代写法，可从地区参考端点获取。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates of the target location, as `latitude,longitude`; used for fine-grained geo-targeting.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 目标地点的 GPS 坐标，格式为 `纬度,经度`，用于更精细的地理定向。

language_code.title_zh: 两位语言代码（如 `en`），是 `language_name` 的代码型替代写法。

os.desc_en: Operating system to emulate for the chosen device, refining the user-agent presented to Google.
os.title_zh: 为所选设备模拟的操作系统，用于细化向 Google 呈现的 user-agent。

window.desc_en: Time window of the price graph for the quote, controlling the historical range shown.
window.title_zh: 报价价格走势图的时间窗口，控制展示的历史区间。

version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time of the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端执行耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total billed cost of this response across all tasks, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应所有任务的合计计费金额，单位美元。

tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表，请求中的每个任务对应一个条目。

tasks[].result.title_zh: 该任务的结果载荷，实际的 SERP 数据嵌套于内。

tasks[].result.desc_en: List of locations supported for this search engine's SERP. Use a returned `location_code` (or `location_name`) when posting tasks to target that locale.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 该搜索引擎 SERP 支持的地区列表。提交任务时用其中的 `location_code`（或 `location_name`）来锁定目标地区。

tasks[].result[].location_code.desc_en: Numeric code identifying the location; pass it as the `location_code` request field to geo-target a task.
tasks[].result[].location_code.title_zh: 标识地区的数字代码；作为请求字段 `location_code` 传入以对任务做地域定位。

tasks[].result[].location_name.desc_en: Human-readable full name of the location; corresponds to the `location_name` request field.
tasks[].result[].location_name.title_zh: 地区的可读全名；对应请求字段 `location_name`。

tasks[].result[].location_code_parent.desc_en: Code of the enclosing (parent) location, e.g. the country a city belongs to; helps build a location hierarchy.
tasks[].result[].location_code_parent.title_zh: 上级（父）地区的代码，例如城市所属的国家，可用于构建地区层级。

tasks[].result[].country_iso_code.desc_en: ISO 3166-1 country code of the location, e.g. `US`.
tasks[].result[].country_iso_code.title_zh: 该地区所属国家的 ISO 3166-1 代码，如 `US`。

tasks[].result[].language_code.desc_en: Code identifying the language; pass it as the `language_code` request field.
tasks[].result[].language_code.title_zh: 标识语言的代码；作为请求字段 `language_code` 传入。

keyword.desc_en: Search query to run on the search engine, exactly as a user would type it. This is the only required field for keyword-based endpoints.
keyword.title_zh: 要在搜索引擎上执行的查询词，按用户实际输入的样子填写；关键词类接口中这是唯一必填字段。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_code`.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的地区全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_code` 二选一提供。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_name`.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的数字地区代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_name` 二选一提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_code`.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_code` 二选一提供。

language_code.desc_en: Language code for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_name`.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_name` 二选一提供。

device.desc_en: Device profile to emulate for the search, which can change how results are ranked and rendered.
device.title_zh: 搜索时模拟的设备类型，会影响结果的排序与呈现方式。

os.desc_en: Operating system to emulate together with `device`.
os.title_zh: 与 `device` 搭配模拟的操作系统。

depth.desc_en: How many SERP results to parse; higher values return more results and may affect task cost.
depth.title_zh: 解析的 SERP 结果条数；值越大返回结果越多，并可能影响任务费用。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the queued task; a higher priority makes the task run sooner and may cost more.
priority.title_zh: 排队任务的执行优先级；优先级越高任务越早执行，费用可能更高。

postback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the task result once it is ready, so you do not have to poll.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后由 DataForSEO 主动回推结果的你方接收地址，从而无需轮询。

pingback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify that the task is complete (without the payload); you then collect results via `task_get`.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时由 DataForSEO 回调通知（不含结果数据）的你方地址；收到通知后再用 `task_get` 领取结果。

postback_data.desc_en: Result format to deliver to `postback_url`; choose the result type that matches how you will consume the data.
postback_data.title_zh: 回推到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；选择与你消费方式相匹配的结果类型。

tasks[].status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.

tasks[].result.desc_en: The collected SERP payload for the requested task. Its inner shape depends on the result type (regular / advanced / html) and the search engine, so it is returned as an open array; parse according to the endpoint you called.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 所请求任务领取到的 SERP 结果数据。其内部结构取决于结果类型（regular / advanced / html）与搜索引擎，故以开放数组返回；请按调用的接口类型解析。

id.desc_en: UUID of the task to collect, as returned in `tasks[].id` when the task was posted or listed by the matching tasks_ready endpoint.
id.title_zh: 要领取的任务的 UUID；提交任务时由 `tasks[].id` 返回，或可从对应 tasks_ready 接口列出。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_code.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole API call. `20000` indicates the call was accepted and processed; non-20xxx values signal a request-level failure that applies before any per-task processing.
status_code.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].result.desc_en: The collected SERP payload for the requested task. Its inner shape depends on the result type (regular / advanced / html) and the search engine, so it is returned as an open array; parse according to the endpoint you called.

tasks[].result.title_zh: 所请求任务领取到的 SERP 结果数据。其内部结构取决于结果类型（regular / advanced / html）与搜索引擎，故以开放数组返回；请按调用的接口类型解析。

keyword.desc_en: Search query to run on the search engine, exactly as a user would type it. This is the only required field for keyword-based endpoints.
keyword.title_zh: 要在搜索引擎上执行的查询词，按用户实际输入的样子填写；关键词类接口中这是唯一必填字段。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_code`.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的地区全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_code` 二选一提供。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_name`.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的数字地区代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_name` 二选一提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_code`.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_code` 二选一提供。

language_code.desc_en: Language code for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_name`.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_name` 二选一提供。

device.desc_en: Device profile to emulate for the search, which can change how results are ranked and rendered.
device.title_zh: 搜索时模拟的设备类型，会影响结果的排序与呈现方式。

os.desc_en: Operating system to emulate together with `device`.
os.title_zh: 与 `device` 搭配模拟的操作系统。

tasks[].result.desc_en: List of locations supported for this search engine's SERP. Use a returned `location_code` (or `location_name`) when posting tasks to target that locale.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 该搜索引擎 SERP 支持的地区列表。提交任务时用其中的 `location_code`（或 `location_name`）来锁定目标地区。

tasks[].result[].location_code.desc_en: Numeric code identifying the location; pass it as the `location_code` request field to geo-target a task.
tasks[].result[].location_code.title_zh: 标识地区的数字代码；作为请求字段 `location_code` 传入以对任务做地域定位。

tasks[].result[].location_name.desc_en: Human-readable full name of the location; corresponds to the `location_name` request field.
tasks[].result[].location_name.title_zh: 地区的可读全名；对应请求字段 `location_name`。

tasks[].result[].location_code_parent.desc_en: Code of the enclosing (parent) location, e.g. the country a city belongs to; helps build a location hierarchy.
tasks[].result[].location_code_parent.title_zh: 上级（父）地区的代码，例如城市所属的国家，可用于构建地区层级。

tasks[].result[].country_iso_code.desc_en: ISO 3166-1 country code of the location, e.g. `US`.
tasks[].result[].country_iso_code.title_zh: 该地区所属国家的 ISO 3166-1 代码，如 `US`。

language_name.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_code` 二选一提供。

language_code.desc_en: Language code for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_name`.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_name` 二选一提供。

device.desc_en: Device profile to emulate. Only desktop is supported for this endpoint.
device.title_zh: 搜索时模拟的设备类型；本接口仅支持 desktop。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the queued task; a higher priority makes the task run sooner and may cost more.
priority.title_zh: 排队任务的执行优先级；优先级越高任务越早执行，费用可能更高。

postback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the task result once it is ready, so you do not have to poll.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后由 DataForSEO 主动回推结果的你方接收地址，从而无需轮询。

pingback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify that the task is complete (without the payload); you then collect results via `task_get`.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时由 DataForSEO 回调通知（不含结果数据）的你方地址；收到通知后再用 `task_get` 领取结果。

postback_data.desc_en: Result format to deliver to `postback_url`. Only the advanced result type is available for this endpoint.
postback_data.title_zh: 回推到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；本接口仅提供 advanced 结果类型。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_code.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole API call. `20000` indicates the call was accepted and processed; non-20xxx values signal a request-level failure that applies before any per-task processing.
status_code.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].id.desc_en: UUID of this task. Pass it to the matching `task_get` endpoint to collect results later, and reuse it as `task_id` for the AI Summary and Screenshot endpoints.
tasks[].id.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID。稍后用它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回结果，也可作为 `task_id` 复用于 AI Summary 与 Screenshot 接口。

tasks[].status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code. `20000` means done; `20100` typically means the task was accepted and is still being processed.
tasks[].status_code.title_zh: 单任务状态码。`20000` 表示已完成；`20100` 通常表示任务已受理、仍在处理中。

tasks[].status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
tasks[].status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

tasks[].cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks[].cost.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks[].result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's `result` array.
tasks[].result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的条目数量。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].result.desc_en: List of completed-but-uncollected tasks. Each entry exposes the URLs to fetch its results.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 已完成但尚未领取的任务列表；每个条目给出领取结果的 URL。

tasks[].result[].id.desc_en: UUID of a completed task ready for collection; feed it to the matching `task_get` endpoint.
tasks[].result[].id.title_zh: 可领取的已完成任务的 UUID；传给对应的 `task_get` 接口。

tasks[].result[].endpoint_advanced.desc_en: Relative API path for collecting this task's advanced results.
tasks[].result[].endpoint_advanced.title_zh: 领取该任务 advanced 结果的相对 API 路径。

id.desc_en: UUID of the task to collect, as returned in `tasks[].id` when the task was posted or listed by the matching tasks_ready endpoint.
id.title_zh: 要领取的任务的 UUID；提交任务时由 `tasks[].id` 返回，或可从对应 tasks_ready 接口列出。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.

tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].result.desc_en: The collected SERP payload for the requested task. Its inner shape depends on the result type (regular / advanced / html) and the search engine, so it is returned as an open array; parse according to the endpoint you called.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 所请求任务领取到的 SERP 结果数据。其内部结构取决于结果类型（regular / advanced / html）与搜索引擎，故以开放数组返回；请按调用的接口类型解析。

video_id.desc_en: Identifier of the target YouTube video (the `v` value in a watch URL). Required to fetch info, organic, subtitle, or comment data for that video.
video_id.title_zh: 目标 YouTube 视频的标识（观看链接中的 `v` 值）。获取该视频的信息、自然结果、字幕或评论时必填。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_code`.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的地区全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_code` 二选一提供。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_name`.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的数字地区代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_name` 二选一提供。

tasks[].result.desc_en: The collected SERP payload for the requested task. Its inner shape depends on the result type (regular / advanced / html) and the search engine, so it is returned as an open array; parse according to the endpoint you called.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 所请求任务领取到的 SERP 结果数据。其内部结构取决于结果类型（regular / advanced / html）与搜索引擎，故以开放数组返回；请按调用的接口类型解析。

keyword.desc_en: Search query to run on the search engine, exactly as a user would type it. This is the only required field for keyword-based endpoints.
keyword.title_zh: 要在搜索引擎上执行的查询词，按用户实际输入的样子填写；关键词类接口中这是唯一必填字段。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_code`.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的地区全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_code` 二选一提供。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_name`.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的数字地区代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_name` 二选一提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_code`.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_code` 二选一提供。

language_code.desc_en: Language code for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_name`.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_name` 二选一提供。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_code.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole API call. `20000` indicates the call was accepted and processed; non-20xxx values signal a request-level failure that applies before any per-task processing.
status_code.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].result.desc_en: The SERP payload generated in real time for this Live request. Its inner shape depends on the result type and search engine, so it is returned as an open array.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 本次 Live 请求实时生成的 SERP 结果数据。其内部结构取决于结果类型与搜索引擎，故以开放数组返回。

video_id.desc_en: Identifier of the target YouTube video (the `v` value in a watch URL). Required to fetch info, organic, subtitle, or comment data for that video.
video_id.title_zh: 目标 YouTube 视频的标识（观看链接中的 `v` 值）。获取该视频的信息、自然结果、字幕或评论时必填。

language_code.desc_en: Language code of the subtitle track to retrieve for the video.
language_code.title_zh: 要获取的视频字幕轨道的语言代码。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the queued task; a higher priority makes the task run sooner and may cost more.
priority.title_zh: 排队任务的执行优先级；优先级越高任务越早执行，费用可能更高。

postback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the task result once it is ready, so you do not have to poll.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后由 DataForSEO 主动回推结果的你方接收地址，从而无需轮询。

pingback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify that the task is complete (without the payload); you then collect results via `task_get`.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时由 DataForSEO 回调通知（不含结果数据）的你方地址；收到通知后再用 `task_get` 领取结果。

postback_data.desc_en: Result format to deliver to `postback_url`. Only the advanced result type is available for this endpoint.
postback_data.title_zh: 回推到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；本接口仅提供 advanced 结果类型。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_code.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole API call. `20000` indicates the call was accepted and processed; non-20xxx values signal a request-level failure that applies before any per-task processing.
status_code.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].id.desc_en: UUID of this task. Pass it to the matching `task_get` endpoint to collect results later, and reuse it as `task_id` for the AI Summary and Screenshot endpoints.
tasks[].id.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID。稍后用它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回结果，也可作为 `task_id` 复用于 AI Summary 与 Screenshot 接口。

tasks[].status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code. `20000` means done; `20100` typically means the task was accepted and is still being processed.
tasks[].status_code.title_zh: 单任务状态码。`20000` 表示已完成；`20100` 通常表示任务已受理、仍在处理中。

tasks[].status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
tasks[].status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

tasks[].cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks[].cost.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks[].result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's `result` array.
tasks[].result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的条目数量。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].result.desc_en: List of completed-but-uncollected tasks. Each entry exposes the URLs to fetch its results.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 已完成但尚未领取的任务列表；每个条目给出领取结果的 URL。

tasks[].result[].id.desc_en: UUID of a completed task ready for collection; feed it to the matching `task_get` endpoint.
tasks[].result[].id.title_zh: 可领取的已完成任务的 UUID；传给对应的 `task_get` 接口。

tasks[].result[].endpoint_advanced.desc_en: Relative API path for collecting this task's advanced results.
tasks[].result[].endpoint_advanced.title_zh: 领取该任务 advanced 结果的相对 API 路径。

id.desc_en: UUID of the task to collect, as returned in `tasks[].id` when the task was posted or listed by the matching tasks_ready endpoint.
id.title_zh: 要领取的任务的 UUID；提交任务时由 `tasks[].id` 返回，或可从对应 tasks_ready 接口列出。

status_code.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].result.desc_en: The collected SERP payload for the requested task. Its inner shape depends on the result type (regular / advanced / html) and the search engine, so it is returned as an open array; parse according to the endpoint you called.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 所请求任务领取到的 SERP 结果数据。其内部结构取决于结果类型（regular / advanced / html）与搜索引擎，故以开放数组返回；请按调用的接口类型解析。

video_id.desc_en: Identifier of the target YouTube video (the `v` value in a watch URL). Required to fetch info, organic, subtitle, or comment data for that video.
video_id.title_zh: 目标 YouTube 视频的标识（观看链接中的 `v` 值）。获取该视频的信息、自然结果、字幕或评论时必填。

tasks[].result.desc_en: The SERP payload generated in real time for this Live request. Its inner shape depends on the result type and search engine, so it is returned as an open array.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 本次 Live 请求实时生成的 SERP 结果数据。其内部结构取决于结果类型与搜索引擎，故以开放数组返回。

tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].result.desc_en: List of locations supported for this search engine's SERP. Use a returned `location_code` (or `location_name`) when posting tasks to target that locale.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 该搜索引擎 SERP 支持的地区列表。提交任务时用其中的 `location_code`（或 `location_name`）来锁定目标地区。

tasks[].result[].location_code.desc_en: Numeric code identifying the location; pass it as the `location_code` request field to geo-target a task.
tasks[].result[].location_code.title_zh: 标识地区的数字代码；作为请求字段 `location_code` 传入以对任务做地域定位。

tasks[].result[].location_name.desc_en: Human-readable full name of the location; corresponds to the `location_name` request field.
tasks[].result[].location_name.title_zh: 地区的可读全名；对应请求字段 `location_name`。

tasks[].result[].location_code_parent.desc_en: Code of the enclosing (parent) location, e.g. the country a city belongs to; helps build a location hierarchy.
tasks[].result[].location_code_parent.title_zh: 上级（父）地区的代码，例如城市所属的国家，可用于构建地区层级。

tasks[].result[].country_iso_code.desc_en: ISO 3166-1 country code of the location, e.g. `US`.
tasks[].result[].country_iso_code.title_zh: 该地区所属国家的 ISO 3166-1 代码，如 `US`。

tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].result.desc_en: List of languages supported for this search engine's SERP. Use a returned `language_code` (or `language_name`) when posting tasks.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 该搜索引擎 SERP 支持的语言列表。提交任务时使用其中的 `language_code`（或 `language_name`）。

tasks[].result[].language_name.desc_en: Human-readable full name of the language; corresponds to the `language_name` request field.
tasks[].result[].language_name.title_zh: 语言的可读全名；对应请求字段 `language_name`。

tasks[].result[].language_code.desc_en: Code identifying the language; pass it as the `language_code` request field.
tasks[].result[].language_code.title_zh: 标识语言的代码；作为请求字段 `language_code` 传入。

keyword.desc_en: Search query to run on the search engine, exactly as a user would type it. This is the only required field for keyword-based endpoints.
keyword.title_zh: 要在搜索引擎上执行的查询词，按用户实际输入的样子填写；关键词类接口中这是唯一必填字段。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_code`.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的地区全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_code` 二选一提供。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_name`.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的数字地区代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_name` 二选一提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_code`.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_code` 二选一提供。

language_code.desc_en: Language code for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_name`.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_name` 二选一提供。

device.desc_en: Device profile to emulate for the search, which can change how results are ranked and rendered.
device.title_zh: 搜索时模拟的设备类型，会影响结果的排序与呈现方式。

os.desc_en: Operating system to emulate together with `device`.
os.title_zh: 与 `device` 搭配模拟的操作系统。

depth.desc_en: How many SERP results to parse; higher values return more results and may affect task cost.
depth.title_zh: 解析的 SERP 结果条数；值越大返回结果越多，并可能影响任务费用。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the queued task; a higher priority makes the task run sooner and may cost more.
priority.title_zh: 排队任务的执行优先级；优先级越高任务越早执行，费用可能更高。

postback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the task result once it is ready, so you do not have to poll.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后由 DataForSEO 主动回推结果的你方接收地址，从而无需轮询。

pingback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify that the task is complete (without the payload); you then collect results via `task_get`.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时由 DataForSEO 回调通知（不含结果数据）的你方地址；收到通知后再用 `task_get` 领取结果。

postback_data.desc_en: Result format to deliver to `postback_url`; choose the result type that matches how you will consume the data.
postback_data.title_zh: 回推到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；选择与你消费方式相匹配的结果类型。

version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].id.desc_en: UUID of this task. Pass it to the matching `task_get` endpoint to collect results later, and reuse it as `task_id` for the AI Summary and Screenshot endpoints.
tasks[].id.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID。稍后用它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回结果，也可作为 `task_id` 复用于 AI Summary 与 Screenshot 接口。

tasks[].status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code. `20000` means done; `20100` typically means the task was accepted and is still being processed.
tasks[].status_code.title_zh: 单任务状态码。`20000` 表示已完成；`20100` 通常表示任务已受理、仍在处理中。

tasks[].status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
tasks[].status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

tasks[].cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks[].cost.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks[].result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's `result` array.
tasks[].result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks[].result.title_zh: 已完成但尚未领取的任务列表；每个条目给出领取结果的 URL。

tasks[].result[].id.desc_en: UUID of a completed task ready for collection; feed it to the matching `task_get` endpoint.
tasks[].result[].id.title_zh: 可领取的已完成任务的 UUID；传给对应的 `task_get` 接口。

tasks[].result[].endpoint_regular.desc_en: Relative API path for collecting this task's regular results.
tasks[].result[].endpoint_regular.title_zh: 领取该任务 regular 结果的相对 API 路径。

tasks[].result[].endpoint_advanced.desc_en: Relative API path for collecting this task's advanced results.
tasks[].result[].endpoint_advanced.title_zh: 领取该任务 advanced 结果的相对 API 路径。

tasks[].result[].endpoint_html.desc_en: Relative API path for collecting this task's HTML results.
tasks[].result[].endpoint_html.title_zh: 领取该任务 HTML 结果的相对 API 路径。

id.desc_en: UUID of the task to collect, as returned in `tasks[].id` when the task was posted or listed by the matching tasks_ready endpoint.
id.title_zh: 要领取的任务的 UUID；提交任务时由 `tasks[].id` 返回，或可从对应 tasks_ready 接口列出。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].result.desc_en: The collected SERP payload for the requested task. Its inner shape depends on the result type (regular / advanced / html) and the search engine, so it is returned as an open array; parse according to the endpoint you called.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 所请求任务领取到的 SERP 结果数据。其内部结构取决于结果类型（regular / advanced / html）与搜索引擎，故以开放数组返回；请按调用的接口类型解析。

id.desc_en: UUID of the task to collect, as returned in `tasks[].id` when the task was posted or listed by the matching tasks_ready endpoint.
id.title_zh: 要领取的任务的 UUID；提交任务时由 `tasks[].id` 返回，或可从对应 tasks_ready 接口列出。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_code.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole API call. `20000` indicates the call was accepted and processed; non-20xxx values signal a request-level failure that applies before any per-task processing.
status_code.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].result.desc_en: List of locations supported for this search engine's SERP. Use a returned `location_code` (or `location_name`) when posting tasks to target that locale.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 该搜索引擎 SERP 支持的地区列表。提交任务时用其中的 `location_code`（或 `location_name`）来锁定目标地区。

tasks[].result[].location_code.desc_en: Numeric code identifying the location; pass it as the `location_code` request field to geo-target a task.
tasks[].result[].location_code.title_zh: 标识地区的数字代码；作为请求字段 `location_code` 传入以对任务做地域定位。

tasks[].result[].location_name.desc_en: Human-readable full name of the location; corresponds to the `location_name` request field.
tasks[].result[].location_name.title_zh: 地区的可读全名；对应请求字段 `location_name`。

tasks[].result[].location_code_parent.desc_en: Code of the enclosing (parent) location, e.g. the country a city belongs to; helps build a location hierarchy.
tasks[].result[].location_code_parent.title_zh: 上级（父）地区的代码，例如城市所属的国家，可用于构建地区层级。

tasks[].result[].country_iso_code.desc_en: ISO 3166-1 country code of the location, e.g. `US`.
tasks[].result[].country_iso_code.title_zh: 该地区所属国家的 ISO 3166-1 代码，如 `US`。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].result.desc_en: List of languages supported for this search engine's SERP. Use a returned `language_code` (or `language_name`) when posting tasks.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 该搜索引擎 SERP 支持的语言列表。提交任务时使用其中的 `language_code`（或 `language_name`）。

tasks[].result[].language_name.desc_en: Human-readable full name of the language; corresponds to the `language_name` request field.
tasks[].result[].language_name.title_zh: 语言的可读全名；对应请求字段 `language_name`。

tasks[].result[].language_code.desc_en: Code identifying the language; pass it as the `language_code` request field.
tasks[].result[].language_code.title_zh: 标识语言的代码；作为请求字段 `language_code` 传入。

keyword.desc_en: Search query to run on the search engine, exactly as a user would type it. This is the only required field for keyword-based endpoints.
keyword.title_zh: 要在搜索引擎上执行的查询词，按用户实际输入的样子填写；关键词类接口中这是唯一必填字段。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_code`.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的地区全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_code` 二选一提供。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_name`.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的数字地区代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_name` 二选一提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_code`.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_code` 二选一提供。

language_code.desc_en: Language code for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_name`.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_name` 二选一提供。

device.desc_en: Device profile to emulate for the search, which can change how results are ranked and rendered.
device.title_zh: 搜索时模拟的设备类型，会影响结果的排序与呈现方式。

os.desc_en: Operating system to emulate together with `device`.
os.title_zh: 与 `device` 搭配模拟的操作系统。

depth.desc_en: How many SERP results to parse; higher values return more results and may affect task cost.
depth.title_zh: 解析的 SERP 结果条数；值越大返回结果越多，并可能影响任务费用。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the queued task; a higher priority makes the task run sooner and may cost more.
priority.title_zh: 排队任务的执行优先级；优先级越高任务越早执行，费用可能更高。

postback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the task result once it is ready, so you do not have to poll.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后由 DataForSEO 主动回推结果的你方接收地址，从而无需轮询。

pingback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify that the task is complete (without the payload); you then collect results via `task_get`.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时由 DataForSEO 回调通知（不含结果数据）的你方地址；收到通知后再用 `task_get` 领取结果。

postback_data.desc_en: Result format to deliver to `postback_url`; choose the result type that matches how you will consume the data.
postback_data.title_zh: 回推到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；选择与你消费方式相匹配的结果类型。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].id.desc_en: UUID of this task. Pass it to the matching `task_get` endpoint to collect results later, and reuse it as `task_id` for the AI Summary and Screenshot endpoints.
tasks[].id.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID。稍后用它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回结果，也可作为 `task_id` 复用于 AI Summary 与 Screenshot 接口。

tasks[].status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code. `20000` means done; `20100` typically means the task was accepted and is still being processed.
tasks[].status_code.title_zh: 单任务状态码。`20000` 表示已完成；`20100` 通常表示任务已受理、仍在处理中。

tasks[].status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
tasks[].status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

tasks[].cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks[].cost.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks[].result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's `result` array.
tasks[].result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks[].result.title_zh: 已完成但尚未领取的任务列表；每个条目给出领取结果的 URL。

tasks[].result[].id.desc_en: UUID of a completed task ready for collection; feed it to the matching `task_get` endpoint.
tasks[].result[].id.title_zh: 可领取的已完成任务的 UUID；传给对应的 `task_get` 接口。

tasks[].result[].endpoint_regular.desc_en: Relative API path for collecting this task's regular results.
tasks[].result[].endpoint_regular.title_zh: 领取该任务 regular 结果的相对 API 路径。

tasks[].result[].endpoint_advanced.desc_en: Relative API path for collecting this task's advanced results.
tasks[].result[].endpoint_advanced.title_zh: 领取该任务 advanced 结果的相对 API 路径。

tasks[].result[].endpoint_html.desc_en: Relative API path for collecting this task's HTML results.
tasks[].result[].endpoint_html.title_zh: 领取该任务 HTML 结果的相对 API 路径。

tasks[].result.title_zh: 所请求任务领取到的 SERP 结果数据。其内部结构取决于结果类型（regular / advanced / html）与搜索引擎，故以开放数组返回；请按调用的接口类型解析。

id.desc_en: UUID of the task to collect, as returned in `tasks[].id` when the task was posted or listed by the matching tasks_ready endpoint.
id.title_zh: 要领取的任务的 UUID；提交任务时由 `tasks[].id` 返回，或可从对应 tasks_ready 接口列出。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_code.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole API call. `20000` indicates the call was accepted and processed; non-20xxx values signal a request-level failure that applies before any per-task processing.
status_code.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].result.desc_en: The collected SERP payload for the requested task. Its inner shape depends on the result type (regular / advanced / html) and the search engine, so it is returned as an open array; parse according to the endpoint you called.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 所请求任务领取到的 SERP 结果数据。其内部结构取决于结果类型（regular / advanced / html）与搜索引擎，故以开放数组返回；请按调用的接口类型解析。

keyword.desc_en: Search query to run on the search engine, exactly as a user would type it. This is the only required field for keyword-based endpoints.
keyword.title_zh: 要在搜索引擎上执行的查询词，按用户实际输入的样子填写；关键词类接口中这是唯一必填字段。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_code`.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的地区全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_code` 二选一提供。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_name`.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的数字地区代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_name` 二选一提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_code`.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_code` 二选一提供。

language_code.desc_en: Language code for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_name`.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_name` 二选一提供。

device.desc_en: Device profile to emulate for the search, which can change how results are ranked and rendered.
device.title_zh: 搜索时模拟的设备类型，会影响结果的排序与呈现方式。

os.desc_en: Operating system to emulate together with `device`.
os.title_zh: 与 `device` 搭配模拟的操作系统。

tasks[].result.desc_en: List of locations supported for this search engine's SERP. Use a returned `location_code` (or `location_name`) when posting tasks to target that locale.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 该搜索引擎 SERP 支持的地区列表。提交任务时用其中的 `location_code`（或 `location_name`）来锁定目标地区。

tasks[].result[].location_code.desc_en: Numeric code identifying the location; pass it as the `location_code` request field to geo-target a task.
tasks[].result[].location_code.title_zh: 标识地区的数字代码；作为请求字段 `location_code` 传入以对任务做地域定位。

tasks[].result[].location_name.desc_en: Human-readable full name of the location; corresponds to the `location_name` request field.
tasks[].result[].location_name.title_zh: 地区的可读全名；对应请求字段 `location_name`。

tasks[].result[].location_code_parent.desc_en: Code of the enclosing (parent) location, e.g. the country a city belongs to; helps build a location hierarchy.
tasks[].result[].location_code_parent.title_zh: 上级（父）地区的代码，例如城市所属的国家，可用于构建地区层级。

tasks[].result[].country_iso_code.desc_en: ISO 3166-1 country code of the location, e.g. `US`.
tasks[].result[].country_iso_code.title_zh: 该地区所属国家的 ISO 3166-1 代码，如 `US`。

os.desc_en: Operating system to emulate together with `device`.
os.title_zh: 与 `device` 搭配模拟的操作系统。

depth.desc_en: How many SERP results to parse; higher values return more results and may affect task cost.
depth.title_zh: 解析的 SERP 结果条数；值越大返回结果越多，并可能影响任务费用。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the queued task; a higher priority makes the task run sooner and may cost more.
priority.title_zh: 排队任务的执行优先级；优先级越高任务越早执行，费用可能更高。

postback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the task result once it is ready, so you do not have to poll.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后由 DataForSEO 主动回推结果的你方接收地址，从而无需轮询。

pingback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify that the task is complete (without the payload); you then collect results via `task_get`.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时由 DataForSEO 回调通知（不含结果数据）的你方地址；收到通知后再用 `task_get` 领取结果。

postback_data.desc_en: Result format to deliver to `postback_url`; choose the result type that matches how you will consume the data.
postback_data.title_zh: 回推到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；选择与你消费方式相匹配的结果类型。

status_code.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].id.desc_en: UUID of this task. Pass it to the matching `task_get` endpoint to collect results later, and reuse it as `task_id` for the AI Summary and Screenshot endpoints.
tasks[].id.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID。稍后用它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回结果，也可作为 `task_id` 复用于 AI Summary 与 Screenshot 接口。

tasks[].status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code. `20000` means done; `20100` typically means the task was accepted and is still being processed.
tasks[].status_code.title_zh: 单任务状态码。`20000` 表示已完成；`20100` 通常表示任务已受理、仍在处理中。

tasks[].status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
tasks[].status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

tasks[].cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks[].cost.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks[].result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's `result` array.
tasks[].result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的条目数量。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_code.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole API call. `20000` indicates the call was accepted and processed; non-20xxx values signal a request-level failure that applies before any per-task processing.
status_code.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].result.desc_en: List of completed-but-uncollected tasks. Each entry exposes the URLs to fetch its results.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 已完成但尚未领取的任务列表；每个条目给出领取结果的 URL。

tasks[].result[].id.desc_en: UUID of a completed task ready for collection; feed it to the matching `task_get` endpoint.
tasks[].result[].id.title_zh: 可领取的已完成任务的 UUID；传给对应的 `task_get` 接口。

tasks[].result[].endpoint_regular.desc_en: Relative API path for collecting this task's regular results.
tasks[].result[].endpoint_regular.title_zh: 领取该任务 regular 结果的相对 API 路径。

tasks[].result[].endpoint_advanced.desc_en: Relative API path for collecting this task's advanced results.
tasks[].result[].endpoint_advanced.title_zh: 领取该任务 advanced 结果的相对 API 路径。

tasks[].result[].endpoint_html.desc_en: Relative API path for collecting this task's HTML results.
tasks[].result[].endpoint_html.title_zh: 领取该任务 HTML 结果的相对 API 路径。

id.desc_en: UUID of the task to collect, as returned in `tasks[].id` when the task was posted or listed by the matching tasks_ready endpoint.
id.title_zh: 要领取的任务的 UUID；提交任务时由 `tasks[].id` 返回，或可从对应 tasks_ready 接口列出。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.

tasks[].result.desc_en: The collected SERP payload for the requested task. Its inner shape depends on the result type (regular / advanced / html) and the search engine, so it is returned as an open array; parse according to the endpoint you called.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 所请求任务领取到的 SERP 结果数据。其内部结构取决于结果类型（regular / advanced / html）与搜索引擎，故以开放数组返回；请按调用的接口类型解析。

id.title_zh: 要领取的任务的 UUID；提交任务时由 `tasks[].id` 返回，或可从对应 tasks_ready 接口列出。

tasks[].result.desc_en: The collected SERP payload for the requested task. Its inner shape depends on the result type (regular / advanced / html) and the search engine, so it is returned as an open array; parse according to the endpoint you called.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 所请求任务领取到的 SERP 结果数据。其内部结构取决于结果类型（regular / advanced / html）与搜索引擎，故以开放数组返回；请按调用的接口类型解析。

keyword.desc_en: Search query to run on the search engine, exactly as a user would type it. This is the only required field for keyword-based endpoints.
keyword.title_zh: 要在搜索引擎上执行的查询词，按用户实际输入的样子填写；关键词类接口中这是唯一必填字段。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_code`.
location_name.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的地区全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_code` 二选一提供。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_name`.
location_code.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的数字地区代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_name` 二选一提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_code`.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_code` 二选一提供。

language_code.desc_en: Language code for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_name`.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_name` 二选一提供。

device.desc_en: Device profile to emulate for the search, which can change how results are ranked and rendered.
device.title_zh: 搜索时模拟的设备类型，会影响结果的排序与呈现方式。

os.desc_en: Operating system to emulate together with `device`.
os.title_zh: 与 `device` 搭配模拟的操作系统。

depth.desc_en: How many SERP results to parse; higher values return more results and may affect task cost.
depth.title_zh: 解析的 SERP 结果条数；值越大返回结果越多，并可能影响任务费用。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the queued task; a higher priority makes the task run sooner and may cost more.
priority.title_zh: 排队任务的执行优先级；优先级越高任务越早执行，费用可能更高。

postback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the task result once it is ready, so you do not have to poll.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后由 DataForSEO 主动回推结果的你方接收地址，从而无需轮询。

pingback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify that the task is complete (without the payload); you then collect results via `task_get`.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时由 DataForSEO 回调通知（不含结果数据）的你方地址；收到通知后再用 `task_get` 领取结果。

postback_data.desc_en: Result format to deliver to `postback_url`; choose the result type that matches how you will consume the data.
postback_data.title_zh: 回推到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；选择与你消费方式相匹配的结果类型。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].result.desc_en: The collected SERP payload for the requested task. Its inner shape depends on the result type (regular / advanced / html) and the search engine, so it is returned as an open array; parse according to the endpoint you called.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 所请求任务领取到的 SERP 结果数据。其内部结构取决于结果类型（regular / advanced / html）与搜索引擎，故以开放数组返回；请按调用的接口类型解析。

id.desc_en: UUID of the task to collect, as returned in `tasks[].id` when the task was posted or listed by the matching tasks_ready endpoint.
id.title_zh: 要领取的任务的 UUID；提交任务时由 `tasks[].id` 返回，或可从对应 tasks_ready 接口列出。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_code.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole API call. `20000` indicates the call was accepted and processed; non-20xxx values signal a request-level failure that applies before any per-task processing.
status_code.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

id.title_zh: 要领取的任务的 UUID；提交任务时由 `tasks[].id` 返回，或可从对应 tasks_ready 接口列出。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
