tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].result.desc_en: The collected SERP payload for the requested task. Its inner shape depends on the result type (regular / advanced / html) and the search engine, so it is returned as an open array; parse according to the endpoint you called.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 所请求任务领取到的 SERP 结果数据。其内部结构取决于结果类型（regular / advanced / html）与搜索引擎，故以开放数组返回；请按调用的接口类型解析。

task_id.desc_en: UUID of an existing SERP task whose content the summary is built from; returned as `tasks[].id` when you posted the task and valid for 30 days.
task_id.title_zh: 用于生成摘要的已有 SERP 任务的 UUID；提交任务时由 `tasks[].id` 返回，有效期 30 天。

prompt.desc_en: Extra instruction steering how the AI summarizes the SERP content.
prompt.title_zh: 用于引导 AI 如何总结 SERP 内容的附加指令。

support_extra.desc_en: When enabled, the summary also takes extra SERP features (such as `answer_box`, `knowledge_graph`, and `featured_snippet`) into account.
support_extra.title_zh: 开启后，摘要会同时纳入额外的 SERP 特性（如 `answer_box`、`knowledge_graph`、`featured_snippet`）。

fetch_content.desc_en: When enabled, the page content behind the SERP results is fetched and fed into the summary for richer answers.
fetch_content.title_zh: 开启后，会抓取 SERP 结果背后的页面内容并纳入摘要，以获得更充实的回答。

include_links.desc_en: When enabled, the summary cites the source links it drew from.
include_links.title_zh: 开启后，摘要会附带其引用的来源链接。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_code.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole API call. `20000` indicates the call was accepted and processed; non-20xxx values signal a request-level failure that applies before any per-task processing.
status_code.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].id.desc_en: UUID of this task. Pass it to the matching `task_get` endpoint to collect results later, and reuse it as `task_id` for the AI Summary and Screenshot endpoints.
tasks[].id.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID。稍后用它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回结果，也可作为 `task_id` 复用于 AI Summary 与 Screenshot 接口。

tasks[].status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code. `20000` means done; `20100` typically means the task was accepted and is still being processed.
tasks[].status_code.title_zh: 单任务状态码。`20000` 表示已完成；`20100` 通常表示任务已受理、仍在处理中。

tasks[].status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
tasks[].status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

tasks[].result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's `result` array.
tasks[].result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks[].path.desc_en: API path segments that were called, echoing how the request was routed.
tasks[].path.title_zh: 本次调用的 API 路径分段，回显请求的路由方式。

tasks[].data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied in the POST request, useful for correlating the response with its input.
tasks[].data.title_zh: 回显 POST 请求中提交的参数，便于将响应与其输入对应。

tasks[].result.desc_en: Array holding the AI summary output for the request.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 承载本次请求 AI 摘要输出的数组。

tasks[].result[].items_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `items` array.

tasks[].result[].items[].summary.desc_en: The AI-generated summary text answering the prompt against the SERP content.
tasks[].result[].items[].summary.title_zh: 针对 SERP 内容并结合 prompt 生成的 AI 摘要文本。

task_id.desc_en: UUID of an existing SERP task whose page is screenshotted; returned as `tasks[].id` when you posted the task and valid for 7 days.
task_id.title_zh: 用于截图的已有 SERP 任务的 UUID；提交任务时由 `tasks[].id` 返回，有效期 7 天。

browser_preset.desc_en: Predefined viewport profile (desktop, tablet, or mobile) controlling the rendered screen size.
browser_preset.title_zh: 预设视口配置（desktop、tablet 或 mobile），决定渲染的屏幕尺寸。

browser_screen_width.desc_en: Custom viewport width in pixels, overriding the preset; valid range 240-9999.
browser_screen_width.title_zh: 自定义视口宽度（像素），覆盖预设；有效范围 240-9999。

browser_screen_height.desc_en: Custom viewport height in pixels, overriding the preset; valid range 240-9999.
browser_screen_height.title_zh: 自定义视口高度（像素），覆盖预设；有效范围 240-9999。

browser_screen_scale_factor.desc_en: Device pixel ratio applied when rendering, controlling screenshot sharpness; valid range 0.5-3.
browser_screen_scale_factor.title_zh: 渲染时应用的设备像素比，控制截图清晰度；有效范围 0.5-3。

page.desc_en: Which SERP page to capture (1 is the first results page).
page.title_zh: 要截取的 SERP 页码（1 为第一页结果）。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_code.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole API call. `20000` indicates the call was accepted and processed; non-20xxx values signal a request-level failure that applies before any per-task processing.
status_code.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

tasks.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks[].id.desc_en: UUID of this task. Pass it to the matching `task_get` endpoint to collect results later, and reuse it as `task_id` for the AI Summary and Screenshot endpoints.
tasks[].id.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID。稍后用它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回结果，也可作为 `task_id` 复用于 AI Summary 与 Screenshot 接口。

tasks[].status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code. `20000` means done; `20100` typically means the task was accepted and is still being processed.
tasks[].status_code.title_zh: 单任务状态码。`20000` 表示已完成；`20100` 通常表示任务已受理、仍在处理中。

tasks[].status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
tasks[].status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

tasks[].result_count.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's `result` array.
tasks[].result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks[].path.desc_en: API path segments that were called, echoing how the request was routed.
tasks[].path.title_zh: 本次调用的 API 路径分段，回显请求的路由方式。

tasks[].data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied in the POST request, useful for correlating the response with its input.
tasks[].data.title_zh: 回显 POST 请求中提交的参数，便于将响应与其输入对应。

tasks[].result.desc_en: Array holding the screenshot output for the request.
tasks[].result.title_zh: 承载本次请求截图输出的数组。

tasks[].result[].items_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `items` array.

tasks[].result[].items[].image.desc_en: URL of the captured SERP page screenshot hosted on DataForSEO storage.
tasks[].result[].items[].image.title_zh: 截取的 SERP 页面截图地址，托管于 DataForSEO 存储。

categories.desc_en: Business categories used to filter the listings search; omit it to return all listings found in the location.
categories.title_zh: 用于筛选商户列表搜索的商户分类；留空则返回该地区内找到的全部商户。

description.desc_en: Business description to match (up to 200 characters); restricts results to listings whose description matches.
description.title_zh: 用于匹配的商户描述（最多 200 个字符）；将结果限定为描述匹配的商户。

title.desc_en: Business name to match (up to 200 characters); restricts results to listings whose name matches.
title.title_zh: 用于匹配的商户名称（最多 200 个字符）；将结果限定为名称匹配的商户。

is_claimed.desc_en: Filter by owner-verification status: `true` returns only businesses verified by their owner on Google Maps.
is_claimed.title_zh: 按所有者认证状态筛选：`true` 仅返回已被所有者在 Google 地图上认证的商户。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates in `latitude,longitude` (optionally with a radius) setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_name`/`location_code`.
location_coordinate.title_zh: GPS 坐标，格式 `latitude,longitude`（可附半径），用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_name`/`location_code` 择一提供。

filters.desc_en: Array of filtering conditions (up to 8) combined with `and`/`or` logical operators to narrow the listings search.
filters.title_zh: 筛选条件数组（最多 8 条），以 `and`/`or` 逻辑运算符组合，用于收窄列表搜索结果。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules for the results, using the same fields as `filters` with direction `asc` or `desc`.
order_by.title_zh: 结果排序规则，使用与 `filters` 相同的字段，方向为 `asc` 或 `desc`。

limit.desc_en: Maximum number of businesses to return. Default `100`, maximum `1000`.
limit.title_zh: 返回商户的最大数量。默认 `100`，最大 `1000`。

offset.desc_en: Number of leading businesses to skip in the results array. Default `0`.
offset.title_zh: 在结果数组中跳过的前导商户数量。默认 `0`。

offset_token.desc_en: Pagination token returned in a prior response; pass it to fetch the next batch and avoid timeouts on very large result sets.
offset_token.title_zh: 上一次响应中返回的分页令牌；传入以取回下一批结果，避免超大结果集超时。

tag.desc_en: Your own task label (up to 255 characters), echoed back in the response `data` so you can correlate results with requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签（最多 255 个字符），会在响应 `data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求对应。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response, e.g. `3.0.0`.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号，如 `3.0.0`。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response envelope (DataForSEO global code, distinct from the per-task `tasks.status_code`); `20000` indicates the request was accepted successfully.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个响应信封的全局状态码（DataForSEO 全局编码，区别于单任务的 `tasks.status_code`）；`20000` 表示请求被成功受理。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the envelope `status_code`; read it when troubleshooting a non-success code.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与信封 `status_code` 对应的可读说明；排查非成功状态码时参考此字段。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock processing time of the whole request, expressed in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 整个请求的处理耗时，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total money charged for all tasks in this response, in US dollars.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应内全部任务合计扣费，单位美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in `tasks` that finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's `status_code`.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，请逐一检查任务的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per posted task, each holding its own status and `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表，每个对应一个提交的任务，分别携带各自的状态与 `result` 数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier (UUID). Reuse it on the matching `task_get` endpoint to fetch this task's results within the retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务唯一标识（UUID）。可在保留期内携带它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回本任务结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code in the 10000-60000 range; `20000` means the task completed successfully while other values signal task-level errors.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，取值区间 10000-60000；`20000` 表示任务成功，其它值代表任务级错误。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message explaining this task's `status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 解释该任务 `status_code` 的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Money charged for this individual task, in US dollars.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的扣费金额，单位美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the task belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径片段，便于追溯任务归属的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you supplied when posting the task, returned so you can correlate results with your input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你提交任务时所传的参数，便于将结果与输入对应起来。

result.desc_en: Array holding the actual data payload of the task.
result.title_zh: 承载任务实际数据的结果数组。

result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of matching results available in our database for your request.
result.total_count.title_zh: 我方数据库中与请求匹配的可用结果总数。

result.count.desc_en: Number of items in the `items` array.

result.offset.desc_en: Offset position within the returned businesses array.
result.offset.title_zh: 返回商户数组中的偏移位置。

result.offset_token.desc_en: Token enabling pagination: pass it on a follow-up task to retrieve the next batch of results; each token is single-use per follow-up.
result.offset_token.title_zh: 分页令牌：在后续任务中传入即可取回下一批结果；每个令牌对应一次后续请求且互不相同。

items.desc_en: Array of nested item elements belonging to this entry.
items.title_zh: 归属于该条目的嵌套子项数组。

items.type.desc_en: Type tag of this element, identifying its schema.
items.type.title_zh: 该元素的类型标记，用于识别其结构。

items.title.desc_en: Title / name shown for the element in the SERP.
items.title.title_zh: 该元素在 SERP 中显示的标题 / 名称。

items.original_title.desc_en: Original element title as shown by Google, before any translation.
items.original_title.title_zh: Google 显示的元素原始标题，未经翻译。

items.description.desc_en: Description of the business entity shown in the SERP.
items.description.title_zh: SERP 中显示的商户描述。

items.category.desc_en: Primary Google My Business category that best describes the entity's services.
items.category.title_zh: 最能概括该实体服务的 Google 商家主分类。

items.category_ids.desc_en: Global category IDs that stay constant regardless of the selected country.
items.category_ids.title_zh: 不随所选国家变化的全局分类 ID。

items.additional_categories.desc_en: Additional Google My Business categories detailing the entity's services.
items.additional_categories.title_zh: 更细致描述该实体服务的附加 Google 商家分类。

items.cid.desc_en: Google-defined client ID uniquely identifying the local establishment.
items.cid.title_zh: 唯一标识本地商户的 Google 客户端 ID（CID）。

items.feature_id.desc_en: Unique identifier of the element / establishment in the SERP.
items.feature_id.title_zh: 该元素 / 商户在 SERP 中的唯一标识符。

items.address.desc_en: Street address of the business entity.

items.address_info.desc_en: Structured object breaking the address into individual components.
items.address_info.title_zh: 将地址拆分为各组成部分的结构化对象。

items.borough.desc_en: Administrative district or borough the entity belongs to.
items.borough.title_zh: 实体所属的行政区或区划。

items.city.desc_en: City where the entity is located.

items.zip.desc_en: ZIP / postal code of the entity.

items.region.desc_en: DMA region of the entity's location.
items.region.title_zh: 实体所在地的 DMA 区域。

items.country_code.desc_en: ISO country code of the entity's location.
items.country_code.title_zh: 实体所在地的 ISO 国家代码。

items.place_id.desc_en: Google Place ID of the local establishment featured in the element.
items.place_id.title_zh: 该元素所含本地商户的 Google Place ID。

items.phone.desc_en: Phone number of the business entity.

items.url.desc_en: Absolute URL associated with this element.
items.url.title_zh: 与该元素关联的绝对 URL。

items.logo.desc_en: URL of the logo shown in the Google My Business profile.
items.logo.title_zh: Google 商家资料中展示的 logo 图片 URL。

items.main_image.desc_en: URL of the main image shown in the Google My Business profile.
items.main_image.title_zh: Google 商家资料中展示的主图 URL。

items.total_photos.desc_en: Total number of images featured in the Google My Business profile.
items.total_photos.title_zh: Google 商家资料中收录的图片总数。

items.snippet.desc_en: Additional descriptive snippet about the business entity.
items.snippet.title_zh: 关于商户的附加描述片段。

items.latitude.desc_en: Latitude coordinate of the entity on Google Maps.
items.latitude.title_zh: 该实体在 Google 地图上的纬度坐标。

items.longitude.desc_en: Longitude coordinate of the entity on Google Maps.
items.longitude.title_zh: 该实体在 Google 地图上的经度坐标。

items.is_claimed.desc_en: Whether the entity has been verified by its owner on Google Maps.
items.is_claimed.title_zh: 该实体是否已被所有者在 Google 地图上认证。

items.attributes.desc_en: Service-detail checks for the entity, derived from user feedback and its `category`.
items.attributes.title_zh: 基于用户反馈与 `category` 生成的商户服务细节勾选项。

items.available_attributes.desc_en: Attributes the entity is reported to offer.
items.available_attributes.title_zh: 该实体被标记为可提供的属性。

items.unavailable_attributes.desc_en: Attributes the entity is reported not to offer.
items.unavailable_attributes.title_zh: 该实体被标记为不提供的属性。

items.place_topics.desc_en: Most-mentioned keywords from customer reviews mapped to how many reviews mention each.
items.place_topics.title_zh: 客户评论中最常被提及的关键词及各自被提及的评论数。

items.rating.desc_en: Rating object summarizing review-based popularity of the entity.
items.rating.title_zh: 汇总实体基于评论的人气评分对象。

items.rating_type.desc_en: Rating scale in use; values include `Max5`, `Percents`, `CustomMax`, indicating how `value` should be interpreted.
items.rating_type.title_zh: 所用评分量纲，取值如 `Max5`、`Percents`、`CustomMax`，决定 `value` 的解读方式。

items.value.desc_en: Numeric rating value, interpreted according to `rating_type`.
items.value.title_zh: 评分数值，需结合 `rating_type` 解读。

items.votes_count.desc_en: Number of votes / reviews the rating is based on.
items.votes_count.title_zh: 评分所依据的投票 / 评论数量。

items.rating_max.desc_en: Maximum possible value for the given `rating_type`.
items.rating_max.title_zh: 对应 `rating_type` 的最大可能取值。

items.hotel_rating.desc_en: Hotel class rating ranging 1-5 stars; `null` when no class rating exists.
items.hotel_rating.title_zh: 酒店星级评定，范围 1-5 星；无星级信息时为 `null`。

items.price_level.desc_en: Relative price level; values: `inexpensive`, `moderate`, `expensive`, `very_expensive`; `null` when unknown.
items.price_level.title_zh: 相对价格档次，取值 `inexpensive`、`moderate`、`expensive`、`very_expensive`；未知时为 `null`。

items.rating_distribution.desc_en: Rating-distribution placeholder; in hotel-search results this field is always `null` and exists only for interoperability with the Hotel Info endpoint.
items.rating_distribution.title_zh: 评分分布占位字段；在酒店搜索结果中恒为 `null`，仅为与 Hotel Info 接口保持互通而保留。

items.people_also_search.desc_en: Related business entities that users also searched for.
items.people_also_search.title_zh: 用户还搜索过的相关商户。

items.work_time.desc_en: Object describing the entity's operating-hours details.
items.work_time.title_zh: 描述实体营业时间细节的对象。

items.work_hours.desc_en: Object describing the establishment's working hours.
items.work_hours.title_zh: 描述商户营业时间的对象。

items.timetable.title_zh: 按周排列的营业时间表。

items.open.title_zh: 开门时间对象，含 `hour` 与 `minute`。

items.hour.title_zh: 小时分量，采用 24 小时制。

items.close.title_zh: 关门时间对象，含 `hour` 与 `minute`。

popular_times.desc_en: Object describing busy-hour patterns of the establishment.
popular_times.title_zh: 描述商户繁忙时段规律的对象。

popular_times.popular_times_by_days.desc_en: Busy-hour breakdown for each day of the week.
popular_times.popular_times_by_days.title_zh: 按一周每天拆分的繁忙时段。

popular_times.time.title_zh: 繁忙时段的时间对象，含 `hour` 与 `minute`。

popular_times.hour.title_zh: 小时分量，采用 24 小时制。

popular_times.popular_index.desc_en: Time-bound popularity index from 0 to 100; higher means busier.
popular_times.popular_index.title_zh: 时段人气指数，范围 0-100，越高表示越繁忙。

local_business_links.desc_en: List of available interactions with the business directly from the search results, such as booking, ordering or messaging links.
local_business_links.title_zh: 可直接从搜索结果与商户互动的入口列表，如预订、下单或消息链接。

local_business_links.type.desc_en: Type tag of this element, identifying its schema.
local_business_links.type.title_zh: 该元素的类型标记，用于识别其结构。

local_business_links.title.desc_en: Title / name shown for the element in the SERP.
local_business_links.title.title_zh: 该元素在 SERP 中显示的标题 / 名称。

local_business_links.url.desc_en: Absolute URL associated with this element.
local_business_links.url.title_zh: 与该元素关联的绝对 URL。

contact_info.desc_en: List of the business's available contacts (e.g. phone, website) you can use to reach it directly from search results.
contact_info.title_zh: 商户可用联系方式列表（如电话、网站），可直接从搜索结果发起联系。

contact_info.type.desc_en: Type tag of this element, identifying its schema.
contact_info.type.title_zh: 该元素的类型标记，用于识别其结构。

contact_info.value.desc_en: Numeric rating value, interpreted according to `rating_type`.
contact_info.value.title_zh: 评分数值，需结合 `rating_type` 解读。

contact_info.source.desc_en: Data source of the contact entry.
contact_info.source.title_zh: 该联系信息条目的数据来源。

contact_info.check_url.desc_en: Direct URL to the search results, for verifying the data.
contact_info.check_url.title_zh: 指向搜索结果的直达链接，用于核对数据。

contact_info.last_updated_time.desc_en: UTC timestamp when this contact data was last updated.
contact_info.last_updated_time.title_zh: 该联系信息最后更新的 UTC 时间戳。

contact_info.first_seen.desc_en: UTC timestamp when our crawler first encountered this element.
contact_info.first_seen.title_zh: 我方爬虫首次发现该元素的 UTC 时间戳。

keyword.desc_en: Search keyword identifying the local establishment; URL-encode it and keep it within the endpoint's character limit. Required when neither `cid` nor `place_id` is supplied.
keyword.title_zh: 用于定位本地商户的搜索关键词；需 URL 编码并遵守接口字符上限。未提供 `cid` 或 `place_id` 时此字段必填。

cid.desc_en: Google-defined unique ID of the business entity. Required when neither `keyword` nor `place_id` is supplied.
cid.title_zh: 商户实体的 Google 唯一标识（CID）。未提供 `keyword` 或 `place_id` 时此字段必填。

place_id.desc_en: Google Maps Place ID of the business entity. Required when neither `keyword` nor `cid` is supplied.
place_id.title_zh: 商户实体在 Google 地图中的 Place ID。未提供 `keyword` 或 `cid` 时此字段必填。

priority.desc_en: Task execution priority: `1` for normal priority, `2` for high priority (charged at a higher rate for faster handling).
priority.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 为普通优先级，`2` 为高优先级（按更高费率计费以加快处理）。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`) setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; valid values come from the matching Locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 完整地区名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`），用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Locations 接口。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; valid values come from the matching Locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 数字地区编码，用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Locations 接口。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates in `latitude,longitude` (optionally with a radius) setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_name`/`location_code`.
location_coordinate.title_zh: GPS 坐标，格式 `latitude,longitude`（可附半径），用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_name`/`location_code` 择一提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name (e.g. `English`) for the search. Supply this or `language_code`; valid values come from the matching Languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索所用语言的完整名称（如 `English`）。需与 `language_code` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Languages 接口。

language_code.desc_en: Language code (e.g. `en`) for the search. Supply this or `language_name`; valid values come from the matching Languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索所用的语言代码（如 `en`）。需与 `language_name` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Languages 接口。

depth.desc_en: Parsing depth: number of reviews to collect from the SERP. Set it in multiples of 20, since results are processed twenty at a time.
depth.title_zh: 解析深度：从 SERP 采集的评论数量。建议设为 20 的倍数，因系统每批处理 20 条。

tag.desc_en: Your own task label (up to 255 characters), echoed back in the response `data` so you can correlate results with requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签（最多 255 个字符），会在响应 `data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求对应。

postback_url.desc_en: URL to which finished task results are POSTed (gzip-compressed). Use `$id`/`$tag` placeholders to have them substituted automatically.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后用于 POST 推送结果（gzip 压缩）的回调 URL。可用 `$id`/`$tag` 占位符自动替换。

pingback_url.desc_en: URL pinged via GET when the task completes, signalling that results are ready to collect. Supports `$id`/`$tag` placeholders.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时通过 GET 触达的通知 URL，用于提示结果已就绪。支持 `$id`/`$tag` 占位符。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response, e.g. `3.0.0`.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号，如 `3.0.0`。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response envelope (DataForSEO global code, distinct from the per-task `tasks.status_code`); `20000` indicates the request was accepted successfully.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个响应信封的全局状态码（DataForSEO 全局编码，区别于单任务的 `tasks.status_code`）；`20000` 表示请求被成功受理。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the envelope `status_code`; read it when troubleshooting a non-success code.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与信封 `status_code` 对应的可读说明；排查非成功状态码时参考此字段。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock processing time of the whole request, expressed in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 整个请求的处理耗时，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total money charged for all tasks in this response, in US dollars.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应内全部任务合计扣费，单位美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in `tasks` that finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's `status_code`.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，请逐一检查任务的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per posted task, each holding its own status and `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表，每个对应一个提交的任务，分别携带各自的状态与 `result` 数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier (UUID). Reuse it on the matching `task_get` endpoint to fetch this task's results within the retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务唯一标识（UUID）。可在保留期内携带它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回本任务结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code in the 10000-60000 range; `20000` means the task completed successfully while other values signal task-level errors.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，取值区间 10000-60000；`20000` 表示任务成功，其它值代表任务级错误。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message explaining this task's `status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 解释该任务 `status_code` 的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Money charged for this individual task, in US dollars.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的扣费金额，单位美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the task belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径片段，便于追溯任务归属的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you supplied when posting the task, returned so you can correlate results with your input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你提交任务时所传的参数，便于将结果与输入对应起来。

result.desc_en: Array holding the actual data payload of the task.
result.title_zh: 承载任务实际数据的结果数组。

hotel_identifier.desc_en: Unique Google identifier of a hotel entity (required). Obtain it from the advanced Google SERP API or from Hotel Searches results.
hotel_identifier.title_zh: 酒店实体的 Google 唯一标识（必填）。可从高级 Google SERP API 或 Hotel Searches 结果中获取。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`) setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; valid values come from the matching Locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 完整地区名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`），用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Locations 接口。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; valid values come from the matching Locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 数字地区编码，用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Locations 接口。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates in `latitude,longitude` (optionally with a radius) setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_name`/`location_code`.
location_coordinate.title_zh: GPS 坐标，格式 `latitude,longitude`（可附半径），用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_name`/`location_code` 择一提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name (e.g. `English`) for the search. Supply this or `language_code`; valid values come from the matching Languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索所用语言的完整名称（如 `English`）。需与 `language_code` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Languages 接口。

language_code.desc_en: Language code (e.g. `en`) for the search. Supply this or `language_name`; valid values come from the matching Languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索所用的语言代码（如 `en`）。需与 `language_name` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Languages 接口。

check_in.desc_en: Check-in date in `yyyy-mm-dd`; must not be earlier than today. Defaults to tomorrow when omitted.
check_in.title_zh: 入住日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`；不得早于今天。不填默认为明天。

check_out.desc_en: Check-out date in `yyyy-mm-dd`; must be later than `check_in`. Defaults to two days from now when omitted.
check_out.title_zh: 退房日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`；须晚于 `check_in`。不填默认为后天。

currency.desc_en: Currency for the returned prices, e.g. `USD`.
currency.title_zh: 返回价格所用的货币，如 `USD`。

adults.desc_en: Number of adult guests. Defaults to two adults when omitted.
adults.title_zh: 成人入住人数。不填默认为两名成人。

children.desc_en: Children to include, given as an array of their ages (e.g. `[14]`). Defaults to no children when omitted.
children.title_zh: 随行儿童，以年龄数组表示（如 `[14]`）。不填则不计入儿童。

load_prices_by_dates.desc_en: Set to `true` to include the `prices_by_dates` array with stay prices split by date in the response.
load_prices_by_dates.title_zh: 设为 `true` 时，响应中将包含按日期拆分住宿价格的 `prices_by_dates` 数组。

prices_start_date.desc_en: Start date (`yyyy-mm-dd`) for date-split prices; requires `load_prices_by_dates=true`. Defaults to `check_in`.
prices_start_date.title_zh: 按日期拆分价格的起始日期（`yyyy-mm-dd`）；需 `load_prices_by_dates=true`。默认取 `check_in`。

prices_end_date.desc_en: End date (`yyyy-mm-dd`) for date-split prices; requires `load_prices_by_dates=true`. Defaults to one month of prices.
prices_end_date.title_zh: 按日期拆分价格的结束日期（`yyyy-mm-dd`）；需 `load_prices_by_dates=true`。默认返回一个月的价格。

prices_date_range.desc_en: Predefined period for date-split prices (alternative to start/end dates); requires `load_prices_by_dates=true`.
prices_date_range.title_zh: 按日期拆分价格的预设区间（与起止日期二选一）；需 `load_prices_by_dates=true`。

tag.desc_en: Your own task label (up to 255 characters), echoed back in the response `data` so you can correlate results with requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签（最多 255 个字符），会在响应 `data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求对应。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response, e.g. `3.0.0`.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号，如 `3.0.0`。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response envelope (DataForSEO global code, distinct from the per-task `tasks.status_code`); `20000` indicates the request was accepted successfully.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个响应信封的全局状态码（DataForSEO 全局编码，区别于单任务的 `tasks.status_code`）；`20000` 表示请求被成功受理。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the envelope `status_code`; read it when troubleshooting a non-success code.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与信封 `status_code` 对应的可读说明；排查非成功状态码时参考此字段。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock processing time of the whole request, expressed in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 整个请求的处理耗时，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total money charged for all tasks in this response, in US dollars.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应内全部任务合计扣费，单位美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in `tasks` that finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's `status_code`.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，请逐一检查任务的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per posted task, each holding its own status and `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表，每个对应一个提交的任务，分别携带各自的状态与 `result` 数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier (UUID). Reuse it on the matching `task_get` endpoint to fetch this task's results within the retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务唯一标识（UUID）。可在保留期内携带它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回本任务结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code in the 10000-60000 range; `20000` means the task completed successfully while other values signal task-level errors.
