result.total_count.title_zh: 我方数据库中与请求匹配的可用结果总数。

result.visible_by_default.desc_en: Whether the review element is shown by default.
result.visible_by_default.title_zh: 该评论元素是否默认展示。

result.rating_distribution.desc_en: Object breaking down vote counts per star level (1 through 5).
result.rating_distribution.title_zh: 按 1-5 星逐级拆分投票数的对象。

result.other_sites_reviews.title_zh: 聚合自第三方站点的评论。

result.rating.desc_en: Rating object summarizing review-based popularity of the entity.
result.rating.title_zh: 汇总实体基于评论的人气评分对象。

result.rating_type.desc_en: Rating scale in use; values include `Max5`, `Percents`, `CustomMax`, indicating how `value` should be interpreted.
result.rating_type.title_zh: 所用评分量纲，取值如 `Max5`、`Percents`、`CustomMax`，决定 `value` 的解读方式。

result.rating_max.desc_en: Maximum possible value for the given `rating_type`.
result.rating_max.title_zh: 对应 `rating_type` 的最大可能取值。

result.overview_images.desc_en: URLs of images shown in the hotel overview.
result.overview_images.title_zh: 酒店概览中展示的图片 URL。

result.prices.desc_en: Pricing details for the hotel stay.
result.prices.title_zh: 酒店住宿的价格明细对象。

result.price_without_discount.desc_en: Price per night before any discount is applied.
result.price_without_discount.title_zh: 未应用折扣前的每晚价格。

result.discount_text.title_zh: 描述所应用折扣的文字。

result.check_in.desc_en: Check-in date-time in UTC, format `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`.
result.check_in.title_zh: 入住日期时间（UTC），格式 `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`。

result.check_out.desc_en: Check-out date-time in UTC, format `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`.
result.check_out.title_zh: 退房日期时间（UTC），格式 `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`。

result.visitors.desc_en: Number of visitors the price applies to.
result.visitors.title_zh: 该价格所对应的入住人数。

result.type.desc_en: Element type tag of this result entry.
result.type.title_zh: 该结果条目的元素类型标记。

result.is_paid.desc_en: Whether this is a paid listing/ad (`true`) versus an organic/free booking link (`false`).
result.is_paid.title_zh: 是否为付费展示/广告（`true`），否则为自然/免费预订链接（`false`）。

result.free_cancellation_until.desc_en: UTC date until which free cancellation is available; `null` if free cancellation is not offered.
result.free_cancellation_until.title_zh: 可免费取消的截止 UTC 日期；不提供免费取消时为 `null`。

result.max_visitors.desc_en: Maximum number of visitors the price offer is valid for.
result.max_visitors.title_zh: 该价格方案有效的最大入住人数。

result.offer_images.desc_en: URLs of images featured in the price offer.
result.offer_images.title_zh: 价格方案中展示的图片 URL。

result.prices_by_dates.desc_en: Array of hotel stay prices broken down by date.
result.prices_by_dates.title_zh: 按日期拆分的酒店住宿价格数组。

id.desc_en: UUID of the task whose results you want to fetch, as returned in `tasks.id` when the task was created.
id.title_zh: 要拉取结果的任务 UUID，即创建任务时在 `tasks.id` 返回的标识。

hotel_identifier.desc_en: Unique Google identifier of a hotel entity (required). Obtain it from the advanced Google SERP API or from Hotel Searches results.
hotel_identifier.title_zh: 酒店实体的 Google 唯一标识（必填）。可从高级 Google SERP API 或 Hotel Searches 结果中获取。

keyword.desc_en: Search keyword identifying the local establishment; URL-encode it and keep it within the endpoint's character limit. Required when neither `cid` nor `place_id` is supplied.
keyword.title_zh: 用于定位本地商户的搜索关键词；需 URL 编码并遵守接口字符上限。未提供 `cid` 或 `place_id` 时此字段必填。

priority.desc_en: Task execution priority: `1` for normal priority, `2` for high priority (charged at a higher rate for faster handling).
priority.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 为普通优先级，`2` 为高优先级（按更高费率计费以加快处理）。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`) setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; valid values come from the matching Locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 完整地区名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`），用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Locations 接口。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; valid values come from the matching Locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 数字地区编码，用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Locations 接口。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates in `latitude,longitude` (optionally with a radius) setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_name`/`location_code`.
location_coordinate.title_zh: GPS 坐标，格式 `latitude,longitude`（可附半径），用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_name`/`location_code` 择一提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name (e.g. `English`) for the search. Supply this or `language_code`; valid values come from the matching Languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索所用语言的完整名称（如 `English`）。需与 `language_code` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Languages 接口。

language_code.desc_en: Language code (e.g. `en`) for the search. Supply this or `language_name`; valid values come from the matching Languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索所用的语言代码（如 `en`）。需与 `language_name` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Languages 接口。

check_in.desc_en: Check-in date in `yyyy-mm-dd`; must not be earlier than today. Defaults to tomorrow when omitted.
check_in.title_zh: 入住日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`；不得早于今天。不填默认为明天。

check_out.desc_en: Check-out date in `yyyy-mm-dd`; must be later than `check_in`. Defaults to two days from now when omitted.
check_out.title_zh: 退房日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`；须晚于 `check_in`。不填默认为后天。

currency.desc_en: Currency for the returned prices, e.g. `USD`.
currency.title_zh: 返回价格所用的货币，如 `USD`。

adults.desc_en: Number of adult guests. Defaults to two adults when omitted.
adults.title_zh: 成人入住人数。不填默认为两名成人。

children.desc_en: Children to include, given as an array of their ages (e.g. `[14]`). Defaults to no children when omitted.
children.title_zh: 随行儿童，以年龄数组表示（如 `[14]`）。不填则不计入儿童。

load_prices_by_dates.desc_en: Set to `true` to include the `prices_by_dates` array with stay prices split by date in the response.
load_prices_by_dates.title_zh: 设为 `true` 时，响应中将包含按日期拆分住宿价格的 `prices_by_dates` 数组。

prices_start_date.desc_en: Start date (`yyyy-mm-dd`) for date-split prices; requires `load_prices_by_dates=true`. Defaults to `check_in`.
prices_start_date.title_zh: 按日期拆分价格的起始日期（`yyyy-mm-dd`）；需 `load_prices_by_dates=true`。默认取 `check_in`。

prices_end_date.desc_en: End date (`yyyy-mm-dd`) for date-split prices; requires `load_prices_by_dates=true`. Defaults to one month of prices.
prices_end_date.title_zh: 按日期拆分价格的结束日期（`yyyy-mm-dd`）；需 `load_prices_by_dates=true`。默认返回一个月的价格。

prices_date_range.desc_en: Predefined period for date-split prices (alternative to start/end dates); requires `load_prices_by_dates=true`.
prices_date_range.title_zh: 按日期拆分价格的预设区间（与起止日期二选一）；需 `load_prices_by_dates=true`。

tag.desc_en: Your own task label (up to 255 characters), echoed back in the response `data` so you can correlate results with requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签（最多 255 个字符），会在响应 `data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求对应。

postback_url.desc_en: URL to which finished task results are POSTed (gzip-compressed). Use `$id`/`$tag` placeholders to have them substituted automatically.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后用于 POST 推送结果（gzip 压缩）的回调 URL。可用 `$id`/`$tag` 占位符自动替换。

postback_data.desc_en: Datatype pushed to your `postback_url`; required when `postback_url` is set. Possible values: `advanced`, `html`.
postback_data.title_zh: 推送至 `postback_url` 的数据类型；设置了 `postback_url` 时必填。取值：`advanced`、`html`。

pingback_url.desc_en: URL pinged via GET when the task completes, signalling that results are ready to collect. Supports `$id`/`$tag` placeholders.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时通过 GET 触达的通知 URL，用于提示结果已就绪。支持 `$id`/`$tag` 占位符。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response, e.g. `3.0.0`.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号，如 `3.0.0`。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response envelope (DataForSEO global code, distinct from the per-task `tasks.status_code`); `20000` indicates the request was accepted successfully.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个响应信封的全局状态码（DataForSEO 全局编码，区别于单任务的 `tasks.status_code`）；`20000` 表示请求被成功受理。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the envelope `status_code`; read it when troubleshooting a non-success code.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与信封 `status_code` 对应的可读说明；排查非成功状态码时参考此字段。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock processing time of the whole request, expressed in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 整个请求的处理耗时，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total money charged for all tasks in this response, in US dollars.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应内全部任务合计扣费，单位美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in `tasks` that finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's `status_code`.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，请逐一检查任务的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per posted task, each holding its own status and `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表，每个对应一个提交的任务，分别携带各自的状态与 `result` 数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier (UUID). Reuse it on the matching `task_get` endpoint to fetch this task's results within the retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务唯一标识（UUID）。可在保留期内携带它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回本任务结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code in the 10000-60000 range; `20000` means the task completed successfully while other values signal task-level errors.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，取值区间 10000-60000；`20000` 表示任务成功，其它值代表任务级错误。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message explaining this task's `status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 解释该任务 `status_code` 的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Money charged for this individual task, in US dollars.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的扣费金额，单位美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the task belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径片段，便于追溯任务归属的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you supplied when posting the task, returned so you can correlate results with your input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你提交任务时所传的参数，便于将结果与输入对应起来。

result.desc_en: Array holding the actual data payload of the task.
result.title_zh: 承载任务实际数据的结果数组。

keyword.desc_en: Search keyword identifying the local establishment; URL-encode it and keep it within the endpoint's character limit. Required when neither `cid` nor `place_id` is supplied.
keyword.title_zh: 用于定位本地商户的搜索关键词；需 URL 编码并遵守接口字符上限。未提供 `cid` 或 `place_id` 时此字段必填。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`) setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; valid values come from the matching Locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 完整地区名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`），用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Locations 接口。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; valid values come from the matching Locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 数字地区编码，用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Locations 接口。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates in `latitude,longitude` (optionally with a radius) setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_name`/`location_code`.
location_coordinate.title_zh: GPS 坐标，格式 `latitude,longitude`（可附半径），用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_name`/`location_code` 择一提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name (e.g. `English`) for the search. Supply this or `language_code`; valid values come from the matching Languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索所用语言的完整名称（如 `English`）。需与 `language_code` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Languages 接口。

language_code.desc_en: Language code (e.g. `en`) for the search. Supply this or `language_name`; valid values come from the matching Languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索所用的语言代码（如 `en`）。需与 `language_name` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Languages 接口。

depth.desc_en: Parsing depth: number of reviews to collect from the SERP. Set it in multiples of 20, since results are processed twenty at a time.
depth.title_zh: 解析深度：从 SERP 采集的评论数量。建议设为 20 的倍数，因系统每批处理 20 条。

check_in.desc_en: Check-in date in `yyyy-mm-dd`; must not be earlier than today. Defaults to tomorrow when omitted.
check_in.title_zh: 入住日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`；不得早于今天。不填默认为明天。

check_out.desc_en: Check-out date in `yyyy-mm-dd`; must be later than `check_in`. Defaults to two days from now when omitted.
check_out.title_zh: 退房日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`；须晚于 `check_in`。不填默认为后天。

currency.desc_en: Currency for the returned prices, e.g. `USD`.
currency.title_zh: 返回价格所用的货币，如 `USD`。

adults.desc_en: Number of adult guests. Defaults to two adults when omitted.
adults.title_zh: 成人入住人数。不填默认为两名成人。

children.desc_en: Children to include, given as an array of their ages (e.g. `[14]`). Defaults to no children when omitted.
children.title_zh: 随行儿童，以年龄数组表示（如 `[14]`）。不填则不计入儿童。

stars.desc_en: Filter by hotel class, as an array of star values, e.g. `[3,4,5]`.
stars.title_zh: 按酒店星级筛选，以星级数组表示，如 `[3,4,5]`。

min_rating.desc_en: Minimum guest rating; returns only hotels rated above the given value, e.g. `2.5`.
min_rating.title_zh: 最低住客评分；仅返回评分高于该值的酒店，如 `2.5`。

sort_by.desc_en: Sorting of hotel-search results; values include `relevance`, `lowest_price`, `highest_rating`. For reviews, sorts review order.
sort_by.title_zh: 酒店搜索结果的排序方式，取值如 `relevance`、`lowest_price`、`highest_rating`。用于评论时则决定评论排序。

min_price.desc_en: Minimum price per night, expressed in the currency set by `currency`.
min_price.title_zh: 每晚最低价格，币种由 `currency` 决定。

max_price.desc_en: Maximum price per night, expressed in the currency set by `currency`.
max_price.title_zh: 每晚最高价格，币种由 `currency` 决定。

free_cancellation.desc_en: Set to `true` to return only hotels offering free cancellation. Default `false`.
free_cancellation.title_zh: 设为 `true` 仅返回提供免费取消的酒店。默认 `false`。

is_vacation_rentals.desc_en: Set to `true` to search vacation rentals instead of hotels. Default `false`.
is_vacation_rentals.title_zh: 设为 `true` 时搜索度假租赁而非酒店。默认 `false`。

amenities.desc_en: Filter by hotel amenities, given as an array of amenity codes (e.g. `["free_parking","pets_allowed"]`).
amenities.title_zh: 按酒店便利设施筛选，以设施编码数组表示（如 `["free_parking","pets_allowed"]`）。

tag.desc_en: Your own task label (up to 255 characters), echoed back in the response `data` so you can correlate results with requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签（最多 255 个字符），会在响应 `data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求对应。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response, e.g. `3.0.0`.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号，如 `3.0.0`。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response envelope (DataForSEO global code, distinct from the per-task `tasks.status_code`); `20000` indicates the request was accepted successfully.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个响应信封的全局状态码（DataForSEO 全局编码，区别于单任务的 `tasks.status_code`）；`20000` 表示请求被成功受理。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the envelope `status_code`; read it when troubleshooting a non-success code.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与信封 `status_code` 对应的可读说明；排查非成功状态码时参考此字段。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock processing time of the whole request, expressed in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 整个请求的处理耗时，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total money charged for all tasks in this response, in US dollars.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应内全部任务合计扣费，单位美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in `tasks` that finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's `status_code`.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，请逐一检查任务的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per posted task, each holding its own status and `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表，每个对应一个提交的任务，分别携带各自的状态与 `result` 数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier (UUID). Reuse it on the matching `task_get` endpoint to fetch this task's results within the retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务唯一标识（UUID）。可在保留期内携带它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回本任务结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code in the 10000-60000 range; `20000` means the task completed successfully while other values signal task-level errors.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，取值区间 10000-60000；`20000` 表示任务成功，其它值代表任务级错误。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message explaining this task's `status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 解释该任务 `status_code` 的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Money charged for this individual task, in US dollars.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的扣费金额，单位美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the task belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径片段，便于追溯任务归属的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you supplied when posting the task, returned so you can correlate results with your input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你提交任务时所传的参数，便于将结果与输入对应起来。

result.desc_en: Array holding the actual data payload of the task.
result.title_zh: 承载任务实际数据的结果数组。

result.keyword.desc_en: The search keyword echoed from your POST request, returned URL-decoded; if you passed a `cid:` value it is reflected here as well.
result.keyword.title_zh: 回显你 POST 请求中的搜索关键词，已做 URL 解码；若传入的是 `cid:` 形式也会原样反映在此。

result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the POST request, identifying the geographic target of the search.
result.location_code.title_zh: 回显自 POST 请求的地区编码，标识搜索的地理目标。

result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the POST request, identifying the interface language of the search.
result.language_code.title_zh: 回显自 POST 请求的语言编码，标识搜索的界面语言。

result.check_url.desc_en: Direct URL to the live search engine results, so you can manually verify the data we returned.
result.check_url.title_zh: 指向实时搜索引擎结果的直达链接，可用于人工核对我们返回的数据。

result.datetime.desc_en: UTC timestamp of when this result was collected, format `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`.
result.datetime.title_zh: 采集该结果的 UTC 时间戳，格式为 `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`。

result.items_count.desc_en: Number of items returned in the `items` array; raise it via the `depth` parameter when posting a task.
result.items_count.title_zh: `items` 数组返回的条目数量；提交任务时可用 `depth` 参数提高。

items.desc_en: Array of nested item elements belonging to this entry.
items.title_zh: 归属于该条目的嵌套子项数组。

items.type.desc_en: Type tag of this element, identifying its schema.
items.type.title_zh: 该元素的类型标记，用于识别其结构。

items.hotel_identifier.desc_en: Unique Google identifier of a hotel entity; pass it as `hotel_identifier` to the Hotel Info endpoint.
items.hotel_identifier.title_zh: 酒店实体的 Google 唯一标识；可作为 `hotel_identifier` 传给 Hotel Info 接口。

items.title.desc_en: Title / name shown for the element in the SERP.
items.title.title_zh: 该元素在 SERP 中显示的标题 / 名称。

items.is_paid.desc_en: Whether this is a paid listing/ad (`true`) versus an organic/free booking link (`false`).
items.is_paid.title_zh: 是否为付费展示/广告（`true`），否则为自然/免费预订链接（`false`）。

items.location.title_zh: 评论者标注的所在地（如国家）。

items.latitude.desc_en: Latitude coordinate of the entity on Google Maps.
items.latitude.title_zh: 该实体在 Google 地图上的纬度坐标。

items.longitude.desc_en: Longitude coordinate of the entity on Google Maps.
items.longitude.title_zh: 该实体在 Google 地图上的经度坐标。

items.reviews.desc_en: Object with hotel review and rating information, broken down by criteria.
items.reviews.title_zh: 按各维度拆分的酒店评论与评分信息对象。

items.value.desc_en: Numeric rating value, interpreted according to `rating_type`.
items.value.title_zh: 评分数值，需结合 `rating_type` 解读。

items.votes_count.desc_en: Number of votes / reviews the rating is based on.
items.votes_count.title_zh: 评分所依据的投票 / 评论数量。

items.mentions.desc_en: Hotel mentions placeholder; in hotel-search results this field is always `null` and exists only for interoperability with the Hotel Info endpoint.
items.mentions.title_zh: 酒店提及占位字段；在酒店搜索结果中恒为 `null`，仅为与 Hotel Info 接口保持互通而保留。

items.rating_distribution.desc_en: Rating-distribution placeholder; in hotel-search results this field is always `null` and exists only for interoperability with the Hotel Info endpoint.
items.rating_distribution.title_zh: 评分分布占位字段；在酒店搜索结果中恒为 `null`，仅为与 Hotel Info 接口保持互通而保留。

items.other_sites_reviews.desc_en: Third-party reviews placeholder; in hotel-search results this field is always `null` and exists only for interoperability with the Hotel Info endpoint.
items.other_sites_reviews.title_zh: 第三方评论占位字段；在酒店搜索结果中恒为 `null`，仅为与 Hotel Info 接口保持互通而保留。

items.overview_images.desc_en: URLs of images shown in the hotel overview.
items.overview_images.title_zh: 酒店概览中展示的图片 URL。

items.prices.desc_en: Pricing details for the hotel stay.
items.prices.title_zh: 酒店住宿的价格明细对象。

items.price_without_discount.desc_en: Price per night before any discount is applied.
items.price_without_discount.title_zh: 未应用折扣前的每晚价格。

items.discount_text.title_zh: 描述所应用折扣的文字。

items.check_in.desc_en: Check-in date-time in UTC, format `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`.
items.check_in.title_zh: 入住日期时间（UTC），格式 `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`。

items.check_out.desc_en: Check-out date-time in UTC, format `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`.
items.check_out.title_zh: 退房日期时间（UTC），格式 `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`。

items.visitors.desc_en: Number of visitors the price applies to.
items.visitors.title_zh: 该价格所对应的入住人数。

items.items.desc_en: Nested items placeholder; in hotel-search results this field is always `null` and exists only for interoperability with the Hotel Info endpoint.
items.items.title_zh: 嵌套子项占位字段；在酒店搜索结果中恒为 `null`，仅为与 Hotel Info 接口保持互通而保留。

keyword.desc_en: Search keyword identifying the local establishment; URL-encode it and keep it within the endpoint's character limit. Required when neither `cid` nor `place_id` is supplied.
keyword.title_zh: 用于定位本地商户的搜索关键词；需 URL 编码并遵守接口字符上限。未提供 `cid` 或 `place_id` 时此字段必填。

priority.desc_en: Task execution priority: `1` for normal priority, `2` for high priority (charged at a higher rate for faster handling).
priority.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 为普通优先级，`2` 为高优先级（按更高费率计费以加快处理）。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`) setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; valid values come from the matching Locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 完整地区名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`），用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Locations 接口。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; valid values come from the matching Locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 数字地区编码，用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Locations 接口。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates in `latitude,longitude` (optionally with a radius) setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_name`/`location_code`.
location_coordinate.title_zh: GPS 坐标，格式 `latitude,longitude`（可附半径），用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_name`/`location_code` 择一提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name (e.g. `English`) for the search. Supply this or `language_code`; valid values come from the matching Languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索所用语言的完整名称（如 `English`）。需与 `language_code` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Languages 接口。

language_code.desc_en: Language code (e.g. `en`) for the search. Supply this or `language_name`; valid values come from the matching Languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索所用的语言代码（如 `en`）。需与 `language_name` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Languages 接口。

depth.desc_en: Parsing depth: number of reviews to collect from the SERP. Set it in multiples of 20, since results are processed twenty at a time.
depth.title_zh: 解析深度：从 SERP 采集的评论数量。建议设为 20 的倍数，因系统每批处理 20 条。

check_in.desc_en: Check-in date in `yyyy-mm-dd`; must not be earlier than today. Defaults to tomorrow when omitted.
check_in.title_zh: 入住日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`；不得早于今天。不填默认为明天。

check_out.desc_en: Check-out date in `yyyy-mm-dd`; must be later than `check_in`. Defaults to two days from now when omitted.
check_out.title_zh: 退房日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`；须晚于 `check_in`。不填默认为后天。

currency.desc_en: Currency for the returned prices, e.g. `USD`.
currency.title_zh: 返回价格所用的货币，如 `USD`。

adults.desc_en: Number of adult guests. Defaults to two adults when omitted.
adults.title_zh: 成人入住人数。不填默认为两名成人。

children.desc_en: Children to include, given as an array of their ages (e.g. `[14]`). Defaults to no children when omitted.
children.title_zh: 随行儿童，以年龄数组表示（如 `[14]`）。不填则不计入儿童。

stars.desc_en: Filter by hotel class, as an array of star values, e.g. `[3,4,5]`.
stars.title_zh: 按酒店星级筛选，以星级数组表示，如 `[3,4,5]`。

min_rating.desc_en: Minimum guest rating; returns only hotels rated above the given value, e.g. `2.5`.
min_rating.title_zh: 最低住客评分；仅返回评分高于该值的酒店，如 `2.5`。

sort_by.desc_en: Sorting of hotel-search results; values include `relevance`, `lowest_price`, `highest_rating`. For reviews, sorts review order.
sort_by.title_zh: 酒店搜索结果的排序方式，取值如 `relevance`、`lowest_price`、`highest_rating`。用于评论时则决定评论排序。

min_price.desc_en: Minimum price per night, expressed in the currency set by `currency`.
min_price.title_zh: 每晚最低价格，币种由 `currency` 决定。

max_price.desc_en: Maximum price per night, expressed in the currency set by `currency`.
max_price.title_zh: 每晚最高价格，币种由 `currency` 决定。

free_cancellation.desc_en: Set to `true` to return only hotels offering free cancellation. Default `false`.
free_cancellation.title_zh: 设为 `true` 仅返回提供免费取消的酒店。默认 `false`。

is_vacation_rentals.desc_en: Set to `true` to search vacation rentals instead of hotels. Default `false`.
is_vacation_rentals.title_zh: 设为 `true` 时搜索度假租赁而非酒店。默认 `false`。

amenities.desc_en: Filter by hotel amenities, given as an array of amenity codes (e.g. `["free_parking","pets_allowed"]`).
amenities.title_zh: 按酒店便利设施筛选，以设施编码数组表示（如 `["free_parking","pets_allowed"]`）。

tag.desc_en: Your own task label (up to 255 characters), echoed back in the response `data` so you can correlate results with requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签（最多 255 个字符），会在响应 `data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求对应。

postback_url.desc_en: URL to which finished task results are POSTed (gzip-compressed). Use `$id`/`$tag` placeholders to have them substituted automatically.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后用于 POST 推送结果（gzip 压缩）的回调 URL。可用 `$id`/`$tag` 占位符自动替换。

pingback_url.desc_en: URL pinged via GET when the task completes, signalling that results are ready to collect. Supports `$id`/`$tag` placeholders.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时通过 GET 触达的通知 URL，用于提示结果已就绪。支持 `$id`/`$tag` 占位符。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response, e.g. `3.0.0`.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号，如 `3.0.0`。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response envelope (DataForSEO global code, distinct from the per-task `tasks.status_code`); `20000` indicates the request was accepted successfully.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个响应信封的全局状态码（DataForSEO 全局编码，区别于单任务的 `tasks.status_code`）；`20000` 表示请求被成功受理。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the envelope `status_code`; read it when troubleshooting a non-success code.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与信封 `status_code` 对应的可读说明；排查非成功状态码时参考此字段。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock processing time of the whole request, expressed in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 整个请求的处理耗时，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total money charged for all tasks in this response, in US dollars.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应内全部任务合计扣费，单位美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in `tasks` that finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's `status_code`.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，请逐一检查任务的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per posted task, each holding its own status and `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表，每个对应一个提交的任务，分别携带各自的状态与 `result` 数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier (UUID). Reuse it on the matching `task_get` endpoint to fetch this task's results within the retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务唯一标识（UUID）。可在保留期内携带它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回本任务结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code in the 10000-60000 range; `20000` means the task completed successfully while other values signal task-level errors.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，取值区间 10000-60000；`20000` 表示任务成功，其它值代表任务级错误。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message explaining this task's `status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 解释该任务 `status_code` 的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Money charged for this individual task, in US dollars.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的扣费金额，单位美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the task belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径片段，便于追溯任务归属的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you supplied when posting the task, returned so you can correlate results with your input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你提交任务时所传的参数，便于将结果与输入对应起来。

result.desc_en: Array holding the actual data payload of the task.
result.title_zh: 承载任务实际数据的结果数组。

keyword.desc_en: Search keyword identifying the local establishment; URL-encode it and keep it within the endpoint's character limit. Required when neither `cid` nor `place_id` is supplied.
keyword.title_zh: 用于定位本地商户的搜索关键词；需 URL 编码并遵守接口字符上限。未提供 `cid` 或 `place_id` 时此字段必填。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`) setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; valid values come from the matching Locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 完整地区名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`），用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Locations 接口。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; valid values come from the matching Locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 数字地区编码，用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Locations 接口。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates in `latitude,longitude` (optionally with a radius) setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_name`/`location_code`.
location_coordinate.title_zh: GPS 坐标，格式 `latitude,longitude`（可附半径），用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_name`/`location_code` 择一提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name (e.g. `English`) for the search. Supply this or `language_code`; valid values come from the matching Languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索所用语言的完整名称（如 `English`）。需与 `language_code` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Languages 接口。

language_code.desc_en: Language code (e.g. `en`) for the search. Supply this or `language_name`; valid values come from the matching Languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索所用的语言代码（如 `en`）。需与 `language_name` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Languages 接口。

tag.desc_en: Your own task label (up to 255 characters), echoed back in the response `data` so you can correlate results with requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签（最多 255 个字符），会在响应 `data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求对应。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response, e.g. `3.0.0`.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号，如 `3.0.0`。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response envelope (DataForSEO global code, distinct from the per-task `tasks.status_code`); `20000` indicates the request was accepted successfully.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个响应信封的全局状态码（DataForSEO 全局编码，区别于单任务的 `tasks.status_code`）；`20000` 表示请求被成功受理。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the envelope `status_code`; read it when troubleshooting a non-success code.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与信封 `status_code` 对应的可读说明；排查非成功状态码时参考此字段。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock processing time of the whole request, expressed in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 整个请求的处理耗时，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total money charged for all tasks in this response, in US dollars.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应内全部任务合计扣费，单位美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in `tasks` that finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's `status_code`.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，请逐一检查任务的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per posted task, each holding its own status and `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表，每个对应一个提交的任务，分别携带各自的状态与 `result` 数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier (UUID). Reuse it on the matching `task_get` endpoint to fetch this task's results within the retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务唯一标识（UUID）。可在保留期内携带它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回本任务结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code in the 10000-60000 range; `20000` means the task completed successfully while other values signal task-level errors.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，取值区间 10000-60000；`20000` 表示任务成功，其它值代表任务级错误。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message explaining this task's `status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 解释该任务 `status_code` 的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Money charged for this individual task, in US dollars.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的扣费金额，单位美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the task belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径片段，便于追溯任务归属的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you supplied when posting the task, returned so you can correlate results with your input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你提交任务时所传的参数，便于将结果与输入对应起来。

result.desc_en: Array holding the actual data payload of the task.
result.title_zh: 承载任务实际数据的结果数组。

result.keyword.desc_en: The search keyword echoed from your POST request, returned URL-decoded; if you passed a `cid:` value it is reflected here as well.
result.keyword.title_zh: 回显你 POST 请求中的搜索关键词，已做 URL 解码；若传入的是 `cid:` 形式也会原样反映在此。

result.se_domain.desc_en: Search engine domain used for this result, echoed from the POST request.
result.se_domain.title_zh: 本结果使用的搜索引擎域名，回显自 POST 请求。

result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the POST request, identifying the geographic target of the search.
result.location_code.title_zh: 回显自 POST 请求的地区编码，标识搜索的地理目标。

result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the POST request, identifying the interface language of the search.
result.language_code.title_zh: 回显自 POST 请求的语言编码，标识搜索的界面语言。

result.check_url.desc_en: Direct URL to the live search engine results, so you can manually verify the data we returned.
result.check_url.title_zh: 指向实时搜索引擎结果的直达链接，可用于人工核对我们返回的数据。

result.datetime.desc_en: UTC timestamp of when this result was collected, format `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`.
result.datetime.title_zh: 采集该结果的 UTC 时间戳，格式为 `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`。

result.item_types.desc_en: List of distinct element types present in the `items` array, letting you know which item schemas to expect.
result.item_types.title_zh: `items` 数组中出现的元素类型清单，提示你应预期哪些条目结构。

result.items_count.desc_en: Number of items returned in the `items` array; raise it via the `depth` parameter when posting a task.
result.items_count.title_zh: `items` 数组返回的条目数量；提交任务时可用 `depth` 参数提高。

items.desc_en: Array of nested item elements belonging to this entry.
items.title_zh: 归属于该条目的嵌套子项数组。

items.type.desc_en: Type tag of this element, identifying its schema.
items.type.title_zh: 该元素的类型标记，用于识别其结构。

items.rank_group.desc_en: Position of the element within the group of elements sharing the same `type`.
items.rank_group.title_zh: 该元素在同 `type` 元素分组内的位置。

items.rank_absolute.desc_en: Absolute position of the element among all returned elements.
items.rank_absolute.title_zh: 该元素在全部返回元素中的绝对位置。

items.position.desc_en: Layout alignment of the element in the SERP, e.g. `right`.
items.position.title_zh: 该元素在 SERP 中的版面对齐方式，如 `right`。

items.title.desc_en: Title / name shown for the element in the SERP.
items.title.title_zh: 该元素在 SERP 中显示的标题 / 名称。

items.original_title.desc_en: Original element title as shown by Google, before any translation.
items.original_title.title_zh: Google 显示的元素原始标题，未经翻译。

items.description.desc_en: Description of the business entity shown in the SERP.
items.description.title_zh: SERP 中显示的商户描述。

items.category.desc_en: Primary Google My Business category that best describes the entity's services.
items.category.title_zh: 最能概括该实体服务的 Google 商家主分类。

items.category_ids.desc_en: Global category IDs that stay constant regardless of the selected country.
items.category_ids.title_zh: 不随所选国家变化的全局分类 ID。

items.additional_categories.desc_en: Additional Google My Business categories detailing the entity's services.
items.additional_categories.title_zh: 更细致描述该实体服务的附加 Google 商家分类。

items.cid.desc_en: Google-defined client ID uniquely identifying the local establishment.
items.cid.title_zh: 唯一标识本地商户的 Google 客户端 ID（CID）。

items.feature_id.desc_en: Unique identifier of the element / establishment in the SERP.
items.feature_id.title_zh: 该元素 / 商户在 SERP 中的唯一标识符。

items.address.desc_en: Street address of the business entity.

items.address_info.desc_en: Structured object breaking the address into individual components.
items.address_info.title_zh: 将地址拆分为各组成部分的结构化对象。

items.borough.desc_en: Administrative district or borough the entity belongs to.
items.borough.title_zh: 实体所属的行政区或区划。

items.city.desc_en: City where the entity is located.

items.zip.desc_en: ZIP / postal code of the entity.

items.region.desc_en: DMA region of the entity's location.
items.region.title_zh: 实体所在地的 DMA 区域。

items.country_code.desc_en: ISO country code of the entity's location.
items.country_code.title_zh: 实体所在地的 ISO 国家代码。

items.place_id.desc_en: Google Place ID of the local establishment featured in the element.
items.place_id.title_zh: 该元素所含本地商户的 Google Place ID。

items.phone.desc_en: Phone number of the business entity.

items.url.desc_en: Absolute URL associated with this element.
items.url.title_zh: 与该元素关联的绝对 URL。

items.contact_url.desc_en: URL of the establishment's preferred contact page.
items.contact_url.title_zh: 商户首选联系页面的 URL。

items.contributor_url.desc_en: URL of the contributor's Local Guides profile, when available.
items.contributor_url.title_zh: 贡献者 Local Guides 主页的 URL（若有）。

items.book_online_url.desc_en: URL behind the element's 'book online' button, leading to the booking or order page.
items.book_online_url.title_zh: 元素「在线预订」按钮指向的链接，通往预订或下单页面。

items.logo.desc_en: URL of the logo shown in the Google My Business profile.
items.logo.title_zh: Google 商家资料中展示的 logo 图片 URL。

items.main_image.desc_en: URL of the main image shown in the Google My Business profile.
items.main_image.title_zh: Google 商家资料中展示的主图 URL。

items.total_photos.desc_en: Total number of images featured in the Google My Business profile.
items.total_photos.title_zh: Google 商家资料中收录的图片总数。

items.snippet.desc_en: Additional descriptive snippet about the business entity.
items.snippet.title_zh: 关于商户的附加描述片段。

items.latitude.desc_en: Latitude coordinate of the entity on Google Maps.
items.latitude.title_zh: 该实体在 Google 地图上的纬度坐标。

items.longitude.desc_en: Longitude coordinate of the entity on Google Maps.
items.longitude.title_zh: 该实体在 Google 地图上的经度坐标。

items.is_claimed.desc_en: Whether the entity has been verified by its owner on Google Maps.
items.is_claimed.title_zh: 该实体是否已被所有者在 Google 地图上认证。

items.attributes.desc_en: Service-detail checks for the entity, derived from user feedback and its `category`.
items.attributes.title_zh: 基于用户反馈与 `category` 生成的商户服务细节勾选项。

items.available_attributes.desc_en: Attributes the entity is reported to offer.
items.available_attributes.title_zh: 该实体被标记为可提供的属性。

items.unavailable_attributes.desc_en: Attributes the entity is reported not to offer.
items.unavailable_attributes.title_zh: 该实体被标记为不提供的属性。

items.place_topics.desc_en: Most-mentioned keywords from customer reviews mapped to how many reviews mention each.
items.place_topics.title_zh: 客户评论中最常被提及的关键词及各自被提及的评论数。

items.rating.desc_en: Rating object summarizing review-based popularity of the entity.
items.rating.title_zh: 汇总实体基于评论的人气评分对象。

items.rating_type.desc_en: Rating scale in use; values include `Max5`, `Percents`, `CustomMax`, indicating how `value` should be interpreted.
items.rating_type.title_zh: 所用评分量纲，取值如 `Max5`、`Percents`、`CustomMax`，决定 `value` 的解读方式。

items.value.desc_en: Numeric rating value, interpreted according to `rating_type`.
items.value.title_zh: 评分数值，需结合 `rating_type` 解读。

items.votes_count.desc_en: Number of votes / reviews the rating is based on.
items.votes_count.title_zh: 评分所依据的投票 / 评论数量。

items.rating_max.desc_en: Maximum possible value for the given `rating_type`.
items.rating_max.title_zh: 对应 `rating_type` 的最大可能取值。

items.rating_distribution.desc_en: Rating-distribution placeholder; in hotel-search results this field is always `null` and exists only for interoperability with the Hotel Info endpoint.
items.rating_distribution.title_zh: 评分分布占位字段；在酒店搜索结果中恒为 `null`，仅为与 Hotel Info 接口保持互通而保留。

items.people_also_search.desc_en: Related business entities that users also searched for.
items.people_also_search.title_zh: 用户还搜索过的相关商户。

items.work_time.desc_en: Object describing the entity's operating-hours details.
items.work_time.title_zh: 描述实体营业时间细节的对象。

items.work_hours.desc_en: Object describing the establishment's working hours.
items.work_hours.title_zh: 描述商户营业时间的对象。

items.timetable.title_zh: 按周排列的营业时间表。

items.open.title_zh: 开门时间对象，含 `hour` 与 `minute`。

items.hour.title_zh: 小时分量，采用 24 小时制。

items.close.title_zh: 关门时间对象，含 `hour` 与 `minute`。

popular_times.desc_en: Object describing busy-hour patterns of the establishment.
popular_times.title_zh: 描述商户繁忙时段规律的对象。

popular_times.popular_times_by_days.desc_en: Busy-hour breakdown for each day of the week.
popular_times.popular_times_by_days.title_zh: 按一周每天拆分的繁忙时段。

popular_times.time.title_zh: 繁忙时段的时间对象，含 `hour` 与 `minute`。

popular_times.hour.title_zh: 小时分量，采用 24 小时制。

popular_times.popular_index.desc_en: Time-bound popularity index from 0 to 100; higher means busier.
popular_times.popular_index.title_zh: 时段人气指数，范围 0-100，越高表示越繁忙。

local_business_links.desc_en: List of available interactions with the business directly from the search results, such as booking, ordering or messaging links.
local_business_links.title_zh: 可直接从搜索结果与商户互动的入口列表，如预订、下单或消息链接。

local_business_links.type.desc_en: Type tag of this element, identifying its schema.
local_business_links.type.title_zh: 该元素的类型标记，用于识别其结构。

local_business_links.title.desc_en: Title / name shown for the element in the SERP.
local_business_links.title.title_zh: 该元素在 SERP 中显示的标题 / 名称。

local_business_links.url.desc_en: Absolute URL associated with this element.
local_business_links.url.title_zh: 与该元素关联的绝对 URL。

local_business_links.delivery_services.desc_en: List of available delivery services for the establishment.
local_business_links.delivery_services.title_zh: 该商户可用的配送服务列表。

local_business_links.is_directory_item.desc_en: Whether the establishment is part of a shared-address directory (e.g. a mall); `null` for a parent directory item.
local_business_links.is_directory_item.title_zh: 该商户是否属于共用地址的目录条目（如商场）；若为目录父项则为 `null`。

directory.desc_en: Directory entries: businesses sharing the target establishment's address.
directory.title_zh: 目录条目：与目标商户共用地址的商户集合。

directory.title.desc_en: Title / name shown for the element in the SERP.
directory.title.title_zh: 该元素在 SERP 中显示的标题 / 名称。

directory.items.desc_en: Array of nested item elements belonging to this entry.
directory.items.title_zh: 归属于该条目的嵌套子项数组。

directory.type.desc_en: Type tag of this element, identifying its schema.
directory.type.title_zh: 该元素的类型标记，用于识别其结构。

directory.rank_group.desc_en: Position of the element within the group of elements sharing the same `type`.
directory.rank_group.title_zh: 该元素在同 `type` 元素分组内的位置。

directory.rank_absolute.desc_en: Absolute position of the element among all returned elements.
directory.rank_absolute.title_zh: 该元素在全部返回元素中的绝对位置。

directory.url.desc_en: Absolute URL associated with this element.
directory.url.title_zh: 与该元素关联的绝对 URL。

directory.rating.desc_en: Rating object summarizing review-based popularity of the entity.
directory.rating.title_zh: 汇总实体基于评论的人气评分对象。

directory.rating_type.desc_en: Rating scale in use; values include `Max5`, `Percents`, `CustomMax`, indicating how `value` should be interpreted.
directory.rating_type.title_zh: 所用评分量纲，取值如 `Max5`、`Percents`、`CustomMax`，决定 `value` 的解读方式。

directory.value.desc_en: Numeric rating value, interpreted according to `rating_type`.
directory.value.title_zh: 评分数值，需结合 `rating_type` 解读。

directory.votes_count.desc_en: Number of votes / reviews the rating is based on.
directory.votes_count.title_zh: 评分所依据的投票 / 评论数量。

directory.rating_max.desc_en: Maximum possible value for the given `rating_type`.
directory.rating_max.title_zh: 对应 `rating_type` 的最大可能取值。

directory.rating_distribution.desc_en: Object breaking down vote counts per star level (1 through 5).
directory.rating_distribution.title_zh: 按 1-5 星逐级拆分投票数的对象。

directory.snippet.desc_en: Additional descriptive snippet about the business entity.
directory.snippet.title_zh: 关于商户的附加描述片段。

directory.address.desc_en: Street address of the business entity.

directory.address_info.desc_en: Structured object breaking the address into individual components.
directory.address_info.title_zh: 将地址拆分为各组成部分的结构化对象。

directory.borough.desc_en: Administrative district or borough the entity belongs to.
directory.borough.title_zh: 实体所属的行政区或区划。

directory.city.desc_en: City where the entity is located.

directory.zip.desc_en: ZIP / postal code of the entity.

directory.region.desc_en: DMA region of the entity's location.
directory.region.title_zh: 实体所在地的 DMA 区域。

directory.country_code.desc_en: ISO country code of the entity's location.
directory.country_code.title_zh: 实体所在地的 ISO 国家代码。

directory.place_id.desc_en: Google Place ID of the local establishment featured in the element.
directory.place_id.title_zh: 该元素所含本地商户的 Google Place ID。

directory.phone.desc_en: Phone number of the business entity.

directory.main_image.desc_en: URL of the main image shown in the Google My Business profile.
directory.main_image.title_zh: Google 商家资料中展示的主图 URL。

directory.total_photos.desc_en: Total number of images featured in the Google My Business profile.
directory.total_photos.title_zh: Google 商家资料中收录的图片总数。

directory.category.desc_en: Primary Google My Business category that best describes the entity's services.
directory.category.title_zh: 最能概括该实体服务的 Google 商家主分类。

directory.category_ids.desc_en: Global category IDs that stay constant regardless of the selected country.
directory.category_ids.title_zh: 不随所选国家变化的全局分类 ID。

directory.work_hours.desc_en: Object describing the establishment's working hours.
directory.work_hours.title_zh: 描述商户营业时间的对象。

directory.feature_id.desc_en: Unique identifier of the element / establishment in the SERP.
directory.feature_id.title_zh: 该元素 / 商户在 SERP 中的唯一标识符。

directory.cid.desc_en: Google-defined client ID uniquely identifying the local establishment.
directory.cid.title_zh: 唯一标识本地商户的 Google 客户端 ID（CID）。

directory.latitude.desc_en: Latitude coordinate of the entity on Google Maps.
directory.latitude.title_zh: 该实体在 Google 地图上的纬度坐标。

directory.longitude.desc_en: Longitude coordinate of the entity on Google Maps.
directory.longitude.title_zh: 该实体在 Google 地图上的经度坐标。

directory.is_claimed.desc_en: Whether the entity has been verified by its owner on Google Maps.
directory.is_claimed.title_zh: 该实体是否已被所有者在 Google 地图上认证。

directory.local_justifications.desc_en: Google local justifications: snippets explaining why the business matches the query.
directory.local_justifications.title_zh: Google 本地匹配理由：解释该商户为何匹配查询的文字片段。

directory.is_directory_item.desc_en: Whether the establishment is part of a shared-address directory (e.g. a mall); `null` for a parent directory item.
directory.is_directory_item.title_zh: 该商户是否属于共用地址的目录条目（如商场）；若为目录父项则为 `null`。

directory.price_level.desc_en: Relative price level; values: `inexpensive`, `moderate`, `expensive`, `very_expensive`; `null` when unknown.
directory.price_level.title_zh: 相对价格档次，取值 `inexpensive`、`moderate`、`expensive`、`very_expensive`；未知时为 `null`。

directory.hotel_rating.desc_en: Hotel class rating ranging 1-5 stars; `null` when no class rating exists.
directory.hotel_rating.title_zh: 酒店星级评定，范围 1-5 星；无星级信息时为 `null`。

keyword.desc_en: Search keyword identifying the local establishment; URL-encode it and keep it within the endpoint's character limit. Required when neither `cid` nor `place_id` is supplied.
keyword.title_zh: 用于定位本地商户的搜索关键词；需 URL 编码并遵守接口字符上限。未提供 `cid` 或 `place_id` 时此字段必填。

priority.desc_en: Task execution priority: `1` for normal priority, `2` for high priority (charged at a higher rate for faster handling).
priority.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 为普通优先级，`2` 为高优先级（按更高费率计费以加快处理）。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`) setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; valid values come from the matching Locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 完整地区名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`），用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Locations 接口。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; valid values come from the matching Locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 数字地区编码，用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Locations 接口。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates in `latitude,longitude` (optionally with a radius) setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_name`/`location_code`.
location_coordinate.title_zh: GPS 坐标，格式 `latitude,longitude`（可附半径），用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_name`/`location_code` 择一提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name (e.g. `English`) for the search. Supply this or `language_code`; valid values come from the matching Languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索所用语言的完整名称（如 `English`）。需与 `language_code` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Languages 接口。

language_code.desc_en: Language code (e.g. `en`) for the search. Supply this or `language_name`; valid values come from the matching Languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索所用的语言代码（如 `en`）。需与 `language_name` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Languages 接口。

tag.desc_en: Your own task label (up to 255 characters), echoed back in the response `data` so you can correlate results with requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签（最多 255 个字符），会在响应 `data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求对应。

postback_url.desc_en: URL to which finished task results are POSTed (gzip-compressed). Use `$id`/`$tag` placeholders to have them substituted automatically.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后用于 POST 推送结果（gzip 压缩）的回调 URL。可用 `$id`/`$tag` 占位符自动替换。

pingback_url.desc_en: URL pinged via GET when the task completes, signalling that results are ready to collect. Supports `$id`/`$tag` placeholders.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时通过 GET 触达的通知 URL，用于提示结果已就绪。支持 `$id`/`$tag` 占位符。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response, e.g. `3.0.0`.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号，如 `3.0.0`。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response envelope (DataForSEO global code, distinct from the per-task `tasks.status_code`); `20000` indicates the request was accepted successfully.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个响应信封的全局状态码（DataForSEO 全局编码，区别于单任务的 `tasks.status_code`）；`20000` 表示请求被成功受理。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the envelope `status_code`; read it when troubleshooting a non-success code.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与信封 `status_code` 对应的可读说明；排查非成功状态码时参考此字段。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock processing time of the whole request, expressed in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 整个请求的处理耗时，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total money charged for all tasks in this response, in US dollars.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应内全部任务合计扣费，单位美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in `tasks` that finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's `status_code`.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，请逐一检查任务的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per posted task, each holding its own status and `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表，每个对应一个提交的任务，分别携带各自的状态与 `result` 数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier (UUID). Reuse it on the matching `task_get` endpoint to fetch this task's results within the retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务唯一标识（UUID）。可在保留期内携带它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回本任务结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code in the 10000-60000 range; `20000` means the task completed successfully while other values signal task-level errors.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，取值区间 10000-60000；`20000` 表示任务成功，其它值代表任务级错误。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message explaining this task's `status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 解释该任务 `status_code` 的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Money charged for this individual task, in US dollars.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的扣费金额，单位美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the task belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径片段，便于追溯任务归属的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you supplied when posting the task, returned so you can correlate results with your input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你提交任务时所传的参数，便于将结果与输入对应起来。

result.desc_en: Array holding the actual data payload of the task.
result.title_zh: 承载任务实际数据的结果数组。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response, e.g. `3.0.0`.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号，如 `3.0.0`。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response envelope (DataForSEO global code, distinct from the per-task `tasks.status_code`); `20000` indicates the request was accepted successfully.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个响应信封的全局状态码（DataForSEO 全局编码，区别于单任务的 `tasks.status_code`）；`20000` 表示请求被成功受理。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the envelope `status_code`; read it when troubleshooting a non-success code.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与信封 `status_code` 对应的可读说明；排查非成功状态码时参考此字段。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock processing time of the whole request, expressed in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 整个请求的处理耗时，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total money charged for all tasks in this response, in US dollars.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应内全部任务合计扣费，单位美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in `tasks` that finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's `status_code`.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，请逐一检查任务的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per posted task, each holding its own status and `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表，每个对应一个提交的任务，分别携带各自的状态与 `result` 数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier (UUID). Reuse it on the matching `task_get` endpoint to fetch this task's results within the retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务唯一标识（UUID）。可在保留期内携带它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回本任务结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code in the 10000-60000 range; `20000` means the task completed successfully while other values signal task-level errors.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，取值区间 10000-60000；`20000` 表示任务成功，其它值代表任务级错误。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message explaining this task's `status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 解释该任务 `status_code` 的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Money charged for this individual task, in US dollars.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的扣费金额，单位美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the task belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径片段，便于追溯任务归属的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you supplied when posting the task, returned so you can correlate results with your input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你提交任务时所传的参数，便于将结果与输入对应起来。

result.desc_en: Array holding the actual data payload of the task.
result.title_zh: 承载任务实际数据的结果数组。

result.keyword.desc_en: The search keyword echoed from your POST request, returned URL-decoded; if you passed a `cid:` value it is reflected here as well.
result.keyword.title_zh: 回显你 POST 请求中的搜索关键词，已做 URL 解码；若传入的是 `cid:` 形式也会原样反映在此。

result.se_domain.desc_en: Search engine domain used for this result, echoed from the POST request.
result.se_domain.title_zh: 本结果使用的搜索引擎域名，回显自 POST 请求。

result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the POST request, identifying the geographic target of the search.
result.location_code.title_zh: 回显自 POST 请求的地区编码，标识搜索的地理目标。

result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the POST request, identifying the interface language of the search.
result.language_code.title_zh: 回显自 POST 请求的语言编码，标识搜索的界面语言。

result.check_url.desc_en: Direct URL to the live search engine results, so you can manually verify the data we returned.
result.check_url.title_zh: 指向实时搜索引擎结果的直达链接，可用于人工核对我们返回的数据。

result.datetime.desc_en: UTC timestamp of when this result was collected, format `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`.
result.datetime.title_zh: 采集该结果的 UTC 时间戳，格式为 `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`。

result.business_updates_id.desc_en: Identifier of the business-updates element in the SERP.
result.business_updates_id.title_zh: SERP 中商家动态元素的标识符。

result.cid.desc_en: Google-defined client ID of the local establishment; can be reused with Google reviews endpoints to pull full review data.
result.cid.title_zh: 本地商户的 Google 客户端 ID（CID）；可配合 Google 评论类接口取回完整评论数据。

result.feature_id.desc_en: Unique identifier of the SERP feature / business element returned for this result.

items.desc_en: Array of nested item elements belonging to this entry.

items.type.desc_en: Type tag of this element, identifying its schema.

items.rank_group.desc_en: Position of the element within the group of elements sharing the same `type`.

items.post_text.desc_en: Main body text of the post.

items.url.desc_en: Absolute URL associated with this element.

items.images_url.desc_en: URL of an image included in the post.
items.images_url.title_zh: 动态中所含图片的 URL。

items.post_date.desc_en: Publish date of the post, format `mm/dd/yyyy hh:mm:ss`.
items.post_date.title_zh: 动态发布日期，格式 `mm/dd/yyyy hh:mm:ss`。

items.timestamp.desc_en: UTC timestamp when the item was published, format `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`.

version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号，如 `3.0.0`。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response envelope (DataForSEO global code, distinct from the per-task `tasks.status_code`); `20000` indicates the request was accepted successfully.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个响应信封的全局状态码（DataForSEO 全局编码，区别于单任务的 `tasks.status_code`）；`20000` 表示请求被成功受理。

tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the task belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径片段，便于追溯任务归属的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you supplied when posting the task, returned so you can correlate results with your input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你提交任务时所传的参数，便于将结果与输入对应起来。

result.desc_en: Array holding the actual data payload of the task.
result.title_zh: 承载任务实际数据的结果数组。

result.id.desc_en: UUID of a completed task that is ready for collection; pass it to the corresponding `task_get` endpoint.
result.id.title_zh: 已完成、可供领取的任务 UUID；将其传给对应的 `task_get` 接口即可取回结果。

result.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type echoed from the POST request.
result.se_type.title_zh: 回显自 POST 请求的搜索引擎类型。

result.se.desc_en: Search engine the completed task was set for.
result.se.title_zh: 该已完成任务所设定的搜索引擎。

result.date_posted.desc_en: UTC date when the task was originally posted.
result.date_posted.title_zh: 该任务最初提交的 UTC 日期。

result.tag.desc_en: Your own user-defined task identifier echoed back, so you can match ready tasks to your bookkeeping.
result.tag.title_zh: 回显你自定义的任务标识，便于将就绪任务与自有记录对应。

result.endpoint.desc_en: Ready-made endpoint path you can call to collect this task's results.
result.endpoint.title_zh: 可直接调用以领取该任务结果的接口路径。

keyword.desc_en: Search keyword identifying the local establishment; URL-encode it and keep it within the endpoint's character limit. Required when neither `cid` nor `place_id` is supplied.
keyword.title_zh: 用于定位本地商户的搜索关键词；需 URL 编码并遵守接口字符上限。未提供 `cid` 或 `place_id` 时此字段必填。

cid.desc_en: Google-defined unique ID of the business entity. Required when neither `keyword` nor `place_id` is supplied.
cid.title_zh: 商户实体的 Google 唯一标识（CID）。未提供 `keyword` 或 `place_id` 时此字段必填。

place_id.desc_en: Google Maps Place ID of the business entity. Required when neither `keyword` nor `cid` is supplied.
place_id.title_zh: 商户实体在 Google 地图中的 Place ID。未提供 `keyword` 或 `cid` 时此字段必填。

priority.desc_en: Task execution priority: `1` for normal priority, `2` for high priority (charged at a higher rate for faster handling).
priority.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 为普通优先级，`2` 为高优先级（按更高费率计费以加快处理）。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`) setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; valid values come from the matching Locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 完整地区名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`），用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Locations 接口。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; valid values come from the matching Locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 数字地区编码，用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Locations 接口。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates in `latitude,longitude` (optionally with a radius) setting the geographic context. Supply this or `location_name`/`location_code`.
location_coordinate.title_zh: GPS 坐标，格式 `latitude,longitude`（可附半径），用于设定地理范围。需与 `location_name`/`location_code` 择一提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name (e.g. `English`) for the search. Supply this or `language_code`; valid values come from the matching Languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索所用语言的完整名称（如 `English`）。需与 `language_code` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Languages 接口。

language_code.desc_en: Language code (e.g. `en`) for the search. Supply this or `language_name`; valid values come from the matching Languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索所用的语言代码（如 `en`）。需与 `language_name` 择一提供；可用取值来自对应的 Languages 接口。

depth.desc_en: Parsing depth: number of reviews to collect from the SERP. Set it in multiples of 20, since results are processed twenty at a time.
depth.title_zh: 解析深度：从 SERP 采集的评论数量。建议设为 20 的倍数，因系统每批处理 20 条。

sort_by.desc_en: Sorting of hotel-search results; values include `relevance`, `lowest_price`, `highest_rating`. For reviews, sorts review order.
sort_by.title_zh: 酒店搜索结果的排序方式，取值如 `relevance`、`lowest_price`、`highest_rating`。用于评论时则决定评论排序。

tag.desc_en: Your own task label (up to 255 characters), echoed back in the response `data` so you can correlate results with requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签（最多 255 个字符），会在响应 `data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求对应。

postback_url.desc_en: URL to which finished task results are POSTed (gzip-compressed). Use `$id`/`$tag` placeholders to have them substituted automatically.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后用于 POST 推送结果（gzip 压缩）的回调 URL。可用 `$id`/`$tag` 占位符自动替换。

pingback_url.desc_en: URL pinged via GET when the task completes, signalling that results are ready to collect. Supports `$id`/`$tag` placeholders.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时通过 GET 触达的通知 URL，用于提示结果已就绪。支持 `$id`/`$tag` 占位符。

version.desc_en: API version string that produced this response, e.g. `3.0.0`.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号，如 `3.0.0`。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response envelope (DataForSEO global code, distinct from the per-task `tasks.status_code`); `20000` indicates the request was accepted successfully.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个响应信封的全局状态码（DataForSEO 全局编码，区别于单任务的 `tasks.status_code`）；`20000` 表示请求被成功受理。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the envelope `status_code`; read it when troubleshooting a non-success code.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与信封 `status_code` 对应的可读说明；排查非成功状态码时参考此字段。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock processing time of the whole request, expressed in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 整个请求的处理耗时，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total money charged for all tasks in this response, in US dollars.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应内全部任务合计扣费，单位美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in `tasks` that finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's `status_code`.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，请逐一检查任务的 `status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per posted task, each holding its own status and `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表，每个对应一个提交的任务，分别携带各自的状态与 `result` 数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier (UUID). Reuse it on the matching `task_get` endpoint to fetch this task's results within the retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务唯一标识（UUID）。可在保留期内携带它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回本任务结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code in the 10000-60000 range; `20000` means the task completed successfully while other values signal task-level errors.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，取值区间 10000-60000；`20000` 表示任务成功，其它值代表任务级错误。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message explaining this task's `status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 解释该任务 `status_code` 的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Money charged for this individual task, in US dollars.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的扣费金额，单位美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

result.desc_en: Array holding the actual data payload of the task.
result.title_zh: 承载任务实际数据的结果数组。

targets.desc_en: Target page URLs (required), each an absolute URL including the scheme; up to 10 targets per request.
targets.title_zh: 目标页面 URL（必填），每个须为含协议头的绝对 URL；每次请求最多 10 个目标。

tag.desc_en: Your own task label (up to 255 characters), echoed back in the response `data` so you can correlate results with requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签（最多 255 个字符），会在响应 `data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求对应。

result.title_zh: 承载任务实际数据的结果数组。

result.type.desc_en: Element type tag of this result entry.
result.type.title_zh: 该结果条目的元素类型标记。

result.page_url.desc_en: Target page URL this data was collected for, echoed from the `targets` array.
result.page_url.title_zh: 采集该数据所针对的目标页面 URL，回显自 `targets` 数组。

result.pins_count.desc_en: Number of Pinterest saves (pins) made from the related `page_url` via the Pinterest Save Button.
result.pins_count.title_zh: 通过 Pinterest 保存按钮从对应 `page_url` 产生的收藏（pin）数量。
