tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的端点 URL 路径片段，便于追溯结果对应的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted for this task, returned so you can correlate the result with the original request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你为该任务提交的参数，便于将结果与原始请求对应起来。

result.desc_en: Result array; for this task-creation response the value is `null`.
result.title_zh: 结果数组；对于本任务创建响应，其值为 `null`。

version.desc_en: Top-level API metadata object describing this response, including the API version and the aggregated status, timing and cost of the request.
version.title_zh: 顶层 API 元数据对象，包含本次响应的 API 版本，以及整批请求的聚合状态、耗时与计费信息。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the whole request. Use it as the first signal of success or failure before reading the tasks array; the full code list is in the DataForSEO errors reference.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。读取 tasks 数组前应先用它判断请求整体成功或失败；完整状态码列表见 DataForSEO 错误码文档。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code, e.g. `Ok` or an error explanation.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码配套的可读说明信息，例如 `Ok` 或错误原因。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time the platform spent handling the whole request, in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 平台处理整个请求所花费的时间，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for all tasks in this response, in USD.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务对象数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in the `tasks` array that finished with an error; if greater than zero, inspect each task's own status code.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，应逐个检查任务自身的状态码。

tasks.desc_en: Array of task objects; each entry carries the per-task status plus its `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素携带单个任务的状态及其 `result` 结果数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier of this task in UUID format. Reuse it to fetch results from the matching `task_get` endpoint within the task's retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 本任务在系统中的唯一标识，UUID 格式。可在任务保留期内用它向对应的 `task_get` 端点拉取结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Status code of this individual task (range 10000-60000). A value in the 20000 range means success; other ranges signal queued, in-progress or error states.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（范围 10000-60000）。20000 区间表示成功，其它区间表示排队、处理中或错误等状态。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message describing the outcome of this task, paired with `tasks.status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 描述该任务处理结果的可读信息，与 `tasks.status_code` 配套。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent processing this task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 处理该任务所花费的时间，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the result belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的端点 URL 路径片段，便于追溯结果对应的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted for this task, returned so you can correlate the result with the original request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你为该任务提交的参数，便于将结果与原始请求对应起来。

result.desc_en: Array holding the actual payload of this task.
result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际结果数据的数组。

result.keyword.desc_en: Keyword echoed from the POST request.
result.keyword.title_zh: 从 POST 请求回显的关键词。

result.se_domain.desc_en: Search engine domain echoed from the POST request.
result.se_domain.title_zh: 从 POST 请求回显的搜索引擎域名。

result.check_url.desc_en: Direct URL to the search engine results page, so you can verify the data against the live SERP.
result.check_url.title_zh: 指向搜索引擎结果页的直达 URL，可用于将数据与实时 SERP 核对。

result.datetime.desc_en: UTC timestamp when the result was collected, formatted `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`.
result.datetime.title_zh: 结果采集的时间（UTC），格式为 `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`。

result.items_count.desc_en: Number of items in the results array; raise `depth` at task creation for more.
result.items_count.title_zh: 结果数组中的元素数量；创建任务时调大 `depth` 可获取更多。

items.desc_en: Trustpilot search listing results; raise `depth` at task creation for more.
items.title_zh: Trustpilot 搜索列表结果；创建任务时调大 `depth` 可获取更多。

items.rank_group.desc_en: Position of this entry within the group of elements sharing the same `type`.
items.rank_group.title_zh: 该条目在相同 `type` 元素分组内的位置。

items.rank_absolute.desc_en: Absolute rank among all the listed results.
items.rank_absolute.title_zh: 在全部已列出结果中的绝对排名。

items.url.desc_en: URL of the establishment on Trustpilot.
items.url.title_zh: 商家在 Trustpilot 上的 URL。

items.reviews_count.desc_en: Total number of reviews for the establishment.

items.rating.desc_en: Rating score of the establishment submitted by reviewers.
items.rating.title_zh: 评论者给出的该商家评分。

items.rating_type.desc_en: Scale used to express the rating; the business meaning is: `Max5` rated out of 5, `Percents` expressed as a percentage, `CustomMax` rated against a custom maximum.
items.rating_type.title_zh: 评分所采用的标度，业务含义为：`Max5` 表示满分 5 分制，`Percents` 表示百分比制，`CustomMax` 表示自定义满分制。

items.votes_count.desc_en: Number of votes the establishment received.

items.rating_max.desc_en: Maximum possible value for the given `rating_type` (for example 5 when the type is `Max5`).
items.rating_max.title_zh: 对应 `rating_type` 的最大可能取值（例如类型为 `Max5` 时为 5）。

id.desc_en: UUID of the task whose results you want to fetch. The task remains retrievable for 30 days after creation.
id.title_zh: 要拉取结果的任务 UUID。任务自创建起 30 天内可随时取回结果。

version.desc_en: Top-level API metadata object describing this response, including the API version and the aggregated status, timing and cost of the request.
version.title_zh: 顶层 API 元数据对象，包含本次响应的 API 版本，以及整批请求的聚合状态、耗时与计费信息。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the whole request. Use it as the first signal of success or failure before reading the tasks array; the full code list is in the DataForSEO errors reference.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。读取 tasks 数组前应先用它判断请求整体成功或失败；完整状态码列表见 DataForSEO 错误码文档。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code, e.g. `Ok` or an error explanation.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码配套的可读说明信息，例如 `Ok` 或错误原因。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time the platform spent handling the whole request, in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 平台处理整个请求所花费的时间，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for all tasks in this response, in USD.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务对象数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in the `tasks` array that finished with an error; if greater than zero, inspect each task's own status code.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，应逐个检查任务自身的状态码。

tasks.desc_en: Array of task objects; each entry carries the per-task status plus its `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素携带单个任务的状态及其 `result` 结果数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier of this task in UUID format. Reuse it to fetch results from the matching `task_get` endpoint within the task's retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 本任务在系统中的唯一标识，UUID 格式。可在任务保留期内用它向对应的 `task_get` 端点拉取结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Status code of this individual task (range 10000-60000). A value in the 20000 range means success; other ranges signal queued, in-progress or error states.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（范围 10000-60000）。20000 区间表示成功，其它区间表示排队、处理中或错误等状态。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message describing the outcome of this task, paired with `tasks.status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 描述该任务处理结果的可读信息，与 `tasks.status_code` 配套。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent processing this task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 处理该任务所花费的时间，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the result belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的端点 URL 路径片段，便于追溯结果对应的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted for this task, returned so you can correlate the result with the original request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你为该任务提交的参数，便于将结果与原始请求对应起来。

result.desc_en: Array holding the actual payload of this task.
result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际结果数据的数组。

result.id.desc_en: UUID of a completed task that is now ready to be collected; pass it to the matching `task_get` endpoint to download the results.
result.id.title_zh: 已完成、可供拉取的任务的 UUID；将其传给对应的 `task_get` 端点即可下载结果。

result.se.desc_en: Search engine the completed task was set for.
result.se.title_zh: 该已完成任务所针对的搜索引擎。

result.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the completed task was set for.
result.se_type.title_zh: 该已完成任务所针对的搜索引擎类型。

result.date_posted.desc_en: Timestamp (UTC) when the task was originally submitted.

result.tag.desc_en: User-defined label that was attached to the task when it was created, echoed back for matching.
result.tag.title_zh: 创建任务时附加的用户自定义标签，原样回显以便匹配。

result.endpoint.desc_en: Relative endpoint URL to call for collecting this completed task's results.
result.endpoint.title_zh: 用于拉取该已完成任务结果的相对端点 URL。

target.desc_en: Domain, subdomain or webpage whose backlink data you want. Specify a domain/subdomain without the `http(s)://` scheme and without `www.`; specify a page as an absolute URL including the scheme.
target.title_zh: 要查询外链数据的域名、子域名或网页。域名/子域名填写时去掉 `http(s)://` 和 `www.`；网页则填写含协议的完整绝对 URL。

limit.desc_en: Page size: how many items to return in this call. Combine with `offset` to page through the full result set.
limit.title_zh: 单页返回条数，配合 `offset` 翻页遍历完整结果集。

offset.desc_en: Number of leading items to skip before returning results, for offset-based pagination together with `limit`.
offset.title_zh: 返回前跳过的结果条数，与 `limit` 配合实现偏移分页。

internal_list_limit.desc_en: Caps how many elements are returned inside the nested aggregation arrays of each item (e.g. `referring_links_tld`, `referring_links_types`); lower it to keep responses small.
internal_list_limit.title_zh: 限制每个条目内嵌聚合数组（如 `referring_links_tld`、`referring_links_types`）的元素数量，调小可精简响应体。

backlinks_status_type.desc_en: Selects which backlinks feed both the returned list and the aggregated metrics: `all` counts every known link, `live` only links confirmed in the latest check, `lost` only links that have disappeared.
backlinks_status_type.title_zh: 决定纳入列表与聚合指标的外链范围：`all` 计入全部已知外链，`live` 仅最近一次检测仍存活的，`lost` 仅已消失的。

filters.desc_en: Conditions applied to the returned items, combined with `and`/`or` logical operators (up to 8). Reference any item field by name to narrow large result sets.
filters.title_zh: 对返回条目施加的筛选条件，用 `and`/`or` 组合（最多 8 条），可引用任意条目字段名以收窄大结果集。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules for the returned items; each rule pairs a field with `asc` or `desc`, up to three rules applied in order.
order_by.title_zh: 返回条目的排序规则，每条规则指定字段加 `asc`/`desc`，最多三条按顺序生效。

backlinks_filters.desc_en: Pre-filters the raw backlinks that go into the aggregated metrics for the target, so metrics can be computed over a custom subset (e.g. dofollow-only).
backlinks_filters.title_zh: 在计算目标聚合指标前先筛选原始外链，从而基于自定义子集（如仅 dofollow）计算指标。

include_subdomains.desc_en: When true, subdomains of the target are included in the search; set false to restrict analysis to the target host only.
include_subdomains.title_zh: 为 true 时把目标的子域名一并纳入检索；设为 false 则只分析目标主机本身。

include_indirect_links.desc_en: When true, results also count indirect links — links to a page that redirects to the target or points to the target's canonical page.
include_indirect_links.title_zh: 为 true 时一并统计间接链接，即指向「会重定向到目标」或「指向目标 canonical 页」的页面的链接。

exclude_internal_backlinks.desc_en: When true, links coming from the target's own subdomains are dropped so the same domain is not reported as its own referrer; set false to keep such internal links.
exclude_internal_backlinks.title_zh: 为 true 时剔除来自目标自身子域名的链接，避免目标域名成为自己的引荐方；设为 false 则保留这类内部链接。

rank_scale.desc_en: Chooses the numeric scale for all rank-style metrics (`rank`, `domain_from_rank`, `page_from_rank`): `one_hundred` for a 0–100 scale or `one_thousand` for a 0–1000 scale.
rank_scale.title_zh: 选择各类 rank 指标（`rank`、`domain_from_rank`、`page_from_rank`）的数值刻度：`one_hundred` 为 0–100，`one_thousand` 为 0–1000。

tag.desc_en: Free-text label you attach to the task to correlate it with its result; echoed back in the response `data` object.
tag.title_zh: 自定义任务标签，用于把任务与结果对应起来，会原样回显在响应的 `data` 对象中。

version.desc_en: DataForSEO API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response; a 20000-series value indicates success.
status_code.title_zh: 整个响应的状态码，20000 系列表示成功。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与整体状态码对应的可读说明。

time.desc_en: Total processing time for the response.
time.title_zh: 该响应的总处理耗时。

cost.desc_en: Total cost in account credits charged for this response.
cost.title_zh: 本次响应消耗的账户额度费用。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of tasks contained in this response.
tasks_count.title_zh: 本响应包含的任务数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in this response that ended in error.
tasks_error.title_zh: 本响应中执行出错的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: Array of task objects, one per requested task, each carrying its own status and result.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个请求任务一项，各自带有状态与结果。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier of the task, usable to retrieve it later.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识，可用于后续检索该任务。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response; a 20000-series value indicates success.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 整个响应的状态码，20000 系列表示成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与整体状态码对应的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Total processing time for the response.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该响应的总处理耗时。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total cost in account credits charged for this response.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本次响应消耗的账户额度费用。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of result entries returned for this task.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务返回的结果条数。

tasks.path.desc_en: API endpoint path the task was routed to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 该任务对应的 API 接口路径。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters this task was created with, including your `tag`.
tasks.data.title_zh: 创建该任务时所用参数的回显，包含你设置的 `tag`。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for the task; its shape depends on the endpoint.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果载荷，结构随接口而异。

tasks.result.target.desc_en: The target this result block refers to, echoing the requested domain/subdomain/page.
tasks.result.target.title_zh: 该结果块所对应的目标，回显请求的域名/子域名/页面。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of items matching the request, ignoring pagination.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 匹配请求的条目总数（不受分页影响）。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of items actually returned in this `items` array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本次 `items` 数组实际返回的条目数。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Array of result items; each element's fields depend on the endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 结果条目数组，元素字段随接口而异。

tasks.result.items.type.desc_en: Type marker of the item, identifying which result schema it follows.
tasks.result.items.type.title_zh: 条目类型标记，标识其遵循的结果结构。

tasks.result.items.anchor.desc_en: The anchor text used by the backlink(s); for the backlinks endpoint, the clickable text of this link.
tasks.result.items.anchor.title_zh: 外链所用的锚文本；在外链明细接口中即该链接的可点击文字。

tasks.result.items.rank.desc_en: Backlink-based authority score of the entity, on the chosen `rank_scale`; higher means stronger link authority.
tasks.result.items.rank.title_zh: 该实体基于外链的权重评分，按所选 `rank_scale` 计算，越高表示链接权重越强。

tasks.result.items.backlinks.desc_en: Number of backlinks pointing to the entity.
tasks.result.items.backlinks.title_zh: 指向该实体的外链数量。

tasks.result.items.first_seen.desc_en: Date the entity (link/anchor/page) was first discovered in the index.
tasks.result.items.first_seen.title_zh: 该实体（链接/锚文本/页面）首次被索引发现的日期。

tasks.result.items.lost_date.desc_en: Date the entity was detected as lost; null if it is still live.
tasks.result.items.lost_date.title_zh: 该实体被检测为丢失的日期；仍存活则为 null。

tasks.result.items.backlinks_spam_score.desc_en: Aggregated spam score of the entity's backlink profile; higher values flag riskier link sources.
tasks.result.items.backlinks_spam_score.title_zh: 该实体外链画像的聚合垃圾分，越高表示链接来源风险越大。

tasks.result.items.broken_backlinks.desc_en: Number of backlinks pointing to broken (non-resolving) pages of the entity.
tasks.result.items.broken_backlinks.title_zh: 指向该实体失效（无法访问）页面的外链数量。

tasks.result.items.broken_pages.desc_en: Number of the entity's pages that are broken but still receive backlinks.
tasks.result.items.broken_pages.title_zh: 该实体仍在接收外链但已失效的页面数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_domains.desc_en: Number of distinct domains linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.referring_domains.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_domains_nof.desc_en: Number of referring domains whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.referring_domains_nof.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.desc_en: Number of distinct main (root) domains linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同主（根）域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.desc_en: Number of referring main domains whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐主域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_ips.desc_en: Number of distinct IP addresses the backlinks originate from.
tasks.result.items.referring_ips.title_zh: 外链来源的不同 IP 地址数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_subnets.desc_en: Number of distinct subnets the backlinks originate from.
tasks.result.items.referring_subnets.title_zh: 外链来源的不同子网数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_pages.desc_en: Number of distinct pages linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.referring_pages.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同页面数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_tld.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the top-level domain of their source.
tasks.result.items.referring_links_tld.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源顶级域名（TLD）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_types.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by link type (e.g. anchor, image, redirect).
tasks.result.items.referring_links_types.title_zh: 引荐链接按链接类型（如锚文本、图片、重定向）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_attri.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by their HTML attributes (e.g. nofollow, sponsored).
tasks.result.items.referring_links_attri.title_zh: 引荐链接按其 HTML 属性（如 nofollow、sponsored）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_platf.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the platform type of their source site.
tasks.result.items.referring_links_platf.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源站点平台类型的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_seman.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the semantic location on the source page (e.g. content, footer).
tasks.result.items.referring_links_seman.title_zh: 引荐链接按其在来源页面上的语义位置（如正文、页脚）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_count.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the country of their source.
tasks.result.items.referring_links_count.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源国家/地区的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_pages_nofol.desc_en: Number of referring pages whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.referring_pages_nofol.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐页面数量。

target.desc_en: Domain, subdomain or webpage whose backlink data you want. Specify a domain/subdomain without the `http(s)://` scheme and without `www.`; specify a page as an absolute URL including the scheme.
target.title_zh: 要查询外链数据的域名、子域名或网页。域名/子域名填写时去掉 `http(s)://` 和 `www.`；网页则填写含协议的完整绝对 URL。

mode.desc_en: Grouping of the returned backlinks: `as_is` returns every backlink, `one_per_domain` keeps one per referring domain, `one_per_anchor` keeps one per anchor text.
mode.title_zh: 返回外链的分组方式：`as_is` 返回全部，`one_per_domain` 每个引荐域名保留一条，`one_per_anchor` 每种锚文本保留一条。

custom_mode.desc_en: Fine-grained grouping that returns a fixed number of backlinks per chosen field; when set it overrides `mode`.
custom_mode.title_zh: 更精细的分组，按指定字段返回固定条数的外链；设置后将覆盖 `mode`。

filters.desc_en: Conditions applied to the returned items, combined with `and`/`or` logical operators (up to 8). Reference any item field by name to narrow large result sets.
filters.title_zh: 对返回条目施加的筛选条件，用 `and`/`or` 组合（最多 8 条），可引用任意条目字段名以收窄大结果集。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules for the returned items; each rule pairs a field with `asc` or `desc`, up to three rules applied in order.
order_by.title_zh: 返回条目的排序规则，每条规则指定字段加 `asc`/`desc`，最多三条按顺序生效。

offset.desc_en: Number of leading items to skip before returning results, for offset-based pagination together with `limit`.
offset.title_zh: 返回前跳过的结果条数，与 `limit` 配合实现偏移分页。

search_after_token.desc_en: Continuation token for deep pagination beyond the 20,000-result offset cap. Pass the token from the previous response, keeping all other parameters identical, to fetch the next page.
search_after_token.title_zh: 用于突破 20,000 条偏移上限的深翻页续传令牌。传入上一次响应返回的令牌（其余参数须保持一致）即可取下一页。

limit.desc_en: Page size: how many items to return in this call. Combine with `offset` to page through the full result set.
limit.title_zh: 单页返回条数，配合 `offset` 翻页遍历完整结果集。

backlinks_status_type.desc_en: Selects which backlinks feed both the returned list and the aggregated metrics: `all` counts every known link, `live` only links confirmed in the latest check, `lost` only links that have disappeared.
backlinks_status_type.title_zh: 决定纳入列表与聚合指标的外链范围：`all` 计入全部已知外链，`live` 仅最近一次检测仍存活的，`lost` 仅已消失的。

include_subdomains.desc_en: When true, subdomains of the target are included in the search; set false to restrict analysis to the target host only.
include_subdomains.title_zh: 为 true 时把目标的子域名一并纳入检索；设为 false 则只分析目标主机本身。

exclude_internal_backlinks.desc_en: When true, links coming from the target's own subdomains are dropped so the same domain is not reported as its own referrer; set false to keep such internal links.
exclude_internal_backlinks.title_zh: 为 true 时剔除来自目标自身子域名的链接，避免目标域名成为自己的引荐方；设为 false 则保留这类内部链接。

rank_scale.desc_en: Chooses the numeric scale for all rank-style metrics (`rank`, `domain_from_rank`, `page_from_rank`): `one_hundred` for a 0–100 scale or `one_thousand` for a 0–1000 scale.
rank_scale.title_zh: 选择各类 rank 指标（`rank`、`domain_from_rank`、`page_from_rank`）的数值刻度：`one_hundred` 为 0–100，`one_thousand` 为 0–1000。

tag.desc_en: Free-text label you attach to the task to correlate it with its result; echoed back in the response `data` object.
tag.title_zh: 自定义任务标签，用于把任务与结果对应起来，会原样回显在响应的 `data` 对象中。

version.desc_en: DataForSEO API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response; a 20000-series value indicates success.
status_code.title_zh: 整个响应的状态码，20000 系列表示成功。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与整体状态码对应的可读说明。

time.desc_en: Total processing time for the response.
time.title_zh: 该响应的总处理耗时。

cost.desc_en: Total cost in account credits charged for this response.
cost.title_zh: 本次响应消耗的账户额度费用。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of tasks contained in this response.
tasks_count.title_zh: 本响应包含的任务数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in this response that ended in error.
tasks_error.title_zh: 本响应中执行出错的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: Array of task objects, one per requested task, each carrying its own status and result.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个请求任务一项，各自带有状态与结果。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier of the task, usable to retrieve it later.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识，可用于后续检索该任务。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response; a 20000-series value indicates success.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 整个响应的状态码，20000 系列表示成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与整体状态码对应的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Total processing time for the response.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该响应的总处理耗时。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total cost in account credits charged for this response.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本次响应消耗的账户额度费用。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of result entries returned for this task.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务返回的结果条数。

tasks.path.desc_en: API endpoint path the task was routed to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 该任务对应的 API 接口路径。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters this task was created with, including your `tag`.
tasks.data.title_zh: 创建该任务时所用参数的回显，包含你设置的 `tag`。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for the task; its shape depends on the endpoint.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果载荷，结构随接口而异。

tasks.result.target.desc_en: The target this result block refers to, echoing the requested domain/subdomain/page.
tasks.result.target.title_zh: 该结果块所对应的目标，回显请求的域名/子域名/页面。

tasks.result.mode.desc_en: Grouping mode that was applied to these results, echoing the request.
tasks.result.mode.title_zh: 应用于这些结果的分组模式，回显请求。

tasks.result.custom_mode.desc_en: Custom grouping that was applied, echoing the request.
tasks.result.custom_mode.title_zh: 应用的自定义分组，回显请求。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of items matching the request, ignoring pagination.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 匹配请求的条目总数（不受分页影响）。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of items actually returned in this `items` array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本次 `items` 数组实际返回的条目数。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Array of result items; each element's fields depend on the endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 结果条目数组，元素字段随接口而异。

tasks.result.items.type.desc_en: Type marker of the item, identifying which result schema it follows.
tasks.result.items.type.title_zh: 条目类型标记，标识其遵循的结果结构。

tasks.result.items.domain_from.desc_en: Domain of the page that hosts the backlink (the source).
tasks.result.items.domain_from.title_zh: 承载该外链的来源页面所在域名。

tasks.result.items.url_from.desc_en: Full URL of the source page that contains the backlink.
tasks.result.items.url_from.title_zh: 包含该外链的来源页面完整 URL。

tasks.result.items.url_from_https.desc_en: Whether the source URL uses HTTPS.
tasks.result.items.url_from_https.title_zh: 来源 URL 是否使用 HTTPS。

tasks.result.items.domain_to.desc_en: Domain the backlink points to (the target side).
tasks.result.items.domain_to.title_zh: 该外链所指向的目标侧域名。

tasks.result.items.url_to.desc_en: Full URL the backlink points to.
tasks.result.items.url_to.title_zh: 该外链指向的完整 URL。

tasks.result.items.url_to_https.desc_en: Whether the destination URL uses HTTPS.
tasks.result.items.url_to_https.title_zh: 目标 URL 是否使用 HTTPS。

tasks.result.items.tld_from.desc_en: Top-level domain of the source page.

tasks.result.items.is_new.desc_en: Whether this backlink was newly discovered in the latest check.
tasks.result.items.is_new.title_zh: 该外链是否为最近一次检测新发现。

tasks.result.items.is_lost.desc_en: Whether this backlink has been detected as lost.
tasks.result.items.is_lost.title_zh: 该外链是否已被检测为丢失。

tasks.result.items.backlink_spam_score.desc_en: Spam score of this individual backlink; higher values flag a riskier source.
tasks.result.items.backlink_spam_score.title_zh: 该条外链的垃圾分，越高表示来源风险越大。

tasks.result.items.rank.desc_en: Backlink-based authority score of the entity, on the chosen `rank_scale`; higher means stronger link authority.
tasks.result.items.rank.title_zh: 该实体基于外链的权重评分，按所选 `rank_scale` 计算，越高表示链接权重越强。

tasks.result.items.page_from_rank.desc_en: Authority score of the source page, on the chosen `rank_scale`.
tasks.result.items.page_from_rank.title_zh: 来源页面的权重评分，按 `rank_scale` 计算。

tasks.result.items.domain_from_rank.desc_en: Authority score of the source domain, on the chosen `rank_scale`.
tasks.result.items.domain_from_rank.title_zh: 来源域名的权重评分，按 `rank_scale` 计算。

tasks.result.items.domain_from_platform_.desc_en: Platform type(s) detected for the source domain (e.g. cms, blogs).
tasks.result.items.domain_from_platform_.title_zh: 来源域名检测到的平台类型（如 cms、blogs）。

tasks.result.items.domain_from_is_ip.desc_en: Whether the source is addressed by a bare IP rather than a domain name.
tasks.result.items.domain_from_is_ip.title_zh: 来源是否以裸 IP（而非域名）寻址。

tasks.result.items.domain_from_ip.desc_en: IP address of the source domain.
tasks.result.items.domain_from_ip.title_zh: 来源域名的 IP 地址。

tasks.result.items.domain_from_country.desc_en: Country associated with the source domain.
tasks.result.items.domain_from_country.title_zh: 来源域名关联的国家/地区。

tasks.result.items.page_from_external_li.desc_en: Number of external links on the source page.
tasks.result.items.page_from_external_li.title_zh: 来源页面上的外部链接数量。

tasks.result.items.page_from_internal_li.desc_en: Number of internal links on the source page.
tasks.result.items.page_from_internal_li.title_zh: 来源页面上的内部链接数量。

tasks.result.items.page_from_size.desc_en: Size of the source page in bytes.

tasks.result.items.page_from_encoding.desc_en: Character encoding of the source page.

tasks.result.items.page_from_language.desc_en: Detected language of the source page.
tasks.result.items.page_from_language.title_zh: 来源页面检测到的语言。

tasks.result.items.page_from_status_code.desc_en: HTTP status code returned by the source page when last fetched.
tasks.result.items.page_from_status_code.title_zh: 最近一次抓取来源页面返回的 HTTP 状态码。

tasks.result.items.first_seen.desc_en: Date the entity (link/anchor/page) was first discovered in the index.
tasks.result.items.first_seen.title_zh: 该实体（链接/锚文本/页面）首次被索引发现的日期。

tasks.result.items.prev_seen.desc_en: Date of the previous time the entity was seen before the most recent check.
tasks.result.items.prev_seen.title_zh: 最近一次检测之前，该实体上一次被发现的日期。

tasks.result.items.last_seen.desc_en: Most recent date the entity was confirmed present.
tasks.result.items.last_seen.title_zh: 该实体最近一次被确认存在的日期。

tasks.result.items.item_type.desc_en: Specific type of this backlink record (e.g. anchor, redirect, image).
tasks.result.items.item_type.title_zh: 该外链记录的具体类型（如锚文本、重定向、图片）。

tasks.result.items.attributes.desc_en: HTML rel attributes of the link (e.g. nofollow, ugc, sponsored).
tasks.result.items.attributes.title_zh: 链接的 HTML rel 属性（如 nofollow、ugc、sponsored）。

tasks.result.items.dofollow.desc_en: Whether the link passes authority (true = dofollow, false = nofollow).
tasks.result.items.dofollow.title_zh: 该链接是否传递权重（true 为 dofollow，false 为 nofollow）。

tasks.result.items.original.desc_en: Whether this is the original link as opposed to a duplicate occurrence.
tasks.result.items.original.title_zh: 该链接是否为原始链接（而非重复出现）。

tasks.result.items.alt.desc_en: Alt text of the link when it is an image link.
tasks.result.items.alt.title_zh: 图片链接时该链接的 alt 文本。

tasks.result.items.image_url.desc_en: URL of the image when the backlink is an image link.
tasks.result.items.image_url.title_zh: 图片外链时所用图片的 URL。

tasks.result.items.anchor.desc_en: The anchor text used by the backlink(s); for the backlinks endpoint, the clickable text of this link.
tasks.result.items.anchor.title_zh: 外链所用的锚文本；在外链明细接口中即该链接的可点击文字。

tasks.result.items.text_pre.desc_en: Text appearing immediately before the anchor on the source page.
tasks.result.items.text_pre.title_zh: 来源页面上锚文本前紧邻的文字。

tasks.result.items.text_post.desc_en: Text appearing immediately after the anchor on the source page.
tasks.result.items.text_post.title_zh: 来源页面上锚文本后紧邻的文字。

tasks.result.items.semantic_location.desc_en: Semantic location of the link on the source page (e.g. content, header, footer).
tasks.result.items.semantic_location.title_zh: 链接在来源页面上的语义位置（如正文、页眉、页脚）。

tasks.result.items.links_count.desc_en: Number of links from the source page to the target.
tasks.result.items.links_count.title_zh: 来源页面指向目标的链接数量。

tasks.result.items.group_count.desc_en: Number of grouped duplicate links represented by this record.
tasks.result.items.group_count.title_zh: 该记录所代表的合并重复链接数量。

tasks.result.items.is_broken.desc_en: Whether the link is broken (its destination does not resolve).
tasks.result.items.is_broken.title_zh: 该链接是否失效（目标无法访问）。

tasks.result.items.url_to_status_code.desc_en: HTTP status code returned by the destination URL.
tasks.result.items.url_to_status_code.title_zh: 目标 URL 返回的 HTTP 状态码。

tasks.result.items.url_to_spam_score.desc_en: Spam score of the destination URL.
tasks.result.items.url_to_spam_score.title_zh: 目标 URL 的垃圾分。

tasks.result.items.url_to_redirect_targe.desc_en: Final URL the destination redirects to, if any.
tasks.result.items.url_to_redirect_targe.title_zh: 目标若发生重定向，则最终跳转到的 URL。

tasks.result.items.is_indirect_link.desc_en: Whether the link reaches the target indirectly via a redirect or canonical chain.
tasks.result.items.is_indirect_link.title_zh: 该链接是否经由重定向或 canonical 链间接到达目标。

tasks.result.items.indirect_link_path.desc_en: The redirect/canonical hops the indirect link passes through to reach the target.
tasks.result.items.indirect_link_path.title_zh: 间接链接到达目标所经过的重定向/canonical 跳转路径。

tasks.result.items.indirect_link_path.ty.desc_en: Type marker of the item, identifying which result schema it follows.
tasks.result.items.indirect_link_path.ty.title_zh: 条目类型标记，标识其遵循的结果结构。

tasks.result.items.indirect_link_path.st.desc_en: Overall status code of the response; a 20000-series value indicates success.
tasks.result.items.indirect_link_path.st.title_zh: 整个响应的状态码，20000 系列表示成功。

tasks.result.items.indirect_link_path.ur.desc_en: URL of the page this item describes.
tasks.result.items.indirect_link_path.ur.title_zh: 该条目所描述页面的 URL。

tasks.result.search_after_token.desc_en: Token to pass as `search_after_token` in the next request to continue deep pagination.
tasks.result.search_after_token.title_zh: 用于下一次请求作为 `search_after_token` 续传深翻页的令牌。

targets.desc_en: Set of domains, subdomains or webpages to query in one bulk request, each formatted the same way as `target`.
targets.title_zh: 单次批量请求要查询的一组域名、子域名或网页，每项格式与 `target` 相同。

tag.desc_en: Free-text label you attach to the task to correlate it with its result; echoed back in the response `data` object.
tag.title_zh: 自定义任务标签，用于把任务与结果对应起来，会原样回显在响应的 `data` 对象中。

version.desc_en: DataForSEO API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response; a 20000-series value indicates success.
status_code.title_zh: 整个响应的状态码，20000 系列表示成功。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与整体状态码对应的可读说明。

time.desc_en: Total processing time for the response.
time.title_zh: 该响应的总处理耗时。

cost.title_zh: 本次响应消耗的账户额度费用。

tasks_count.title_zh: 本响应包含的任务数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in this response that ended in error.
tasks_error.title_zh: 本响应中执行出错的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: Array of task objects, one per requested task, each carrying its own status and result.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个请求任务一项，各自带有状态与结果。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier of the task, usable to retrieve it later.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识，可用于后续检索该任务。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response; a 20000-series value indicates success.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 整个响应的状态码，20000 系列表示成功。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与整体状态码对应的可读说明。

tasks.time.desc_en: Total processing time for the response.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该响应的总处理耗时。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total cost in account credits charged for this response.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本次响应消耗的账户额度费用。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of result entries returned for this task.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务返回的结果条数。

tasks.path.desc_en: API endpoint path the task was routed to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 该任务对应的 API 接口路径。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters this task was created with, including your `tag`.
tasks.data.title_zh: 创建该任务时所用参数的回显，包含你设置的 `tag`。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for the task; its shape depends on the endpoint.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果载荷，结构随接口而异。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of items actually returned in this `items` array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本次 `items` 数组实际返回的条目数。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Array of result items; each element's fields depend on the endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 结果条目数组，元素字段随接口而异。

tasks.result.items.target.desc_en: The target this row reports on, echoing one of the requested `targets`.
tasks.result.items.target.title_zh: 该行所统计的目标，回显请求 `targets` 中的某一项。

tasks.result.items.backlinks.desc_en: Number of backlinks pointing to the entity.
tasks.result.items.backlinks.title_zh: 指向该实体的外链数量。

targets.desc_en: Set of domains, subdomains or webpages to query in one bulk request, each formatted the same way as `target`.
targets.title_zh: 单次批量请求要查询的一组域名、子域名或网页，每项格式与 `target` 相同。

date_from.desc_en: Start of the time range (format `yyyy-mm-dd`); if omitted, the endpoint's minimum supported date is used.
date_from.title_zh: 时间范围起始日期（格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`）；不填则使用该接口支持的最小日期。

tag.desc_en: Free-text label you attach to the task to correlate it with its result; echoed back in the response `data` object.
tag.title_zh: 自定义任务标签，用于把任务与结果对应起来，会原样回显在响应的 `data` 对象中。

version.desc_en: DataForSEO API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code of the response; a 20000-series value indicates success.
status_code.title_zh: 整个响应的状态码，20000 系列表示成功。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与整体状态码对应的可读说明。

include_subdomains.title_zh: 为 true 时把目标的子域名一并纳入检索；设为 false 则只分析目标主机本身。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of items matching the request, ignoring pagination.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 匹配请求的条目总数（不受分页影响）。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of items actually returned in this `items` array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本次 `items` 数组实际返回的条目数。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Array of result items; each element's fields depend on the endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 结果条目数组，元素字段随接口而异。

tasks.result.items.type.desc_en: Type marker of the item, identifying which result schema it follows.
tasks.result.items.type.title_zh: 条目类型标记，标识其遵循的结果结构。

tasks.result.items.url.desc_en: URL of the page this item describes.
tasks.result.items.url.title_zh: 该条目所描述页面的 URL。

tasks.result.items.rank.desc_en: Backlink-based authority score of the entity, on the chosen `rank_scale`; higher means stronger link authority.
tasks.result.items.rank.title_zh: 该实体基于外链的权重评分，按所选 `rank_scale` 计算，越高表示链接权重越强。

tasks.result.items.main_domain_rank.desc_en: Backlink-based authority score of the entity's main domain, on the chosen `rank_scale`.
tasks.result.items.main_domain_rank.title_zh: 该实体所属主域名基于外链的权重评分，按 `rank_scale` 计算。

tasks.result.items.backlinks.desc_en: Number of backlinks pointing to the entity.
tasks.result.items.backlinks.title_zh: 指向该实体的外链数量。

tasks.result.items.first_seen.desc_en: Date the entity (link/anchor/page) was first discovered in the index.
tasks.result.items.first_seen.title_zh: 该实体（链接/锚文本/页面）首次被索引发现的日期。

tasks.result.items.lost_date.desc_en: Date the entity was detected as lost; null if it is still live.
tasks.result.items.lost_date.title_zh: 该实体被检测为丢失的日期；仍存活则为 null。

tasks.result.items.backlinks_spam_score.desc_en: Aggregated spam score of the entity's backlink profile; higher values flag riskier link sources.
tasks.result.items.backlinks_spam_score.title_zh: 该实体外链画像的聚合垃圾分，越高表示链接来源风险越大。

tasks.result.items.broken_backlinks.desc_en: Number of backlinks pointing to broken (non-resolving) pages of the entity.
tasks.result.items.broken_backlinks.title_zh: 指向该实体失效（无法访问）页面的外链数量。

tasks.result.items.broken_pages.desc_en: Number of the entity's pages that are broken but still receive backlinks.
tasks.result.items.broken_pages.title_zh: 该实体仍在接收外链但已失效的页面数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_domains.desc_en: Number of distinct domains linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.referring_domains.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_domains_nof.desc_en: Number of referring domains whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.referring_domains_nof.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.desc_en: Number of distinct main (root) domains linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同主（根）域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.desc_en: Number of referring main domains whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐主域名数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_ips.desc_en: Number of distinct IP addresses the backlinks originate from.
tasks.result.items.referring_ips.title_zh: 外链来源的不同 IP 地址数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_subnets.desc_en: Number of distinct subnets the backlinks originate from.
tasks.result.items.referring_subnets.title_zh: 外链来源的不同子网数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_pages.desc_en: Number of distinct pages linking to the entity.
tasks.result.items.referring_pages.title_zh: 链向该实体的不同页面数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_pages_nofol.desc_en: Number of referring pages whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.referring_pages_nofol.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐页面数量。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_tld.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the top-level domain of their source.
tasks.result.items.referring_links_tld.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源顶级域名（TLD）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_types.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by link type (e.g. anchor, image, redirect).
tasks.result.items.referring_links_types.title_zh: 引荐链接按链接类型（如锚文本、图片、重定向）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_attri.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by their HTML attributes (e.g. nofollow, sponsored).
tasks.result.items.referring_links_attri.title_zh: 引荐链接按其 HTML 属性（如 nofollow、sponsored）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_platf.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the platform type of their source site.
tasks.result.items.referring_links_platf.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源站点平台类型的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_seman.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the semantic location on the source page (e.g. content, footer).
tasks.result.items.referring_links_seman.title_zh: 引荐链接按其在来源页面上的语义位置（如正文、页脚）的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_links_count.desc_en: Breakdown of referring links by the country of their source.
tasks.result.items.referring_links_count.title_zh: 引荐链接按来源国家/地区的分布。

tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.desc_en: Number of distinct main (root) domains linking to the entity.

tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.desc_en: Number of referring main domains whose links are all nofollow.
tasks.result.items.referring_main_domain.title_zh: 链接全为 nofollow 的引荐主域名数量。

targets.title_zh: 单次批量请求要查询的一组域名、子域名或网页，每项格式与 `target` 相同。

tasks.result.items.target.desc_en: The target this row reports on, echoing one of the requested `targets`.
tasks.result.items.target.title_zh: 该行所统计的目标，回显请求 `targets` 中的某一项。

tasks.result.items.spam_score.desc_en: Spam score of the target's backlink profile; higher values flag riskier link sources.
tasks.result.items.spam_score.title_zh: 目标外链画像的垃圾分，越高表示链接来源风险越大。

target.desc_en: Domain, subdomain or webpage whose backlink data you want. Specify a domain/subdomain without the `http(s)://` scheme and without `www.`; specify a page as an absolute URL including the scheme.
target.title_zh: 要查询外链数据的域名、子域名或网页。域名/子域名填写时去掉 `http(s)://` 和 `www.`；网页则填写含协议的完整绝对 URL。

limit.desc_en: Page size: how many items to return in this call. Combine with `offset` to page through the full result set.
limit.title_zh: 单页返回条数，配合 `offset` 翻页遍历完整结果集。

offset.desc_en: Number of leading competitor domains to skip before returning results, for paging with `limit`.
offset.title_zh: 返回前跳过的竞争对手域名条数，与 `limit` 配合翻页。

filters.desc_en: Conditions applied to the returned items, combined with `and`/`or` logical operators (up to 8). Reference any item field by name to narrow large result sets.
filters.title_zh: 对返回条目施加的筛选条件，用 `and`/`or` 组合（最多 8 条），可引用任意条目字段名以收窄大结果集。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules for the returned items; each rule pairs a field with `asc` or `desc`, up to three rules applied in order.
order_by.title_zh: 返回条目的排序规则，每条规则指定字段加 `asc`/`desc`，最多三条按顺序生效。

main_domain.desc_en: When true, only the main domain of the target is considered when searching for competitors.
main_domain.title_zh: 为 true 时仅以目标的主域名参与竞争对手检索。

exclude_large_domains.desc_en: When true, very large generic domains (e.g. google.com, amazon.com) are omitted from competitor results.
exclude_large_domains.title_zh: 为 true 时从竞争对手结果中剔除超大型通用域名（如 google.com、amazon.com）。

exclude_internal_backlinks.desc_en: When true, links coming from the target's own subdomains are dropped so the same domain is not reported as its own referrer; set false to keep such internal links.
exclude_internal_backlinks.title_zh: 为 true 时剔除来自目标自身子域名的链接，避免目标域名成为自己的引荐方；设为 false 则保留这类内部链接。

rank_scale.desc_en: Chooses the numeric scale for all rank-style metrics (`rank`, `domain_from_rank`, `page_from_rank`): `one_hundred` for a 0–100 scale or `one_thousand` for a 0–1000 scale.
rank_scale.title_zh: 选择各类 rank 指标（`rank`、`domain_from_rank`、`page_from_rank`）的数值刻度：`one_hundred` 为 0–100，`one_thousand` 为 0–1000。

tag.desc_en: Free-text label you attach to the task to correlate it with its result; echoed back in the response `data` object.
tag.title_zh: 自定义任务标签，用于把任务与结果对应起来，会原样回显在响应的 `data` 对象中。

tasks.status_code.title_zh: 整个响应的状态码，20000 系列表示成功。

tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与整体状态码对应的可读说明。

tasks.time.title_zh: 该响应的总处理耗时。

tasks.path.title_zh: 该任务对应的 API 接口路径。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters this task was created with, including your `tag`.
tasks.data.title_zh: 创建该任务时所用参数的回显，包含你设置的 `tag`。

tasks.result.desc_en: Result payload for the task; its shape depends on the endpoint.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果载荷，结构随接口而异。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of items matching the request, ignoring pagination.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 匹配请求的条目总数（不受分页影响）。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of items actually returned in this `items` array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本次 `items` 数组实际返回的条目数。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Array of result items; each element's fields depend on the endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 结果条目数组，元素字段随接口而异。

tasks.result.items.type.desc_en: Type marker of the item, identifying which result schema it follows.
tasks.result.items.type.title_zh: 条目类型标记，标识其遵循的结果结构。

tasks.result.items.target.desc_en: The target this row reports on, echoing one of the requested `targets`.
tasks.result.items.target.title_zh: 该行所统计的目标，回显请求 `targets` 中的某一项。

tasks.result.items.rank.desc_en: Backlink-based authority score of the entity, on the chosen `rank_scale`; higher means stronger link authority.
tasks.result.items.rank.title_zh: 该实体基于外链的权重评分，按所选 `rank_scale` 计算，越高表示链接权重越强。

tasks.result.items.intersections.desc_en: Number of referring domains this competitor shares with the target.
tasks.result.items.intersections.title_zh: 该竞争对手与目标共有的引荐域名数量。

targets.desc_en: Set of domains, subdomains or webpages to query in one bulk request, each formatted the same way as `target`.
targets.title_zh: 单次批量请求要查询的一组域名、子域名或网页，每项格式与 `target` 相同。

exclude_targets.desc_en: Targets to exclude: results keep only referrers that link to `targets` but not to any entry here, useful for finding link gaps unique to your set.
exclude_targets.title_zh: 要排除的目标：结果只保留链向 `targets` 但不链向本列表任一项的引荐方，便于发现专属于目标集的链接缺口。

filters.desc_en: Conditions applied to the returned items, combined with `and`/`or` logical operators (up to 8). Reference any item field by name to narrow large result sets.
filters.title_zh: 对返回条目施加的筛选条件，用 `and`/`or` 组合（最多 8 条），可引用任意条目字段名以收窄大结果集。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules for the returned items; each rule pairs a field with `asc` or `desc`, up to three rules applied in order.
order_by.title_zh: 返回条目的排序规则，每条规则指定字段加 `asc`/`desc`，最多三条按顺序生效。

offset.desc_en: Number of leading items to skip before returning results, for offset-based pagination together with `limit`.
offset.title_zh: 返回前跳过的结果条数，与 `limit` 配合实现偏移分页。

limit.desc_en: Page size: how many items to return in this call. Combine with `offset` to page through the full result set.
limit.title_zh: 单页返回条数，配合 `offset` 翻页遍历完整结果集。

internal_list_limit.desc_en: Caps how many elements are returned inside the nested aggregation arrays of each item (e.g. `referring_links_tld`, `referring_links_types`); lower it to keep responses small.
internal_list_limit.title_zh: 限制每个条目内嵌聚合数组（如 `referring_links_tld`、`referring_links_types`）的元素数量，调小可精简响应体。

backlinks_status_type.desc_en: Selects which backlinks feed both the returned list and the aggregated metrics: `all` counts every known link, `live` only links confirmed in the latest check, `lost` only links that have disappeared.
backlinks_status_type.title_zh: 决定纳入列表与聚合指标的外链范围：`all` 计入全部已知外链，`live` 仅最近一次检测仍存活的，`lost` 仅已消失的。

backlinks_filters.desc_en: Pre-filters the raw backlinks that go into the aggregated metrics for the target, so metrics can be computed over a custom subset (e.g. dofollow-only).
backlinks_filters.title_zh: 在计算目标聚合指标前先筛选原始外链，从而基于自定义子集（如仅 dofollow）计算指标。

include_subdomains.desc_en: When true, subdomains of the target are included in the search; set false to restrict analysis to the target host only.
include_subdomains.title_zh: 为 true 时把目标的子域名一并纳入检索；设为 false 则只分析目标主机本身。

include_indirect_links.desc_en: When true, results also count indirect links — links to a page that redirects to the target or points to the target's canonical page.
include_indirect_links.title_zh: 为 true 时一并统计间接链接，即指向「会重定向到目标」或「指向目标 canonical 页」的页面的链接。

exclude_internal_backlinks.desc_en: When true, links coming from the target's own subdomains are dropped so the same domain is not reported as its own referrer; set false to keep such internal links.
exclude_internal_backlinks.title_zh: 为 true 时剔除来自目标自身子域名的链接，避免目标域名成为自己的引荐方；设为 false 则保留这类内部链接。

intersection_mode.desc_en: How results across the specified targets are combined: `all` bases results on all backlinks, `partial` only on backlinks shared across targets.
intersection_mode.title_zh: 多个目标结果的合并方式：`all` 基于全部外链，`partial` 仅基于目标间共有的外链。

rank_scale.desc_en: Chooses the numeric scale for all rank-style metrics (`rank`, `domain_from_rank`, `page_from_rank`): `one_hundred` for a 0–100 scale or `one_thousand` for a 0–1000 scale.
rank_scale.title_zh: 选择各类 rank 指标（`rank`、`domain_from_rank`、`page_from_rank`）的数值刻度：`one_hundred` 为 0–100，`one_thousand` 为 0–1000。

tag.desc_en: Free-text label you attach to the task to correlate it with its result; echoed back in the response `data` object.
tag.title_zh: 自定义任务标签，用于把任务与结果对应起来，会原样回显在响应的 `data` 对象中。

version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号。

status_code.title_zh: 整个响应的状态码，20000 系列表示成功。

tasks_count.title_zh: 本响应包含的任务数量。

tasks_error.title_zh: 本响应中执行出错的任务数量。

tasks.id.title_zh: 任务的唯一标识，可用于后续检索该任务。
