version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本；便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_code.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole call. `20000` means the call succeeded; any other value signals a request-level failure that occurred before per-task processing.
status_code.title_zh: 整次调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用成功；其他值代表在进入单任务处理前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message paired with `status_code`; read it to learn the cause when `status_code` is not a success value.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时据此定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD; free listing endpoints (languages/locations/filters/categories/technologies) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；languages/locations/filters/categories/technologies 等免费列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `tasks.status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `tasks.status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Array holding the individual task results of this call; the Live endpoints submit one task per call, so expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 承载本次调用各任务结果的数组；Live 接口每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks.id.desc_en: UUID identifying this task within DataForSEO's system; use it to correlate the result with your request.
tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的 UUID 标识；可用于将结果与请求对应。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000). `20000` means the task completed successfully; other values indicate this specific task failed.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单任务状态码（范围 10000-60000）。`20000` 表示该任务成功完成；其他值表示此任务失败。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

tasks.time.desc_en: Execution time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单任务的执行耗时，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `tasks.result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `tasks.result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API path segments that were called, echoing how the request was routed.
tasks.path.title_zh: 本次调用的 API 路径分段，回显请求的路由方式。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters passed in the GET request URL, useful for correlating the response with its input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显 GET 请求 URL 中传入的参数，便于将响应与其输入对应。

tasks.result.groups.desc_en: Array of top-level technology groups, each grouping related categories and technologies.
tasks.result.groups.title_zh: 顶层技术分组数组，每个分组聚合相关的类别与技术。

tasks.result.groups.id.desc_en: Identifier of the technology group; pass it as the `group` (or `groups`) request field on the technology query endpoints. Example: marketing, sales.
tasks.result.groups.id.title_zh: 技术分组的标识；可作为请求字段 `group`（或 `groups`）传入技术查询接口。示例：marketing、sales。

tasks.result.groups.title.desc_en: Human-readable display name of the technology group.
tasks.result.groups.title.title_zh: 技术分组的可读显示名称。

tasks.result.groups.categories.desc_en: Technology categories that belong to this group.
tasks.result.groups.categories.title_zh: 归属于该分组的技术类别。

tasks.result.groups.categories.id.desc_en: Identifier of the technology category; pass it as the `category` (or `categories`) request field. Example: crm, cart_abandonment.
tasks.result.groups.categories.id.title_zh: 技术类别的标识；可作为请求字段 `category`（或 `categories`）传入。示例：crm、cart_abandonment。

tasks.result.groups.categories.path.desc_en: Dotted path locating the category within the group hierarchy. Example: user_generated_content.content_curation.
tasks.result.groups.categories.path.title_zh: 在分组层级中定位该类别的点号路径。示例：user_generated_content.content_curation。

tasks.result.groups.categories.title.desc_en: Human-readable display name of the technology category.
tasks.result.groups.categories.title.title_zh: 技术类别的可读显示名称。

tasks.result.groups.categories.technolog.desc_en: Names of the individual technologies in this category; pass a name as the `technology` (or `technologies`) request field. Example: "Salesforce", "CareCart".
tasks.result.groups.categories.technolog.title_zh: 该类别下各项技术的名称；可将名称作为请求字段 `technology`（或 `technologies`）传入。示例："Salesforce"、"CareCart"。

technology_paths.desc_en: Technology paths to query; one of technology_paths, groups, categories, technologies or keywords must be set. Each path pinpoints a technology within the group/category hierarchy.
technology_paths.title_zh: 要查询的技术路径；technology_paths、groups、categories、technologies、keywords 至少需设置其一。每条路径在分组/类别层级中精确定位一项技术。

groups.desc_en: Technology group ids to query; one of technology_paths, groups, categories, technologies or keywords must be set. Find valid ids via the technologies endpoint.
groups.title_zh: 要查询的技术分组 id；technology_paths、groups、categories、technologies、keywords 至少需设置其一。有效 id 见 technologies 接口。

categories.desc_en: Technology category ids to query; one of technology_paths, groups, categories, technologies or keywords must be set. Find valid ids via the technologies endpoint.
categories.title_zh: 要查询的技术类别 id；technology_paths、groups、categories、technologies、keywords 至少需设置其一。有效 id 见 technologies 接口。

technologies.desc_en: Technology names to query; one of technology_paths, groups, categories, technologies or keywords must be set. Find valid names via the technologies endpoint.
technologies.title_zh: 要查询的技术名称；technology_paths、groups、categories、technologies、keywords 至少需设置其一。有效名称见 technologies 接口。

keywords.desc_en: Keywords to match in a domain's title, description or meta keywords (UTF-8, up to 10). Example: ["seo","software"].
keywords.title_zh: 要在域名标题、描述或 meta 关键词中匹配的关键词（UTF-8，最多 10 个）。示例：["seo","software"]。

mode.desc_en: Match mode for the supplied group/category/technology terms, controlling whether results match exactly or partially.
mode.title_zh: 对所给 group/category/technology 词条的匹配模式，控制结果是精确匹配还是部分匹配。

filters.desc_en: Result-filtering conditions (up to 8), combined with and/or logical operators; see the available-filters endpoint for the fields and operators you can use.
filters.title_zh: 结果过滤条件（最多 8 条），以 and/or 逻辑运算符组合；可用字段与运算符见 available-filters 接口。

internal_list_limit.desc_en: Single cap applied to internal arrays (e.g. countries, languages, content_languages, keywords); when set, it overrides the per-level internal limits.
internal_list_limit.title_zh: 对内部数组（如 countries、languages、content_languages、keywords）统一施加的上限；设置后会覆盖各级 internal 限制。

tag.desc_en: Your own task label (up to 255 characters) echoed back in the response's `tasks.data`, useful for matching results to requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签（最多 255 字符），会在响应的 `tasks.data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求对应。

tasks.result.countries.desc_en: Distribution of domains by country with the count of websites per country.

tasks.result.languages.desc_en: Distribution of domains by language with the count of websites per language.

tasks.result.keywords.desc_en: Distribution of domains by keyword (found in titles, descriptions or meta keywords) with the count of websites per keyword.

technology.desc_en: Technology whose historical usage you want. Find valid names via the technologies endpoint. Example: "Salesforce".
technology.title_zh: 你想查询历史使用情况的技术。有效名称见 technologies 接口。示例："Salesforce"。

date_from.desc_en: Start date of the time range (format yyyy-mm-dd); defaults to the earliest available date when omitted. Minimum 2022-10-31. Example: "2023-06-01".
date_from.title_zh: 时间范围的起始日期（格式 yyyy-mm-dd）；省略时默认取最早可用日期。最小值 2022-10-31。示例："2023-06-01"。

date_to.desc_en: End date of the time range (format yyyy-mm-dd); defaults to today when omitted. Example: "2023-01-15".
date_to.title_zh: 时间范围的结束日期（格式 yyyy-mm-dd）；省略时默认取当天。示例："2023-01-15"。

tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `tasks.status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `tasks.status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Array holding the individual task results of this call; the Live endpoints submit one task per call, so expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 承载本次调用各任务结果的数组；Live 接口每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks.id.desc_en: UUID identifying this task within DataForSEO's system; use it to correlate the result with your request.
tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的 UUID 标识；可用于将结果与请求对应。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000). `20000` means the task completed successfully; other values indicate this specific task failed.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单任务状态码（范围 10000-60000）。`20000` 表示该任务成功完成；其他值表示此任务失败。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

tasks.time.desc_en: Execution time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单任务的执行耗时，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `tasks.result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `tasks.result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API path segments that were called, echoing how the request was routed.
tasks.path.title_zh: 本次调用的 API 路径分段，回显请求的路由方式。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted in the POST request body, useful for correlating the response with its input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在 POST 请求体中提交的参数，便于将响应与其输入对应。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying this task's result records; the fields below describe one record.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务结果记录的数组；下列字段描述其中单条记录。

tasks.result.technology.desc_en: Technology the historical series describes, echoing the requested `technology`.
tasks.result.technology.title_zh: 历史序列所描述的技术，回显请求的 `technology`。

tasks.result.date_from.desc_en: Start of the time range covered by the series, echoing the request.
tasks.result.date_from.title_zh: 序列覆盖时间范围的起始日期，回显请求。

tasks.result.date_to.desc_en: End of the time range covered by the series, echoing the request.
tasks.result.date_to.title_zh: 序列覆盖时间范围的结束日期，回显请求。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of dated data points in the `items` series.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: `items` 序列中带日期的数据点数量。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Time series of usage snapshots, one entry per date.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 按日期排列的使用量快照时间序列，每个日期一个条目。

tasks.result.items.type.desc_en: Element type marker for the data point; fixed value `technology_stats_item`.
tasks.result.items.type.title_zh: 数据点的元素类型标记；固定值 `technology_stats_item`。

tasks.result.items.date.title_zh: 该数据点所对应的日期。

tasks.result.items.domains_count.desc_en: Number of domains using the specified technology on this date.
tasks.result.items.domains_count.title_zh: 该日期使用所指定技术的域名数量。

tasks.result.items.countries.desc_en: Distribution of using websites by country on this date, with the count per country.
tasks.result.items.countries.title_zh: 该日期使用该技术的网站按国家的分布及每国计数。

tasks.result.items.languages.desc_en: Distribution of using websites by language on this date, with the count per language.
tasks.result.items.languages.title_zh: 该日期使用该技术的网站按语言的分布及每种语言的计数。

tasks.result.items.domains_rank.desc_en: Distribution of using websites by backlink-rank range on this date, with the count per range.
tasks.result.items.domains_rank.title_zh: 该日期使用该技术的网站按反链排名区间的分布及每区间的计数。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response; useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本；便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_code.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole call. `20000` means the call succeeded; any other value signals a request-level failure that occurred before per-task processing.
status_code.title_zh: 整次调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用成功；其他值代表在进入单任务处理前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message paired with `status_code`; read it to learn the cause when `status_code` is not a success value.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时据此定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD; free listing endpoints (languages/locations/filters/categories/technologies) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；languages/locations/filters/categories/technologies 等免费列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `tasks.status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `tasks.status_code`。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000). `20000` means the task completed successfully; other values indicate this specific task failed.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单任务状态码（范围 10000-60000）。`20000` 表示该任务成功完成；其他值表示此任务失败。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `tasks.result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `tasks.result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API path segments that were called, echoing how the request was routed.
tasks.path.title_zh: 本次调用的 API 路径分段，回显请求的路由方式。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters passed in the GET request URL, useful for correlating the response with its input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显 GET 请求 URL 中传入的参数，便于将响应与其输入对应。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying this task's result records; the fields below describe one record.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务结果记录的数组；下列字段描述其中单条记录。

limit.desc_en: Maximum number of records to return.
limit.title_zh: 返回记录数量的上限。

offset.desc_en: Number of leading records to skip in the results array, for paging.
offset.title_zh: 结果数组中跳过的前导记录数，用于分页。

offset_token.desc_en: Token from a prior response's identical field; supply it to fetch the subsequent batch and avoid timeouts when paging through very large result sets.
offset_token.title_zh: 取自上一次响应同名字段的令牌；传入以获取后续批次，并在翻阅超大结果集时避免超时。

filters.desc_en: Result-filtering conditions (up to 8), combined with and/or logical operators; see the available-filters endpoint for the fields and operators you can use.
filters.title_zh: 结果过滤条件（最多 8 条），以 and/or 逻辑运算符组合；可用字段与运算符见 available-filters 接口。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules for the results, each a field plus an asc/desc direction.
order_by.title_zh: 结果排序规则，每条由字段加 asc/desc 方向组成。

tag.desc_en: Your own task label (up to 255 characters) echoed back in the response's `tasks.data`, useful for matching results to requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签（最多 255 字符），会在响应的 `tasks.data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求对应。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response; useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.

tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

tasks.time.title_zh: 该单任务的执行耗时，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `tasks.result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `tasks.result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API path segments that were called, echoing how the request was routed.
tasks.path.title_zh: 本次调用的 API 路径分段，回显请求的路由方式。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted in the POST request body, useful for correlating the response with its input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在 POST 请求体中提交的参数，便于将响应与其输入对应。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying this task's result records; the fields below describe one record.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务结果记录的数组；下列字段描述其中单条记录。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of relevant results in the database matching your request, which may exceed the number returned.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中匹配你请求的相关结果总数，可能多于实际返回的条数。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of domain records returned in the `items` array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: `items` 数组中返回的域名记录数量。

tasks.result.offset.desc_en: The `offset` value applied to this result, echoing the request.
tasks.result.offset.title_zh: 本结果实际应用的 `offset` 值，回显请求。

tasks.result.offset_token.desc_en: Token to fetch the next page; pass it as the request `offset_token` to page past the deep-offset limit and retrieve over 100,000 results across requests.
tasks.result.offset_token.title_zh: 用于翻下一页的令牌；作为请求 `offset_token` 传入，可越过深分页上限、跨多次请求获取超过 100,000 条结果。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Array of domain records, each combining Whois data with backlink, organic and paid search metrics.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 域名记录数组，每条记录将 Whois 数据与反链、自然及付费搜索指标合并。

tasks.result.items.created_datetime.desc_en: ISO 8601 date and time when the domain was first registered. Example: "1997-03-29 03:00:00 +00:00".

tasks.result.items.changed_datetime.desc_en: ISO 8601 date and time when the domain's Whois entry was last modified. Example: "2021-01-14 08:36:28 +00:00".
tasks.result.items.changed_datetime.title_zh: 该域名 Whois 记录最后一次被修改的 ISO 8601 日期时间。示例："2021-01-14 08:36:28 +00:00"。

tasks.result.items.expiration_datetime.desc_en: ISO 8601 date and time when the domain registration is due to expire. Example: "2022-11-26 17:21:23 +00:00".

tasks.result.items.updated_datetime.desc_en: ISO 8601 date and time when the domain was last updated. Example: "2021-01-29 13:59:38 +00:00".

tasks.result.items.first_seen.desc_en: First time the DataForSEO crawler found the domain, in UTC `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00` format. Example: "2019-11-15 12:57:46 +00:00".
tasks.result.items.first_seen.title_zh: DataForSEO 爬虫首次发现该域名的时间，采用 UTC `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00` 格式。示例："2019-11-15 12:57:46 +00:00"。

tasks.result.items.epp_status_codes.desc_en: EPP (Extensible Provisioning Protocol) status codes describing the domain's registration state as defined by ICANN.
tasks.result.items.epp_status_codes.title_zh: 描述该域名注册状态的 EPP（可扩展配置协议）状态码，由 ICANN 定义。

tasks.result.items.tld.desc_en: Top-level domain of the name within the DNS root zone.
tasks.result.items.tld.title_zh: 该域名在 DNS 根区中的顶级域。

tasks.result.items.registered.desc_en: Whether the domain registration is currently active; `false` means it has expired (expired domains are retained only briefly).
tasks.result.items.registered.title_zh: 该域名注册当前是否有效；`false` 表示已过期（过期域名仅短期保留）。

tasks.result.items.registrar.desc_en: Registrar managing the domain; `null` when unknown. Example: NameCheap, Inc.
tasks.result.items.registrar.title_zh: 管理该域名的注册商；未知时为 `null`。示例：NameCheap, Inc.。

tasks.result.items.metrics.desc_en: Ranking and traffic metrics for the domain, split into organic and paid search.
tasks.result.items.metrics.title_zh: 该域名的排名与流量指标，分为自然搜索与付费搜索两部分。

tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.desc_en: Ranking and traffic data from organic search for the domain.
tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.title_zh: 该域名来自自然搜索的排名与流量数据。

tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_1.desc_en: Number of organic SERPs where the domain ranks #1.
tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_1.title_zh: 该域名在 自然 SERP 中排名第 1 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_2.desc_en: Number of organic SERPs where the domain ranks #2-3.
tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_2.title_zh: 该域名在 自然 SERP 中排名第 2-3 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_4.desc_en: Number of organic SERPs where the domain ranks #4-10.
tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_4.title_zh: 该域名在 自然 SERP 中排名第 4-10 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_1.desc_en: Number of organic SERPs where the domain ranks #11-20.
tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_1.title_zh: 该域名在 自然 SERP 中排名第 11-20 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_2.desc_en: Number of organic SERPs where the domain ranks #21-30.
tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_2.title_zh: 该域名在 自然 SERP 中排名第 21-30 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_3.desc_en: Number of organic SERPs where the domain ranks #31-40.
tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_3.title_zh: 该域名在 自然 SERP 中排名第 31-40 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_4.desc_en: Number of organic SERPs where the domain ranks #41-50.
tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_4.title_zh: 该域名在 自然 SERP 中排名第 41-50 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_5.desc_en: Number of organic SERPs where the domain ranks #51-60.
tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_5.title_zh: 该域名在 自然 SERP 中排名第 51-60 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_6.desc_en: Number of organic SERPs where the domain ranks #61-70.
tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_6.title_zh: 该域名在 自然 SERP 中排名第 61-70 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_7.desc_en: Number of organic SERPs where the domain ranks #71-80.
tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_7.title_zh: 该域名在 自然 SERP 中排名第 71-80 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_8.desc_en: Number of organic SERPs where the domain ranks #81-90.
tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_8.title_zh: 该域名在 自然 SERP 中排名第 81-90 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_9.desc_en: Number of organic SERPs where the domain ranks #91-100.
tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.pos_9.title_zh: 该域名在 自然 SERP 中排名第 91-100 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.etv.desc_en: Estimated monthly organic traffic to the domain, computed as the product of CTR and search volume across all keywords it ranks for.
tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.etv.title_zh: 该域名预估的每月自然流量，按其排名的所有关键词的点击率与搜索量乘积求和计算。

tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.count.desc_en: Total count of organic SERPs that contain the domain.
tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.count.title_zh: 包含该域名的自然 SERP 总数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.estim.desc_en: Estimated monthly cost (USD) of buying ads to cover all keywords the domain ranks for in organic search, derived from traffic and CPC values.
tasks.result.items.metrics.organic.estim.title_zh: 为覆盖该域名在自然搜索中排名的全部关键词而投放广告的预估每月成本（美元），由流量与 CPC 推算。

tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.desc_en: Ranking and traffic data from paid search for the domain.
tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.title_zh: 该域名来自付费搜索的排名与流量数据。

tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_1.desc_en: Number of paid SERPs where the domain ranks #1.
tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_1.title_zh: 该域名在 付费 SERP 中排名第 1 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_2_3.desc_en: Number of paid SERPs where the domain ranks #2-3.
tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_2_3.title_zh: 该域名在 付费 SERP 中排名第 2-3 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_4_10.desc_en: Number of paid SERPs where the domain ranks #4-10.
tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_4_10.title_zh: 该域名在 付费 SERP 中排名第 4-10 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_11_2.desc_en: Number of paid SERPs where the domain ranks #11-20.
tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_11_2.title_zh: 该域名在 付费 SERP 中排名第 11-20 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_21_3.desc_en: Number of paid SERPs where the domain ranks #21-30.
tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_21_3.title_zh: 该域名在 付费 SERP 中排名第 21-30 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_31_4.desc_en: Number of paid SERPs where the domain ranks #31-40.
tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_31_4.title_zh: 该域名在 付费 SERP 中排名第 31-40 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_41_5.desc_en: Number of paid SERPs where the domain ranks #41-50.
tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_41_5.title_zh: 该域名在 付费 SERP 中排名第 41-50 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_51_6.desc_en: Number of paid SERPs where the domain ranks #51-60.
tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_51_6.title_zh: 该域名在 付费 SERP 中排名第 51-60 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_61_7.desc_en: Number of paid SERPs where the domain ranks #61-70.
tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_61_7.title_zh: 该域名在 付费 SERP 中排名第 61-70 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_71_8.desc_en: Number of paid SERPs where the domain ranks #71-80.
tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_71_8.title_zh: 该域名在 付费 SERP 中排名第 71-80 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_81_9.desc_en: Number of paid SERPs where the domain ranks #81-90.
tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_81_9.title_zh: 该域名在 付费 SERP 中排名第 81-90 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_91_1.desc_en: Number of paid SERPs where the domain ranks #91-100.
tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.pos_91_1.title_zh: 该域名在 付费 SERP 中排名第 91-100 位的次数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.etv.desc_en: Estimated monthly paid traffic to the domain, computed as the product of CTR and search volume across all keywords it ranks for.
tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.etv.title_zh: 该域名预估的每月付费流量，按其排名的所有关键词的点击率与搜索量乘积求和计算。

tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.count.desc_en: Total count of paid SERPs that contain the domain.
tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.count.title_zh: 包含该域名的付费 SERP 总数。

tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.estimate.desc_en: Estimated monthly cost (USD) of buying ads to cover all keywords the domain ranks for in paid search, derived from traffic and CPC values.
tasks.result.items.metrics.paid.estimate.title_zh: 为覆盖该域名在付费搜索中排名的全部关键词而投放广告的预估每月成本（美元），由流量与 CPC 推算。

tasks.result.items.backlinks_info.desc_en: Backlink statistics for the domain from DataForSEO's Backlink Index.
tasks.result.items.backlinks_info.title_zh: 来自 DataForSEO 反链索引的该域名反链统计。

tasks.result.items.backlinks_info.referr.desc_en: Number of distinct domains that link to the target domain.
tasks.result.items.backlinks_info.referr.title_zh: 链接到目标域名的不同域名数量。

tasks.result.items.backlinks_info.referr.desc_en: Number of distinct main (root) domains that link to the target domain.
tasks.result.items.backlinks_info.referr.title_zh: 链接到目标域名的不同主（根）域名数量。

tasks.result.items.backlinks_info.referr.desc_en: Number of distinct pages that link to the target domain.
tasks.result.items.backlinks_info.referr.title_zh: 链接到目标域名的不同页面数量。

tasks.result.items.backlinks_info.dofoll.desc_en: Number of dofollow backlinks pointing to the target domain.
tasks.result.items.backlinks_info.dofoll.title_zh: 指向目标域名的 dofollow 反链数量。

tasks.result.items.backlinks_info.backli.desc_en: Total number of backlinks to the target domain, including both dofollow and nofollow links.
tasks.result.items.backlinks_info.backli.title_zh: 指向目标域名的反链总数，包含 dofollow 与 nofollow 两类。

tasks.result.items.backlinks_info.time_u.desc_en: Time the backlink data was last refreshed, in UTC `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00` format. Example: 2019-11-15 12:57:46 +00:00.
tasks.result.items.backlinks_info.time_u.title_zh: 反链数据最后一次刷新的时间，采用 UTC `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00` 格式。示例：2019-11-15 12:57:46 +00:00。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response; useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本；便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_code.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole call. `20000` means the call succeeded; any other value signals a request-level failure that occurred before per-task processing.
status_code.title_zh: 整次调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用成功；其他值代表在进入单任务处理前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message paired with `status_code`; read it to learn the cause when `status_code` is not a success value.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时据此定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD; free listing endpoints (languages/locations/filters/categories/technologies) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；languages/locations/filters/categories/technologies 等免费列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `tasks.status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `tasks.status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Array holding the individual task results of this call; the Live endpoints submit one task per call, so expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 承载本次调用各任务结果的数组；Live 接口每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks.id.desc_en: UUID identifying this task within DataForSEO's system; use it to correlate the result with your request.
tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的 UUID 标识；可用于将结果与请求对应。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000). `20000` means the task completed successfully; other values indicate this specific task failed.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单任务状态码（范围 10000-60000）。`20000` 表示该任务成功完成；其他值表示此任务失败。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

tasks.time.desc_en: Execution time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单任务的执行耗时，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `tasks.result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `tasks.result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API path segments that were called, echoing how the request was routed.
tasks.path.title_zh: 本次调用的 API 路径分段，回显请求的路由方式。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters passed in the GET request URL, useful for correlating the response with its input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显 GET 请求 URL 中传入的参数，便于将响应与其输入对应。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying this task's result records; the fields below describe one record.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务结果记录的数组；下列字段描述其中单条记录。

tasks.result.category_code.desc_en: Numeric code identifying the category; pass it as the `category_code` request field on Category Trends.
tasks.result.category_code.title_zh: 标识该分类的数字代码；可作为请求字段 `category_code` 传入 Category Trends 接口。

tasks.result.category_name.desc_en: Human-readable full name of the category.

tasks.result.category_code_parent.desc_en: Code of the parent (superordinate) category, letting you reconstruct the category hierarchy; `null` for top-level categories.
tasks.result.category_code_parent.title_zh: 上级（父）分类的代码，可据此重建分类层级；顶层分类为 `null`。

category_code.desc_en: Category code whose citations you want; obtain valid codes from the Categories endpoint.
category_code.title_zh: 你想查询其引用的分类代码；有效代码见 Categories 接口。

page_type.desc_en: Restrict results to these page types. Possible values: "ecommerce", "news", "blogs", "message-boards", "organization".
page_type.title_zh: 将结果限定为这些页面类型。可能取值："ecommerce"、"news"、"blogs"、"message-boards"、"organization"。

search_mode.desc_en: How citations are grouped: `as_is` returns every citation, `one_per_domain` returns one citation per domain.
search_mode.title_zh: 引用的分组方式：`as_is` 返回全部引用，`one_per_domain` 每个域名只返回一条引用。

internal_list_limit.desc_en: Single cap applied to internal arrays (e.g. countries, languages, content_languages, keywords); when set, it overrides the per-level internal limits.
internal_list_limit.title_zh: 对内部数组（如 countries、languages、content_languages、keywords）统一施加的上限；设置后会覆盖各级 internal 限制。

date_from.desc_en: Start date of the time range (format yyyy-mm-dd); minimum 2022-10-31. Example: "2019-01-15".
date_from.title_zh: 时间范围的起始日期（格式 yyyy-mm-dd）；最小值 2022-10-31。示例："2019-01-15"。

date_to.desc_en: End date of the time range (format yyyy-mm-dd); defaults to today when omitted. Example: "2019-01-15".
date_to.title_zh: 时间范围的结束日期（格式 yyyy-mm-dd）；省略时默认取当天。示例："2019-01-15"。

date_group.desc_en: Granularity for grouping the time series. Possible values: day, week, month (default month).
date_group.title_zh: 时间序列分组的粒度。可能取值：day、week、month（默认 month）。

initial_dataset_filters.desc_en: Filters applied to the underlying Search dataset before trend/summary aggregation (up to 8), combined with and/or logical operators.
initial_dataset_filters.title_zh: 在趋势/汇总聚合前对底层 Search 数据集施加的过滤条件（最多 8 条），以 and/or 逻辑运算符组合。

rank_scale.desc_en: Scale used to present rank values; choose whether ranks are reported on a 0-100 or 0-1000 scale.
rank_scale.title_zh: 用于呈现排名值的刻度；可选择以 0-100 或 0-1000 刻度报告排名。

tag.desc_en: Your own task label (up to 255 characters) echoed back in the response's `tasks.data`, useful for matching results to requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签（最多 255 字符），会在响应的 `tasks.data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求对应。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response; useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本；便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_code.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole call. `20000` means the call succeeded; any other value signals a request-level failure that occurred before per-task processing.
status_code.title_zh: 整次调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用成功；其他值代表在进入单任务处理前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message paired with `status_code`; read it to learn the cause when `status_code` is not a success value.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时据此定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD; free listing endpoints (languages/locations/filters/categories/technologies) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；languages/locations/filters/categories/technologies 等免费列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `tasks.status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `tasks.status_code`。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000). `20000` means the task completed successfully; other values indicate this specific task failed.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单任务状态码（范围 10000-60000）。`20000` 表示该任务成功完成；其他值表示此任务失败。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

tasks.time.desc_en: Execution time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单任务的执行耗时，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `tasks.result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `tasks.result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API path segments that were called, echoing how the request was routed.
tasks.path.title_zh: 本次调用的 API 路径分段，回显请求的路由方式。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted in the POST request body, useful for correlating the response with its input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在 POST 请求体中提交的参数，便于将响应与其输入对应。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying this task's result records; the fields below describe one record.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务结果记录的数组；下列字段描述其中单条记录。

tasks.result.type.desc_en: Element type marker for the record; fixed value `content_analysis_trends`.
tasks.result.type.title_zh: 记录的元素类型标记；固定值 `content_analysis_trends`。

tasks.result.date.desc_en: Date (or period start) the trend data point describes, grouped per the request `date_group`.
tasks.result.date.title_zh: 该趋势数据点对应的日期（或区间起点），按请求 `date_group` 分组。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of records in the database matching your request, which may exceed the number actually returned.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中匹配你请求的记录总数，可能多于实际返回的条数。

tasks.result.rank.desc_en: Normalized sum of the ranks of all URLs citing the target; a higher value reflects stronger overall authority of the citing pages.
tasks.result.rank.title_zh: 引用目标的所有 URL 排名的归一化求和；值越高表示引用页面整体权威性越强。

tasks.result.top_domains.desc_en: Top domains citing the target, each with its citation count, so you can see which sites dominate the citation set.
tasks.result.top_domains.title_zh: 引用目标最多的域名及各自的引用次数，可据此了解哪些站点在引用集中占主导。

tasks.result.sentiment_connotations.desc_en: Breakdown of emotional reactions (e.g. anger, happiness, love, sadness, share, fun) tied to the citations, with the citation count per sentiment.
tasks.result.sentiment_connotations.title_zh: 与引用相关的情绪反应分布（如 anger、happiness、love、sadness、share、fun），并给出每种情绪的引用次数。

tasks.result.connotation_types.desc_en: Breakdown of sentiment polarity (positive, negative, neutral) tied to the citations, with the citation count per type.
tasks.result.connotation_types.title_zh: 与引用相关的情感极性分布（positive、negative、neutral），并给出每种类型的引用次数。

tasks.result.text_categories.desc_en: Text categories detected in the citations with the citation count in each; resolve category codes via the Categories endpoint.
tasks.result.text_categories.title_zh: 在引用中识别出的文本分类及各分类的引用次数；分类代码可通过 Categories 接口解析。

tasks.result.page_categories.desc_en: Page categories of the citing pages with the citation count in each; resolve category codes via the Categories endpoint.
tasks.result.page_categories.title_zh: 引用页面的页面分类及各分类的引用次数；分类代码可通过 Categories 接口解析。

tasks.result.page_types.desc_en: Distribution of citations across page types (e.g. ecommerce, news, blogs, message-boards, organization), with the count per type.
tasks.result.page_types.title_zh: 引用按页面类型的分布（如 ecommerce、news、blogs、message-boards、organization），并给出每类的计数。

tasks.result.countries.desc_en: Distribution of citations by country with the citation count per country; resolve country codes via the Locations endpoint.
tasks.result.countries.title_zh: 引用按国家的分布及每个国家的引用次数；国家代码可通过 Locations 接口解析。

tasks.result.languages.desc_en: Distribution of citations by language with the citation count per language; resolve language codes via the Languages endpoint.
tasks.result.languages.title_zh: 引用按语言的分布及每种语言的引用次数；语言代码可通过 Languages 接口解析。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response; useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本；便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

tasks.time.desc_en: Execution time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单任务的执行耗时，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `tasks.result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `tasks.result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API path segments that were called, echoing how the request was routed.
tasks.path.title_zh: 本次调用的 API 路径分段，回显请求的路由方式。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters passed in the GET request URL, useful for correlating the response with its input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显 GET 请求 URL 中传入的参数，便于将响应与其输入对应。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying this task's result records; the fields below describe one record.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务结果记录的数组；下列字段描述其中单条记录。

tasks.result.language_name.desc_en: Human-readable full name of the language.

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: ISO 639-1 code of the language; pass it as the `language_code` request field where supported.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 该语言的 ISO 639-1 代码；在支持处可作为请求字段 `language_code` 传入。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response; useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本；便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_code.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole call. `20000` means the call succeeded; any other value signals a request-level failure that occurred before per-task processing.
status_code.title_zh: 整次调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用成功；其他值代表在进入单任务处理前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message paired with `status_code`; read it to learn the cause when `status_code` is not a success value.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时据此定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD; free listing endpoints (languages/locations/filters/categories/technologies) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；languages/locations/filters/categories/technologies 等免费列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `tasks.status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `tasks.status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Array holding the individual task results of this call; the Live endpoints submit one task per call, so expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 承载本次调用各任务结果的数组；Live 接口每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks.id.desc_en: UUID identifying this task within DataForSEO's system; use it to correlate the result with your request.
tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的 UUID 标识；可用于将结果与请求对应。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000). `20000` means the task completed successfully; other values indicate this specific task failed.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单任务状态码（范围 10000-60000）。`20000` 表示该任务成功完成；其他值表示此任务失败。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

tasks.time.desc_en: Execution time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单任务的执行耗时，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `tasks.result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `tasks.result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API path segments that were called, echoing how the request was routed.
tasks.path.title_zh: 本次调用的 API 路径分段，回显请求的路由方式。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters passed in the GET request URL, useful for correlating the response with its input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显 GET 请求 URL 中传入的参数，便于将响应与其输入对应。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying this task's result records; the fields below describe one record.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务结果记录的数组；下列字段描述其中单条记录。

tasks.result.location_name.desc_en: Human-readable full name of the location.

tasks.result.country_iso_code.desc_en: ISO country code of the location.
tasks.result.country_iso_code.title_zh: 该地区的 ISO 国家代码。

keyword.desc_en: Target keyword whose citations you want (UTF-8, lowercased on the server). To match an exact phrase rather than a standalone keyword, wrap it in escaped double quotes.
keyword.title_zh: 你想查询其引用的目标关键词（UTF-8，服务端会转为小写）。若要匹配精确短语而非独立关键词，请用转义双引号包裹。

keyword_fields.desc_en: Restrict matching to keywords that specific content fields must contain (e.g. title, main_title, previous_title); keys are field names and values are the keywords to require.
keyword_fields.title_zh: 将匹配限定为特定内容字段必须包含的关键词（如 title、main_title、previous_title）；键为字段名，值为要求包含的关键词。

page_type.desc_en: Restrict results to these page types. Possible values: "ecommerce", "news", "blogs", "message-boards", "organization".
page_type.title_zh: 将结果限定为这些页面类型。可能取值："ecommerce"、"news"、"blogs"、"message-boards"、"organization"。

search_mode.desc_en: How citations are grouped: `as_is` returns every citation, `one_per_domain` returns one citation per domain.
search_mode.title_zh: 引用的分组方式：`as_is` 返回全部引用，`one_per_domain` 每个域名只返回一条引用。

internal_list_limit.desc_en: Single cap applied to internal arrays (e.g. countries, languages, content_languages, keywords); when set, it overrides the per-level internal limits.
internal_list_limit.title_zh: 对内部数组（如 countries、languages、content_languages、keywords）统一施加的上限；设置后会覆盖各级 internal 限制。

date_from.desc_en: Start date of the time range (format yyyy-mm-dd). Example: "2019-01-15".
date_from.title_zh: 时间范围的起始日期（格式 yyyy-mm-dd）。示例："2019-01-15"。

date_to.desc_en: End date of the time range (format yyyy-mm-dd); defaults to today when omitted. Example: "2019-01-15".
date_to.title_zh: 时间范围的结束日期（格式 yyyy-mm-dd）；省略时默认取当天。示例："2019-01-15"。

date_group.desc_en: Granularity for grouping the time series. Possible values: day, week, month (default month).
date_group.title_zh: 时间序列分组的粒度。可能取值：day、week、month（默认 month）。

initial_dataset_filters.desc_en: Filters applied to the underlying Search dataset before trend/summary aggregation (up to 8), combined with and/or logical operators.
initial_dataset_filters.title_zh: 在趋势/汇总聚合前对底层 Search 数据集施加的过滤条件（最多 8 条），以 and/or 逻辑运算符组合。

rank_scale.desc_en: Scale used to present rank values; choose whether ranks are reported on a 0-100 or 0-1000 scale.
rank_scale.title_zh: 用于呈现排名值的刻度；可选择以 0-100 或 0-1000 刻度报告排名。

tag.desc_en: Your own task label (up to 255 characters) echoed back in the response's `tasks.data`, useful for matching results to requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签（最多 255 字符），会在响应的 `tasks.data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求对应。

tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单任务状态码（范围 10000-60000）。`20000` 表示该任务成功完成；其他值表示此任务失败。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

tasks.time.desc_en: Execution time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单任务的执行耗时，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `tasks.result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `tasks.result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API path segments that were called, echoing how the request was routed.
tasks.path.title_zh: 本次调用的 API 路径分段，回显请求的路由方式。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted in the POST request body, useful for correlating the response with its input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在 POST 请求体中提交的参数，便于将响应与其输入对应。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying this task's result records; the fields below describe one record.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务结果记录的数组；下列字段描述其中单条记录。

tasks.result.type.desc_en: Element type marker for the record; fixed value `content_analysis_trends`.
tasks.result.type.title_zh: 记录的元素类型标记；固定值 `content_analysis_trends`。

tasks.result.date.desc_en: Date (or period start) the trend data point describes, grouped per the request `date_group`.
tasks.result.date.title_zh: 该趋势数据点对应的日期（或区间起点），按请求 `date_group` 分组。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of records in the database matching your request, which may exceed the number actually returned.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中匹配你请求的记录总数，可能多于实际返回的条数。

tasks.result.rank.desc_en: Normalized sum of the ranks of all URLs citing the target; a higher value reflects stronger overall authority of the citing pages.
tasks.result.rank.title_zh: 引用目标的所有 URL 排名的归一化求和；值越高表示引用页面整体权威性越强。

tasks.result.top_domains.desc_en: Top domains citing the target, each with its citation count, so you can see which sites dominate the citation set.
tasks.result.top_domains.title_zh: 引用目标最多的域名及各自的引用次数，可据此了解哪些站点在引用集中占主导。

tasks.result.sentiment_connotations.desc_en: Breakdown of emotional reactions (e.g. anger, happiness, love, sadness, share, fun) tied to the citations, with the citation count per sentiment.
tasks.result.sentiment_connotations.title_zh: 与引用相关的情绪反应分布（如 anger、happiness、love、sadness、share、fun），并给出每种情绪的引用次数。

tasks.result.connotation_types.desc_en: Breakdown of sentiment polarity (positive, negative, neutral) tied to the citations, with the citation count per type.
tasks.result.connotation_types.title_zh: 与引用相关的情感极性分布（positive、negative、neutral），并给出每种类型的引用次数。

tasks.result.text_categories.desc_en: Text categories detected in the citations with the citation count in each; resolve category codes via the Categories endpoint.
tasks.result.text_categories.title_zh: 在引用中识别出的文本分类及各分类的引用次数；分类代码可通过 Categories 接口解析。

tasks.result.page_categories.desc_en: Page categories of the citing pages with the citation count in each; resolve category codes via the Categories endpoint.
tasks.result.page_categories.title_zh: 引用页面的页面分类及各分类的引用次数；分类代码可通过 Categories 接口解析。

tasks.result.page_types.desc_en: Distribution of citations across page types (e.g. ecommerce, news, blogs, message-boards, organization), with the count per type.
tasks.result.page_types.title_zh: 引用按页面类型的分布（如 ecommerce、news、blogs、message-boards、organization），并给出每类的计数。

tasks.result.countries.desc_en: Distribution of citations by country with the citation count per country; resolve country codes via the Locations endpoint.
tasks.result.countries.title_zh: 引用按国家的分布及每个国家的引用次数；国家代码可通过 Locations 接口解析。

tasks.result.languages.desc_en: Distribution of citations by language with the citation count per language; resolve language codes via the Languages endpoint.
tasks.result.languages.title_zh: 引用按语言的分布及每种语言的引用次数；语言代码可通过 Languages 接口解析。

keyword.desc_en: Target keyword whose citations you want (UTF-8, lowercased on the server). To match an exact phrase rather than a standalone keyword, wrap it in escaped double quotes.
keyword.title_zh: 你想查询其引用的目标关键词（UTF-8，服务端会转为小写）。若要匹配精确短语而非独立关键词，请用转义双引号包裹。

keyword_fields.desc_en: Restrict matching to keywords that specific content fields must contain (e.g. title, main_title, previous_title); keys are field names and values are the keywords to require.

page_type.desc_en: Restrict results to these page types. Possible values: "ecommerce", "news", "blogs", "message-boards", "organization".
page_type.title_zh: 将结果限定为这些页面类型。可能取值："ecommerce"、"news"、"blogs"、"message-boards"、"organization"。

search_mode.title_zh: 引用的分组方式：`as_is` 返回全部引用，`one_per_domain` 每个域名只返回一条引用。

positive_connotation_threshold.desc_en: Probability threshold for positive sentiment; setting it filters which citations contribute to the connotation_types breakdown.
positive_connotation_threshold.title_zh: 正向情感的概率阈值；设置后会筛选哪些引用计入 connotation_types 拆解。

sentiments_connotation_threshold.desc_en: Probability threshold for sentiment connotations; setting it filters which citations contribute to the sentiment_connotations breakdown.
sentiments_connotation_threshold.title_zh: 情绪连结的概率阈值；设置后会筛选哪些引用计入 sentiment_connotations 拆解。

initial_dataset_filters.title_zh: 在趋势/汇总聚合前对底层 Search 数据集施加的过滤条件（最多 8 条），以 and/or 逻辑运算符组合。
