tasks.result.metrics.total_count.desc_en: Total number of records in the database matching your request, which may exceed the number actually returned.
tasks.result.metrics.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中匹配你请求的记录总数，可能多于实际返回的条数。

tasks.result.metrics.rank.desc_en: Normalized sum of the ranks of all URLs citing the keyword within this rating bucket.
tasks.result.metrics.rank.title_zh: 该评分区间内引用该关键词的所有 URL 排名的归一化求和。

tasks.result.metrics.top_domains.desc_en: Top domains citing the target, each with its citation count, so you can see which sites dominate the citation set.
tasks.result.metrics.top_domains.title_zh: 引用目标最多的域名及各自的引用次数，可据此了解哪些站点在引用集中占主导。

tasks.result.metrics.sentiment_connotati.desc_en: Breakdown of emotional reactions (e.g. anger, happiness, love, sadness, share, fun) tied to the citations, with the citation count per sentiment.
tasks.result.metrics.sentiment_connotati.title_zh: 与引用相关的情绪反应分布（如 anger、happiness、love、sadness、share、fun），并给出每种情绪的引用次数。

tasks.result.metrics.connotation_types.desc_en: Breakdown of sentiment polarity (positive, negative, neutral) tied to the citations, with the citation count per type.
tasks.result.metrics.connotation_types.title_zh: 与引用相关的情感极性分布（positive、negative、neutral），并给出每种类型的引用次数。

tasks.result.metrics.text_categories.desc_en: Text categories detected in the citations with the citation count in each; resolve category codes via the Categories endpoint.
tasks.result.metrics.text_categories.title_zh: 在引用中识别出的文本分类及各分类的引用次数；分类代码可通过 Categories 接口解析。

tasks.result.metrics.page_categories.desc_en: Page categories of the citing pages with the citation count in each; resolve category codes via the Categories endpoint.
tasks.result.metrics.page_categories.title_zh: 引用页面的页面分类及各分类的引用次数；分类代码可通过 Categories 接口解析。

tasks.result.metrics.page_types.desc_en: Distribution of citations across page types (e.g. ecommerce, news, blogs, message-boards, organization), with the count per type.
tasks.result.metrics.page_types.title_zh: 引用按页面类型的分布（如 ecommerce、news、blogs、message-boards、organization），并给出每类的计数。

tasks.result.metrics.countries.desc_en: Distribution of citations by country with the citation count per country; resolve country codes via the Locations endpoint.
tasks.result.metrics.countries.title_zh: 引用按国家的分布及每个国家的引用次数；国家代码可通过 Locations 接口解析。

tasks.result.metrics.languages.desc_en: Distribution of citations by language with the citation count per language; resolve language codes via the Languages endpoint.
tasks.result.metrics.languages.title_zh: 引用按语言的分布及每种语言的引用次数；语言代码可通过 Languages 接口解析。

keyword.desc_en: Target keyword whose citations you want (UTF-8, lowercased on the server). To match an exact phrase rather than a standalone keyword, wrap it in escaped double quotes.
keyword.title_zh: 你想查询其引用的目标关键词（UTF-8，服务端会转为小写）。若要匹配精确短语而非独立关键词，请用转义双引号包裹。

keyword_fields.desc_en: Restrict matching to keywords that specific content fields must contain (e.g. title, main_title, previous_title); keys are field names and values are the keywords to require.
keyword_fields.title_zh: 将匹配限定为特定内容字段必须包含的关键词（如 title、main_title、previous_title）；键为字段名，值为要求包含的关键词。

page_type.desc_en: Restrict results to these page types. Possible values: "ecommerce", "news", "blogs", "message-boards", "organization".
page_type.title_zh: 将结果限定为这些页面类型。可能取值："ecommerce"、"news"、"blogs"、"message-boards"、"organization"。

search_mode.desc_en: How citations are grouped: `as_is` returns every citation, `one_per_domain` returns one citation per domain.
search_mode.title_zh: 引用的分组方式：`as_is` 返回全部引用，`one_per_domain` 每个域名只返回一条引用。

limit.desc_en: Maximum number of records to return.
limit.title_zh: 返回记录数量的上限。

filters.desc_en: Result-filtering conditions (up to 8), combined with and/or logical operators; see the available-filters endpoint for the fields and operators you can use.
filters.title_zh: 结果过滤条件（最多 8 条），以 and/or 逻辑运算符组合；可用字段与运算符见 available-filters 接口。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules for the results, each a field plus an asc/desc direction.
order_by.title_zh: 结果排序规则，每条由字段加 asc/desc 方向组成。

offset.desc_en: Number of leading records to skip in the results array, for paging.
offset.title_zh: 结果数组中跳过的前导记录数，用于分页。

offset_token.desc_en: Token from a prior response's identical field; supply it to fetch the subsequent batch and avoid timeouts when paging through very large result sets.
offset_token.title_zh: 取自上一次响应同名字段的令牌；传入以获取后续批次，并在翻阅超大结果集时避免超时。

rank_scale.desc_en: Scale used to present rank values; choose whether ranks are reported on a 0-100 or 0-1000 scale.
rank_scale.title_zh: 用于呈现排名值的刻度；可选择以 0-100 或 0-1000 刻度报告排名。

tag.desc_en: Your own task label (up to 255 characters) echoed back in the response's `tasks.data`, useful for matching results to requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签（最多 255 字符），会在响应的 `tasks.data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求对应。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response; useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本；便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_code.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole call. `20000` means the call succeeded; any other value signals a request-level failure that occurred before per-task processing.
status_code.title_zh: 整次调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用成功；其他值代表在进入单任务处理前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message paired with `status_code`; read it to learn the cause when `status_code` is not a success value.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时据此定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD; free listing endpoints (languages/locations/filters/categories/technologies) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；languages/locations/filters/categories/technologies 等免费列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `tasks.status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `tasks.status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Array holding the individual task results of this call; the Live endpoints submit one task per call, so expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 承载本次调用各任务结果的数组；Live 接口每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks.id.desc_en: UUID identifying this task within DataForSEO's system; use it to correlate the result with your request.
tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的 UUID 标识；可用于将结果与请求对应。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000). `20000` means the task completed successfully; other values indicate this specific task failed.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单任务状态码（范围 10000-60000）。`20000` 表示该任务成功完成；其他值表示此任务失败。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

tasks.time.desc_en: Execution time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单任务的执行耗时，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `tasks.result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `tasks.result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API path segments that were called, echoing how the request was routed.
tasks.path.title_zh: 本次调用的 API 路径分段，回显请求的路由方式。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted in the POST request body, useful for correlating the response with its input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在 POST 请求体中提交的参数，便于将响应与其输入对应。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying this task's result records; the fields below describe one record.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务结果记录的数组；下列字段描述其中单条记录。

tasks.result.offset_token.desc_en: Token to fetch the next page of citations; pass it as the request `offset_token` to page past the deep-offset limit and retrieve over 10,000 results across requests.
tasks.result.offset_token.title_zh: 用于翻取下一页引用的令牌；作为请求 `offset_token` 传入，可越过深分页上限、跨多次请求获取超过 10,000 条结果。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of records in the database matching your request, which may exceed the number actually returned.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中匹配你请求的记录总数，可能多于实际返回的条数。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of records returned in the `items` array of this response.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本响应 `items` 数组中返回的记录数量。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Array of individual citations and their associated content and ranking data.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 逐条引用及其相关内容与排名数据的数组。

tasks.result.items.type.desc_en: Element type marker for the citation record; fixed value `content_analysis_search`.
tasks.result.items.type.title_zh: 引用记录的元素类型标记；固定值 `content_analysis_search`。

tasks.result.items.url.desc_en: URL of the page where the citation was found.
tasks.result.items.url.title_zh: 发现该引用的页面 URL。

tasks.result.items.main_domain.desc_en: Main (root) domain of the citing page.

tasks.result.items.url_rank.desc_en: Backlink-based rank of the specific URL from DataForSEO's Backlink Index; a higher value reflects a stronger backlink profile for the page.
tasks.result.items.url_rank.title_zh: 基于 DataForSEO 反链索引的该 URL 反链排名；值越高表示该页面反链档案越强。

tasks.result.items.spam_score.desc_en: Backlink spam score of the URL from DataForSEO's Backlink Index; a higher value indicates a riskier backlink profile.
tasks.result.items.spam_score.title_zh: 基于 DataForSEO 反链索引的该 URL 反链垃圾分；值越高表示反链档案风险越大。

tasks.result.items.domain_rank.desc_en: Backlink-based rank of the citing domain from DataForSEO's Backlink Index.
tasks.result.items.domain_rank.title_zh: 基于 DataForSEO 反链索引的引用域名反链排名。

tasks.result.items.fetch_time.desc_en: Time the DataForSEO crawler visited the page, in UTC `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00` format. Example: 2017-01-24 13:20:59 +00:00.
tasks.result.items.fetch_time.title_zh: DataForSEO 爬虫访问该页面的时间，采用 UTC `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00` 格式。示例：2017-01-24 13:20:59 +00:00。

tasks.result.items.country.desc_en: Country code of the domain's registration; resolve via the Locations endpoint.
tasks.result.items.country.title_zh: 该域名注册地的国家代码；可通过 Locations 接口解析。

tasks.result.items.language.desc_en: Main language of the domain; resolve via the Languages endpoint.
tasks.result.items.language.title_zh: 该域名的主要语言；可通过 Languages 接口解析。

tasks.result.items.score.desc_en: Citation prominence score derived from url_rank, domain_rank and keyword presence in title, main_title, url and snippet; a higher score means a more valuable citation.
tasks.result.items.score.title_zh: 引用显著度评分，由 url_rank、domain_rank 及关键词在 title、main_title、url、snippet 中的出现情况推算；分值越高引用越有价值。

tasks.result.items.page_category.desc_en: Product and service categories relevant to the citing page; resolve codes via the Categories endpoint.
tasks.result.items.page_category.title_zh: 与引用页面相关的产品及服务分类；分类代码可通过 Categories 接口解析。

tasks.result.items.page_types.desc_en: Page types assigned to the citing page (e.g. ecommerce, news, blogs, message-boards, organization).
tasks.result.items.page_types.title_zh: 为引用页面归类的页面类型（如 ecommerce、news、blogs、message-boards、organization）。

tasks.result.items.ratings.desc_en: Ratings extracted from the page's microdata markup.
tasks.result.items.ratings.title_zh: 从页面 microdata 标记中提取的评分。

tasks.result.items.social_metrics.desc_en: Social media engagement metrics for the page, derived from platform-supported embeds.
tasks.result.items.social_metrics.title_zh: 该页面的社交媒体互动指标，来自平台支持的嵌入组件。

tasks.result.items.content_info.desc_en: Detailed information about the specific citation found at the URL.
tasks.result.items.content_info.title_zh: 在该 URL 处发现的具体引用的详细信息。

tasks.result.items.content_info.content_.desc_en: Type of content the citation appears in. Example: page_content, comment.
tasks.result.items.content_info.content_.title_zh: 引用所在内容的类型。示例：page_content、comment。

tasks.result.items.content_info.title.desc_en: Title of the content block carrying the citation.
tasks.result.items.content_info.title.title_zh: 承载该引用的内容块标题。

tasks.result.items.content_info.previous.desc_en: Title of the content block preceding the citation, useful for locating it in the page structure.
tasks.result.items.content_info.previous.title_zh: 引用前一个内容块的标题，便于在页面结构中定位引用。

tasks.result.items.content_info.level.desc_en: Heading level of the title, from 1 (top) to 6 (bottom), matching the page's h-tag depth.
tasks.result.items.content_info.level.title_zh: 标题的标题级别，从 1（最高）到 6（最低），对应页面的 h 标签层级。

tasks.result.items.content_info.author.desc_en: Author credited for the content, when available.

tasks.result.items.content_info.snippet.desc_en: Excerpt of the content surrounding the citation.
tasks.result.items.content_info.snippet.title_zh: 引用所在内容的摘录片段。

tasks.result.items.content_info.social_m.desc_en: Social media engagement metrics for this content block, derived from platform-supported embeds.
tasks.result.items.content_info.social_m.title_zh: 该内容块的社交媒体互动指标，来自平台支持的嵌入组件。

tasks.result.items.content_info.highligh.desc_en: Portion of the snippet that matches the target keyword, highlighted for emphasis.
tasks.result.items.content_info.highligh.title_zh: 摘录片段中与目标关键词匹配并被高亮的部分。

tasks.result.items.content_info.language.desc_en: Language of the content; resolve via the Languages endpoint.
tasks.result.items.content_info.language.title_zh: 该内容的语言；可通过 Languages 接口解析。

tasks.result.items.content_info.sentimen.desc_en: Emotional reactions (e.g. anger, happiness, love, sadness) detected for this citation, each with its probability index.
tasks.result.items.content_info.sentimen.title_zh: 针对该引用检测到的情绪反应（如 anger、happiness、love、sadness）及各自的概率指数。

tasks.result.items.content_info.connotat.desc_en: Sentiment polarity (positive, negative, neutral) detected for this citation, each with its probability index.
tasks.result.items.content_info.connotat.title_zh: 针对该引用检测到的情感极性（positive、negative、neutral）及各自的概率指数。

tasks.result.items.content_info.text_cat.desc_en: Text categories assigned to this content; resolve codes via the Categories endpoint.
tasks.result.items.content_info.text_cat.title_zh: 为该内容归类的文本分类；分类代码可通过 Categories 接口解析。

tasks.result.items.content_info.date_pub.desc_en: Time the content was published, in UTC `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00` format. Example: 2017-01-24 13:20:59 +00:00.
tasks.result.items.content_info.date_pub.title_zh: 该内容的发布时间，采用 UTC `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00` 格式。示例：2017-01-24 13:20:59 +00:00。

tasks.result.items.content_info.content_.desc_en: Content quality score derived from the number of words, sentences and characters in the content.
tasks.result.items.content_info.content_.title_zh: 内容质量评分，由内容的词数、句数与字符数推算。

tasks.result.items.content_info.semantic.desc_en: Semantic HTML element where the keyword citation sits. Example: article, header.
tasks.result.items.content_info.semantic.title_zh: 关键词引用所在的语义化 HTML 元素。示例：article、header。

tasks.result.items.content_info.rating.desc_en: Rating associated with this content block.
tasks.result.items.content_info.rating.title_zh: 与该内容块关联的评分。

tasks.result.items.content_info.rating.n.desc_en: Rating scale name. Possible values: Max5, Percents, CustomMax.
tasks.result.items.content_info.rating.n.title_zh: 评分刻度名称。可能取值：Max5、Percents、CustomMax。

tasks.result.items.content_info.rating.r.desc_en: The rating value on its scale.
tasks.result.items.content_info.rating.r.title_zh: 该评分在其刻度上的取值。

tasks.result.items.content_info.rating.m.desc_en: Maximum possible value for the named rating scale.
tasks.result.items.content_info.rating.m.title_zh: 所用评分刻度的最大可能值。

tasks.result.items.content_info.rating.r.desc_en: Number of votes behind the rating.
tasks.result.items.content_info.rating.r.title_zh: 构成该评分的投票数量。

tasks.result.items.content_info.rating.r.desc_en: Rating normalized relative to its maximum, for cross-scale comparison.
tasks.result.items.content_info.rating.r.title_zh: 相对其最大值归一化后的评分，便于跨刻度比较。

tasks.result.items.content_info.group_da.desc_en: Publication date or first-crawl time used to group citations chronologically.
tasks.result.items.content_info.group_da.title_zh: 用于按时间分组引用的发布日期或首次抓取时间。

keyword.desc_en: Target keyword whose citations you want (UTF-8, lowercased on the server). To match an exact phrase rather than a standalone keyword, wrap it in escaped double quotes.
keyword.title_zh: 你想查询其引用的目标关键词（UTF-8，服务端会转为小写）。若要匹配精确短语而非独立关键词，请用转义双引号包裹。

keyword_fields.desc_en: Restrict matching to keywords that specific content fields must contain (e.g. title, main_title, previous_title); keys are field names and values are the keywords to require.
keyword_fields.title_zh: 将匹配限定为特定内容字段必须包含的关键词（如 title、main_title、previous_title）；键为字段名，值为要求包含的关键词。

page_type.desc_en: Restrict results to these page types. Possible values: "ecommerce", "news", "blogs", "message-boards", "organization".
page_type.title_zh: 将结果限定为这些页面类型。可能取值："ecommerce"、"news"、"blogs"、"message-boards"、"organization"。

internal_list_limit.desc_en: Single cap applied to internal arrays (e.g. countries, languages, content_languages, keywords); when set, it overrides the per-level internal limits.
internal_list_limit.title_zh: 对内部数组（如 countries、languages、content_languages、keywords）统一施加的上限；设置后会覆盖各级 internal 限制。

positive_connotation_threshold.desc_en: Probability threshold for positive sentiment; setting it filters which citations contribute to the connotation_types breakdown.
positive_connotation_threshold.title_zh: 正向情感的概率阈值；设置后会筛选哪些引用计入 connotation_types 拆解。

sentiments_connotation_threshold.desc_en: Probability threshold for sentiment connotations; setting it filters which citations contribute to the sentiment_connotations breakdown.
sentiments_connotation_threshold.title_zh: 情绪连结的概率阈值；设置后会筛选哪些引用计入 sentiment_connotations 拆解。

initial_dataset_filters.desc_en: Filters applied to the underlying Search dataset before trend/summary aggregation (up to 8), combined with and/or logical operators.
initial_dataset_filters.title_zh: 在趋势/汇总聚合前对底层 Search 数据集施加的过滤条件（最多 8 条），以 and/or 逻辑运算符组合。

rank_scale.desc_en: Scale used to present rank values; choose whether ranks are reported on a 0-100 or 0-1000 scale.
rank_scale.title_zh: 用于呈现排名值的刻度；可选择以 0-100 或 0-1000 刻度报告排名。

tag.desc_en: Your own task label (up to 255 characters) echoed back in the response's `tasks.data`, useful for matching results to requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签（最多 255 字符），会在响应的 `tasks.data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求对应。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response; useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本；便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_code.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole call. `20000` means the call succeeded; any other value signals a request-level failure that occurred before per-task processing.
status_code.title_zh: 整次调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用成功；其他值代表在进入单任务处理前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message paired with `status_code`; read it to learn the cause when `status_code` is not a success value.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时据此定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD; free listing endpoints (languages/locations/filters/categories/technologies) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；languages/locations/filters/categories/technologies 等免费列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `tasks.status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `tasks.status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Array holding the individual task results of this call; the Live endpoints submit one task per call, so expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 承载本次调用各任务结果的数组；Live 接口每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks.id.desc_en: UUID identifying this task within DataForSEO's system; use it to correlate the result with your request.
tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的 UUID 标识；可用于将结果与请求对应。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000). `20000` means the task completed successfully; other values indicate this specific task failed.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单任务状态码（范围 10000-60000）。`20000` 表示该任务成功完成；其他值表示此任务失败。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

tasks.time.desc_en: Execution time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单任务的执行耗时，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `tasks.result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `tasks.result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API path segments that were called, echoing how the request was routed.
tasks.path.title_zh: 本次调用的 API 路径分段，回显请求的路由方式。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted in the POST request body, useful for correlating the response with its input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在 POST 请求体中提交的参数，便于将响应与其输入对应。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying this task's result records; the fields below describe one record.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务结果记录的数组；下列字段描述其中单条记录。

tasks.result.type.desc_en: Element type marker for the record; fixed value `content_analysis_sentiment_analysis`.
tasks.result.type.title_zh: 记录的元素类型标记；固定值 `content_analysis_sentiment_analysis`。

tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.desc_en: Citations grouped by sentiment polarity (positive, negative, neutral), each group carrying its own full metric breakdown.
tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.title_zh: 按情感极性（positive、negative、neutral）分组的引用，每组各自携带完整的指标拆解。

tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.desc_en: One polarity bucket; the dynamic key is one of positive, negative, or neutral, and the object holds that bucket's metrics.
tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.title_zh: 单个极性分桶；动态键名为 positive、negative 或 neutral 之一，对象内为该分桶的指标。

tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.desc_en: Element type marker for this bucket's metrics; fixed value `content_analysis_summary`.
tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.title_zh: 该分桶指标的元素类型标记；固定值 `content_analysis_summary`。

tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.desc_en: Total number of relevant citations in this bucket.
tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.title_zh: 该分桶内相关引用的总数。

tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.desc_en: Normalized sum of the ranks of all relevant URLs in this bucket.
tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.title_zh: 该分桶内全部相关 URL 排名的归一化求和。

tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.desc_en: Top domains citing the target, each with its citation count, so you can see which sites dominate the citation set.
tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.title_zh: 引用目标最多的域名及各自的引用次数，可据此了解哪些站点在引用集中占主导。

tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.desc_en: Breakdown of emotional reactions (e.g. anger, happiness, love, sadness, share, fun) tied to the citations, with the citation count per sentiment.
tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.title_zh: 与引用相关的情绪反应分布（如 anger、happiness、love、sadness、share、fun），并给出每种情绪的引用次数。

tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.desc_en: Breakdown of sentiment polarity (positive, negative, neutral) tied to the citations, with the citation count per type.
tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.title_zh: 与引用相关的情感极性分布（positive、negative、neutral），并给出每种类型的引用次数。

tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.desc_en: Text categories detected in the citations with the citation count in each; resolve category codes via the Categories endpoint.
tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.title_zh: 在引用中识别出的文本分类及各分类的引用次数；分类代码可通过 Categories 接口解析。

tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.desc_en: Page categories of the citing pages with the citation count in each; resolve category codes via the Categories endpoint.
tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.title_zh: 引用页面的页面分类及各分类的引用次数；分类代码可通过 Categories 接口解析。

tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.desc_en: Distribution of citations across page types (e.g. ecommerce, news, blogs, message-boards, organization), with the count per type.
tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.title_zh: 引用按页面类型的分布（如 ecommerce、news、blogs、message-boards、organization），并给出每类的计数。

tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.desc_en: Distribution of citations by country with the citation count per country; resolve country codes via the Locations endpoint.
tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.title_zh: 引用按国家的分布及每个国家的引用次数；国家代码可通过 Locations 接口解析。

tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.desc_en: Distribution of citations by language with the citation count per language; resolve language codes via the Languages endpoint.
tasks.result.positive_connotation_distri.title_zh: 引用按语言的分布及每种语言的引用次数；语言代码可通过 Languages 接口解析。

tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.desc_en: Citations grouped by emotional reaction (anger, happiness, love, sadness, share, fun), each group carrying its own full metric breakdown.
tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.title_zh: 按情绪反应（anger、happiness、love、sadness、share、fun）分组的引用，每组各自携带完整的指标拆解。

tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.desc_en: One sentiment bucket; the dynamic key is one of anger, happiness, love, sadness, share, or fun, and the object holds that bucket's metrics.
tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.title_zh: 单个情绪分桶；动态键名为 anger、happiness、love、sadness、share 或 fun 之一，对象内为该分桶的指标。

tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.desc_en: Element type marker for this bucket's metrics; fixed value `content_analysis_summary`.
tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.title_zh: 该分桶指标的元素类型标记；固定值 `content_analysis_summary`。

tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.desc_en: Total number of relevant citations in this bucket.
tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.title_zh: 该分桶内相关引用的总数。

tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.desc_en: Normalized sum of the ranks of all relevant URLs in this bucket.
tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.title_zh: 该分桶内全部相关 URL 排名的归一化求和。

tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.desc_en: Top domains citing the target, each with its citation count, so you can see which sites dominate the citation set.
tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.title_zh: 引用目标最多的域名及各自的引用次数，可据此了解哪些站点在引用集中占主导。

tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.desc_en: Breakdown of emotional reactions (e.g. anger, happiness, love, sadness, share, fun) tied to the citations, with the citation count per sentiment.
tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.title_zh: 与引用相关的情绪反应分布（如 anger、happiness、love、sadness、share、fun），并给出每种情绪的引用次数。

tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.desc_en: Breakdown of sentiment polarity (positive, negative, neutral) tied to the citations, with the citation count per type.
tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.title_zh: 与引用相关的情感极性分布（positive、negative、neutral），并给出每种类型的引用次数。

tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.desc_en: Text categories detected in the citations with the citation count in each; resolve category codes via the Categories endpoint.
tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.title_zh: 在引用中识别出的文本分类及各分类的引用次数；分类代码可通过 Categories 接口解析。

tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.desc_en: Page categories of the citing pages with the citation count in each; resolve category codes via the Categories endpoint.
tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.title_zh: 引用页面的页面分类及各分类的引用次数；分类代码可通过 Categories 接口解析。

tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.desc_en: Distribution of citations across page types (e.g. ecommerce, news, blogs, message-boards, organization), with the count per type.
tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.title_zh: 引用按页面类型的分布（如 ecommerce、news、blogs、message-boards、organization），并给出每类的计数。

tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.desc_en: Distribution of citations by country with the citation count per country; resolve country codes via the Locations endpoint.
tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.title_zh: 引用按国家的分布及每个国家的引用次数；国家代码可通过 Locations 接口解析。

tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.desc_en: Distribution of citations by language with the citation count per language; resolve language codes via the Languages endpoint.
tasks.result.sentiment_connotation_distr.title_zh: 引用按语言的分布及每种语言的引用次数；语言代码可通过 Languages 接口解析。

keyword.desc_en: Target keyword whose citations you want (UTF-8, lowercased on the server). To match an exact phrase rather than a standalone keyword, wrap it in escaped double quotes.
keyword.title_zh: 你想查询其引用的目标关键词（UTF-8，服务端会转为小写）。若要匹配精确短语而非独立关键词，请用转义双引号包裹。

keyword_fields.desc_en: Restrict matching to keywords that specific content fields must contain (e.g. title, main_title, previous_title); keys are field names and values are the keywords to require.
keyword_fields.title_zh: 将匹配限定为特定内容字段必须包含的关键词（如 title、main_title、previous_title）；键为字段名，值为要求包含的关键词。

page_type.desc_en: Restrict results to these page types. Possible values: "ecommerce", "news", "blogs", "message-boards", "organization".
page_type.title_zh: 将结果限定为这些页面类型。可能取值："ecommerce"、"news"、"blogs"、"message-boards"、"organization"。

internal_list_limit.desc_en: Single cap applied to internal arrays (e.g. countries, languages, content_languages, keywords); when set, it overrides the per-level internal limits.
internal_list_limit.title_zh: 对内部数组（如 countries、languages、content_languages、keywords）统一施加的上限；设置后会覆盖各级 internal 限制。

positive_connotation_threshold.desc_en: Probability threshold for positive sentiment; setting it filters which citations contribute to the connotation_types breakdown.
positive_connotation_threshold.title_zh: 正向情感的概率阈值；设置后会筛选哪些引用计入 connotation_types 拆解。

sentiments_connotation_threshold.desc_en: Probability threshold for sentiment connotations; setting it filters which citations contribute to the sentiment_connotations breakdown.
sentiments_connotation_threshold.title_zh: 情绪连结的概率阈值；设置后会筛选哪些引用计入 sentiment_connotations 拆解。

initial_dataset_filters.desc_en: Filters applied to the underlying Search dataset before trend/summary aggregation (up to 8), combined with and/or logical operators.
initial_dataset_filters.title_zh: 在趋势/汇总聚合前对底层 Search 数据集施加的过滤条件（最多 8 条），以 and/or 逻辑运算符组合。

rank_scale.desc_en: Scale used to present rank values; choose whether ranks are reported on a 0-100 or 0-1000 scale.
rank_scale.title_zh: 用于呈现排名值的刻度；可选择以 0-100 或 0-1000 刻度报告排名。

tag.desc_en: Your own task label (up to 255 characters) echoed back in the response's `tasks.data`, useful for matching results to requests.
tag.title_zh: 你自定义的任务标签（最多 255 字符），会在响应的 `tasks.data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求对应。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response; useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
version.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本；便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

status_code.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole call. `20000` means the call succeeded; any other value signals a request-level failure that occurred before per-task processing.
status_code.title_zh: 整次调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用成功；其他值代表在进入单任务处理前就发生的请求级失败。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message paired with `status_code`; read it to learn the cause when `status_code` is not a success value.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时据此定位原因。

time.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD; free listing endpoints (languages/locations/filters/categories/technologies) return 0.
cost.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；languages/locations/filters/categories/technologies 等免费列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: How many entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `tasks.status_code`.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `tasks.status_code`。

tasks.desc_en: Array holding the individual task results of this call; the Live endpoints submit one task per call, so expect a single entry.
tasks.title_zh: 承载本次调用各任务结果的数组；Live 接口每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

tasks.id.desc_en: UUID identifying this task within DataForSEO's system; use it to correlate the result with your request.
tasks.id.title_zh: 该任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的 UUID 标识；可用于将结果与请求对应。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000). `20000` means the task completed successfully; other values indicate this specific task failed.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单任务状态码（范围 10000-60000）。`20000` 表示该任务成功完成；其他值表示此任务失败。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

tasks.time.desc_en: Execution time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 该单任务的执行耗时，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `tasks.result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `tasks.result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API path segments that were called, echoing how the request was routed.
tasks.path.title_zh: 本次调用的 API 路径分段，回显请求的路由方式。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted in the POST request body, useful for correlating the response with its input.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你在 POST 请求体中提交的参数，便于将响应与其输入对应。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array carrying this task's result records; the fields below describe one record.
tasks.result.title_zh: 承载该任务结果记录的数组；下列字段描述其中单条记录。

tasks.result.type.desc_en: Element type marker for the record; fixed value `content_analysis_summary`.
tasks.result.type.title_zh: 记录的元素类型标记；固定值 `content_analysis_summary`。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of records in the database matching your request, which may exceed the number actually returned.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中匹配你请求的记录总数，可能多于实际返回的条数。

tasks.result.rank.desc_en: Normalized sum of the ranks of all URLs citing the keyword; a higher value reflects stronger overall authority of the citing pages.
tasks.result.rank.title_zh: 引用该关键词的所有 URL 排名的归一化求和；值越高表示引用页面整体权威性越强。

tasks.result.top_domains.desc_en: Top domains citing the target, each with its citation count, so you can see which sites dominate the citation set.
tasks.result.top_domains.title_zh: 引用目标最多的域名及各自的引用次数，可据此了解哪些站点在引用集中占主导。

tasks.result.sentiment_connotations.desc_en: Breakdown of emotional reactions (e.g. anger, happiness, love, sadness, share, fun) tied to the citations, with the citation count per sentiment.
tasks.result.sentiment_connotations.title_zh: 与引用相关的情绪反应分布（如 anger、happiness、love、sadness、share、fun），并给出每种情绪的引用次数。

tasks.result.connotation_types.desc_en: Breakdown of sentiment polarity (positive, negative, neutral) tied to the citations, with the citation count per type.
tasks.result.connotation_types.title_zh: 与引用相关的情感极性分布（positive、negative、neutral），并给出每种类型的引用次数。

tasks.result.text_categories.desc_en: Text categories detected in the citations with the citation count in each; resolve category codes via the Categories endpoint.
tasks.result.text_categories.title_zh: 在引用中识别出的文本分类及各分类的引用次数；分类代码可通过 Categories 接口解析。

tasks.result.page_categories.desc_en: Page categories of the citing pages with the citation count in each; resolve category codes via the Categories endpoint.
tasks.result.page_categories.title_zh: 引用页面的页面分类及各分类的引用次数；分类代码可通过 Categories 接口解析。

tasks.result.page_types.desc_en: Distribution of citations across page types (e.g. ecommerce, news, blogs, message-boards, organization), with the count per type.
tasks.result.page_types.title_zh: 引用按页面类型的分布（如 ecommerce、news、blogs、message-boards、organization），并给出每类的计数。

tasks.result.countries.desc_en: Distribution of citations by country with the citation count per country; resolve country codes via the Locations endpoint.
tasks.result.countries.title_zh: 引用按国家的分布及每个国家的引用次数；国家代码可通过 Locations 接口解析。

tasks.result.languages.desc_en: Distribution of citations by language with the citation count per language; resolve language codes via the Languages endpoint.
tasks.result.languages.title_zh: 引用按语言的分布及每种语言的引用次数；语言代码可通过 Languages 接口解析。
